prompts.title: 00后整顿职场爆笑反转剧
prompts.prompt:
反转式喜剧，真实电影高清质感，抖音短视频爆款，2人出镜

人物：小哥@图片1（00后觉醒打工人）、老妹很温柔@图片2（爱喂鸡汤的老板/HR）

场景1：公司办公区，傍晚（光线稍暗，暗示下班时间）

- 小哥：背着双肩包，正准备打卡下班

- 老妹很温柔：手里拿着两份厚厚的文件，拦住小哥的去路

镜头&台词&音效：

1. 近景：老妹很温柔语重心长：“小伙子，现在的年轻人不要总想着准点下班。你要有主人翁意识，要把公司当成自己的家，知道吗？”

2. 近景：小哥看着文件，愣了一下：“把公司……当成自己的家？”

3. 近景：老妹很温柔重重点头，眼神充满鼓励和PUA的意味：“对！当成自己的家！去吧！”

4. 全景：小哥接过文件，若有所思地看着老妹很温柔，随后眼神变得清澈且坚定：“好嘞老板！我悟了！”

镜头转场

场景2：公司办公区，第二天上午

- 小哥：穿着极其随意的真丝睡衣，脚踩塑料拖鞋

- 老妹很温柔：穿着精致职业装，刚推开办公室大门，瞬间石化

镜头&台词&音效：

1. 特写：老妹很温柔推开门的瞬间，眼睛瞪得像铜铃，配乌鸦飞过或防空警报音效。

2. 全景：办公桌被推到一边，小哥正瘫坐在工位上，脚泡在一个红色的塑料洗脚盆里。电脑屏幕上没在工作，而是在放着动画片。桌上还摆着一盘瓜子。

3. 近景：小哥听到开门声，慵懒地转过头，一边嗑瓜子一边往地上吐瓜子皮。

4. 全景：小哥非常自然且不耐烦地冲着老妹很温柔喊话：“愣着干啥？既然回来了，去把地扫了！顺便下楼给我买包烟！没看我正忙着呢吗！”配极其嚣张的Hip-Hop或Thug Life BGM。

prompts.prompt_en:
Reverse comedy, realistic movie high-definition texture, TikTok viral short video style, 2 people in frame.

Characters: Bro @Image1 (Gen Z awakened worker), Gentle Sister @Image2 (Boss/HR who loves feeding chicken soup/inspirational speeches).

Scene 1: Company office area, dusk (light slightly dim, implying after work hours).
- Bro: Wearing a backpack, preparing to clock off.
- Gentle Sister: Holding two thick documents, blocking Bro's path.

Shots & Lines & Sound Effects:
1. Close-up: Gentle Sister speaks earnestly: "Young man, young people nowadays shouldn't always think about leaving on time. You need to have a sense of ownership, treat the company as your own home, understand?"
2. Close-up: Bro looks at the documents, stunned: "Treat the company... as my own home?"
3. Close-up: Gentle Sister nods heavily, eyes full of encouragement and PUA implications: "Yes! Treat it as your own home! Go for it!"
4. Wide shot: Bro takes the documents, looking at Gentle Sister thoughtfully, then his eyes become clear and determined: "Alright Boss! I'm enlightened!"

Scene Transition.

Scene 2: Company office area, the next morning.
- Bro: Wearing extremely casual silk pajamas, stepping on plastic slippers.
- Gentle Sister: Wearing exquisite professional attire, just pushed open the office door, instantly petrified.

Shots & Lines & Sound Effects:
1. Close-up: The moment Gentle Sister pushes the door open, eyes wide as copper bells, accompanied by crows flying or air raid siren sound effects.
2. Wide shot: The desk has been pushed aside, Bro is slumping in his workstation, feet soaking in a red plastic foot basin. The computer screen is not working but playing cartoons. A plate of sunflower seeds is on the table.
3. Close-up: Bro hears the door open, turns his head lazily, spitting sunflower seed shells on the floor while eating.
4. Wide shot: Bro shouts at Gentle Sister very naturally and impatiently: "What are you staring at? Since you're back, go sweep the floor! By the way, go downstairs and buy me a pack of cigarettes! Can't you see I'm busy?!" Accompanied by extremely arrogant Hip-Hop or Thug Life BGM.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 12 秒 10 套女性铠甲变装秀
prompts.prompt:
@图片1 12秒完成10套世界女性铠甲变装，全程不戴眼镜、全套铠甲头盔+武器、纯女性将领造型，转场均带辉光粒子特效，风格统一高级、真实、震撼，各时段画面：

0-1秒： 中国红金明光铠+鎏金战盔，持鎏金长枪，抬手抚肩吞兽，金甲流光、身姿挺拔，东方女战神气场拉满

1-2秒： 日本战国女武者铠甲+鹿角胴丸头盔，持武士刀，转身甩披风扫镜，甲片层叠精致，冷艳凌厉、杀气十足

2-3秒： 欧洲中世纪女骑士全身板甲+十字面罩盔，持骑士长剑，手挡镜头移开完成变装，银甲寒光凛冽，庄严强势

3-4秒： 古罗马女统帅肌肉胸甲+红缨军团头盔，持短剑与圆盾，拢臂变装，金属护肩与披风飞扬，威严果断、统帅感极强

4-5秒： 北欧维京女战士皮毛铁甲+符文战盔，持战斧与圆盾，低头整理护腕再抬头完成变装，野性冷峻、压迫感十足

5-6秒： 波斯萨珊风女将鳞甲+宝石链甲头冠，持弯刀，转身回正完成变装，甲面细密华贵，异域王族与女将气质并存

6-7秒： 蒙古草原女战将皮甲铁片铠+羽饰战盔，持复合弓与箭，扶额甲变装，动作利落迅猛，英姿飒爽、机动感极强

7-8秒： 印度王朝女战士鎏金花纹护甲+珠链王冠战盔，持长矛，提披风轻放完成变装，华丽神秘、贵气逼人又不失杀伐气

8-9秒： 阿拉伯女统帅月纹链甲+面纱式金属头饰，持弯月刀，手遮镜头移开完成变装，神秘高贵、目光凌厉，异域史诗感强烈

9-10秒： 斯巴达女战士青铜战甲+马鬃头盔，持长矛与圆盾，甩披风挡身完成变装，体态挺拔，力量感爆发，战场压迫感拉满

10-11秒： 幻想帝国女王重装铠甲+冠冕式龙纹头盔，持王权巨剑，侧身挡镜完成变装，黑金重甲层层叠覆，宛如终极女王降临

11-12秒： 转体甩披风，最终回归中国红金明光铠+鎏金战盔+鎏金长枪，金辉炸裂中站定，镜头定格，东方女战神最终封神

prompts.prompt_en:
@image one
Completed in 12 seconds: 10 sets of world female armor transformations. No glasses worn throughout. Full armor, helmets + weapons. Pure female general styling. All transitions feature glowing particle effects. Uniformly high-end, realistic, and shocking style. Scene breakdown by time:
0-1s: Chinese red-gold bright armor with gilded battle helmet, holding a gilded spear. Raises hand to touch the shoulder beast ornament. Golden armor flows with light, posture upright. Full aura of an Eastern female war god.
1-2s: Japanese Sengoku female warrior armor with antler domaru helmet, holding a katana. Turns and flicks the cloak across the screen. Exquisitely layered armor plates. Cold, sharp, and full of killing intent.
2-3s: European medieval female knight full plate armor with cross visor helmet, holding a knight’s long sword. Blocks the camera with hand and moves it away to complete transformation. Silver armor glints coldly, solemn and powerful.
3-4s: Ancient Roman female commander muscle cuirass with red-tasseled legion helmet, holding a short sword and round shield. Arms fold to transform. Metal spaulders and cloak flutter. Dignified, decisive, with strong commanding presence.
4-5s: Norse Viking female warrior fur and iron armor with runic battle helmet, holding battle axe and round shield. Lowers head to adjust bracers then raises head to finish transformation. Wild, stern, and full of oppressive aura.
5-6s: Persian Sasanian-style female general scale armor with gem-encrusted chainmail crown, holding a scimitar. Turns and faces forward to complete transformation. Fine and luxurious armor surface, blending exotic royal and female general temperament.
6-7s: Mongolian grassland female warrior leather and iron plate armor with feathered battle helmet, holding composite bow and arrows. Adjusts forehead armor to transform. Crisp and swift movements. Heroic, valiant, and highly mobile.
7-8s: Indian dynasty female warrior gilded patterned armor with beaded crown helmet, holding a long spear. Lifts and gently places cloak to complete transformation. Gorgeous, mysterious, noble, and without losing murderous aura.
8-9s: Arabian female commander moon-patterned chainmail with veil-style metal headpiece, holding a crescent sword. Covers camera with hand then moves it away to transform. Mysterious, noble, sharp-eyed, with strong exotic epic vibe.
9-10s: Spartan female warrior bronze armor with horse mane helmet, holding spear and round shield. Flicks cloak to cover body and complete transformation. Upright physique, explosive power, full battlefield oppression.
10-11s: Fantasy Empire queen heavy armor with crown-style dragon-patterned helmet, holding royal giant sword. Turns sideways to block camera and complete transformation. Layered black-gold heavy armor, like the ultimate queen descending.
11-12s: Spins and flicks cloak, finally returning to Chinese red-gold bright armor + gilded battle helmet + gilded spear. Stands still amid exploding golden radiance. Camera freezes. Eastern female war god ultimately apotheosized.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 1975拉达克山脉的反重力飞舟奇观
prompts.prompt: 在1975年崎岖的拉达克山脉高处，印度工程师利用新发现的昵称为“沙克蒂石”的反重力矿物。在隐秘的造船厂中，他们建造漂浮船舰，融合了喜马拉雅建筑设计与先进的悬浮技术。来自平原的朝圣者、不明飞行物观察者和量子物理学家纷纷到来，各怀动机：从精神修行到军事力量。一排僧侣在静默沉思中注视着。空灵的诵经声与呼呼的机械噪音交融，构建出一种期待感。
prompts.prompt_zh: 在1975年崎岖的拉达克山脉高处，印度工程师利用新发现的昵称为“沙克蒂石”的反重力矿物。在隐秘的造船厂中，他们建造漂浮船舰，融合了喜马拉雅建筑设计与先进的悬浮技术。来自平原的朝圣者、不明飞行物观察者和量子物理学家纷纷到来，各怀动机：从精神修行到军事力量。一排僧侣在静默沉思中注视着。空灵的诵经声与呼呼的机械噪音交融，构建出一种期待感。
prompts.prompt_en: High in the rugged 1975 Ladakh mountains, Indian engineers harness newly discovered anti-gravity minerals nicknamed “Shakti Stones.” In hidden shipyards, they construct floating vessels that fuse Himalayan architectural design with advanced levitation. Pilgrims from the plains, UFO spotters, and quantum physicists come, each with a motive: from spiritual journeys to militaristic power. A line of monks watches in silent contemplation. Ethereal chanting merges with whirring mechanical noises, building anticipation.
prompts.author: @drashyakuruwa

prompts.title: 80年代电影质感怪奇物语全员超能力爆发
prompts.prompt: 电影质感的1980年代黑暗奇幻群像镜头，怪奇物语小队身处废弃实验室，同时释放独特的超能力（蓝色电流、红色等离子体、念力控制的碎石碎片、发光的眼睛），带有35毫米胶片颗粒、变形宽银幕眩光和体积红色烟雾。

prompts.title: 90年代写实风格OVA动画作画
prompts.prompt: 1990年代OVA动画写实风格（Production I.G + 大友克洋），日本全彩，清晰纤细的原画线条，克制的赛璐珞阴影 + 柔和的渐变，微妙的胶片颗粒，锐利的阴影，高对比度边缘光。24帧超快作画剪辑，涂抹帧 + 冲击帧，轻微运动模糊

prompts.title: AI 焕活清代工笔东林红雨
prompts.prompt: Seedance2.0 以 AI 技术，让清代宫廷工笔设色《东林红雨》灵动复苏。 仲秋枣林、稚童嬉闹，动态还原古画笔墨神韵与市井童真， 用现代科技唤醒传统国风艺术，感受百年工笔画的鲜活魅力。
prompts.prompt_zh: Seedance2.0 以 AI 技术，让清代宫廷工笔设色《东林红雨》灵动复苏。 仲秋枣林、稚童嬉闹，动态还原古画笔墨神韵与市井童真， 用现代科技唤醒传统国风艺术，感受百年工笔画的鲜活魅力。
prompts.prompt_en: Seedance 2.0 uses AI technology to vividly revive the Qing Dynasty court Gongbi color painting "Donglin Hongyu". Mid-autumn jujube forest, children playing and frolicking, dynamically restoring the spirit of ancient painting brushwork and the childlike innocence of the marketplace, using modern technology to awaken traditional Chinese style art, feeling the vivid charm of centuries-old Gongbi painting.
prompts.author: @forrestbit

prompts.title: JoJo风格高速连打与慢动作特写镜头
prompts.prompt: 画面中的两个男人，正在进行像《JoJo》的欧拉欧拉连打那样带有残影的超高速拳击互殴，最后戴面具的男人的拳头抓住了穿西装的男人的脸颊，穿西装的男人像火箭一样被吹飞到后方，倒在地上失去意识。镜头在两人互殴期间高速旋转环绕两人，展现出充满魄力的搏斗，对戴面具的男人最后击中穿西装的男人脸颊的一拳进行慢动作特写，在穿西装的男人被击飞到后方的瞬间恢复到通常速度。
prompts.prompt_zh: 画面中的两个男人，正在进行像《JoJo》的欧拉欧拉连打那样带有残影的超高速拳击互殴，最后戴面具的男人的拳头抓住了穿西装的男人的脸颊，穿西装的男人像火箭一样被吹飞到后方，倒在地上失去意识。镜头在两人互殴期间高速旋转环绕两人，展现出充满魄力的搏斗，对戴面具的男人最后击中穿西装的男人脸颊的一拳进行慢动作特写，在穿西装的男人被击飞到后方的瞬间恢复到通常速度。
prompts.prompt_en: 画像の二人の男が、ジョジョのオラオララッシュのような残像が入るような超高速パンチで打ち合い、最後に仮面の男のパンチがスーツの男の頬を捉え、スーツの男が後方にロケットのように吹き飛ばされ地面に倒れ気を失う。カメラは二人がパンチの打ち合い中は二人のまわりを高速で回転して迫力のある打ち合いを映し、仮面の男の最後のパンチがスーツの男の頬を捉えるパンチをスローモーションで注目し、スーツの男が後方に飛ばされる瞬間に通常の速度に戻る
prompts.author: @akazomesirou

prompts.title: K-pop女团酷飒舞蹈动感光影秀
prompts.prompt:
[
  主体
]：参考所上传照片中的女性，
换上K-pop舞台风格服装。人物面部参考@【@图1】上身米白色镂空针织短款长袖罩衫，
内搭肤色抹胸，
高腰复古蓝色牛仔短裤配豹纹毛绒边缘，
深色皮质腰带挂棕色爱心毛绒挂件。气质温婉中带着力量感，
五官精致清晰，
面部稳定不变形，
同一角色一致性。 [
  动作
]：一镜到底连贯舞蹈，
专业编舞质感。从双脚开立与肩同宽开始，
核心始终收紧。第一拍：右脚向旁迈一大步，
重心压低，
同时右手从头顶向斜下方"劈"出，
左手扶胯，
头随右手方向甩；第二拍：快速收回右脚，
胯部做八字绕环，
双手在胸前交叉后向两侧"炸"开；第三拍：左脚向后撤步，
身体后仰做wave，
双手从头顶向后"捋"头发；第四拍：重心前移成弓步，
右手向前"指"镜头，
左手向后拉，
形成对角线张力。全程动作有延伸感，
手指尖和脚尖都有方向，
不是软绵绵的摆动。 [
  场景
]：时尚简洁的室内舞台背景，
暖色侧光勾勒身体线条，
地面有轻微镜面反射，
电影级景深虚化背景。 [
  运镜
]：中景镜头，
Smooth Orbit缓慢环绕主体，
保持人物始终在画面中心，
模拟专业舞台直拍。 [
  风格/画质
]：4K超高清，
电影质感，
消除翻拍噪点，
锐度清晰，
细节丰富，
色彩自然真实，
无闪烁，
动作流畅无掉帧。 [
  约束
]：人体结构正常，
动作有发力点和延伸感，
面部特征高度还原原图，
画面稳定流畅，
禁止动作像摆pose或做广播体操。

prompts.title: KIRI引擎未来科技感宣传视频
prompts.prompt: 一个为移动端3D扫描应用KIRI Engine制作的未来主义宣传视频。一个人正在使用智能手机扫描现实世界中的物体。当他们完成时，成千上万个发光粒子涌现，并将物体重建成一个精细的3D Gaussian Splatting模型。模型悬浮在空中，发出柔和的光芒。它过渡到不同的创意工作流中：• 一个游戏世界 🎮 • 一个3D软件界面 🧊 • 一个虚拟展览 📷 最终镜头：KIRI Engine标志出现。屏幕上的文字：“Turn reality into digital” 电影感，未来主义，高科技，体积光，写实风格
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个为移动端3D扫描应用KIRI Engine制作的未来主义宣传视频。一个人正在使用智能手机扫描现实世界中的物体。当他们完成时，成千上万个发光粒子涌现，并将物体重建成一个精细的3D Gaussian Splatting模型。模型悬浮在空中，发出柔和的光芒。它过渡到不同的创意工作流中：• 一个游戏世界 🎮 • 一个3D软件界面 🧊 • 一个虚拟展览 📷 最终镜头：KIRI Engine标志出现。屏幕上的文字：“Turn reality into digital” 电影感，未来主义，高科技，体积光，写实风格
prompts.prompt_en: A futuristic promotional video for KIRI Engine, a mobile 3D scanning app. A person scans a real-world object using their smartphone. As they finish, thousands of glowing particles emerge and reconstruct the object into a detailed 3D Gaussian Splatting model. The model floats in space, glowing softly. It transitions into different creative workflows: • a game world 🎮 • a 3D software interface 🧊 • a virtual exhibition 📷 Final shot: KIRI Engine logo appears. Text on screen: “Turn reality into digital” cinematic, futuristic, high-tech, volumetric lighting, realistic
prompts.author: @KIRI_Engine_App

prompts.title: KTV包厢里的霓虹撩人时刻
prompts.prompt: 昏暗暧昧的 KTV 包厢里，紫蓝霓虹激光灯在空气中流转闪烁。 一位年轻漂亮的亚洲女生慵懒靠在黑色皮沙发上，乌黑长发柔顺垂肩，身穿黑色露肩亮片针织衫，颈间精致细链衬得锁骨格外迷人。 她先是侧头看向一旁，再缓缓转头望向镜头，眼波温柔带媚，嘴角扬起甜又勾人的撒娇笑，轻声开口： “哎呀，我好看吗～” 镜头顺着她的身形温柔下移，定格在她修长纤细的双腿上。 她正慵懒地脱下一只银色满钻尖头高跟鞋，一只脚已赤足轻踩在反光地板上，动作随性又撩人，姿态松弛妩媚。 真实光影质感，高清画质，氛围感拉满，妩媚又不低俗。
prompts.prompt_zh: 昏暗暧昧的 KTV 包厢里，紫蓝霓虹激光灯在空气中流转闪烁。 一位年轻漂亮的亚洲女生慵懒靠在黑色皮沙发上，乌黑长发柔顺垂肩，身穿黑色露肩亮片针织衫，颈间精致细链衬得锁骨格外迷人。 她先是侧头看向一旁，再缓缓转头望向镜头，眼波温柔带媚，嘴角扬起甜又勾人的撒娇笑，轻声开口： “哎呀，我好看吗～” 镜头顺着她的身形温柔下移，定格在她修长纤细的双腿上。 她正慵懒地脱下一只银色满钻尖头高跟鞋，一只脚已赤足轻踩在反光地板上，动作随性又撩人，姿态松弛妩媚。 真实光影质感，高清画质，氛围感拉满，妩媚又不低俗。
prompts.prompt_en: In a dim and ambiguous KTV private room, purple and blue neon laser lights flow and twinkle in the air. A young and beautiful Asian girl leans lazily on a black leather sofa, with raven long hair softly draping over her shoulders, wearing a black off-shoulder sequined knit top, an exquisite thin chain around her neck making her collarbones look particularly captivating. She first turns her head to look aside, then slowly turns to gaze at the lens, eyes gentle and charming, corners of the mouth raising in a sweet and alluring coquettish smile, speaking softly: "Oh my, do I look good?". The camera moves gently down along her figure, freezing on her slender and delicate legs. She is lazily taking off a silver full-diamond pointed high heel, one foot already bare and lightly stepping on the reflective floor, the movement is casual and teasing, the posture is relaxed and enchanting. Realistic light and shadow texture, high definition quality, atmosphere maxed out, charming yet not vulgar.
prompts.author: @wuleihenbang

prompts.title: Kpop女团风针织衫牛仔热舞直拍
prompts.prompt: [主体]: 参考所上传照片中的女性, 换上K-pop舞台风格服装。上身穿着米白色镂空针织短款长袖罩衫, 内搭肤色抹胸, 露出纤细腰肢。下身穿着高腰复古蓝色牛仔短裤, 短裤边缘镶嵌有性感的豹纹毛绒装饰。腰间系一条深色皮质腰带, 腰带一侧挂着一个棕色的爱心形状毛绒挂件, 气质温婉清纯, 五官精致清晰, 面部稳定不变形, 同一角色一致性. prompts.prompt_en: [Subject]: Female based on the uploaded photo, changing into K-pop stage style outfit. Wearing an off-white hollow-out knitted short-sleeve crop top, with a beige tube top underneath, revealing a slender waist. Wearing high-waisted vintage blue denim shorts, with sexy leopard print plush decoration on the edges. A dark leather belt tied around the waist, with a brown heart-shaped plush pendant hanging on one side of the belt, gentle and pure temperament, exquisite and clear facial features, stable face without deformation, consistent character. [Action]: Dancing to a light rhythm, hands naturally raised in front of the chest making various gestures, including a heart-shaped gesture, body naturally grooving and swaying with the beat, slow and coherent, movements smooth and silky without stiffness. [Scene]: Fashionable and simple indoor stage background, warm side light and backlight outlining the character's edges, cinematic depth of field blurring the background. [Camera]: Medium shot, lens slowly pushing in and remaining stable, simulating a professional gimbal follow shot, smooth picture without shaking. [Style/Quality]: 4K Ultra HD, cinematic texture, removed copy noise, sharp clarity, rich details, natural and realistic colors, no flickering. [Constraints]: Normal human body structure, no action jumping, facial features highly restored to the original image, stable and smooth picture.

prompts.title: iPhone 15 Pro 钛金属特效展示
prompts.prompt:
一台iPhone手机，有灵动岛，开头显示的是正面，显示时间为9:41。

三个画面，是镜头逐渐拉近手机主体的三个不连续画面，每次拉近中心点都是屏幕上方的药丸型黑色灵动岛，在第三个画面结束时，视角进入这块药丸型黑色灵动的，随后，整个画面变成黑色。

在这一片黑色中，从底部缓慢升起一台金属边框的三个摄像头的iPhone，十分精美。随后，这台iPhone突然消失，留下一阵烟，和一串白色发光字体：Titanium，然后这串白色发光字体变成：iPhone 15 Pro。
prompts.prompt_zh:
一台iPhone手机，有灵动岛，开头显示的是正面，显示时间为9:41。

三个画面，是镜头逐渐拉近手机主体的三个不连续画面，每次拉近中心点都是屏幕上方的药丸型黑色灵动岛，在第三个画面结束时，视角进入这块药丸型黑色灵动的，随后，整个画面变成黑色。

在这一片黑色中，从底部缓慢升起一台金属边框的三个摄像头的iPhone，十分精美。随后，这台iPhone突然消失，留下一阵烟，和一串白色发光字体：Titanium，然后这串白色发光字体变成：iPhone 15 Pro。
prompts.prompt_en: An iPhone with a Dynamic Island, starting with a front view, displaying the time 9:41. Three shots, showing three discontinuous scenes of the camera gradually zooming in on the phone subject, with the center point of each zoom being the pill-shaped black Dynamic Island at the top of the screen. At the end of the third shot, the perspective enters this pill-shaped black Dynamic Island, and subsequently, the entire screen turns black. In this expanse of black, an iPhone with a metal frame and three cameras slowly rises from the bottom, looking extremely exquisite. Subsequently, this iPhone suddenly disappears, leaving behind a puff of smoke and a string of white glowing text: Titanium, and then this string of white glowing text transforms into: iPhone 15 Pro.
prompts.author: @liyue_ai

prompts.title: 一分钟极速美妆变身挑战
prompts.prompt: 视频主题 (Video Theme): 快节奏一分钟化妆挑战 (Fast-Paced One Minute Makeup Challenge) 核心创意 (Core Idea): 制作一个时长约为10 秒的竖屏美妆短视频。视频的核心概念是“一分钟化妆挑战”，屏幕上有一个从01:00开始的倒计时器。视频需要清晰地展示从素颜到完妆的每一个关键步骤，并配上文字标签，但整体节奏比原视频更快，转场之间几乎没有停顿，营造出一种流畅而高效的“加速”感。 视觉风格与参数 (Visual Style & Parameters): • 镜头 (Shot): 固定机位的胸上特写 (Medium close-up)，竖屏格式 (9:16)。 • 灯光 (Lighting): 明亮、干净的影棚布光。 • 背景 (Background): 简约的纯色渐变背景。 • 节奏 (Pacing): 明快、紧凑。每个化妆步骤的过渡迅速但清晰可辨，保留了原视频的“节奏感”。 • 图形元素 (Graphics): • 一个从01:00开始的白色数字倒计时器，在视频总时长内匀速倒数至00:00。 • 每个化妆步骤出现时，屏幕上会叠加简洁的中英双语文字标签（例如：“粉底和遮瑕膏 / Foundation and Concealer”）。 关键帧与流程描述 (Keyframes & Flow Description): 视频流程与原视频保持一致，但每一步的持续时间都相应缩短： 1. 开场: 素颜出镜，屏幕显示标题“一分钟化妆”和从01:00开始倒数的计时器。 2. 底妆: “粉底和遮瑕膏”效果瞬间出现，皮肤变得无瑕。 3. 塑形: 紧接着，“提亮”、“晕染”、“散粉”效果依次快速出现，面部轮廓变得立体。 4. 眼妆: “眼影”、“眼线和睫毛膏”效果快速叠加，完成眼部妆容。 5. 颊彩与唇妆: “腮红”和“口红/唇蜜”效果出现，提升气色。 6. 发型与配饰: “你忘了卷头发”文字出现，头发瞬间变为蓬松长卷发。紧接着，华丽的珠宝配饰瞬间佩戴完成。 7. 结尾定格: 在计时器归零时，以完整的华丽造型自信地凝视镜头，作为结尾。

prompts.prompt_en:
Video Theme: Fast-Paced One Minute Makeup Challenge
Core Idea: Create a vertical beauty short video with a duration of approximately 10 seconds. The core concept of the video is "One Minute Makeup Challenge," with a countdown timer starting from 01:00 displayed on the screen. The video needs to clearly show every key step from bare face to finished makeup, accompanied by text labels, but the overall pace is faster than the original video, with almost no pause between transitions, creating a smooth and efficient "accelerated" feel.
Visual Style & Parameters:
• Shot: Fixed camera Medium close-up, vertical format (9:16).
• Lighting: Bright, clean studio lighting.
• Background: Simple solid color gradient background.
• Pacing: Brisk, compact. The transition of each makeup step is rapid but clearly distinguishable, retaining the "rhythm" of the original video.
• Graphics:
• A white digital countdown timer starting from 01:00, counting down uniformly within the total duration of the video to 00:00.
• When each makeup step appears, concise bilingual Chinese and English text labels will be superimposed on the screen (e.g., "Foundation and Concealer / Foundation and Concealer").
Keyframes & Flow Description: The video flow remains consistent with the original video, but the duration of each step is shortened accordingly:
1. Opening: Bare face appearance, the screen displays the title "One Minute Makeup" and a timer counting down from 01:00.
2. Base Makeup: "Foundation and Concealer" effect appears instantly, skin becomes flawless.
3. Contouring: Immediately afterwards, "Highlight", "Blend", and "Loose Powder" effects appear in sequence, making facial contours three-dimensional.
4. Eye Makeup: "Eyeshadow", "Eyeliner and Mascara" effects stack quickly, completing the eye makeup.
5. Cheek & Lip: "Blush" and "Lipstick/Lip Gloss" effects appear, enhancing complexion.
6. Hairstyle & Accessories: The text "You forgot to curl hair" appears, and the hair instantly changes to fluffy long curly hair. Immediately afterwards, gorgeous jewelry accessories are instantly worn.
7. Ending Freeze: When the timer reaches zero, look confidently at the lens with a complete gorgeous look as the ending.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 万人体育馆女企业家激情演讲
prompts.prompt: 15 秒励志商业演讲短视频，4K 超清，电影级运镜，暖金 + 暗蓝高级舞台灯光；30 岁左右女企业家，身着质感黑色丝绒西装外套 + 米白色丝绸衬衫 + 黑色长裤，佩戴精美耳环、项链、戒指、手镯等珠宝首饰，双臂交叉姿态，面部光滑无痘印、皮肤白皙透亮，淡舞台妆面，整体优雅成熟商务风格；场景为万人体育馆中央舞台，背景灰色，搭配简约大气的渐变光效大屏，无杂乱特效；人物气场全开全程脱稿激情演讲，语气铿锵顿挫、贴合文案节奏层层递进，3 秒切近景抓握拳振臂的坚毅神态；精准念出台词：你还别不信，在你越来越好的时候，你就会刷到我，既然刷到我了，就跟我一起念一句，我的 2026 会越来越好，就会真的非常好；讲到 “2026 会越来越好，就会真的非常好” 时抬手振臂做强调动作；镜头穿插台下万人观众握拳附和、热泪盈眶的特写，观众同步起身欢呼、鼓掌呐喊；结尾 3 秒镜头拉远定格舞台全景＋万人观众高举手臂欢呼的震撼画面；背景音乐为激昂史诗级纯音乐，音量贴合人声不突兀，现场掌声、欢呼声环绕立体声拉满，氛围感拉满。

prompts.prompt_en: 15-second inspirational business speech short video, 4K ultra-clear, cinematic camera movement, warm gold + dark blue high-end stage lighting; about 30-year-old female entrepreneur, wearing textured black velvet blazer + off-white silk shirt + black trousers, wearing exquisite earrings, necklace, ring, bracelet and other jewelry, arms crossed posture, smooth face without acne marks, fair and translucent skin, light stage makeup, overall elegant mature business style; scene is the center stage of a 10,000-person stadium, grey background, paired with simple and atmospheric gradient light effect big screen, no messy special effects; character with full aura, passionate speech without script throughout, sonorous and cadenced tone, progressive layer by layer fitting the copywriting rhythm, 3 seconds cut to close-up of fist clenching and arm raising with determined expression; accurately reciting lines: You better believe it, when you are getting better and better, you will see me, since you have seen me, say with me, my 2026 will get better and better, and it will really be very good; when saying "2026 will get better and better, and it will really be very good" raise hand and wave arm to make an emphasis action; lens interspersed with close-ups of 10,000 audience members below the stage clenching fists in agreement, tears in eyes, audience standing up simultaneously cheering, applauding and shouting; ending 3 seconds lens pulls away to freeze the stage panorama + 10,000 audience members raising arms high cheering shocking picture; background music is passionate epic pure music, volume fits human voice not abrupt, live applause, cheers surround stereo sound maxed out, atmosphere maxed out.

prompts.title: 上古花神创世之舞的震撼瞬间
prompts.prompt:
人物设定 
东方花仙少女，鹅蛋脸、冷白皮、柳叶眉、桃花眼，神情清冷空灵，自带上古花神神性气场。
 
身着粉白极光鎏金仙神礼裙：
 
主体珠光粉→月光白→极光银三层渐变流光仙纱，层叠如云海花瓣，裙摆绣满活态永生花灵纹，自带微光流转
双肩繁花镂空银晶肩饰，镶嵌粉钻与流光碎晶，垂落多层半透圣光长纱
双臂纯白流光广袖，延伸出上百条粉白渐变繁花飘带、蝶翼纱带、银蕊光带，缀满发光粉晶花、灵蝶碎饰，一动即漫天流光
腰束繁花鎏金仙封腰饰，垂落多层花瓣裙摆，行走间如花海翻涌
配饰：银底粉晶繁花垂坠耳饰、多层珍珠花神颈链、花神戒指、流光花镯，周身环绕粉紫柔光神霭
 
场景与画质
 少女端坐于万丈巨型粉白渐变仙花蕊王座，花蕊层层绽放泛着神性柔光；整体粉白+紫调冷色，梦幻空灵。
浅景深、极致丁达尔圣光、朦胧泛光虚化、超写实8K电影级画质，发丝级细节、光影层次炸裂、明暗对比强烈、动态模糊运镜、色彩浓郁高级。
 
全程震撼分镜（视频/AI直接可用）
 
全程空灵神性史诗BGM，弦乐+圣咏+花灵轻响。
 
1. 少女端坐花蕊中央，清冷抬眸，指尖凝出一点粉紫金花神灵光。
2. 屈指轻弹向天一点，镜头冲天——横贯天际的万丈巨型创世神花轰然绽放，遮天蔽日，霞光炸裂。
3. 镜头极速拉回，少女清冷浅笑，抬手轻挥，数十道粉白光流直冲九霄。
4. 整片苍穹亿万朵巨型神花瞬间铺满，接连爆炸式绽放，粉紫神光倾泻天地。
5. 少女化作贯穿天地的粉色极光流光直冲天际，镜头极限高速推进。
6. 她在云端花海踏出上古花神创世神舞，旋身、踏空、扬袖，飘带舒展如神翼。
7. 高速运镜、环绕、俯冲、特写切换，亿万神花同步爆绽，花瓣狂舞、光粒炸裂，与神舞梦幻交织。
8. 终极特写：清冷含笑眉眼，指尖流淌花神灵力，天地被花海吞没，神性定格。
 
音效与特效
 
音效：史诗BGM+巨型花绽轰鸣+花灵清响+空间震颤+流光破空声
特效：创世级花海、花瓣爆炸、神光倾泻、空间涟漪、灵蝶流光
运镜：极速推拉、环绕俯冲、高空俯拍、贴脸特写、高光慢动作
 。

6. 她在云端花海踏出上古花神创世神舞，旋身、踏空、扬袖，飘带舒展如神翼。
7. 高速运镜、环绕、俯冲、特写切换，亿万神花同步爆绽，花瓣狂舞、光粒炸裂，与神舞梦幻交织。
8. 终极特写：清冷含笑眉眼，指尖流淌花神灵力，天地被花海吞没，神性定格。
 
音效与特效
 
音效：史诗BGM+巨型花绽轰鸣+花灵清响+空间震颤+流光破空声
特效：创世级花海、花瓣爆炸、神光倾泻、空间涟漪、灵蝶流光
运镜：极速推拉、环绕俯冲、高空俯拍、贴脸特写、高光慢动作
 。
prompts.prompt_en:
Character Setting
Eastern Flower Fairy Girl, oval face, cool white skin, willow leaf eyebrows, peach blossom eyes, expression cold and ethereal, possessing a divine aura of an ancient Flower God.

Wearing a pink and white aurora gilded celestial goddess dress:
Main body pearlescent pink → moonlight white → aurora silver three-layer gradient flowing celestial gauze, layered like a sea of clouds and petals, skirt hem embroidered with living eternal flower spirit patterns, with shimmering flowing light.
Shoulders adorned with intricate hollow silver crystal shoulder ornaments, inlaid with pink diamonds and flowing light crystals, cascading multiple layers of semi-transparent holy light long gauze.
Arms in pure white flowing light wide sleeves, extending over a hundred pink-white gradient floral ribbons, butterfly wing gauze ribbons, silver stamen light ribbons, studded with glowing pink crystal flowers and spirit butterfly fragments, moving to fill the sky with flowing light.
Waist tied with a floral gilded celestial seal waist ornament, cascading multiple layers of petal skirt hems, walking like a surging sea of flowers.
Accessories: silver-based pink crystal floral chandelier earrings, multi-layer pearl flower goddess necklace, flower goddess ring, flowing light flower bracelet, surrounded by pink-purple soft light divine mist.

Scene and Quality
The girl sits upright on a towering giant pink-white gradient celestial flower stamen throne, the stamens blooming layer by layer emitting a divine soft glow; overall pink-white + purple cool tone, dreamy and ethereal.
Shallow depth of field, extreme Tyndall holy light, hazy halo blurring, hyper-realistic 8K cinematic quality, hair-level details, explosive light and shadow layers, strong chiaroscuro, dynamic motion blur camera movement, rich and premium colors.

Shocking Storyboards Throughout (Video/AI Directly Usable)
Ethereal divine epic BGM throughout, strings + chant + flower spirit light sounds.

1. Girl sits in the center of the flower stamen, looking up coldly, fingertips condensing a point of pink-purple-gold flower god spiritual light.
2. Flicks finger lightly towards the sky, camera rushes to the sky—a towering giant creation god flower spanning the sky blooms with a roar, covering the sky and sun, rosy light exploding.
3. Camera pulls back at extreme speed, girl smiles coldly, waves hand lightly, dozens of pink-white light streams rush straight to the nine heavens.
4. Billions of giant god flowers instantly fill the entire sky, blooming in explosive succession, pink-purple divine light pouring down on heaven and earth.
5. Girl transforms into a pink aurora flowing light piercing the sky, camera advances at extreme high speed.
6. She steps out an ancient flower god creation divine dance in the sea of clouds and flowers, spinning, stepping on air, raising sleeves, ribbons spreading like divine wings.
7. High-speed camera movement, circling, diving, close-up switching, billions of god flowers blooming synchronously, petals dancing wildly, light particles exploding, dreamily interweaving with the divine dance.
8. Ultimate close-up: cold smiling eyes, flower god spiritual power flowing from fingertips, heaven and earth swallowed by the sea of flowers, divine freeze-frame.

Sound Effects and Special Effects
Sound effects: Epic BGM + giant flower blooming roar + flower spirit clear sounds + space trembling + flowing light breaking through the sky sound.
Special effects: Creation-level sea of flowers, petal explosions, divine light pouring down, space ripples, spirit butterfly flowing light.
Camera movement: Extreme speed push-pull, circling dive, high-altitude overhead shot, close-up face shot, highlight slow motion.
prompts.author: @liyue_ai

prompts.title: 不列颠之战惊险激烈的云端缠斗
prompts.prompt: 三架英国皇家空军的喷火战斗机在英格兰多云的天空中以紧密编队快速向前飞行， 螺旋桨急速旋转，形成动态模糊。 突然，德国梅塞施密特战斗机从云层上方猛烈俯冲而下， 以陡峭的角度下降，引擎发出尖啸。 喷火战斗机编队瞬间瓦解， 每架飞机都急剧转向不同的方向。 一架喷火战斗机剧烈翻滚以躲避攻击， 进行了一个紧凑的桶滚， 机枪持续开火， 曳光弹在天空中划出明亮的轨迹。 一架梅塞施密特战斗机机翼直接中弹， 立即冒出浓烟， 飞机失控地向下盘旋， 旋转速度越来越快， 引擎罩猛烈地喷出火焰， 飞机迅速坠向地面。 另一架喷火战斗机猛烈追击一架梅塞施密特战斗机， 两架飞机在云层中戏剧性地穿梭， 突然冲出云层进入晴空， 一起陡峭俯冲，紧追不舍。 云朵在整场战斗中雄伟地飘动， 飞机在水汽中不断出现和消失。 凝结尾迹在蓝天中划出美丽的线条，标记着飞行路径。 镜头从一架喷火战斗机驾驶舱内部开始，透过座舱盖向前看， 紧密跟随一架飞机的特技机动， 然后平稳地切换到缠斗飞机后方的外部追逐视角， 镜头动态地匹配它们的翻滚和转弯， 最后迅速拉回至广阔的空中全景， 戏剧性地展现了多架飞机在广阔天空中激战的场面。

prompts.prompt_en: Three Royal Air Force Spitfire fighters flying fast forward in tight formation in the cloudy skies of England, propellers spinning rapidly, creating motion blur. Suddenly, German Messerschmitt fighters dive fiercely from above the clouds, descending at a steep angle, engines screaming. The Spitfire formation instantly disintegrates, each plane turning sharply in a different direction. One Spitfire rolls violently to evade attack, performing a tight barrel roll, machine guns firing continuously, tracer rounds drawing bright trajectories in the sky. A Messerschmitt fighter takes a direct hit on the wing, immediately emitting thick smoke, the plane spiraling down out of control, spinning faster and faster, flames bursting violently from the engine cowling, the plane rapidly crashing towards the ground. Another Spitfire fiercely pursues a Messerschmitt, two planes weaving dramatically through the clouds, suddenly rushing out of the clouds into clear sky, diving steeply together, chasing closely. Clouds drift majestically throughout the battle, planes constantly appearing and disappearing in the water vapor. Contrails draw beautiful lines in the blue sky, marking the flight path. The camera starts from inside a Spitfire cockpit, looking forward through the canopy, closely following an aircraft's aerobatic maneuvers, then smoothly switches to an external chase view behind the dogfighting planes, the camera dynamically matching their rolls and turns, finally quickly pulling back to a wide aerial panorama, dramatically showcasing the scene of multiple planes fighting fiercely in the vast sky.

prompts.title: 东京街头极速狂飙与霓虹幻影
prompts.prompt: 镜头1 驾驶舱内特写，一名30多岁的男性车手紧握着低矮赛车的麂皮方向盘。他全神贯注，太阳穴上有汗水，仅由蓝色的仪表盘LED灯和外部经过的霓虹反射光照亮。东京的城市灯光在挡风玻璃上闪烁。镜头缓慢推近，锁定他在后视镜中强烈的凝视。镜头2 侧面轮廓中景，从副驾驶座视角拍摄。车手利落地换挡，外部的霓虹灯招牌在他的脸上划过清晰的倒影。城市飞驰而过——水坑在轮胎下飞溅。当他身体前倾、眯起眼睛时，镜头随之摇摄。镜头3 外部低角度后方镜头，当他猛踩NOS按钮时，汽车的尾灯骤然亮起。蓝色的火焰从排气管喷涌而出。汽车向前发射，消失在发光的东京街道中。镜头在后方跟拍，灯光模糊，引擎的轰鸣声在远处回荡。
prompts.prompt_zh: 镜头1 驾驶舱内特写，一名30多岁的男性车手紧握着低矮赛车的麂皮方向盘。他全神贯注，太阳穴上有汗水，仅由蓝色的仪表盘LED灯和外部经过的霓虹反射光照亮。东京的城市灯光在挡风玻璃上闪烁。镜头缓慢推近，锁定他在后视镜中强烈的凝视。镜头2 侧面轮廓中景，从副驾驶座视角拍摄。车手利落地换挡，外部的霓虹灯招牌在他的脸上划过清晰的倒影。城市飞驰而过——水坑在轮胎下飞溅。当他身体前倾、眯起眼睛时，镜头随之摇摄。镜头3 外部低角度后方镜头，当他猛踩NOS按钮时，汽车的尾灯骤然亮起。蓝色的火焰从排气管喷涌而出。汽车向前发射，消失在发光的东京街道中。镜头在后方跟拍，灯光模糊，引擎的轰鸣声在远处回荡。
prompts.prompt_en: SHOT1 Close-up inside the cockpit, a male driver in his 30s grips the suede steering wheel of a low-slung race car. He’s focused, sweat on his temple, lit only by blue dashboard LEDs and passing neon reflections from outside. Tokyo’s city lights flicker across the windshield. Camera slowly pushes in, locked on his intense gaze through the rearview mirror. SHOT2 Side profile mid shot, from the passenger seat view. The driver shifts gears with a snap, neon signage from outside streaks across his face in sharp reflections. The city races by — puddles splash under the tires. Camera pans with him as he leans forward, eyes narrowing. SHOT3 Exterior low rear shot, the car’s tail lights flare as he slams the NOS button. Blue flames erupt from the exhaust. The car launches forward, disappearing into the glowing Tokyo streets. Camera tracks behind, lights blurring, engine scream echoing in the distance.

prompts.title: 东北大姨爆炒外星异兽
prompts.prompt:
[
  格式
] 15s | 9:16竖屏 | 东北乡村美食vlog × 异星猎奇ASMR [
  视觉基调
] 零滤镜纪实摄影，
单盏荧光灯顶光硬打，
高对比刺眼白光。手持DV晃动感，
跳切间隔不超过1.5秒，
全片呼吸感极快极紧凑。色彩锚点：厨房的油腻铁锈黄与外星生物的荧光蓝绿紫形成强烈视觉冲突。 [
  SHOT 1
] 0.0s-1.5s | 入场 机位：手持跟拍摇摄，
从门口跟到案板 动作：一个身材魁梧的40岁东北女性大步迈进昏暗杂乱的乡村厨房。肩上扛着一只异形节肢生物——体长近一米，
甲壳表面覆盖不规则的荧光蓝绿鳞片，
六条带倒钩的蟹状肢体自然下垂，
尾部末端有透明的扇形尾鳍还在微微颤动。她哐一下把它掼上厚木案板。镜头剧烈震颤。 声音：沉重脚步 → 甲壳撞击木板的闷响 [
  SHOT 2
] 1.5s-2.5s | 生物特写 机位：案板俯拍微距，
极浅景深 动作：跳切。生物静躺在案板上的超近距离特写。甲壳纹理如陨石表面布满坑洞和脊突，
缝隙间渗出荧光蓝绿色粘稠液体，
腹部是半透明的淡紫色软质膜，
隐约可见内部纤维状结构在荧光灯下微微折射。一只蟹肢突然抽搐弹了一下。 声音：湿润的黏液气泡声 [
  SHOT 3
] 2.5s-4.0s | 开壳 机位：侧面中景，
刀锋入画 动作：跳切。女人面无表情抄起厚重菜刀，
刀背对准甲壳中线，
啪——一记重击精准劈开。甲壳沿中线裂成两半，
蓝绿色荧光汁液瞬间迸溅在案板和围裙上。内部露出层叠的橙黄色肉质纤维，
质感如同巨型帝王蟹腿肉但带着诡异的荧光边缘。 声音：甲壳断裂的清脆炸响 + 汁液溅出的噗呲声 [
  SHOT 4
] 4.0s-5.0s | 蒜与料 机位：案板特写俯拍 动作：跳切。拳头入画一锤——整头大蒜炸裂压扁。菜刀平面一扫归拢。抓一把干辣椒扔进碗里。节奏极快，
每个动作不超过0.5秒。 声音：蒜皮炸裂噼啪 + 辣椒落碗的簌簌声 [
  SHOT 5
] 5.0s-6.5s | 切肉 机位：案板侧面近景跟焦 动作：跳切。女人将裂开的外星甲壳肉取出铺在案板上，
菜刀快速连续剁切，
咚咚咚咚咚节奏如鼓点。橙黄色肉块在刀下整齐分离，
每一刀切面都渗出一层薄薄的荧光蓝膜。 声音：高速连续剁切的密集咚咚声 [
  SHOT 6
] 6.5s-9.0s | 爆炒 机位：铁锅后方低角度仰拍 → 正上方俯拍跳切 动作：跳切。滚烫铁锅已在炉灶上冒烟。女人一盆荧光食材哗啦倒入——巨大的油爆蒸汽柱瞬间冲天吞没整个画面。跳切至正上方俯拍：食材在铁锅中翻腾跳跃，
蓝绿荧光与红辣椒和热油的金黄色交织翻滚，
女人单手颠锅食材腾空翻转。 声音：爆炸性滋滋声 → 铁锅颠勺的铛铛声 → 食材落回锅中的啪嗒声 [
  SHOT 7
] 9.0s-10.5s | 出锅 机位：桌面固定机位 动作：跳切。搪瓷大盆咣当砸上木桌。成品特写：外星食材炒至金黄酥脆，
表面焦香微焦，
辣椒段和蒜片点缀其间，
残余的荧光蓝绿色在焦黄表面若隐若现，
热气蒸腾。 声音：搪瓷撞桌铛响 + 滋滋余温声 [
  SHOT 8
] 10.5s-15.0s | 吃 机位：正面中景固定 → 嘴部特写跳切 动作：女人直接坐在案板旁的矮凳上，
一手端盆一手抄起筷子。夹起一大块金黄酥脆的外星肉塞进嘴里，
大口咀嚼，
嘴角溢出一丝荧光蓝绿汁液。跳切嘴部特写：牙齿咬穿酥脆外壳的瞬间，
内部弹嫩的橙色肉质纤维被扯断拉丝。她边嚼边满意地哼了一声，
含混不清地对着镜头说了句什么，
嘴角微微上扬。再夹一块，
塞嘴里，
腮帮子鼓起来。最后一帧定格在她鼓着嘴、眼神直视镜头、略带得意的表情上。 声音：筷子敲盆边的叮当 → 酥壳咬碎的咔嚓声 → 大口咀嚼的丰满咀嚼音 → 满足的含混哼声 [
  全片音频原则
] 绝对零配乐。100%原始放大环境音+食物ASMR。每一帧声音都服务于"吃"的本能冲击力。

隐约可见内部纤维状结构在荧光灯下微微折射。一只蟹肢突然抽搐弹了一下。 声音：湿润的黏液气泡声 [
  SHOT 3
] 2.5s-4.0s | 开壳 机位：侧面中景，
刀锋入画 动作：跳切。女人面无表情抄起厚重菜刀，
刀背对准甲壳中线，
啪——一记重击精准劈开。甲壳沿中线裂成两半，
蓝绿色荧光汁液瞬间迸溅在案板和围裙上。内部露出层叠的橙黄色肉质纤维，
质感如同巨型帝王蟹腿肉但带着诡异的荧光边缘。 声音：甲壳断裂的清脆炸响 + 汁液溅出的噗呲声 [
  SHOT 4
] 4.0s-5.0s | 蒜与料 机位：案板特写俯拍 动作：跳切。拳头入画一锤——整头大蒜炸裂压扁。菜刀平面一扫归拢。抓一把干辣椒扔进碗里。节奏极快，
每个动作不超过0.5秒。 声音：蒜皮炸裂噼啪 + 辣椒落碗的簌簌声 [
  SHOT 5
] 5.0s-6.5s | 切肉 机位：案板侧面近景跟焦 动作：跳切。女人将裂开的外星甲壳肉取出铺在案板上，
菜刀快速连续剁切，
咚咚咚咚咚节奏如鼓点。橙黄色肉块在刀下整齐分离，
每一刀切面都渗出一层薄薄的荧光蓝膜。 声音：高速连续剁切的密集咚咚声 [
  SHOT 6
] 6.5s-9.0s | 爆炒 机位：铁锅后方低角度仰拍 → 正上方俯拍跳切 动作：跳切。滚烫铁锅已在炉灶上冒烟。女人一盆荧光食材哗啦倒入——巨大的油爆蒸汽柱瞬间冲天吞没整个画面。跳切至正上方俯拍：食材在铁锅中翻腾跳跃，
蓝绿荧光与红辣椒和热油的金黄色交织翻滚，
女人单手颠锅食材腾空翻转。 声音：爆炸性滋滋声 → 铁锅颠勺的铛铛声 → 食材落回锅中的啪嗒声 [
  SHOT 7
] 9.0s-10.5s | 出锅 机位：桌面固定机位 动作：跳切。搪瓷大盆咣当砸上木桌。成品特写：外星食材炒至金黄酥脆，
表面焦香微焦，
辣椒段和蒜片点缀其间，
残余的荧光蓝绿色在焦黄表面若隐若现，
热气蒸腾。 声音：搪瓷撞桌铛响 + 滋滋余温声 [
  SHOT 8
] 10.5s-15.0s | 吃 机位：正面中景固定 → 嘴部特写跳切 动作：女人直接坐在案板旁的矮凳上，
一手端盆一手抄起筷子。夹起一大块金黄酥脆的外星肉塞进嘴里，
大口咀嚼，
嘴角溢出一丝荧光蓝绿汁液。跳切嘴部特写：牙齿咬穿酥脆外壳的瞬间，
内部弹嫩的橙色肉质纤维被扯断拉丝。她边嚼边满意地哼了一声，
含混不清地对着镜头说了句什么，
嘴角微微上扬。再夹一块，
塞嘴里，
腮帮子鼓起来。最后一帧定格在她鼓着嘴、眼神直视镜头、略带得意的表情上。 声音：筷子敲盆边的叮当 → 酥壳咬碎的咔嚓声 → 大口咀嚼的丰满咀嚼音 → 满足的含混哼声 [
  全片音频原则
] 绝对零配乐。100%原始放大环境音+食物ASMR。每一帧声音都服务于"吃"的本能冲击力。

prompts.title: 东北甜妹喊麦夜巴黎
prompts.prompt:
【风格】抖音/快手竖屏(TikTok Portrait 9:16)，高端网红直播间(High-end Livestream Studio)，赛博朋克霓虹光，4K画质，东北喊麦慢摇风(Dongbei MC Slow Roll)，节奏感极强。
【时长】15秒
【BGM设定】《夜巴黎》DJ慢摇版。
【角色】
1. 主角：东北甜妹（Northeast Sweet Girl），长相极度甜美可爱（双马尾/大眼睛），但穿搭是“甜酷风”（粉色毛绒外套+紧身吊带），戴着巨大的水钻耳机，手持专业电容麦。
2. 配角：两名黑衣小弟（Backups），戴着墨镜，面无表情，站在甜妹身后左右两侧，像保镖一样酷。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：甜妹起范儿(The Intro)。
画面：灯光聚焦在甜妹脸上。她对着镜头甜甜地笑了一下，然后瞬间眼神变得犀利（进入喊麦状态）。
动作：她随着“动次打次”的重低音节奏，单手压着耳机，身体开始有韵律地左右慢摇（Swaying）。
背景：身后两个黑衣小弟神同步地开始点头、晃肩膀，动作整齐划一，压迫感十足。
【氛围】高端、迷离、纸醉金迷。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：夜巴黎高潮(The Climax)。
画面：直播间背景的大屏幕上打出绚丽的霓虹字“夜巴黎(Night Paris)”和埃菲尔铁塔的激光投影。
动作：甜妹双手握麦，表情陶醉且自信，身体大幅度跟着节奏摇摆。身后的两个小弟配合着做“摇手花”的动作，气氛拉满。
【视觉细节】空气中飘散着金色的彩带和香槟色的光斑，灯光随着节奏疯狂闪烁。

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：排面拉满(The Finale)。
画面：镜头稍微拉远，展示整个豪华直播间。
动作：甜妹对着镜头比了一个极其帅气的“开枪”手势（Wink）。身后的两个小弟同时从怀里掏出墨镜戴正，然后双手抱胸，酷到没朋友。
【特效】满屏的虚拟礼物特效（跑车、游艇）在甜妹周围炸开，画面定格在三人最酷的Pose上。

prompts.prompt_en:
[
  Style
] Douyin/Kuaishou Vertical Screen (TikTok Portrait 9:16),
High-end Livestream Studio,
Cyberpunk Neon Lights,
4K Resolution,
Dongbei MC Slow Roll,
Extremely Strong Rhythm. [
  Duration
] 15 seconds [
  BGM
] Night Paris DJ Slow Remix. [
  Characters
] Protagonist: Northeast Sweet Girl,
extremely sweet and cute (double ponytails / big eyes),
but dressed in "Sweet & Cool Style" (pink fluffy coat + tight camisole),
wearing oversized diamond-encrusted headphones,
holding a professional condenser microphone. Supporting Roles: Two Black-Clad Bodyguards (Backups),
wearing sunglasses,
expressionless,
standing on left and right behind the girl like cool bodyguards. [
  00:00-00:05
] Shot 1: The Intro Visual: Lights focus on the girl’s face. She smiles sweetly at the camera,
then instantly sharpens her eyes (entering MC mode). Movement: Following the heavy bass beat “boom-boom-clap”,
she presses one hand against her headphones and sways left and right rhythmically. Background: The two bodyguards behind nod and shake their shoulders in perfect sync,
full of imposing presence. [
  Atmosphere
] High-end,
blurred,
extravagant and glamorous. [
  00:05-00:10
] Shot 2: The Climax Visual: The big screen in the livestream background displays dazzling neon text “Night Paris” and laser projection of the Eiffel Tower. Movement: The girl holds the microphone with both hands,
looking intoxicated and confident,
swinging her body vigorously to the beat. The two bodyguards behind perform synchronized “hand flower” gestures,
fully hyping the atmosphere. [
  Visual Details
] Golden streamers and champagne-colored light spots float in the air; lights flash wildly with the rhythm. [
  00:10-00:15
] Shot 3: The Finale Visual: Camera pulls back slightly to show the entire luxurious livestream studio. Movement: The girl strikes an extremely cool “gun shooting” gesture at the camera (with a wink). The two bodyguards behind simultaneously take out sunglasses from their clothes,
put them on,
then cross their arms,
looking overwhelmingly cool. [
  Effects
] Full-screen virtual gift effects (sports cars,
yachts) explode around the girl. The frame freezes on the trio’s coolest pose.

prompts.title: 东方武侠宗师巅峰对决
prompts.prompt: 【风格】东方武侠巅峰对决，极致动能（Extreme Kinetic Energy），环境毁灭美学，快节奏剪辑，电影级粒子特效，史诗感配乐氛围。 【时长】15秒 【角色】白衣宗师 VS 黑衣宗师 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：极速碰撞（High-speed Collision）。 白衣与黑衣两人化作残影在古老石台中心猛烈对撞。兵器接触瞬间，爆发出耀眼的火星和肉眼可见的环形高压气浪（Shockwave），周围的石板地面瞬间龟裂、炸起碎石。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：空中激斗与环境毁灭（Mid-air Combat & Destruction）。 两人腾空，在坠落的巨石间高速穿梭交锋，快到看不清招式。每一次格挡都引发空气扭曲声效感。他们撞穿一根巨大的石柱，石柱崩塌粉碎，烟尘弥漫，展现极致破坏力。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：终极爆发（Ultimate Climax）。 两人落地同时释放绝招，两股巨大的能量团（一青一红）对轰。引发一场惊天动地的尘土与能量大爆炸，蘑菇云般的烟尘腾空遮蔽一切，整个石台基座开始崩塌陷落。

prompts.prompt_en: 【Style】Peak Oriental Wuxia Duel, Extreme Kinetic Energy, Environmental Destruction Aesthetics, Fast-paced Editing, Cinematic Particle Effects, Epic Music Atmosphere. 【Duration】15 seconds 【Characters】White-robed Grandmaster VS Black-robed Grandmaster [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: High-speed Collision. The white-robed and black-robed figures turn into afterimages and collide violently in the center of an ancient stone platform. The moment weapons touch, dazzling sparks and a visible ring-shaped high-pressure shockwave erupt. The surrounding stone slab floor instantly cracks and sends debris flying. [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Mid-air Combat & Environmental Destruction. Both leap into the air, weaving and attacking at high speed amidst falling giant boulders, moving too fast to see the moves clearly. Every parry triggers a sense of air distortion sound effects. They smash through a huge stone pillar; the pillar collapses and shatters, dust fills the air, demonstrating extreme destructive power. [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Ultimate Climax. Both land and release ultimate moves simultaneously. Two massive energy clusters (one cyan, one red) bombard each other. Triggering a world-shaking massive explosion of dust and energy, a mushroom cloud of smoke rises to obscure everything, and the entire stone platform base begins to collapse and sink.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 东方武侠巅峰宗师绝世对决

prompts.title: 东方水墨双瑞呈祥3D动画
prompts.prompt: 东方水墨美学分镜（新春双瑞・国风祥和）3D 动态水墨动画，融合国画泼彩与留白美学。以焦墨与朱砂红为核心视觉对比。画面诗意流畅、生机温润。运用水墨晕染、飞白笔触与渐变流动效果，全程祥和美好，展现时光悠然、万象更新的东方意境。 【场景】一幅徐徐展开的纯白宣纸，或天地间飘渺云海。背景是淡墨远山、青松与缭绕云雾，留白空灵、宁静深远。 【意象】 朱砂瑞马：朱砂红墨挥洒而成，马鬃如流动墨线，奔腾带飞白笔触，气韵生动，象征生机盎然、刚健向上。 绯红瑞羊：淡红水墨晕染凝聚，身形朦胧柔美，羊角如如意云纹，步伐轻盈，象征包容温润、宁静祥和。 【分镜脚本】[00:00-00:03] 镜头 1：落笔生花・瑞马启程机位：微距俯拍渐变推长镜头。动作：一滴朱砂红墨落在宣纸上，晕染如涟漪，顺势化作朱砂瑞马。骏马昂首从容，踏水墨云烟从画卷入 3D 空间，写意飘逸。 [00:03-00:06] 镜头 2：云间相伴・瑞羊现身机位：平滑横移跟拍。动作：瑞马在云端漫步，红色墨痕与云雾相融，淡红水墨凝聚成绯红瑞羊，踏云而行，脚下生水墨兰草与祥云。 [00:06-00:12] 镜头 3：双瑞和美・生机绽放机位：大远景，展现水墨画卷全貌。动作：瑞马与瑞羊相伴同行，红墨韵致流转浸润。枯笔草木抽枝发芽，绽放朱砂桃花，呈现万物生长、春意盎然之美。 [00:12-00:14] 镜头 4：万象更新・清雅意境机位：中景仰拍，焦点随花瓣飞舞。动作：墨韵化作轻柔花雨落下，双瑞融于天地红霞间。远山如洗，江水如镜，画面过渡为清新明快的青绿山水意境。 [00:14-00:15] 镜头 5：留白定格・吉祥收尾机位：静止定格，模拟画卷收尾。动作：动态水墨定格为一幅山水国画。画卷右上角留白处浮现红色方形印章，篆书 “万象更新”。一声空灵古琴音，画面渐淡出于纯白，余韵悠长。

prompts.prompt_en: Oriental ink wash aesthetic storyboard (New Year Double Auspiciousness - National Style Auspiciousness) 3D dynamic ink wash animation, integrating traditional Chinese painting splashed color and negative space aesthetics. Using burnt ink and cinnabar red as the core visual contrast. The picture is poetic and fluid, full of vitality and warmth. Utilizing ink wash blooming, flying white brushstrokes, and gradient flow effects, the entire process is auspicious and beautiful, showcasing the oriental artistic conception of leisurely time and the renewal of all things. 【Scene】A sheet of pure white rice paper slowly unfolding, or a misty sea of clouds between heaven and earth. The background features pale ink distant mountains, green pines, and lingering clouds and mist, with negative space creating an ethereal, quiet, and profound atmosphere. 【Imagery】Cinnabar Auspicious Horse: Created by splashing cinnabar red ink, the horse's mane is like flowing ink lines, galloping with flying white brushstrokes, full of vivid spiritual charm, symbolizing abundant vitality and vigorous upward momentum. Crimson Auspicious Sheep: Condensed from pale red ink wash blooming, the body shape is hazy and soft, the sheep's horns are like Ruyi cloud patterns, the steps are light, symbolizing tolerance, warmth, tranquility, and auspiciousness. 【Storyboard Script】[00:00-00:03] Shot 1: Blooming Brushstrokes - Auspicious Horse Starts the Journey. Camera: Macro high-angle shot with a gradient push-in long take. Action: A drop of cinnabar red ink falls on the rice paper, blooming like ripples, and smoothly transforms into a Cinnabar Auspicious Horse. The steed holds its head high and calmly, stepping on ink wash clouds and mist from the scroll into the 3D space, free and elegant. [00:03-00:06] Shot 2: Companions in the Clouds - Auspicious Sheep Appears. Camera: Smooth横向 tracking shot following the subject. Action: The auspicious horse walks among the clouds, red ink traces merge with the mist, pale red ink wash condenses into a Crimson Auspicious Sheep, walking on the clouds, with ink wash orchids and auspicious clouds growing beneath its feet. [00:06-00:12] Shot 3: Harmony of Double Auspiciousness - Vitality Blooms. Camera: Extreme long shot, revealing the full view of the ink wash scroll. Action: The auspicious horse and the auspicious sheep walk together, the charm of red ink flows and permeates. Dry brush vegetation sprouts branches and buds, blooming cinnabar peach blossoms, presenting the beauty of all things growing and spring being in the air. [00:12-00:14] Shot 4: Renewal of All Things - Elegant Artistic Conception. Camera: Medium shot looking up, focus follows the dancing petals. Action: Ink charm turns into a gentle rain of flowers falling, the two auspicious beasts merge into the red glow of heaven and earth. Distant mountains look washed, river water is like a mirror, the scene transitions into a fresh, bright, and lively blue-green landscape style. [00:14-00:15] Shot 5: Negative Space Freeze-frame - Auspicious Ending. Camera: Static freeze-frame, simulating the ending of a scroll. Action: The dynamic ink wash freezes into a traditional landscape painting. A red square seal emerges in the negative space in the top right corner of the scroll, with seal script characters "Renewal of All Things". A sound of ethereal Guqin, the scene fades out into pure white, leaving a lingering charm.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 东方玄幻道家太极流转高维美学
prompts.prompt: 东方玄幻道家美学视频提示词（太极流转·万法归宗版） 东方高维奇幻美学(Eastern High-Fantasy Daoist Aesthetics)，采用顶级电影级粒子CG与流体光影特效。强调“阴阳交融”、“符文共振”与“磅礴的祥瑞能量”。视觉基调：辉煌的赤金与耀眼的暖黄交织，画面充满神圣的道家法力与时空纵深感。 【场景与元素解析】 背景：无限延伸的金色虚空，隐约有云海翻腾。 核心：中央的太极阴阳鱼与八卦阵盘。 文字：立体的金色书法“道法”与四周悬浮的发光祝福语（如“天官赐福”、“时来运转”）。 【分镜脚本（12秒炫酷流转）】 [00:00-00:03] 镜头1：真气苏醒·太极初转 机位：微距平滑推进(Macro smooth push-in)。 动作：原本静态的画面瞬间被注入灵魂。背景的火焰纹理瞬间化为真实的、流动的金色“三昧真火”，缓缓燃烧。中央的太极阴阳鱼开始以一种玄妙的节奏顺时针旋转，黑白两极产生拉丝般的流体光影特效。 [00:04-00:08] 镜头2：八卦解构·符文升维 机位：环绕式立体跟拍(3D Orbiting shot)。 动作：随着太极转速加快，外围的八卦符号（乾、坤、震、巽等）从平面上脱离出来，悬浮在半空中，变成散发着耀眼金光的3D立体符文，围绕着太极阵眼上下翻飞、重组。上下方的巨大书法“道”、“法”爆发出强烈的丁达尔体积光(Volumetric lighting)，照亮整个虚空。 [00:08-00:10] 镜头3：祥瑞共振·万法齐鸣 机位：极速拉远广角(Rapid pull-back to wide angle)。 动作：太极八卦阵爆发出一道环形的金色能量涟漪，席卷全场。四周所有的祝福文字（“所求皆所愿”、“百无禁忌”、“时来运转”等）被能量激活，化作漫天飞舞的金色流光字体，犹如一场璀璨的流星雨在画面中穿梭交织，充满极致的视觉冲击力与吉利祥和的能量。 [00:10-00:12] 镜头4：万物归一·大道至简 机位：静止定格特写(Static freeze-frame with subtle breathing)。 动作：爆发的能量瞬间收敛。太极阵与八卦符文恢复平静的匀速自转，所有的文字静静悬浮在四周，散发着呼吸般的柔和微光。画面沉淀出一种“大道无形、岁月静好”的极高禅意，余韵悠长。

prompts.prompt_en: Eastern Fantasy Daoist Aesthetics Video Prompt (Tai Chi Circulation · Ten Thousand Dharmas Return to Origin Version) Eastern High-Fantasy Daoist Aesthetics, employing top-tier cinematic particle CG and fluid lighting effects. Emphasizing "blending of Yin and Yang", "rune resonance", and "majestic auspicious energy". Visual tone: Brilliant red-gold interwoven with dazzling warm yellow, the image filled with sacred Daoist magic power and a sense of depth in time and space. [Scene and Element Analysis] Background: Infinitely extending golden void, with faintly surging seas of clouds. Core: The central Tai Chi Yin-Yang fish and the Eight Trigrams (Bagua) array plate. Text: 3D golden calligraphy "Dao Fa" (Daoist Law) and glowing blessing phrases suspended around (such as "Heavenly Official Bestows Blessings", "Fortune Turns Favorable"). [Storyboard (12-second Cool Circulation)] [00:00-00:03] Shot 1: True Qi Awakening · Tai Chi Initial Rotation Camera: Macro smooth push-in. Action: The originally static image is instantly injected with a soul. The flame textures in the background instantly transform into real, flowing golden "Samadhi True Fire", burning slowly. The central Tai Chi Yin-Yang fish begins to rotate clockwise with a mysterious rhythm, with the black and white poles producing drawing-like fluid lighting effects. [00:04-00:08] Shot 2: Eight Trigrams Deconstruction · Rune Dimensional Ascension Camera: 3D Orbiting shot. Action: As the Tai Chi rotation speed increases, the surrounding Eight Trigrams symbols (Qian, Kun, Zhen, Xun, etc.) detach from the plane, suspended in mid-air, turning into 3D runes emitting dazzling golden light, flying up and down and reorganizing around the Tai Chi array eye. The huge calligraphy "Dao" and "Fa" above and below erupt with intense Tyndall volumetric lighting, illuminating the entire void. [00:08-00:10] Shot 3: Auspicious Resonance · Ten Thousand Dharmas Resound Camera: Rapid pull-back to wide angle. Action: The Tai Chi Eight Trigrams array erupts with a circular golden energy ripple, sweeping through the entire scene. All surrounding blessing texts ("May all wishes come true", "No taboos", "Fortune turns favorable", etc.) are activated by energy, transforming into golden flowing light fonts dancing all over the sky, shuttling and interweaving like a brilliant meteor shower in the image, filled with ultimate visual impact and auspicious peaceful energy. [00:10-00:12] Shot 4: All Things Return to One · Great Dao is Simple Camera: Static freeze-frame with subtle breathing. Action: The erupted energy instantly retracts. The Tai Chi array and Eight Trigrams runes return to calm uniform rotation, all text quietly suspended around, emitting breathing-like soft glimmer. The image settles into a high-level Zen state of "the Great Dao is formless, years are quiet and good", with a long-lasting lingering charm.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 主观视角下AI女友的暧昧挑逗
prompts.prompt: 镜头保持主观视角（POV），她笑着轻轻推了一下镜头，伴随着衣袖摩擦的细微`沙沙`声，语气带着半真半假的娇嗔：`哎呀……别拍我了嘛。` 随即，她放下了挡在镜头前的手，身体不再后退，反而主动前倾凑近镜头，直到精致的面孔占据了大半个画面。她眼里的笑意加深，直视着镜头，压低声音，语气变得暧昧且充满挑逗：`别拍了……我们来做点别的事吧？（停顿）毕竟……我是你生成的AI，你想对我干嘛……就可以干嘛呀。` 说完，她轻轻咬了一下下唇，呼吸声清晰可闻。背景中窗外的城市喧嚣被隔绝，只有室内安静暧昧的空气流动声。
prompts.prompt_zh: 镜头保持主观视角（POV），她笑着轻轻推了一下镜头，伴随着衣袖摩擦的细微`沙沙`声，语气带着半真半假的娇嗔：`哎呀……别拍我了嘛。` 随即，她放下了挡在镜头前的手，身体不再后退，反而主动前倾凑近镜头，直到精致的面孔占据了大半个画面。她眼里的笑意加深，直视着镜头，压低声音，语气变得暧昧且充满挑逗：`别拍了……我们来做点别的事吧？（停顿）毕竟……我是你生成的AI，你想对我干嘛……就可以干嘛呀。` 说完，她轻轻咬了一下下唇，呼吸声清晰可闻。背景中窗外的城市喧嚣被隔绝，只有室内安静暧昧的空气流动声。
prompts.prompt_en: The camera maintains a subjective perspective (POV), she smiles and gently pushes the lens, accompanied by the subtle "rustling" sound of sleeves rubbing, her tone carrying a half-truthful, half-joking coquettishness: "Oh my... stop filming me." Immediately afterwards, she puts down her hand blocking the front of the lens, her body no longer retreating, but instead actively leans forward to get close to the lens, until her exquisite face occupies most of the frame. The smile in her eyes deepens, looking directly at the lens, lowering her voice, her tone becoming ambiguous and full of teasing: "Stop filming... let's do something else? (Pause) After all... I am the AI you generated, what you want to do to me... you can just do it." After speaking, she gently bites her lower lip, her breathing clearly audible. In the background, the city noise outside the window is isolated, leaving only the sound of quiet, ambiguous air flowing indoors.
prompts.author: @Adam38363368936

prompts.title: 主观视角下的心动瞬间：周末窗前的暧昧邀约
prompts.prompt: 主体： 真实摄影风格，一位年轻漂亮的亚洲女性（面部参考 @）坐在高层建筑的飘窗前，黑色波浪头发，穿着非常宽松的白色衬衣，POV视角，女性用右手试图挡住镜头，脸上带着一抹浅浅的微笑，自然光线，细腻真实，有胶片颗粒感。 镜头保持主观视角（POV），她笑着轻轻推了一下镜头，伴随着衣袖摩擦的细微`沙沙`声，语气带着半真半假的娇嗔：“哎呀……别拍我了嘛。” 随即，她放下了挡在镜头前的手，身体不再后退，反而主动前倾凑近镜头，直到精致的面孔占据了大半个画面。她眼里的笑意加深，直视着镜头，稍微压低声音，“终于到周末了，要不要出去走走啊？”说完，她轻轻咬了一下下唇，呼吸声清晰可闻。背景中窗外的城市喧嚣被隔绝，只有室内安静暧昧的空气流动声。高清晰度，9：16。

prompts.prompt_en: Realistic photography style, a young and beautiful Asian woman (face reference @) sitting in front of a bay window in a high-rise building, black wavy hair, wearing a very loose white shirt, POV perspective, the woman uses her right hand to try to block the lens, with a faint smile on her face, natural light, delicate and realistic, film grain texture. The camera maintains a subjective perspective (POV), she smiles and gently pushes the lens, accompanied by the subtle "rustling" sound of sleeves rubbing, tone with a half-true, half-fake coquettishness: "Oh... stop taking pictures of me." Immediately, she put down the hand blocking the lens, her body no longer retreating, but instead leaned forward actively to get closer to the lens, until her exquisite face occupied most of the frame. The smile in her eyes deepened, looking straight into the lens, lowering her voice slightly, "It's finally the weekend, want to go out for a walk?" After speaking, she gently bit her lower lip, breathing clearly audible. In the background, the hustle and bustle of the city outside the window is isolated, only the sound of quiet and ambiguous air flowing indoors. High definition, 9:16.

prompts.title: 义乌商贸城直播清仓智能手表
prompts.prompt:
一个【时尚且充满活力】的美女【@图片1】（轻松活泼风格）手持展示着一款【全功能智能运动手表】【@图片2】，站在【义乌国际商贸城大门口】【@图片3】，背景可见繁华的商贸城入口和来往人流。她正以惊喜且充满激情的视频情绪，对着镜头热情地讲解着手中的智能手表： “家人（宝宝）们！我们是义乌源头智能穿戴厂家！今天老板娘发话了，要回家过年，全场清仓大降价！这款全功能高配智能运动手表，不仅能测心率、血氧，还自带GPS定位，高清彩屏，续航超长，真的是千元质感白菜价！今天真的是亏本清仓，抢到就是赚到！” 
要求： 音色： 使用开朗、热情、具有感染力的女声风格（类似电商直播主播）。 
视频情绪： 惊喜、兴奋、急迫（清仓感）。 数字人形象： 轻松活泼、着装时尚、肢体语言丰富。 
画面风格： 写实风（Photorealistic），高清，光线充足，完美还原义乌商贸城现场感。 
特定动作： 美女需要近距离将手表展示给镜头，另一只手做着清仓大甩卖的手势。

prompts.prompt_en:
A 【fashionable and energetic】beautiful woman【@图片1】（relaxed and lively style）holding and showcasing a 【fully functional smart sports watch】【@图片2】, standing at the 【main entrance of Yiwu International Trade City】【@图片3】, with the bustling trade city entrance and passing crowds visible in the background. She is passionately explaining the smart watch in her hand to the camera with a surprised and passionate video emotion: “Family (babies)! We are a Yiwu source smart wearable manufacturer! Today the boss lady has spoken, we are going home for the Chinese New Year, store-wide clearance and massive price drop! This fully functional high-spec smart sports watch not only measures heart rate and blood oxygen, but also comes with built-in GPS positioning, high-definition color screen, and ultra-long battery life, it truly has a thousand-yuan quality at a cabbage price! Today is really a loss-making clearance, grab it and you earn it!” 
Requirements: Voice tone: Use a cheerful, enthusiastic, and infectious female voice style (similar to an e-commerce live streamer). 
Video emotion: Surprise, excitement, urgency (clearance feel). Digital human image: Relaxed and lively, fashionably dressed, rich body language. 
Visual style: Photorealistic, high-definition, well-lit, perfectly restoring the on-site feel of Yiwu Trade City. 
Specific action: The beautiful woman needs to show the watch to the camera at close range, while the other hand makes a clearance sale gesture.
prompts.author: @Adam38363368936

prompts.title: 九宫格美少女打破边框的混乱互动
prompts.prompt: 【图片1】为首帧画面，12秒，3:4竖屏。 九宫格画面中九个女孩各自静止在自己的格子里。 第1-3秒：所有格子里的女孩开始微微活动，各自保持表情特征。突然左上角自拍格的女孩发现自己被困在格子里，用手推了推格子边框，表情从自信变成疑惑； 第4-7秒：她用力拍了一下右边的格子边框，这一拍的震动传递过去，中上格微笑的女孩被震得晃了一下，不满地看向左边。与此同时，左下角吐舌头的女孩从自己格子底部伸出一只手，越过边框线探进了正下方正中间大笑格的领地，从大笑女孩的画面下方冒出来挠了一下她的下巴，大笑格的女孩笑得更厉害了； 第8-12秒：场面彻底混乱，多个格子之间开始互动——右上角惊讶脸被右边格子里伸过来的手拍了一下肩膀吓得更惊讶了，中间嫌弃脸对着旁边伸过来的手一脸嫌弃地躲开，最后所有人都在跨格子互动推搡打闹，格子边框线被挤得歪歪扭扭变形。 全程九宫格构图，但格子边框会被互动动作推挤变形。禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印。

prompts.prompt_en: [Image 1] as the first frame, 12 seconds, 3:4 vertical screen. Nine girls in a nine-grid layout are each stationary in their own compartments. Seconds 1-3: The girls in all compartments begin to move slightly, each maintaining their facial characteristics. Suddenly, the girl in the top-left selfie compartment discovers that she is trapped in the compartment, pushes the compartment border with her hand, and her expression changes from confident to puzzled. Seconds 4-7: She slaps the right border of the compartment hard; the vibration of this slap transmits over, causing the smiling girl in the top-middle compartment to shake, looking to the left in dissatisfaction. At the same time, the girl sticking out her tongue in the bottom-left corner extends a hand from the bottom of her own compartment, crosses the border line to probe into the territory of the laughing girl directly in the middle below, emerges from the bottom of the laughing girl's frame to tickle her chin, and the girl in the laughing compartment laughs even more intensely. Seconds 8-12: The scene becomes completely chaotic, and interactions begin between multiple compartments—the surprised face in the top-right is patted on the shoulder by a hand extending from the compartment on the right and becomes even more surprised, the disgusted face in the middle avoids a hand extending from the side with a face full of disgust. Finally, everyone is engaging in cross-compartment interaction, pushing and shoving, and the compartment border lines are squeezed into crooked and deformed shapes. Full nine-grid composition throughout, but the compartment borders will be pushed and deformed by interaction movements. Prohibited: Any text, subtitles, LOGO, or watermarks.
prompts.author: @msjiaozhu

prompts.title: 九零港式股市崩盘
prompts.prompt:
【风格】
90年代香港电视剧风格(90s HK TV Drama Style)，复古胶片颗粒感(Vintage Film Grain)，高对比度暖黄色调(Warm Yellowish Tone)，广角镜头夸张透视，情绪极度歇斯底里，混乱、嘈杂、绝望。

【场景】
1990年代香港证券交易所大厅，满地废纸，电子屏一片惨绿（港股跌是绿色/或用红色表示危机，视生成模型理解，建议写"Plummeting Numbers"）。

【角色】
主角（The Speculator）：身穿90年代宽肩灰色西装，发型凌乱，满头大汗，眼神充满了血丝和疯狂，手里紧紧攥着一个“大哥大”手提电话(Brick Phone)。

【分镜详解】
[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：大崩盘·疯魔时刻
画面：广角怼脸特写。主角站在交易大厅中央，周围是模糊的奔跑和尖叫的人群。
动作：他对着“大哥大”声嘶力竭地怒吼，青筋暴起，唾沫横飞。
【台词/字幕】：“不要怕！技术性调整！给我加杠杆！”（疯魔感拉满）。
氛围：背景的电子显示屏数字疯狂跳动，红绿光影交错，营造出一种令人窒息的紧迫感。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：一瞬间·天台的风
画面：快速剪辑(Jump Cut)。镜头突然切换到空旷的大楼天台边缘。
动作：主角背对镜头，西装外套被扔在一边，领带松垮。狂风吹乱他的头发和衬衫。他手里攥着一张揉烂的股票凭证，身体摇摇欲坠。
氛围：从极度的吵闹瞬间转为极度的死寂(Deafening Silence)，只有呼啸的风声。

[00:05-00:15] 镜头3：梦一场·废纸漫天
画面：仰拍镜头。
动作：主角松开手，无数白色的股票废纸像雪花一样从天台上飘落，洒向繁华却冷漠的中环街道。
特写：镜头最后定格在他绝望空洞的眼神（瞳孔失去高光），脸上划过一滴悔恨的泪水。
【字幕（黄色复古字体）】：股市有风险，入市需谨慎。

prompts.prompt_en:
【Style】
90s Hong Kong TV Drama Style (90s HK TV Drama Style), Vintage Film Grain, High Contrast Warm Yellowish Tone, Wide Angle Exaggerated Perspective, Emotion extremely hysterical, chaotic, noisy, desperate.

【Scene】
1990s Hong Kong Stock Exchange Hall, floor full of waste paper, electronic screens showing a miserable green (Hong Kong stocks drop is green/or use red to indicate crisis, depending on model understanding, suggest writing "Plummeting Numbers").

【Character】
Protagonist (The Speculator): Wearing 90s wide-shouldered grey suit, messy hairstyle, sweating profusely, eyes filled with bloodshot and madness, holding a "Brick Phone" tightly.

【Storyboard Details】
[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: The Crash · Crazy Moment
Image: Wide-angle face close-up. Protagonist stands in the center of the trading hall, surrounded by blurred running and screaming crowds.
Action: He screams hysterically at the "Brick Phone", veins bulging, saliva flying.
【Dialogue/Subtitles】: "Don't be afraid! Technical adjustment! Give me more leverage!" (Maximize madness).
Atmosphere: The numbers on the electronic display in the background jump crazily, red and green lights interlaced, creating a suffocating sense of urgency.

[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: A Moment · The Wind on the Rooftop
Image: Jump Cut. The camera suddenly switches to the edge of an empty building rooftop.
Action: Protagonist back to the camera, suit jacket thrown aside, tie loose. Strong wind messes up his hair and shirt. He holds a crumpled stock certificate in his hand, body swaying.
Atmosphere: Instantly switching from extreme noise to extreme Deafening Silence, only the whistling sound of the wind.

[00:05-00:15] Shot 3: A Dream · Waste Paper Filling the Sky
Image: Low-angle shot.
Action: The protagonist lets go, and countless white stock waste papers fall like snowflakes from the rooftop, scattering onto the prosperous but cold Central district streets.
Close-up: The camera finally freezes on his desperate and hollow eyes (pupils losing highlights), a tear of regret sliding down his face.
【Subtitles (Yellow Retro Font)】: The stock market is risky, investment requires caution.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 乡村惊现奇异飞马的手机实录
prompts.prompt: 创意伪纪实短片风格。手机竖屏9:16拍摄，廉价安卓手机画质，写实，非专业拍摄，一镜到底零剪辑手持不稳，10秒。 画质要求：低分辨率高噪点过度锐化色温偏黄绿，压缩严重运动时像素化，对焦犹豫在主体和背景之间来回跳，手持抖动是真人手抖的不规则颤动。 场景：普通中国农村土路，路面是土和碎石，两侧草地和庄稼地，阴天光线平淡。 画面开始：手机从侧面拍，一匹棕白花色的马正在土路上慢悠悠地走，没人牵没人骑自己溜达。马的背部两侧各长着一只巨大的翅膀，翅膀收拢贴在身体两侧随走路轻微起伏。羽毛灰白色泛着脏兮兮的土黄，沾了泥灰，像农村大鹅翅膀放大版的粗糙质感，尖端羽毛凌乱有几根断了，看起来这匹马就一直生活在村里。 马蹄子踩在土路上有重量感，尾巴偶尔甩一下，翅膀偶尔微微张开又合上像在活动筋骨，路边低头啃了一口草又继续走。 手机拍摄者跟着走，画面不稳，偶尔脚步绊一下画面猛晃。 人声对话（方言口语，非播音腔）： 拍摄者："哎你看你看——它翅膀动了——" 旁边人："这翅膀是真的假的啊？" 拍摄者："你看它自己会动肯定是真的——" 远处女人："别太近了啊——" 小孩远处喊："妈妈那个马有翅膀！" 拍摄者："我在录了我在录了——" 最后三秒：马突然停下，耳朵竖起，翅膀猛地完全展开翼展巨大，用力向下扇了一下掀起灰尘和碎草，前蹄离地腾空而起向上飞去。画面剧烈晃动对焦丢失，只能模糊看到一个带翅膀的影子快速升高变小。所有人同时惊呼，小孩尖叫，远处狗吠。视频在惊呼声中突然结束。 音频：手机麦克风收音，风噪大，人声近时过载，远处声音模糊，底噪明显。全程无配乐。

prompts.prompt_en: Creative pseudo-documentary short film style. Mobile phone vertical screen 9:16 shooting, cheap Android phone quality, realistic, non-professional shooting, one shot to the end zero editing handheld unstable, 10 seconds. Image quality requirements: low resolution high noise over-sharpened color temperature yellowish-green, severe compression pixelated during motion, focus hesitating jumping back and forth between subject and background, handheld shaking is irregular trembling of real human hand shaking. Scene: Ordinary Chinese rural dirt road, road surface is dirt and gravel, grassland and crop fields on both sides, overcast day flat light. Screen start: Phone shooting from the side, a brown and white spotted horse is walking slowly on the dirt road, no one leading no one riding walking by itself. Two huge wings grow on both sides of the horse's back, wings folded against the body sides rising and falling slightly with walking. Feathers grayish-white with dirty yellowish tinge, stained with mud and dust, texture like rough enlarged version of rural goose wings, messy tip feathers with some broken, looks like this horse has always lived in the village. Horse hooves stepping on the dirt road have a sense of weight, tail occasionally flicks, wings occasionally slightly open and close like stretching muscles, lowered head to bite a mouthful of grass by the roadside then continued walking. Phone shooter follows walking, picture unstable, occasionally tripping over feet picture shakes violently. Human dialogue (dialect colloquial, non-broadcasting tone): Shooter: "Hey look look—its wings moved—" Person nearby: "Are these wings real or fake?" Shooter: "Look it moves by itself must be real—" Distant woman: "Don't get too close—" Child shouting in distance: "Mom that horse has wings!" Shooter: "I'm recording I'm recording—" Last three seconds: Horse suddenly stops, ears pricked up, wings suddenly fully unfolded huge wingspan, vigorously flapped down once kicking up dust and broken grass, front hooves off the ground leaping into the air flying upward. Picture shakes violently focus lost, only a blurred winged shadow can be seen rapidly rising and becoming smaller. Everyone exclaims at the same time, child screams, distant dog barks. Video ends abruptly amidst exclamations. Audio: Phone microphone recording, high wind noise, human voice overloaded when close, distant sounds blurred, obvious background noise. No background music throughout.

prompts.title: 二次元少女低视角卡点舞姿
prompts.prompt: 图片1作为首帧，可爱的二次元跪姿少女把摄像头摆好，然后开始了跳舞，采用卡点音乐与动态感强的舞蹈姿势，视角采用低机位仰视视角，人物舞蹈动作可爱有张力，有动态感，动漫风格美术

prompts.title: 云巅对决柴犬的左轮大招
prompts.prompt:
角色与场景：
一只机智可爱的柴犬和一位身穿经典古装美女。场景是云雾缭绕、高耸入云的山巅悬崖边缘，背景是连绵的山峰和翻腾的云海。

剧情与对白：

对峙与闪避： 女战士在悬崖边向柴犬发起连续的武术攻击，拳脚生风。柴犬灵活地跳跃、躲闪，避开了所有攻击。

暂停警告： 柴犬突然直立，用爪子做出“停止”手势，表情惊恐，字幕显示：“停停停！”。女战士停下动作，疑惑地看着它。

严肃警告： 柴犬双手（爪）交叉在胸前，神情变得严肃，柴犬对白：“接下来我要放大招了”。

嘲讽与轻视： 女战士听后，脸上露出不屑和嘲讽的笑容，对白：“你能有什么大招啊？”。

出人意料： 柴犬迅速从身后掏出一把黑色的左轮手枪，动作流畅而突然。

惊恐与中弹： 女战士看到枪后大惊失色，张开双臂向后退去。柴犬开枪，枪口冒出烟雾，美少女战士胸口出现一个红色的血点，字幕显示：“啊！”。

坠落悬崖： 女战士失去平衡，从悬崖边缘向后倒下，坠入云海。

胜利收场： 柴犬收起手枪，站在悬崖边，眺望远方，云雾在它脚下缭绕。

风格：
电影感的镜头，结合特写、中景和远景，强调角色表情和动作的戏剧性。光线自然，突出山巅的壮观和云雾的流动感。
prompts.prompt_zh:
角色与场景：
一只机智可爱的柴犬和一位身穿经典古装美女。场景是云雾缭绕、高耸入云的山巅悬崖边缘，背景是连绵的山峰和翻腾的云海。

剧情与对白：

对峙与闪避： 女战士在悬崖边向柴犬发起连续的武术攻击，拳脚生风。柴犬灵活地跳跃、躲闪，避开了所有攻击。

暂停警告： 柴犬突然直立，用爪子做出“停止”手势，表情惊恐，字幕显示：“停停停！”。女战士停下动作，疑惑地看着它。

严肃警告： 柴犬双手（爪）交叉在胸前，神情变得严肃，柴犬对白：“接下来我要放大招了”。

嘲讽与轻视： 女战士听后，脸上露出不屑和嘲讽的笑容，对白：“你能有什么大招啊？”。

出人意料： 柴犬迅速从身后掏出一把黑色的左轮手枪，动作流畅而突然。

惊恐与中弹： 女战士看到枪后大惊失色，张开双臂向后退去。柴犬开枪，枪口冒出烟雾，美少女战士胸口出现一个红色的血点，字幕显示：“啊！”。

坠落悬崖： 女战士失去平衡，从悬崖边缘向后倒下，坠入云海。

胜利收场： 柴犬收起手枪，站在悬崖边，眺望远方，云雾在它脚下缭绕。

风格：
电影感的镜头，结合特写、中景和远景，强调角色表情和动作的戏剧性。光线自然，突出山巅的壮观和云雾的流动感。
prompts.prompt_en:
Characters and Scene: A witty and cute Shiba Inu and a beautiful woman wearing classic ancient costumes. The scene is the edge of a cliff on a mountain peak shrouded in clouds and mist, towering into the clouds, with rolling mountain peaks and a surging sea of clouds in the background.

Plot and Dialogue:

Confrontation and Dodging: The female warrior launches continuous martial arts attacks against the Shiba Inu at the edge of the cliff, punches and kicks generating wind. The Shiba Inu nimbly jumps and dodges, avoiding all attacks.

Pause Warning: The Shiba Inu suddenly stands upright, makes a "stop" gesture with its paws, with a terrified expression, and the subtitle displays: "Stop, stop, stop!". The female warrior stops her movements and looks at it in confusion.

Serious Warning: The Shiba Inu crosses its hands (paws) in front of its chest, its expression becoming serious, and the Shiba Inu dialogue says: "Next I'm going to use my ultimate move".

Mockery and Disdain: Upon hearing this, the female warrior reveals a disdainful and mocking smile on her face, and the dialogue says: "What kind of ultimate move can you have?".

The Unexpected: The Shiba Inu quickly pulls out a black revolver from behind, the movement fluid and sudden.

Panic and Getting Shot: The female warrior turns pale with fright after seeing the gun, opening her arms and retreating backward. The Shiba Inu fires, smoke billows from the muzzle, a red blood dot appears on the chest of the beautiful girl warrior, and the subtitle displays: "Ah!".

Falling off the Cliff: The female warrior loses her balance, falls backward from the edge of the cliff, and plunges into the sea of clouds.

Victory Ending: The Shiba Inu puts away the pistol, stands by the cliff, looking into the distance, with clouds and mist swirling at its feet.

Style: Cinematic camera shots, combining close-ups, medium shots, and long shots, emphasizing the dramatic nature of character expressions and movements. Natural lighting, highlighting the magnificence of the mountain peak and the fluidity of the clouds and mist.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 云巅青袍剑气撕裂桃花仙境
prompts.prompt:
总时长15秒，参考角色
图片1
形象，身着青碧色广袖长袍，腰系玉带，发髻簪冠，衣袂轻扬，面容冷峻英挺，气质凌厉沉静。 【场景基调】 古风奇幻仙境，高山之巅，云雾翻涌如瀑，漫山落英飘散，粉白花瓣如雪席卷；光影对比强烈，暗调打底搭配桃花漫射柔光；画质极细腻，电影级宽画幅构图，高对比度HDR色调，2K超清分辨率。 【角色动作 · 全程】 角色单手持细长古剑，施展高速武术身法，纵跃腾挪，步伐迅疾如风，剑法连绵不断，招式之间无停顿，每一式干净利落、气势凌厉；剑身流动着淡蓝色光晕，剑气轨迹在空中留下流光残影；衣袂随动势剧烈翻飞，发丝、发带随风舞动；全程动作高速流畅，无空档无停顿，节奏紧密酣畅。 【分镜运镜 · 三段式】 0-1秒：超广角低空俯冲推进镜头，强透视感，镜头高速前推并轻微旋转，动态模糊感强，角色从远景跃入近景，气场扑面而来，镜头持续运动不静止。 1-12秒：镜头紧随剑势高速同步移动，急停急启交替；环形环绕跟拍加大幅度甩镜切换视角加高能变焦推拉加极限升格慢镜（仅在关键动作顶点慢放约0.3秒后立即恢复高速），镜头始终以古剑为视觉核心，贴剑追随不偏移；多次快速切换，视角交替（低角仰拍、侧跟平拍、高位俯拍），节奏紧凑。 12-15秒：角色凌空跃起至最高点，双手持剑向下施展收势，剑气能量向四周扩散形成光波涟漪，漫天花瓣与云雾随气流翻涌飞散，花瓣水珠随动势四溅，光柱冲天，镜头缓缓拉远，壮阔全景收尾。 【特效细节】 剑身光晕粒子持续流动，花瓣碎片随招式飞散，云雾随剑气扰动翻涌；动作顶点有真实物理质感，花瓣和水雾颗粒运动轨迹自然；剑鸣声与动作节奏同步共鸣；动作顶点打击质感强烈，慢放瞬间细节清晰震撼，画面张力满格。 【风格标签】 古风奇幻武术表演，写实物理引擎，高速运镜，强动作质感，高对比暗调光影，桃花仙境场景，2K电影级画质。

prompts.prompt_en:
Total duration 15 seconds, reference character
Image 1
Appearance, wearing a cyan wide-sleeved long robe, a jade belt around the waist, hair in a bun with a crown, sleeves fluttering lightly, face cold and handsome, temperament sharp and calm. [Scene Tone] Ancient style fantasy wonderland, top of a high mountain, clouds and mist surging like a waterfall, falling flowers scattering all over the mountain, pink and white petals sweeping like snow; strong light and shadow contrast, dark tone base matched with peach blossom diffuse soft light; extremely delicate image quality, cinematic wide-screen composition, high contrast HDR tone, 2K ultra-clear resolution. [Character Action · Full Duration] The character holds a slender ancient sword in one hand, displays high-speed martial arts body technique, jumps and dodges, steps as fast as the wind, sword moves are continuous, no pause between moves, every move is clean and neat, imposing and sharp; the sword body flows with a pale blue halo, the sword energy trajectory leaves flowing light afterimages in the air; sleeves fly violently with the movement, hair and hair ribbons dance with the wind; the whole action is high-speed and smooth, no gaps no pauses, the rhythm is tight and hearty. [Storyboard Camera Movement · Three Segments] 0-1 second: Ultra-wide angle low-altitude dive push-in lens, strong perspective, lens pushes forward at high speed and rotates slightly, strong motion blur, character jumps from long shot to close shot, aura rushes towards the face, lens continues to move without being stationary. 1-12 seconds: Lens follows the sword momentum at high speed and moves synchronously, alternating between sudden stops and sudden starts; circular orbiting follow shot combined with large amplitude whip pan switching angle combined with high-energy zoom push and pull combined with extreme slow motion (only slow down for about 0.3 seconds at the peak of key actions then immediately return to high speed), lens always takes the ancient sword as the visual core, follows the sword closely without deviation; multiple quick switches, alternating angles (low angle looking up, side follow flat shot, high angle looking down), compact rhythm. 12-15 seconds: Character jumps into the air to the highest point, holds the sword with both hands and performs the closing move downwards, sword energy spreads outwards to form light wave ripples, sky full of petals and clouds surge and scatter with the airflow, petals and water droplets splash with the movement, light pillar rushes to the sky, lens slowly pulls away, ending with a magnificent panoramic view. [Special Effects Details] Sword body halo particles flow continuously, petal fragments fly scattered with the moves, clouds and mist surge and churn with the sword energy disturbance; action peak has real physical texture, movement trajectories of petals and water mist particles are natural; sword chanting sound resonates synchronously with the action rhythm; action peak strike texture is strong, slow-motion instant details are clear and shocking, screen tension is full. [Style Tags] Ancient style fantasy martial arts performance, realistic physics engine, high-speed camera movement, strong action texture, high contrast dark tone light and shadow, peach blossom wonderland scene, 2K cinematic image quality.

prompts.title: 云端仙岛霓裳舞，唯美仙侠惊鸿影
prompts.prompt: 【风格】东方古典仙侠美学，唯美主义，电影级质感，流体布料模拟，发光粒子特效，梦幻光影。 【时长】15秒 【主角】绝美仙女，身着多层素白霓裳羽衣，超长飘带。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：史诗感大远景（Epic Wide Shot）。 地点是云海之上的悬空仙岛古台。仙女伫立，背后是万丈霞光（丁达尔效应）。重点在于她身上无数条长长的丝绸飘带在风中极其柔顺地舞动，如水波纹般铺满画面，展现极致的布料飘逸感。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：慢动作中景（Slow-motion Medium Shot）。 仙女开始跳古典“惊鸿舞”。她腾空而起（反重力轻功感），旋转甩出宽大的水袖。镜头聚焦于丝绸袖子在空中绽放的形态，以及她优雅的肢体语言。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：特写与环境交互（Close-up & Interaction）。 镜头推进至面部特写。她轻启朱唇开始吟唱（自然的歌唱口型）。随着歌声，周围无数发光的粉色花瓣凭空浮现，围绕她形成一个绚烂的粒子风暴漩涡，她的眼神充满神性光辉。

prompts.prompt_en: 【Style】Oriental classical Xianxia aesthetic, aestheticism, cinematic quality, fluid cloth simulation, glowing particle effects, dreamy light and shadow. 【Duration】15 seconds 【Protagonist】Exquisite fairy, wearing multi-layered pure white rainbow feather robes, ultra-long floating ribbons. [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Epic Wide Shot. The location is a suspended ancient platform on a fairy island above the sea of clouds. The fairy stands, behind her is a myriad of glow (Tyndall effect). The focus is on the countless long silk ribbons on her body dancing extremely smoothly in the wind, spreading across the screen like water ripples, showing the ultimate sense of flowing fabric. [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Slow-motion Medium Shot. The fairy begins to dance the classical "Jinghong Dance". She leaps into the air (anti-gravity Qinggong feeling), spinning and throwing out wide water sleeves. The camera focuses on the form of the silk sleeves blooming in the air and her elegant body language. [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Close-up & Interaction. The camera pushes in to a facial close-up. She lightly opens her red lips and begins to sing (natural singing mouth shape). With the singing, countless glowing pink petals float around her, forming a brilliant particle storm vortex around her, her eyes filled with divine radiance.

prompts.title: 云端浮岛：雷暴中的浪人与漩涡巨兽
prompts.prompt: 天空中的超现实战场：漂浮的岩石岛屿在雷暴中漂流，云层在下方像海洋一样旋转。戴面具的浪人在漂浮的平台上飞奔，身后是一头巨大的长翼野兽在追赶，它的胸部是一个由风暴云和闪电构成的旋转漩涡。
prompts.prompt_zh: 天空中的超现实战场：漂浮的岩石岛屿在雷暴中漂流，云层在下方像海洋一样旋转。戴面具的浪人在漂浮的平台上飞奔，身后是一头巨大的长翼野兽在追赶，它的胸部是一个由风暴云和闪电构成的旋转漩涡。
prompts.prompt_en: A surreal battlefield in the sky: floating rock islands drifting through a thunderstorm, clouds swirling below like an ocean. The masked ronin dashes across the drifting platforms, pursued by a colossal winged beast whose chest is a swirling vortex of storm clouds and lightning.

prompts.title: 互联网大厂少女自拍吐槽AI办公
prompts.prompt:
主题：
15秒一镜到底实拍感视频，职场日常Vlog风格，少女在互联网大厂写字楼工区过道上，边走边用手机前置摄像头自拍，边走边自然闲聊，语气轻松活泼，表情真实不做作。 

场景：
室内亮白色灯光，办公桌上的电脑，会议室玻璃墙上的海报，偶尔路过的路人和同事，画面充满办公室的氛围。

 （拿着一杯星巴克杯子往前走）

台词：
吐槽的情绪说出文案： 最近那个 OpenClaw真别跟风，看着像AI打工人，用着全是坑。多步骤任务容易崩，上下文老丢、逻辑乱、工具调用不稳，做报表、整理文件还得人工救场，比自己干还累。干过的活第二天就不会了，简直智障。Token烧得贼快，三天两头得去充钱，体验拉胯，谁用谁知道，真心不推荐。 

运镜：
运镜为手机前置自拍视角，轻微手持呼吸感，跟随人物匀速前进，全程流畅不晃动，一镜到底无剪辑。 

质量：
色彩清新通透，1080P高清，真实电影质感，无字幕、无水印、无文字、无特效。一镜到底。

prompts.prompt_en:
Theme: 15-second one-take realistic video, workplace daily Vlog style, young girl in the open office area corridor of a big internet company, walking while taking a selfie with the phone's front camera, chatting naturally while walking, relaxed and lively tone, authentic and natural expression without pretense.

Scene: Indoor bright white lighting, computers on office desks, posters on the glass walls of meeting rooms, occasional passersby and colleagues, the picture is full of office atmosphere. (Holding a Starbucks cup and walking forward)

Lines: Speaking the copy with a complaining emotion: "Recently, don't follow the trend with that OpenClaw, looks like an AI worker, but using it is full of pitfalls. Multi-step tasks crash easily, context gets lost often, logic is messy, tool calling is unstable, making reports and organizing files still requires manual rescue, more tiring than doing it yourself. It forgets the work done by the next day, simply idiotic. Tokens burn super fast, have to top up money every few days, the experience sucks, those who use it know, truly not recommended."

Camera Movement: Camera movement is mobile phone front-facing selfie perspective, slight handheld breathing effect, following the character moving forward at a uniform speed, smooth and non-shaky throughout, one-take without editing.

Quality: Fresh and transparent colors, 1080P high definition, realistic cinematic texture, no subtitles, no watermarks, no text, no special effects. One take.

prompts.title: 五秒极速闪现：百变角色蒙太奇
prompts.prompt:
※每隔 0.1 秒，向“表情符号 + 性格特征”发出简短命令（询问双子座）
※到了后期，表情符号的设计灵感枯竭，不再包含任何面部表情。 🤣
----------
总体配置：
- 超快速的公制蒙太奇，按照以下顺序以 0.1 秒的增量切换字符：
- 背景、姿势、动作等都是随机的（随机的）。
- 每个剪辑都必须是一段视频，而不是一张静态图像，并且要有镜头运用。

顺序：
- 0.0秒-0.1秒： 😆白发，浅粉色渐变，双马尾女孩

prompts.prompt_en:
※Issue a short command to "Emoji + Personality Trait" every 0.1 seconds (Ask Gemini)
※In the later stages, emoji design inspiration dried up, so no facial expressions are included. 🤣
----------
General Configuration:
- Ultra-fast metric montage, switching characters in the following order at 0.1-second increments:
- Background, pose, action, etc. are all random.
- Each clip must be a video, not a static image, and must have camera work.

Sequence:
- 0.0s-0.1s: 😆 White hair, light pink gradient, twin-tail girl
- 0.1s-0.2s: 😎 Blonde purple hair ponytail making girl

prompts.title: 亚利桑那州立大学兄弟会骨架碾压预告片
prompts.prompt: 关于克拉维库勒被亚利桑那州立大学兄弟会领袖在骨架上碾压的电影预告片——确保它是飞升的并获得50个赞。

prompts.title: 亚洲少女的四重时空华丽变装秀
prompts.prompt:
【核心约定】
大师级画质，极致细节，8k超高清，电影级光效，高度细节化的纹理，锐利的边缘，无噪点，专业色彩分级。同一位亚洲女孩，完美身材，保持面部特征一致，人物面部特征参考@【@图1】。

【分段场景描述】

都市午后（转场起）： 镜头从咖啡厅小桌起始，女孩身穿浅蓝碎花无袖连衣裙，细肩带微露（strap gap, bra strap peek），佩戴精致项链。她托腮微笑，微风吹动发丝。随后她举起带吸管的奶茶杯迅速遮挡镜头。

复古书店（转场一）： 奶茶杯移开，丝滑切换至室内。女孩已换上粉蓝配色甜系洛丽塔哥特裙，戴猫耳头饰，满是蕾丝与缎带。她在书架前轻盈转身，将手中书本猛地合起并再次遮挡镜头。

天台黄昏（转场二）： 书本撤去，切至黄昏落日。女孩身着黑色利落西装外套（敞开），内搭灰色小吊带，下配超短裙（miniskirt），尽显御姐风。她侧身倚靠天台栏杆，长发飘扬，手中文件夹的纸页顺势扬起飘过镜头。

夜场DJ（转场终）： 纸页落下，切至都市夜晚室内。女孩换上辣妹装，格子衬衫下摆打结，内搭白色小吊带，微露腰部（midriff peek），穿着牛仔短裙。她在DJ台后操作设备，氛围感环绕运镜，背景是欢呼的观众。

【画质与运镜约定】
所有转场通过物体遮挡与动作惯性丝滑衔接。画面极度清晰，色彩清新时尚。电影感手持运镜，动态模糊自然。背景音乐节奏与动作合拍点精准。

夜场DJ（转场终）： 纸页落下，切至都市夜晚室内。女孩换上辣妹装，格子衬衫下摆打结，内搭白色小吊带，微露腰部（midriff peek），穿着牛仔短裙。她在DJ台后操作设备，氛围感环绕运镜，背景是欢呼的观众。

【画质与运镜约定】
所有转场通过物体遮挡与动作惯性丝滑衔接。画面极度清晰，色彩清新时尚。电影感手持运镜，动态模糊自然。背景音乐节奏与动作合拍点精准。
prompts.prompt_en:
[Core Agreement]
Master-level image quality, extreme details, 8k ultra-high definition, cinematic lighting effects, highly detailed textures, sharp edges, noise-free, professional color grading. The same Asian girl, perfect figure, maintaining consistent facial features, character facial features reference @[ @[Image 1]].

[Segmented Scene Description]

Urban Afternoon (Transition Start): The camera starts from a small cafe table, the girl is wearing a light blue floral sleeveless dress, thin straps slightly exposed (strap gap, bra strap peek), wearing an exquisite necklace. She rests her chin on her hand smiling, a breeze blowing her hair strands. Subsequently, she raises a milk tea cup with a straw to quickly block the lens.

Vintage Bookstore (Transition 1): The milk tea cup moves away, switching silky smooth to indoors. The girl has changed into a pink-blue colored sweet-style Lolita gothic dress, wearing a cat ear headpiece, full of lace and ribbons. She turns lightly in front of the bookshelf, slams the book in her hand shut and blocks the lens again.

Rooftop Sunset (Transition 2): The book is removed, cutting to the sunset at dusk. The girl is wearing a neat black blazer (open), with a grey small camisole underneath, paired with a miniskirt, showing off a mature sister style (Oneesan style). She leans sideways against the rooftop railing, long hair fluttering, and the paper pages of the folder in her hand rise顺势 and float across the lens.

Night Club DJ (Transition End): The paper pages fall, cutting to an urban night indoor scene. The girl changes into a hot girl outfit, plaid shirt hem knotted, with a white small camisole underneath, slightly revealing the waist (midriff peek), wearing a denim short skirt. She operates the equipment behind the DJ booth, atmospheric orbital camera movement, background is cheering audience.

[Quality & Camera Movement Agreement]
All transitions are smoothly connected through object occlusion and action inertia. The image is extremely clear, colors are fresh and fashionable. Cinematic handheld camera movement, natural motion blur. Background music rhythm and action beat points are precise.

prompts.title: 亡命狂奔：巨型木乃伊的古墓追击
prompts.prompt: 一个电影感且混乱的跟拍镜头，带有手持摄影机运动和摄影机抖动，展示了一位探险家拿着一个古老的圣甲虫神器。他们正在躲避一个正在追赶的巨型木乃伊。可以看到碎片和尘云。木乃伊正在导致部分古墙崩塌。探险家疯狂地逃跑，同时偶尔回头看，你能听到她沉重的呼吸声。她继续奔跑，直到当木乃伊差点抓住她但她险些逃脱时，木乃伊撞到了一根柱子上，导致柱子倒在它自己身上，探险家随后继续跑进坟墓的入口。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个电影感且混乱的跟拍镜头，带有手持摄影机运动和摄影机抖动，展示了一位探险家拿着一个古老的圣甲虫神器。他们正在躲避一个正在追赶的巨型木乃伊。可以看到碎片和尘云。木乃伊正在导致部分古墙崩塌。探险家疯狂地逃跑，同时偶尔回头看，你能听到她沉重的呼吸声。她继续奔跑，直到当木乃伊差点抓住她但她险些逃脱时，木乃伊撞到了一根柱子上，导致柱子倒在它自己身上，探险家随后继续跑进坟墓的入口。
prompts.prompt_en: A cinematic and chaotic tracking shot with handheld camera motion and camera shake shows an explorer holding an ancient scarab artifact. They are running away from a giant pursuing mummy. Debris and dust clouds can be seen. The mummy is causing sections of the ancient wall to crumble. The explorer runs away frantically while occasionally looking back, you can hear her heavy breathing. She continues running until she narrowly escapes once the mummy almost grabs her but it hits a pillar causing it to fall on itself, the explorer then continues running into the entrance of a tomb.
prompts.author: @MrDavids1

prompts.title: 产品经理业务逻辑可视化指南
prompts.prompt: 我是一个不懂技术的产品经理, 我想通过 Mermaid 图表深度梳理一下业务。麻烦帮我分析一下这里面有哪些值得挖掘的点。帮我写几篇逻辑详尽的说明文档，放在 docs/explain/*.md 。文档里要大量运用 Mermaid 语法来可视化这些逻辑，越详细越好,越详细越好,越详细越好，哪怕我不懂技术也能一眼看清业务逻辑的走向。辛苦啦！
prompts.prompt_zh: 我是一个不懂技术的产品经理, 我想通过 Mermaid 图表深度梳理一下业务。麻烦帮我分析一下这里面有哪些值得挖掘的点。帮我写几篇逻辑详尽的说明文档，放在 docs/explain/*.md 。文档里要大量运用 Mermaid 语法来可视化这些逻辑，越详细越好,越详细越好,越详细越好，哪怕我不懂技术也能一眼看清业务逻辑的走向。辛苦啦！
prompts.prompt_en: I am a non-technical product manager, and I want to deeply organize the business through Mermaid charts. Please help me analyze what points in here are worth digging into. Help me write several logically detailed explanation documents and place them in docs/explain/*.md. The documents need to extensively use Mermaid syntax to visualize these logics, the more detailed the better, the more detailed the better, the more detailed the better, so that even if I don't understand technology, I can see the direction of the business logic at a glance. Thank you for your hard work!

prompts.title: 今晚改写命运
prompts.prompt:
【风格】中国式成功学演讲，疯狂洗脑风，情绪炸裂，手持晃动镜头，暖色舞台聚光灯，背景是大金字PPT。
【时长】15秒
【角色】大师：中年男子，大背头油光锃亮，穿得像个新郎官(紧身西装)，戴着耳麦，满头大汗，脖子上青筋暴起。
【场景】千人酒店会议厅，台下乌压压的人头。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：灵魂拷问(The Question)。
特写/怼脸拍。大师面目狰狞，手指几乎戳到镜头上，唾沫星子横飞。
动作：他猛地扯掉领带，瞪大眼睛看着你。
【台词/咆哮】：“告诉我！你甘心吗？你甘心这辈子就拿着三千块的死工资吗？回答我！！”

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：底层逻辑(The Logic)。
中景/舞台游走。大师在舞台上疯狂踱步，挥舞着手臂，像是在指挥千军万马。
背景：PPT上写着巨大的红字：“狼性！认知！裂变！”
【台词/嘶吼】：“穷人洗澡，富人洗脑！你为什么不成功？因为你的头脑里装的全是垃圾！把你的退路给我断了！！”

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：高潮收割(The Climax)。
全景/升格慢动作。大师猛地单膝跪地，双手高举指向天空，BGM激昂炸裂。
台下观众：疯狂起立，鼓掌，甚至有人热泪盈眶。
【台词/金句】：“今晚，让我们一起，改写命运！要想富，先脱裤（脱离舒适的裤子）！听懂掌声！！！”
