prompts.prompt_en:
"Qipao Awakening · 15-Second Viral Hit Version"
[Style] Cinematic Old Shanghai Texture + Fast-paced Commercial Blockbuster Editing, Strong Beat Drum Soundtrack, Film Grain, High Contrast Light and Shadow, Action Match Cut, 8K Ultra Clear, Rhythm Progresses Frame by Frame, Emotion Continuously Rising
[Duration] 15 Seconds
[Character] The Same Oriental Woman, Temperament Changes from Introverted to Sharp, Eyes Change from Lowered to Looking Directly at the Camera, Body Language Changes from Reserved to Controlling the Whole Scene
[Core Transition Mechanism] Each Spin Completes a Time Leap, Action Seamless Match Cut
Storyboard Script
0–2 Seconds [Late Qing Banner Robe] Scene: Enclosed Courtyard, Light Suppressed. Costume: Loose Straight Banner Robe, High Standing Collar, Wide Sleeves, Heavy Embroidery. Action: Head Down, Slowly Raise Eyes, First Heavy Drum Beat, Sudden Spin. Camera: Medium Shot Fast Push In.
2–5 Seconds [1915 Transitional Qipao] Scene: Street, Light Slightly Bright. Costume: Sleeves Narrowing, Waistline Slightly Appearing, Skirt Still Long. Action: Spin Landing, Raise Head, Take First Step, Rhythm Starts to Accelerate, Spin Again.
5–9 Seconds [1920s Shanghai Style] Scene: Shanghai Street, Tram Passing By. Costume: Silk Qipao, Clear Waistline, Length to Calf, Wavy Short Hair. Action: Pace Obviously Accelerating, Actively Looking at the Camera, Camera Orbiting, Drums Strengthening, Crisp and Clean Spin.
9–15 Seconds [1930s Golden Age] Scene: Neon Night Scene, Strong Light Hitting the Contour. Costume: Body-Hugging Cut, High Slit, Sleeveless, Stiletto Heels, Red Lips. Action: Spin Completed, Stop, Slowly Walk Towards the Camera, Camera Shifts from High Angle to Eye Level, She Looks Directly at the Camera, Aura Fully Commanding, Last Drum Beat Drops, Freeze Frame.
prompts.author: @Michell81147285

prompts.title: 无限循环的都市夜生活变奏曲
prompts.prompt:
characters: 一位年轻女子
cinematic_style: 一种华丽、生动的照片级写实风格，使用 SnorriCam 装置和电影镜头实现绝对的中心锁定对焦。转场依赖于无缝背景，这些背景在物理上融化并切入新环境，与空间音频声景无缝同步。
description: 视频的唯一焦点。她在整个循环中保持完全中心锁定的面部位置，无论周围环境如何扭曲和演变，都死死地盯着前方。
video_prompt:
  subject:
    description: 一位完全从正面观看的年轻女子，位于画面的正中心。
    action: 她经历着一个连续、流畅的循环，包括准备、聚会、游荡和崩溃。她的环境在她周围不断融化和变化，而她保持着直接的眼神交流和中心锁定的面部位置。
    dialogue: "我们开始吧。"
  visual_dynamics:
    transformation_speed: 环境、灯光和她的服装流畅地相互渗透。转场不是剪辑，而是由沉重、脉动的俱乐部节拍节奏驱动的无缝、连续变形，改变了地点之间的界限。
    consistency: 她的脸保持绝对锁定在画面中心，朝向前方。视频的结尾与起始帧完全匹配，创造一个完美的、无限的循环。
  scene_sequences:
    - 仰面躺在一张凌乱的床上，茫然地直视上方的相机，被昏暗的晨光照亮。
    - 凌乱的床单平滑地变形为明亮的梳妆镜。她现在坐得笔直，一边涂着大胆的口红，一边直视前方。
    - 镜子反射扩大并吞没房间，融化成一个拥挤、霓虹灯闪烁的夜总会中心。背景变成了移动身体的流动模糊。
    - 夜总会的人群从她身边掠过，将环境拉入紫外线光辉中。她微微仰头喝下一杯发光的霓虹子弹杯，无缝地显现在一个大型 EDM 音乐节的中央。
    - 当她低语 "我们开始吧" 时，音乐节的激光液化并重组为侵略性的频闪灯。她现在正和一位俱乐部 DJ 在后台狂野地跳舞，头发凌乱，额头上闪烁着汗水。
    - 侵略性的频闪灯流畅地转变为黑暗中广告牌闪烁的光芒，显示她站在城市街道的外面。
    - 严酷的城市黑暗淡入一家著名快餐店的荧光光辉。她坐在卡座里吃薯条，穿着和在外面一模一样的衣服。
    - 餐厅墙壁扭曲并收缩成一个无菌、明亮的浴室，闪烁着霓虹灯。她看着镜子，看起来疲惫而困惑，呼吸沉重，她的服装没有改变。
    - 无菌的浴室瓷砖软化并随着流畅的动作变形回开始时凌乱的床单。她仰面躺着，眼睛猛地睁开，茫然地直视上方的相机，与第一帧完全相同。
  art_styles:
    - 高度动态的灯光从自然的晨光流畅地转变为霓虹俱乐部灯光，再到严酷的城市频闪灯
    - 完美的面部锁定稳定（SnorriCam 效果）
  audio_context: 一个沉闷的滴答作响的时钟，逐渐有机地构建成震耳欲聋的科技舞曲贝斯重音，融化成混乱的城市嗡嗡声，并以一声尖锐的喘息声结束。

    - 高度动态的灯光从自然的晨光流畅地转变为霓虹俱乐部灯光，再到严酷的城市频闪灯
    - 完美的面部锁定稳定（SnorriCam 效果）
  audio_context: 一个沉闷的滴答作响的时钟，逐渐有机地构建成震耳欲聋的科技舞曲贝斯重音，融化成混乱的城市嗡嗡声，并以一声尖锐的喘息声结束。
prompts.prompt_en:
characters: A young woman
cinematic_style: A gorgeous, vivid photorealist style using a SnorriCam rig and cinema lenses for absolute center-locked focus. Transitions rely on seamless backgrounds that physically melt and snap into new environments, seamlessly synced to a spatial audio soundscape.
description: The sole focus of the video. She maintains a completely center-locked facial position throughout the entire cycle, staring dead ahead regardless of the environment warping and evolving around her.
video_prompt:
  subject:
    description: A young woman viewed entirely from the front, positioned dead center in the frame.
    action: She experiences a continuous, fluid cycle of getting ready, partying, wandering, and crashing. Her environment continuously melts and shifts around her while she maintains direct eye contact and a center-locked facial position.
    dialogue: "Here we go."
  visual_dynamics:
    transformation_speed: The environment, lighting, and her attire fluidly bleed into one another. Transitions are not cuts but seamless, continuous morphs driven by the rhythm of a heavy, pulsating club beat, morphing the boundaries between locations.
    consistency: Her face remains absolutely locked in the center of the frame, facing forward. The end of the video matches the exact starting frame to create a perfect, infinite loop.
  scene_sequences:
    - Lying flat on her back on a messy bed, staring blankly straight up at the camera, illuminated by dim morning sunlight.
    - The messy bedsheets smoothly morph into a bright vanity mirror. She is now sitting perfectly upright, applying bold lipstick while looking dead ahead.
    - The mirror reflection expands and engulfs the room, melting into the center of a crowded, neon-lit nightclub. The background becomes a fluid blur of moving bodies.
    - The nightclub crowd sweeps past her, pulling the environment into an ultraviolet glow. She tips her head back slightly to down a glowing neon shot glass, seamlessly materializing in the middle of a massive EDM festival.
    - As she whispers "Here we go," the festival lasers liquefy and reform into aggressive strobe lights. She is now dancing wildly backstage with a club DJ, her hair messy and sweat glistening on her forehead.
    - The aggressive strobe lights fluidly shift into the flashing glow of advertising billboards in the dark, revealing her standing outside on a city street.
    - The harsh city darkness fades into the fluorescent glow of a famous fast-food restaurant. She is sitting in a booth eating french fries, dressed exactly as she was outside.
    - The restaurant walls warp and contract into a sterile, brightly lit bathroom with a flickering neon light. She looks tired and confused as she looks into the mirror, breathing heavily, her attire unchanged.
    - The sterile bathroom tiles soften and morph back with fluid motion into the messy bedsheets from the beginning. She is lying flat on her back, eyes snapping open to stare blankly straight up at the camera, identical to the first frame.
  art_styles:
    - Highly dynamic lighting fluidly shifting from natural morning to neon club to harsh city strobes
    - Perfect facial-locked stabilization (SnorriCam effect)
  audio_context: A muffled ticking clock that organically builds into a deafening techno bass drop, melting into a chaotic city hum, and ending with a sharp gasp for air.
prompts.author: @maxescu

prompts.title: 日出时粗野主义屋顶的孤独凝视
prompts.prompt: 日出时分，一位孤独的女性站在一座粗野主义混凝土建筑的屋顶上，风将她的外套向后吹拂，城市在下方柔和的金色雾霾中无尽延伸，远处的车流像光的脉络一样闪烁。镜头从极广角的高空镜头开始，然后围绕她缓慢地以平滑的螺旋轨道下降，随着她闭上眼睛深吸一口气，镜头收紧至侧面特写。尘埃微粒在阳光下漂浮，镜头光晕划过画面，微妙的手持震动感增添了人类的脆弱感。电影感自然光，柔和的大气漫射，35毫米胶片质感，浅景深，诗意现实主义。避免卡通色彩，避免数字锐度，避免人工CGI感。

prompts.prompt_en: A lone woman stands on the roof of a brutalist concrete building at sunrise, wind pulling her coat backward as the city stretches endlessly below in soft golden haze, distant traffic glowing like veins of light. The camera begins in an extreme wide aerial shot, then slowly descends in a smooth spiraling orbit around her, tightening into a close profile as her eyes close and she breathes in. Dust particles float in the sunlight, lens flare streaks across the frame, subtle handheld vibration adds human fragility. Cinematic natural light, soft atmospheric diffusion, 35mm film texture, shallow depth of field, poetic realism. Avoid cartoon colors, avoid digital sharpness, avoid artificial CGI look.
prompts.author: @saniaspeaks_

prompts.title: 日式动漫ACT游戏废土宗师电影级激战
prompts.prompt:
日式动漫 3D 游戏 CG，ACT 动作游戏视角，电影级战斗演出，全程紧跟主角，高燃、高速、高打击感。

主角形象参考图片1，设定为武术宗师，近战体术极强，压迫感十足。场景为末日废土世界，黄沙漫天，尘埃飘落，废墟与残破古风建筑交错，整体气质苍凉、肃杀、带东方末世美学。

开场镜头快速推进主角，风沙掠过，气氛压满。第一波十几只小怪同时扑来，主角瞬间爆发，使用极其流畅凶狠的体术连击连续秒杀，动作包含闪身突进、重拳轰脸、肘击破防、扫腿放倒、腾空追击、落地震荡，连招一镜到底般顺滑，拳拳到肉，敌人被击飞、砸地、翻滚、撞墙，受击反馈强烈。

战斗中加入大量环境破坏：墙体龟裂、碎石炸裂、地面崩碎、尘土冲天、敌人撞碎残垣，强化力量冲击。

清场后，镜头短暂停顿，Boss 登场动画开始。Boss 从沙尘深处现身，伴随压迫感特写、低机位仰拍、脚步震地、风压翻涌，气场强大。

随后主角与 Boss 展开两轮高速近身激战，镜头紧贴主角移动，动作凌厉凶猛，包含格挡、闪避、反击、对拳、贴身压制、爆发重击，呈现高手对决的速度感与力量感。

最终主角蓄势爆发终极大招，残影冲刺，连续重击，正面轰穿 Boss 防御，一击秒杀。结尾展现 Boss 重重坠地、废墟爆裂、尘浪冲天、地面裂开，画面震撼，高潮拉满。

要求整体动作自然连贯，战斗清晰，镜头酷炫但不混乱，突出 ACT 游戏 CG 级别的爽感、压迫感与终结爆发。

prompts.prompt_en: Japanese anime 3D game CG, ACT action game perspective, cinematic battle performance, camera closely follows the protagonist throughout, high-octane, high-speed, high-impact feeling. Protagonist appearance references Image 1, characterized as a martial arts grandmaster, extremely strong in close-range melee combat, exuding immense oppression. Scene set in a doomsday wasteland world, yellow sand filling the sky, dust drifting down, ruins and dilapidated ancient-style buildings interspersed, overall atmosphere is desolate, solemn, with Eastern apocalyptic aesthetics. Opening shot rapidly pushes in on the protagonist, wind and sand sweep past, tension fills the air. First wave of over a dozen minions attacks simultaneously, protagonist instantly erupts, using extremely fluid and fierce melee combos to continuously kill in seconds, actions include dodge dash, heavy punch to the face, elbow strike to break defense, leg sweep to topple, aerial pursuit, ground impact shockwave, combos as smooth as a one-take shot, every punch hits flesh, enemies are knocked flying, smashed into the ground, rolling, crashing into walls, strong hit feedback. Battle includes massive environmental destruction: walls cracking, debris exploding, ground shattering, dust shooting into the sky, enemies crashing through ruins, reinforcing the power impact. After clearing the field, camera pauses briefly, Boss entrance animation begins. Boss emerges from the depths of the sand and dust, accompanied by an oppressive close-up, low-angle looking up shot, footsteps shaking the ground, wind pressure surging, powerful aura. Subsequently, the protagonist and Boss engage in two rounds of high-speed close-quarters fierce combat, camera closely follows the protagonist's movement, actions are sharp and fierce, including parrying, dodging, counter-attacking, fist clashes, close-range suppression, explosive heavy hits, presenting the speed and power of a duel between masters. Finally, the protagonist charges up and unleashes an ultimate move, afterimage dash, continuous heavy hits, frontally blasting through the Boss's defense, one-hit kill. Ending shows the Boss crashing heavily to the ground, ruins exploding, dust waves surging to the sky, ground cracking, screen is shocking, climax maxed out. Requirements: overall movements natural and coherent, combat clear, camera cool but not chaotic, highlighting the satisfaction, oppression, and finishing burst of ACT game CG level.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 日落古刹决战：蜘蛛侠激战齐天大圣
prompts.prompt: 蜘蛛侠与美猴王孙悟空在古老的中国寺庙屋顶上，于金色日落时分展开史诗般的电影级大战。 身穿经典红蓝战衣的蜘蛛侠，用蛛丝荡入战场，在半空中翻身，然后弓身落地。孙悟空，一位肌肉发达的猴族战士，身着虎皮裙，头戴金箍，挥舞着巨大的如意金箍棒，金箍棒能流畅地伸缩。 激烈的近身搏斗：蜘蛛侠躲避着超高速挥舞的金箍棒，用蛛网发射器缠住伸长的金箍棒，被猛地向前一拽，但随即一个后空翻挣脱。孙悟空腾空跃起，距离惊人，以筋斗云的方式翻滚，并用七十二变制造出残影（短暂分身成三个版本，从不同角度发起攻击）。 蜘蛛侠则以敏捷的跑酷在屋瓦间穿梭反击，射出蛛网困住分身，然后用蛛网缠住悟空挥舞中的金箍棒，引发巨大的冲击波，震裂屋顶瓦片，金色火花四溅。 戏剧化的镜头：快速推拉变焦，围绕着战士们的动态环绕镜头，关键冲击瞬间的慢动作（蛛网与金箍棒的碰撞，拳头与能量爆发的交锋），广阔的史诗级全景与特写镜头（坚毅的面孔/咬紧的牙关）之间的快速切换。 超逼真的动作，完美的物理效果，蜘蛛侠战衣上细致的布料褶皱和悟空毛发的摆动，日落时分戏剧性的轮廓光，飞溅的碎片和金色的能量轨迹，激昂的管弦乐与传统中国打击乐的配乐氛围。16:9 电影宽高比，超高细节，无文字，无水印。

prompts.prompt_en: Spider-Man and Monkey King Sun Wukong engage in an epic cinematic battle on the roof of an ancient Chinese temple during a golden sunset. Spider-Man, wearing a classic red and blue suit, swings into the battlefield with webs, flips in mid-air, and then lands in a crouch. Sun Wukong, a muscular monkey warrior wearing a tiger skin skirt and a golden headband, wields a massive Ruyi Jingu Bang, which extends and retracts smoothly. Intense close-quarters combat: Spider-Man dodges the ultra-high-speed swinging cudgel, entangles the extending cudgel with web shooters, is yanked violently forward, but immediately breaks free with a backflip. Sun Wukong leaps into the air, covering an amazing distance, tumbling in a somersault cloud style, and uses the 72 transformations to create afterimages (briefly splitting into three versions to attack from different angles). Spider-Man counterattacks by shuttling between roof tiles with agile parkour, shooting webs to trap the clones, and then entangles Wukong's swinging cudgel with webs, triggering a huge shockwave that cracks the roof tiles and scatters golden sparks. Dramatic camera work: fast dolly zoom, dynamic orbiting camera around the fighters, slow motion at key impact moments (collision of webs and cudgel, clash of fists and energy bursts), rapid switching between vast epic panoramic views and close-ups (grim faces / clenched teeth). Hyper-realistic action, perfect physics, detailed fabric folds on Spider-Man's suit and the swaying of Wukong's fur, dramatic rim lighting at sunset, flying debris and golden energy trails, an atmosphere of stirring orchestral music and traditional Chinese percussion. 16:9 cinematic aspect ratio, ultra-high detail, no text, no watermark.
prompts.author: @TheTopBlasterr

prompts.title: 日落屋顶上的史诗级武道对决
prompts.prompt: 两位武术家在日落时的屋顶上打斗，旋转踢和快速出拳，风吹动衣物，流畅的电影级运镜环绕，慢动作凌空踢，史诗般的氛围。

prompts.title: 时空折叠下的神女赛博觉醒
prompts.prompt: 【影片设定】电影级质感，IMAX画幅，ARRI Alexa 65mm，高对比度，赛博朋克美学，8K分辨率。 【核心概念】时空折叠。从古老纯净的盐湖神女，瞬间觉醒为未来都市的霓虹战士。 镜头1：全景，缓慢推镜头。 画面极静。少女身穿红白民族盛装，戴银饰，伫立在如镜面的白色盐湖。阳光圣洁，背景雪山连绵，风吹衣角，神性满满。 镜头2：超特写（ECU），匹配剪辑。 镜头急速推进至少女眼睛。瞳孔瞬间放大，瞳孔中映射出倒退的数字流和蓝色数据光效。 镜头3：跳切，故障艺术干扰。 画面瞬间被强烈的霓虹光撕裂。白色的盐湖背景瞬间变成雨夜中闪烁的赛博城市全息广告牌。 镜头4：中景，低角度仰拍。 视觉重击。她依然站在画面中央，但民族长袍已变成高科技反光机能服。原本的银质头饰变成了金属流光耳机。 镜头5：特写，光影流转。 雨水落在她脸上，反射着粉紫色的霓虹灯光。她对着镜头冷冷一笑，伸手戴上护目镜，气场全开。 镜头6：大远景，定格。 她站在摩天大楼顶端俯瞰整个钢铁森林，身后是巨大的全息投影鲸鱼游过。字幕：“觉醒·未来”。 时长：10秒 | 风格：好莱坞顶级商业片 | 视觉冲击：极强

prompts.prompt_en: [Movie Settings] Cinematic quality, IMAX aspect ratio, ARRI Alexa 65mm, high contrast, Cyberpunk aesthetics, 8K resolution. [Core Concept] Spacetime folding. Instant awakening from an ancient pure Salt Lake Goddess to a Neon Warrior in a futuristic city. Shot 1: Wide shot, slow push in. The picture is extremely quiet. A young girl wears red and white ethnic ceremonial attire, adorned with silver ornaments, standing on a mirror-like white salt lake. The sunlight is holy, snow-capped mountains stretch continuously in the background, wind blows the corners of her clothes, full of divinity. Shot 2: Extreme Close-Up (ECU), match cut. The lens rapidly pushes into the girl's eyes. Pupils dilate instantly, reflecting backward-flowing digital streams and blue data light effects. Shot 3: Jump cut, glitch art interference. The image is instantly torn apart by intense neon light. The white salt lake background instantly transforms into flickering cyber city holographic billboards in a rainy night. Shot 4: Medium shot, low angle looking up. Visual impact. She still stands in the center of the frame, but the ethnic robe has transformed into a high-tech reflective functional suit. The original silver headwear has turned into metallic flowing headphones. Shot 5: Close-up, light and shadow shifting. Rain falls on her face, reflecting pink and purple neon lights. She smiles coldly at the camera, reaches out to put on goggles, full aura released. Shot 6: Extreme long shot, freeze frame. She stands on top of a skyscraper overlooking the entire steel forest, behind her a giant holographic projection whale swims past. Subtitle: "Awakening · Future". Duration: 10 seconds | Style: Top-tier Hollywood commercial film | Visual Impact: Extremely strong
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 明朝权臣怒斥群臣的霸气瞬间
prompts.prompt: @图片扮演明朝官员，朝堂场景，面对群臣的指责，眼神凌厉、语气傲慢又强势，大声说出台词：你有什么资格来教训我，大明朝两京一十三省，是在我的肩上担着，天下苍生这几个字，还轮不到你来说！ 肢体动作配合情绪，有怒斥的感觉
prompts.prompt_zh: @图片扮演明朝官员，朝堂场景，面对群臣的指责，眼神凌厉、语气傲慢又强势，大声说出台词：你有什么资格来教训我，大明朝两京一十三省，是在我的肩上担着，天下苍生这几个字，还轮不到你来说！ 肢体动作配合情绪，有怒斥的感觉
prompts.prompt_en: Role-playing as a Ming Dynasty official, imperial court scene, facing accusations from the group of ministers, sharp and fierce gaze, arrogant and domineering tone, strong and powerful presence, loudly speaking the lines: "What qualifications do you have to lecture me? The two capitals and thirteen provinces of the Great Ming are carried on my shoulders. The words 'the common people of the world' are not for you to say!", body language matching the intense emotion, a sense of angry rebuke and reprimand
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 昏暗KTV里的霓虹光影佳人
prompts.prompt: 真人写实风格，竖屏，第一人称男友视角。在昏暗的KTV包厢内，背景有紫色和蓝色的霓虹激光灯闪烁。一位漂亮的年轻亚洲女性坐在黑色皮沙发上，黑色长发披肩，身穿黑色露肩亮片毛衣，戴着精致项链。 动作描述: 起初她看向旁边，随后转头看向镜头，脸上带着甜美撒娇的笑容开口说话：哎呀，大哥怎么才来呀。镜头随后平滑向下移，展示她修长的大腿。她正在脱掉一只银色满钻的尖头高跟鞋，一只脚已经赤脚踩在反光的地板上，动作自然慵懒。光影质感真实，高清画质。
prompts.prompt_zh: 真人写实风格，竖屏，第一人称男友视角。在昏暗的KTV包厢内，背景有紫色和蓝色的霓虹激光灯闪烁。一位漂亮的年轻亚洲女性坐在黑色皮沙发上，黑色长发披肩，身穿黑色露肩亮片毛衣，戴着精致项链。 动作描述: 起初她看向旁边，随后转头看向镜头，脸上带着甜美撒娇的笑容开口说话：哎呀，大哥怎么才来呀。镜头随后平滑向下移，展示她修长的大腿。她正在脱掉一只银色满钻的尖头高跟鞋，一只脚已经赤脚踩在反光的地板上，动作自然慵懒。光影质感真实，高清画质。
prompts.prompt_en: Photorealistic style, vertical screen, first-person boyfriend POV. Inside a dimly lit KTV private room, background with flashing purple and blue neon laser lights. A beautiful young Asian woman sitting on a black leather sofa, long black hair draped over shoulders, wearing a black off-shoulder sequined sweater, wearing an exquisite necklace. Action description: Initially she looks to the side, then turns her head to look at the camera, with a sweet and coquettish smile on her face opening her mouth to speak: "Oh my, why did you come so late, big brother." The camera then smoothly pans down, showing her slender long legs. She is taking off one silver full-diamond pointed high heel, one foot is already barefoot stepping on the reflective floor, movement natural and lazy. Realistic lighting texture, high definition image quality.
prompts.author: @binghe

prompts.title: 星际离别前的争吵与耳光
prompts.prompt: 一男一女争论关于离开星球的事，男人说了一些侮辱性的话，她扇了他一巴掌并愤然离去，他转向远处的火箭

prompts.title: 晨光中刚睡醒的慵懒甜美少女
prompts.prompt:
【风格】日常Vlog随手拍风格，iPhone原相机质感，画面略带动态模糊，不经意间的生活感抓拍，低画质颗粒感，真实不做作，日常感十足。

【时长】15秒

【主角】18岁舞蹈生美少女，笔直光滑的黑色波浪发自然披散在肩上（刚睡醒的慵懒感），齐眉刘海，皮肤白皙水润，冷白皮，面部特征参考图1。穿着oversized米白色针织开衫（露出一侧肩膀），赤着脚。耳侧别着粉色樱花小发夹。气质软糯甜美，少女感十足。

【场景】温馨少女卧室，床上堆着毛绒小熊和兔子玩偶，被子有点凌乱，床头柜上有暖黄色台灯和几本漫画书，阳光透过白色窗帘洒进来，充满慵懒的周末早晨氛围。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：慵懒苏醒
画面：45度侧角上半身特写，光线柔和温暖。主角刚睡醒坐在床边，头发有点凌乱但很可爱。
动作：她缓缓伸了个懒腰，然后低头揉眼睛，打了个小哈欠，动作慵懒自然。
表情：眼睛半睁半闭，表情慵懒又带点撒娇。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：慵懒撒娇
画面：镜头稍微拉近，晨光洒在她的侧脸上，皮肤白得发光。
动作：她抬起头，一只手撑在床上，另一只手自然地整理散落的刘海。然后她侧过脸看镜头，嘴角微微上扬。
表情：眼睛里有刚睡醒的迷糊感，但笑得很甜很软。

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：早安问候
画面：转向镜头正前方，双手抱着怀里的毛绒小熊。
动作：她把脸贴在小熊头上蹭了蹭，然后对着镜头轻轻挥手，嘴唇微动像在说"早安"。
表情：软糯的笑，眼睛弯成月牙，脸颊粉粉的，整个人像一只刚睡醒的小猫。

【画面质感】iPhone原相机直出感，轻微颗粒感，动态模糊，不经意的抓拍角度，构图随意但真实。

prompts.prompt_en:
【Style】Daily Vlog snapshot style, iPhone original camera texture, slight motion blur in the frame, casual life snapshot, low-quality graininess, authentic and unpretentious, full of daily sense.
【Duration】15 seconds
【Protagonist】18-year-old dance student beauty, straight smooth black wavy hair naturally draped over shoulders (lazy feeling just after waking up), bangs, fair and moist skin, cold white skin, facial features refer to Image 1. Wearing an oversized beige knitted cardigan (revealing one shoulder), barefoot. A small pink cherry blossom hair clip pinned to the side of the ear. Temperament is soft and sweet, full of girlishness.
【Scene】Cozy girly bedroom, plush teddy bears and bunny dolls piled on the bed, quilt slightly messy, warm yellow table lamp and a few manga books on the bedside table, sunlight streaming in through white curtains, full of lazy weekend morning atmosphere.
[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Lazy Awakening
Image: 45-degree side angle upper body close-up, soft and warm lighting. Protagonist just woke up sitting by the bed, hair slightly messy but cute.
Action: She slowly stretches, then lowers her head to rub her eyes, gives a small yawn, movements are lazy and natural.
Expression: Eyes half-open half-closed, expression lazy with a hint of acting cute.
[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Lazy Cuteness
Image: Camera zooms in slightly, morning light spills on her side profile, skin glowing white.
Action: She lifts her head, one hand supporting on the bed, the other hand naturally arranging scattered bangs. Then she turns her face to look at the camera, corners of mouth slightly raised.
Expression: Eyes have the confusion of just waking up, but smile is sweet and soft.
[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Good Morning Greeting
Image: Turn to front of camera, hands hugging the plush teddy bear in arms.
Action: She rubs her face against the bear's head, then gently waves at the camera, lips moving slightly as if saying "Good Morning".
Expression: Soft smile, eyes curved like crescents, cheeks pink, whole person like a kitten just waking up.
【Image Texture】iPhone original camera straight-out feel, slight graininess, motion blur, casual snapshot angle, composition random but authentic.
prompts.author: @Adam38363368936

prompts.title: 晨光中慵懒撒娇的赖床女友视角
prompts.prompt:
镜头保持高角度俯拍。女子抓着被角的手指在枕头上无意识地摩挲了一下，随后睡眼惺忪地抬起头，眼神从下往上懵懂地看着镜头，带着毫不掩饰的恋眷感。她轻轻蹭了一下枕头，原本埋着的脸蛋微微露出来，做出一副没睡醒不想起床的表情。
她向着镜头伸出双臂，手指在晨光中虚抓了两下，身体顺势在被窝里拱了拱，用那种特有的、沙哑且带着一点点起床气的鼻音，软绵绵地哼唧道：“光……好亮呀……（哈欠）不想起，你再陪我睡会儿嘛……” 尾音带着一丝梦呓般的模糊，飘散在窗外清脆的鸟叫声中。
prompts.prompt_zh:
镜头保持高角度俯拍。女子抓着被角的手指在枕头上无意识地摩挲了一下，随后睡眼惺忪地抬起头，眼神从下往上懵懂地看着镜头，带着毫不掩饰的恋眷感。她轻轻蹭了一下枕头，原本埋着的脸蛋微微露出来，做出一副没睡醒不想起床的表情。
她向着镜头伸出双臂，手指在晨光中虚抓了两下，身体顺势在被窝里拱了拱，用那种特有的、沙哑且带着一点点起床气的鼻音，软绵绵地哼唧道：“光……好亮呀……（哈欠）不想起，你再陪我睡会儿嘛……” 尾音带着一丝梦呓般的模糊，飘散在窗外清脆的鸟叫声中。
prompts.prompt_en: The camera maintains a high-angle overhead shot. The woman's fingers clutching the corner of the quilt unconsciously stroke the pillow, then she lifts her head with sleepy eyes, looking up at the camera innocently, with undisguised affection. She gently nuzzles the pillow, revealing her face that was buried in it, making an expression of not being fully awake and not wanting to get up. She stretches her arms towards the camera, her fingers grasping at the air in the morning light, her body arching comfortably under the covers. Using that unique, hoarse nasal voice with a hint of morning grumpiness, she softly whines: "The light... is so bright... (yawn) I don't want to get up, stay and sleep with me a little longer..." The trailing voice carries a dreamlike haziness, drifting away amidst the crisp chirping of birds outside the window.
prompts.author: @Leslieyu0

【画面质感】iPhone原相机直出感，轻微颗粒感，动态模糊，不经意的抓拍角度，构图随意但真实。
是真人模特拍摄，不是动画片，模特身上的汗水、皮肤的光泽，非常清晰。切记不是动画片，这个是实拍。

【场景】温馨少女卧室，床上堆着毛绒小熊和兔子玩偶，被子有点凌乱，床头柜上有暖黄色台灯和几本漫画书，阳光透过白色窗帘洒进来，充满慵懒的周末早晨氛围。

画面：镜头稍微拉近，晨光洒在她的侧脸上，皮肤白得发光。
动作：她抬起头，一只手撑在床上，另一只手自然地整理散落的刘海。然后她侧过脸看镜头，嘴角微微上扬。
表情：眼睛里有刚睡醒的迷糊感，但笑得很甜很软。

【Style】Daily Vlog snapshot style, iPhone original camera texture, slight motion blur in the frame, candid shot with casual slice-of-life feel, low-quality grain, realistic and unpretentious, full of daily life atmosphere.

【Duration】15 seconds

【Protagonist】Fair complexion, facial features reference @【@Image1】, straight smooth long black hair naturally draped over shoulders (lazy vibe just waking up), bangs reaching eyebrows, exquisite and small oval face, skin fair and hydrated, cold white skin tone. Wearing clothing, barefoot. A small pink cherry blossom hair clip pinned to the side of the ear. Temperament is soft and sweet, full of girlishness.

【Scene】Warm girly bedroom, plush teddy bears and bunny dolls piled on the bed, duvet slightly messy, warm yellow bedside lamp and several manga books on the nightstand, sunlight spilling in through white curtains, filled with a lazy weekend morning atmosphere.

[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Lazy Awakening
Visual: 45-degree side angle upper body close-up, soft and warm lighting. She just woke up sitting by the bed, hair a bit messy but cute.
Action: She slowly stretches, then lowers her head to rub her eyes, gives a little yawn, movements lazy and natural.
Expression: Eyes half-open half-closed, expression lazy with a hint of acting cute.

[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Lazy Cuteness
Visual: Camera zooms in slightly, morning light spills on her side profile, skin glowing white.
Action: She lifts her head, one hand propping on the bed, the other hand naturally arranging scattered bangs. Then she turns her face to look at the lens, corners of mouth slightly raised.
Expression: Eyes have the dazed feeling of just waking up, but the smile is very sweet and soft.

[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Morning Greeting
Visual: She turns to face the front of the lens, holding a plush teddy bear in her arms.
Action: She rubs her face against the bear's head, then waves gently at the lens, lips moving slightly saying "Baby, good morning".
Expression: Soft smile, eyes curved like crescents, cheeks pink, the whole person looks like a kitten just waking up.

【Visual Texture】iPhone original camera straight-out-of-camera feel, slight grain, motion blur, candid camera angle, composition casual but real. It is a real human model shoot, not animation, sweat on the model's body, gloss of the skin, very clear. Remember not animation, this is live-action.

prompts.title: 晨光街角猫咪大厨摊煎饼
prompts.prompt: 主角为【@图1】 场景是城市街道早晨的早饭摊，摊位参考【@图2】 镜头固定视角【@图1】小猫左手拿一个大勺右手拿着一个木质刮板将左手勺中的面糊刮下，左手将大勺放下同时右手将面糊在鏊子上，左手拿起一个鸡蛋在鏊子边缘磕一下，单手将鸡蛋打在面饼上，然后将鸡蛋壳往后面直接扔掉，右手将鸡蛋摊开。然后将木质刮板放下右手拿起小铲子将面饼刮起并对折，左手拿出一个蘸着甜面酱的刷子在面饼上刷三次酱，之后右手拿出一个脆饼掰开叠放在面饼上。之后左手拿一些海带丝右手拿一些土豆丝撒在面饼上，然后将面饼卷起，右手拿起小铲子对着煎饼卷中间切下切成两半，最后拿起一个塑料袋装起来递给镜头方向

prompts.prompt_en: The protagonist is [Image 1]. The scene is a breakfast stall on a city street in the morning, the stall reference is [Image 2]. Fixed camera angle [Image 1]. The kitten holds a large ladle in its left hand and a wooden scraper in its right hand, scraping the batter from the ladle in its left hand. The left hand puts down the large ladle while the right hand simultaneously spreads the batter onto the griddle. The left hand picks up an egg and cracks it on the edge of the griddle, single-handedly cracking the egg onto the pancake, then throwing the eggshell directly behind. The right hand spreads the egg out. Then the wooden scraper is put down, and the right hand picks up a small spatula to scrape up the pancake and fold it in half. The left hand takes a brush dipped in sweet bean sauce and brushes the sauce on the pancake three times. Afterwards, the right hand takes a crispy cracker, breaks it open, and stacks it on the pancake. Then the left hand takes some shredded kelp and the right hand takes some shredded potatoes and sprinkles them on the pancake. Then the pancake is rolled up, the right hand picks up the small spatula and cuts down the middle of the pancake roll to cut it in half. Finally, picking up a plastic bag to pack it and handing it towards the camera direction.

prompts.title: 暖色街头的紫发回眸
prompts.prompt: 动漫风格，第一视角，我走在热闹的街道上，不小心轻轻撞到了身前的女孩，她缓缓回过头，紫色的双马尾顺着动作轻轻扬起，发梢带着柔和的光泽，绿色的眼眸像被阳光照透的翡翠，干净又透亮。 长长的睫毛轻轻颤动，侧脸线条干净柔和，一抬眼的瞬间，干净又惊艳，我（男的）用日语对女孩说：“对不起！我不是故意的” 女孩说：“没关系~”下面有字幕。 身后是暖色调的街道，招牌灯光朦胧，风轻轻吹过，衬得她整个人都像从动漫里走出来一样，温柔又耀眼，背景音乐在女孩转身那一刻刚好卡点上。

prompts.prompt_en: Anime style, first-person perspective, I am walking on a lively street, accidentally gently bumping into the girl in front, she slowly turns her head back, purple twin ponytails gently rising with the movement, hair tips with soft luster, green eyes like emeralds penetrated by sunlight, clean and translucent. Long eyelashes trembling gently, side profile lines clean and soft, the moment she looks up, clean and stunning, I (male) say to the girl in Japanese: "Sorry! I didn't mean it", the girl says: "It's okay~" with subtitles below. Behind is a warm-toned street, sign lights are hazy, wind blowing gently, setting off her whole person as if she walked out of an anime, gentle and dazzling, background music hits the beat right at the moment the girl turns around.

prompts.title: 暗夜塔罗与破碎镜面下的神秘女巫
prompts.prompt:
【0-1秒 纯黑起镜】
画面为纯黑背景，正中央悬浮一张暗黑色鎏金塔罗牌，牌面印有新月与荆棘暗纹，在黑暗中泛着冷调微光，氛围静谧神秘。
 
【1-3秒 仅手入镜】
一只3D国漫质感的手从右侧入镜，肌肤白皙细腻如冷瓷，指节纤细修长，仅用食指与中指轻稳捏住塔罗牌边缘。手腕佩戴多层复古银质巫师手链，缀有新月、水晶与符文挂饰，精致华丽。此阶段画面仅出现手与塔罗牌，无其他元素。
 
【3-5秒 优雅翻牌】
手指以充满仪式感的优雅动作缓缓翻转塔罗牌，牌面旋开时透出淡紫色幽光，随机出现2张塔罗牌画面。
 
【5-8秒 甩牌砸镜碎裂】
手腕优雅上扬，做出高贵的巫师式动作，将塔罗牌猛地甩向镜头。卡牌裹挟冷光撞击在镜面上，镜面瞬间呈蛛网状炸裂，玻璃碎片飞溅，塔罗牌化为光尘消散。
 
【8-10秒 女主显现】
镜面破碎的光影与薄雾中，身形高挑修长、曲线凹凸有致的巫师女主缓缓浮现。她身着西欧复古修身巫师礼袍，暗纹刺绣尽显低调奢华，气场高贵冷艳。头顶垂落如婚纱般的柔纱头纱，遮挡住眉眼与上半张脸，仅露出精致饱满的樱桃小嘴。她保持捏牌的优雅姿态，手链微光闪烁，周身萦绕薄雾，神秘又强大。

prompts.prompt_en:
[0-1s Pure Black Opening]
The screen has a pure black background. A dark black gilded tarot card floats in the exact center. The card face is printed with dark patterns of a crescent moon and thorns, glowing with a cool, faint light in the darkness. The atmosphere is quiet and mysterious.

[1-3s Hand Only Entering Frame]
A hand with 3D Chinese animation texture enters from the right. The skin is fair and delicate like cold porcelain, with slender fingers. The index and middle fingers lightly and steadily pinch the edge of the tarot card. The wrist wears multi-layered vintage silver wizard bracelets, adorned with crescent moon, crystal, and rune charms, exquisite and gorgeous. At this stage, only the hand and tarot card appear in the frame, with no other elements.

[3-5s Elegant Card Flip]
The fingers slowly flip the tarot card with an elegant movement full of ritualistic sense. As the card face rotates open, a pale purple ghostly light shines through, and two tarot card images randomly appear.

[5-8s Card Throw Shattering Lens]
The wrist raises elegantly, making a noble wizard-like motion, throwing the tarot card violently towards the lens. The card, wrapped in cold light, impacts the mirror surface. The mirror instantly shatters in a spiderweb pattern, glass shards flying, and the tarot card dissipates into light dust.

[8-10s Female Lead Appearance]
Amidst the light, shadow, and thin mist of the shattered mirror, a tall and slender female wizard with exquisite curves slowly emerges. She wears a Western European vintage fitted wizard robe, with dark embroidery showing low-key luxury, and her aura is noble and cool. A soft veil like a wedding veil falls from the top of her head, covering her eyebrows, eyes, and upper face, revealing only a delicate and full cherry mouth. She maintains the elegant posture of holding the card, the bracelet shimmering, surrounded by thin mist, mysterious and powerful.
prompts.author: @liyue_ai

prompts.title: 暗影裁缝的致命华尔兹
prompts.prompt:
SUBJECTS (主体):
人物： 一位身形极度干练、手臂肌肉线条如钢丝般的女性高定裁缝，眼神冷冽如针尖。
着装： 融合了旗袍元素的深色战术马甲，双臂裸露，前臂缠绕着暗红色的丝绸护腕（用于增加摩擦力）；手指修长且指尖带有金属护具。 
动作风格： 融合了“咏春”的寸劲与“太极”的圆转。动作遵循（蓄力 → 极速出击 → 瞬间静止）的节奏，强调手指的爆发力和丝绸在空中的张力。

ENVIRONMENT (环境):
昏暗的高级私人工作室。背景是整面墙的红木线轴架，成千上万个色块形成几何美感；中心是一张巨大的黑色大理石裁剪台，表面光可鉴人。上方悬挂着单点聚焦的工业冷光灯，空气中漂浮着细微的纤维微粒。

MOOD (氛围):
极度专注、肃杀、带有仪式感的华丽；动作如外科医生般精确，视觉感官上极具压迫力。

TIMELINE (时间线):
0:00-0:02: 特写/广角POV。 裁缝双手撑在黑色大理石台面，低头静止。镜头极速推进，她猛然抬头，双眼锁定镜头（眼神杀）。右手虚空一抓，一匹暗紫色的重磅真丝像长蛇一样从台面滑过，被她单手“锁”住。

0:02-0:05: 剪辑切换/手持感。 裁缝将绸缎抛向空中。她身形如残影，右手持银色长剪，在绸缎下落的瞬间进行“盲剪”。不是普通的裁剪，而是伴随着武术出拳的劲道，剪刀划过空气发出“嗤”的破空声，布料断口极其平整，丝毫不乱。
0:05-0:07: 移动镜头。 她一个侧跨步滑到工作台另一端。单手横扫，数枚钢针从针垫上震起，悬浮在半空。她运劲一推，钢针像暗器一样精准没入远处的衣架样版中，针尾震颤，发出金属鸣音。

0:07-0:10: 连续镜头。 裁缝开始“控线”。她扯出一条金丝，通过手指指缝的缠绕，像操纵傀儡线一样控制绸缎在空中自动折叠、成型。每一次手指的弹拨都伴随着火花般的静电。她用肘部撞击台面，压脚弹起，她瞬间接住并锁死在面料上。

0:10-0:12: 匹配剪辑。 裁缝原地一个急转，外衣下摆如圆阵散开。她双手合拢，将成型的西装领口猛地一拉，最后一道金线在空中划出完美的弧线自动缝合。动作从极快（残影）瞬间切入极慢（定格）。

0:12-0:15: 稳定POV。 尘埃落定。她单手拎起成品礼服，用力一振，礼服在镜头前展开。镜头聚焦在领口的精美刺绣上。她用指甲轻弹纽扣——纽扣颤动。随后她转身走向阴影，留下一道背影，画面被升起的昂贵香水雾气完全覆盖，干净利落地淡出。
prompts.prompt_zh:
SUBJECTS (主体):
人物： 一位身形极度干练、手臂肌肉线条如钢丝般的女性高定裁缝，眼神冷冽如针尖。
着装： 融合了旗袍元素的深色战术马甲，双臂裸露，前臂缠绕着暗红色的丝绸护腕（用于增加摩擦力）；手指修长且指尖带有金属护具。 
动作风格： 融合了“咏春”的寸劲与“太极”的圆转。动作遵循（蓄力 → 极速出击 → 瞬间静止）的节奏，强调手指的爆发力和丝绸在空中的张力。

ENVIRONMENT (环境):
昏暗的高级私人工作室。背景是整面墙的红木线轴架，成千上万个色块形成几何美感；中心是一张巨大的黑色大理石裁剪台，表面光可鉴人。上方悬挂着单点聚焦的工业冷光灯，空气中漂浮着细微的纤维微粒。

MOOD (氛围):
极度专注、肃杀、带有仪式感的华丽；动作如外科医生般精确，视觉感官上极具压迫力。

prompts.prompt_en:
SUBJECTS:
Characters: A female haute couture tailor with an extremely lean and capable figure, arm muscle lines like steel wires, eyes cold and sharp as needle tips.
Clothing: A dark tactical vest incorporating cheongsam elements, bare arms, forearms wrapped with dark red silk wristbands (used to increase friction); slender fingers with metal fingertip guards.
Action Style: Integrating the inch-power of "Wing Chun" and the circular transitions of "Tai Chi". The movements follow a rhythm of (charging power -> extremely fast strike -> instant stillness), emphasizing the explosive power of the fingers and the tension of silk in the air.

ENVIRONMENT:
A dimly lit high-end private studio. The background is a wall-to-wall mahogany spool rack, with tens of thousands of color blocks forming a geometric aesthetic; in the center is a huge black marble cutting table with a mirror-like surface. A single-point focused industrial cold light hangs above, with tiny fiber particles floating in the air.

MOOD:
Extremely focused, chilling, gorgeous with a sense of ritual; movements as precise as a surgeon's, visually highly oppressive.

TIMELINE:
0:00-0:02: Close-up/Wide-angle POV. The tailor rests both hands on the black marble tabletop, head lowered and still. The camera rushes forward extremely fast, she suddenly looks up, eyes locking onto the camera (killer gaze). Her right hand grabs in the void, a bolt of dark purple heavy silk slides across the tabletop like a long snake, "locked" by her single hand.

0:02-0:05: Cut switch/Handheld feel. The tailor throws the satin into the air. Her figure is like an afterimage, holding a silver long scissors in her right hand, performing a "blind cut" the moment the satin falls. It is not ordinary cutting, but accompanied by the force of martial arts punching, the scissors slice through the air making a "hiss" sound of breaking the air, the fabric's cut is extremely neat, without the slightest mess.

0:05-0:07: Moving camera. She slides to the other end of the workbench with a side step. With a single horizontal sweep, several steel needles are shaken from the pincushion, suspended in mid-air. She pushes with applied force, the steel needles accurately sink into a distant hanger pattern like hidden weapons, the needle tails vibrate, emitting a metallic ringing sound.

0:07-0:10: Continuous shot. The tailor begins "thread control". She pulls out a gold thread, through the wrapping between her fingers, she controls the satin to automatically fold and take shape in the air like manipulating puppet strings. Every flick of her fingers is accompanied by spark-like static electricity. She hits the tabletop with her elbow, the presser foot bounces up, she instantly catches it and locks it dead onto the fabric.

0:10-0:12: Match cut. The tailor makes a sudden spin in place, the hem of her outer garment spreads out like a circular array. She brings her hands together, fiercely pulling the formed suit collar, the last gold thread draws a perfect arc in the air and automatically sews. The movement instantly cuts from extremely fast (afterimage) to extremely slow (freeze frame).

0:12-0:15: Stable POV. The dust settles. She lifts the finished dress with one hand, shakes it forcefully, the dress unfolds in front of the camera. The camera focuses on the exquisite embroidery on the collar. She lightly flicks the button with her fingernail—the button trembles. Then she turns and walks into the shadows, leaving a back view, the screen is completely covered by the rising mist of expensive perfume, cleanly fading out.

prompts.title: 暗月剑客对决
prompts.prompt:
【风格】好莱坞真人特效大片(Hollywood Live-Action Blockbuster)，IMAX电影画质，8K超清，真实摄影(Photorealistic)，暗黑奇幻(Dark Fantasy)，虚幻引擎5写实渲染，无动漫感。
【时长】15秒
【场景】月光下真实的迷雾森林，地面是湿润的泥土和真实的落叶。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：真人演绎·水之呼吸(Realistic Water FX)。
【特写】一名亚洲少年剑客(真实演员脸部毛孔可见)，身穿绿黑格纹的粗布羽织(布料纹理清晰)。
动作：他在月光下双手握刀，压低重心。
特效：随着他呼吸，刀刃上并未出现卡通水流，而是凝聚出**高度写实的、透明且发光的加压高压水流(Hyper-realistic Fluid Simulation)**。水流像一条活龙一样缠绕着真实的刀身，水滴飞溅在镜头上，折射出月光。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：雷霆一闪·极致速度(Lightning Plasma)。
【中景/高速摄影】对面是一名染着金发的青年剑客(真实发丝飘动)，身穿黄色三角纹理的织物外套。
动作：他做出居合斩的起手式，脚下的泥土因为用力过猛而炸裂。
特效：空气中爆发出**真实的刺眼蓝白色电流(Real Plasma Arcs)**，而不是黄色卡通闪电。电流击穿了周围的真实树木，留下烧焦的痕迹。

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：宿命对决·物理碰撞(Physics Clash)。
【慢动作/大爆炸】两人在画面中心极速对撞。
动作：实体水流巨剑与雷电光刃狠狠撞击在一起。
特效：没有漫画线条，只有**真实的物理粒子爆炸**。大量的水蒸气、泥浆、被震断的树枝和耀眼的电火花在空中四散飞溅。冲击波将两人脚下的积水震起一圈圈真实的涟漪。画面极具重量感和破坏力。

prompts.prompt_en:
【Style】Hollywood Live-Action Blockbuster, IMAX movie quality, 8K ultra-clear, Photorealistic, Dark Fantasy, Unreal Engine 5 realistic rendering, no anime feel.
【Duration】15 seconds
【Scene】Real misty forest under moonlight, ground is wet soil and real fallen leaves.

[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Realistic Water FX.
【Close-up】An Asian teenage swordsman (visible facial pores of real actor), wearing a green and black plaid coarse cloth haori (clear fabric texture).
Action: Holding a sword with both hands under the moonlight, lowering his center of gravity.
Special Effects: As he breathes, no cartoon water appears on the blade, but **hyper-realistic, transparent and glowing pressurized high-pressure water** condenses. The water wraps around the real sword like a living dragon, water droplets splashing on the lens, refracting the moonlight.

[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Lightning Plasma.
【Medium shot/high-speed photography】Opposite is a teenage swordsman with dyed blond hair (real hair strands fluttering), wearing a yellow triangular textured fabric jacket.
Action: He assumes the starting stance of a draw cut, the mud under his feet explodes from the excessive force.
Special Effects: **Real dazzling blue-white electrical arcs** burst in the air, not yellow cartoon lightning. The electric arcs penetrate the surrounding real trees, leaving burn marks.

[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Physics Clash.
【Slow motion/big explosion】The two men collide at high speed in the center of the frame.
Action: The physical water giant sword and the lightning blade violently collide.
Special Effects: No comic lines, only **real physical particle explosions**. Large amounts of water vapor, mud, broken branches and dazzling electric sparks scatter in the air. The shockwave lifts the accumulated water at their feet into real ripples. The image has a strong sense of weight and destructive power.

prompts.title: 暗调光影下的黑衣韵律舞动瞬间
prompts.prompt: **### 视觉风格** 9:16 竖构图，4K 超清写实画质。低调布光风格，高对比度。冷色调环境背景与主体全黑服装形成鲜明对比，突出人物轮廓和皮肤光泽，具有社交媒体短视频特有的锐利质感。 **### 场景描述** 室内居家环境（疑似现代风格厨房或客厅），背景可见模糊的白色橱柜。主体是一位长发年轻女性，身穿黑色紧身长袖露脐上衣和热裤 [图 1]，在昏暗空间中伴随音乐跳着极具韵律感的现代舞，散发着自信与诱惑。 **### 摄影技巧** 机位：固定机位（Lock-off），保持画面稳定，依靠人物在画面中的运动制造动感。 镜头：50mm 标准人像焦段，光圈 f/2.8 左右，提供适中景深，突出主体同时保留环境氛围。 灯光：单侧硬光（侧逆光），在主体面部和身体右侧投射高光，左侧处于阴影中，增强立体感。 情绪：自信、诱惑、动感、酷。 **### 动作列表** - 双手举起触碰后脑勺，随后向两侧打开，同时臀部大幅度左右摇摆。 - 身体呈现流畅的 S 形波浪运动（Body Roll），展现核心控制力。 - 头部随节奏轻微摆动，长发随动作自然甩动。

prompts.prompt_en: **### Visual Style** 9:16 vertical composition, 4K ultra-realistic quality. Low-key lighting style, high contrast. The cool-toned environmental background forms a sharp contrast with the subject's all-black outfit, highlighting the figure's silhouette and skin sheen, possessing the sharp texture characteristic of social media short videos. **### Scene Description** Indoor home environment (suspected modern style kitchen or living room), blurred white cabinets visible in the background. The subject is a young woman with long hair, wearing a black tight long-sleeve crop top and hot pants [Image 1], dancing a rhythmic modern dance in a dim space accompanied by music, exuding confidence and seduction. **### Photography Techniques** Camera Position: Fixed position (Lock-off), keeping the frame stable, relying on the character's movement within the frame to create a sense of motion. Lens: 50mm standard portrait focal length, aperture around f/2.8, providing moderate depth of field, highlighting the subject while retaining environmental atmosphere. Lighting: Single-sided hard light (side-backlight), casting highlights on the right side of the subject's face and body, while the left side remains in shadow, enhancing three-dimensionality. Mood: Confident, seductive, dynamic, cool. **### Action List** - Raise both hands to touch the back of the head, then open them to the sides, while swinging the hips significantly left and right. - The body presents a fluid S-shaped wave motion (Body Roll), demonstrating core control. - The head sways slightly with the rhythm, and long hair swings naturally with the movement.

prompts.title: 暗调电影感下的跪地求爱瞬间
prompts.prompt:
一男一女，超高颜值，细腻冷白皮，电影感，故事感，暗调。
客厅内，18岁清纯女主坐在沙发上身着碎花睡裙，精致淡妆，柔顺蓬松长发 发尾小波浪。

俊美斯文白净男主西装革履跪在女生面前与她平视，他黑色微微凌乱短发后疏漏出光洁的额头，绝美丹凤眼长睫毛，几乎没有一丝毛孔，带着无框眼镜，目光温柔无奈看着女主。

开口声音低沉：“我错了，原谅我。”

女主坐在沙发上翘着二郎腿双手抱胸傲娇撇了他一眼：“我凭什么原谅你？”

男主闻言内心刺痛，抬手想触摸她的脸颊：“因为，因为没有你的夜晚，连时间都在惩罚我。”

女主仍然傲娇：“那是你的事。”

prompts.prompt_en: One man and one woman, ultra-high appearance score, delicate cool white skin, cinematic feel, storytelling, dark tone. Inside the living room, an 18-year-old innocent female lead sits on the sofa wearing a floral nightgown, with exquisite light makeup, soft and fluffy long hair with small waves at the ends. A handsome, gentle, and fair male lead in a suit and leather shoes kneels in front of the girl to be at eye level with her; his black slightly messy short hair reveals a clean forehead, stunning phoenix eyes, long eyelashes, almost pore-less skin, wearing rimless glasses, looking at the female lead with a gentle and helpless gaze. He speaks in a low voice: "I was wrong, forgive me." The female lead sits on the sofa with her legs crossed and arms folded across her chest, glancing at him arrogantly: "Why should I forgive you?" Hearing this, the male lead feels a sting in his heart and raises his hand to touch her cheek: "Because, because in the nights without you, even time is punishing me." The female lead remains arrogant: "That's your business."
prompts.author: @liyue_ai

prompts.title: 暴雨夜男主跪地痛哭挽留燕子
prompts.prompt: 【风格】国产爆款短剧（Viral Short Drama），竖屏构图（9:16 Portrait Ratio），极致虐心（Melodramatic），雨夜街头，高对比度霓虹光影，手持摄影晃动感。 【时长】15秒 【角色】卑微男主（浑身湿透，头发凌乱，欲哭无泪）VS 决绝女主“燕子”（妆容精致，冷漠脸）。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：决绝登车（The Departure）。 暴雨夜的繁华街头。一辆黑色劳斯莱斯（或迈克尔巴赫）停在路边，后座车门打开。女主冷漠地甩开男主拉扯的手，头也不回地坐进豪车后排。男主扒着车窗哭喊，被保镖无情拉开。车门重重关上。 【男主状态】满脸泪水与雨水交织，眼神绝望。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：撕心裂肺的追逐（The Chase & The Meme Line）。 豪车起步加速驶离。男主不顾一切地在后面狂奔追赶，踉踉跄跄，鞋子都跑掉一只。镜头紧跟男主脸部特写，疯狂晃动。他一边跑一边冲着远去的车尾灯嘶吼。 【核心台词口型指导】男主崩溃大喊：“燕子！燕子！你不要走！你走了我可怎么办啊！”（表情极其痛苦扭曲）。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：绝望跪地（The Despair）。 豪车的尾灯消失在街角尽头。男主体力不支，重重地跪倒在湿漉漉的柏油马路上，对着空荡荡的街道捶胸顿足，嚎啕大哭。镜头慢慢拉高俯拍，显得他无比渺小和凄凉。雨水不断打在他身上。

prompts.prompt_en: 【Style】Viral Short Drama, 9:16 Portrait Ratio, Melodramatic, Rainy Night Street, High Contrast Neon Light and Shadow, Handheld Camera Shake. 【Duration】15 Seconds 【Character】Humble Male Lead (Soaked, Messy Hair, Want to Cry but No Tears) VS Ruthless Female Lead "Swallow" (Exquisite Makeup, Cold Face). [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: The Departure. Busy street on a stormy night. A black Rolls-Royce (or Maybach) stops by the roadside, rear door opens. The female lead coldly shakes off the male lead's pulling hand, gets into the back seat of the luxury car without looking back. The male lead clings to the car window crying and shouting, pulled away ruthlessly by bodyguards. The car door slams shut heavily. 【Male Lead Status】Face covered with tears and rain mixed together, desperate look in eyes. [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: The Chase & The Meme Line. The luxury car starts to accelerate away. The male lead desperately runs after it, stumbling, losing one shoe. The camera closely follows the male lead's face close-up, shaking crazily. While running, he roars at the receding taillights. 【Core Dialogue Lip Sync Guide】The male lead screams hysterically: "Swallow! Swallow! Don't go! What will I do if you leave!" (Expression extremely painful and distorted). [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: The Despair. The taillights of the luxury car disappear at the end of the street corner. The male lead runs out of strength, kneels heavily on the wet asphalt road, beating his chest and stamping his feet towards the empty street, crying loudly. The camera slowly pulls up to a high angle shot, making him look incredibly small and miserable. Rain keeps hitting his body.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 暴雨夜船厂中潜行的重甲剑齿虎
prompts.prompt: 夜晚一个密集的、受暴雨侵袭的造船场，高耸的起重机和半建造的战舰船体形成了一个生锈钢铁的迷宫。一只巨大的装甲剑齿虎，疤痕累累且久经沙场，带有发光的琥珀色眼睛以及刻有古代符文的板状肩甲，正在潜行
prompts.prompt_zh: 夜晚一个密集的、受暴雨侵袭的造船场，高耸的起重机和半建造的战舰船体形成了一个生锈钢铁的迷宫。一只巨大的装甲剑齿虎，疤痕累累且久经沙场，带有发光的琥珀色眼睛以及刻有古代符文的板状肩甲，正在潜行
prompts.prompt_en: A dense, rain-battered shipyard at night, towering cranes and half-built warship hulls forming a maze of rusted steel. A massive armored sabertooth cat, scarred and battle-worn with glowing amber eyes and plated shoulder armor etched with ancient glyphs, stalks

prompts.title: 暴雨街头霸总雨中深情挽留真爱
prompts.prompt: 【风格】国产热门短剧风（Mini-Drama Style），极致快剪节奏，高颜值滤镜，情绪爆发，雨夜唯美虐心。 【时长】15秒 【角色】深情霸总男主（黑风衣，湿发，眼眶通红）VS 倔强破碎感女主（白裙，满脸泪痕）。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：冲突快切组合（Rapid Cuts）。 暴雨街头。女主决绝转身要走（背影）。男主冲上来一把拉住她的手腕（特写）。女主猛然回头，眼神是爱恨交织的痛苦。 【对白口型指导】女主哭喊：“放手！我们结束了！” [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：真相爆发（Intense Close-ups）。 男主死不放手，雨水在两人脸上横流。男主急切地从怀里掏出一枚戒指（或一份报告），举到她眼前，手指颤抖。 【对白口型指导】男主嘶吼：“你看清楚！我从来没有骗过你！” [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：情感决堤（Climax）。 女主看清手中之物的瞬间，瞳孔地震（极近特写），捂住嘴巴，防线崩溃。下一秒，男主猛地将她拉入怀中死死抱住，仿佛要揉进骨子里。镜头快速旋转环绕拍摄相拥的两人。 【对白口型指导】女主埋头痛哭（无声/呜咽）。

prompts.prompt_en: [Style] Chinese popular mini-drama style (Mini-Drama Style), extreme fast-cutting rhythm, high beauty filter, emotional outburst, beautiful but agonizing rainy night. [Duration] 15 seconds [Characters] Deeply affectionate domineering CEO male lead (black trench coat, wet hair, red eyes) VS stubborn and fragile female lead (white dress, tear-stained face). [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Conflict rapid cut combination (Rapid Cuts). Rainstorm street. The female lead turns around resolutely to leave (view from behind). The male lead rushes up and grabs her wrist (close-up). The female lead turns her head abruptly, her eyes showing the pain of intertwined love and hate. [Dialogue Lip-sync Guidance] Female lead cries out: "Let go! We are done!" [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Truth explosion (Intense Close-ups). The male lead refuses to let go, rain flowing across both their faces. The male lead anxiously takes out a ring (or a report) from his bosom, holds it before her eyes, his fingers trembling. [Dialogue Lip-sync Guidance] Male lead roars: "Look clearly! I never lied to you!" [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Emotional dam break (Climax). The instant the female lead sees the object clearly, her pupils quake (extreme close-up), she covers her mouth, her defenses crumbling. The next second, the male lead violently pulls her into his arms and holds her tight, as if to merge her into his bones. The camera quickly rotates and orbits around the embracing couple. [Dialogue Lip-sync Guidance] Female lead buries her head and sobs (silent/whimpering).
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 暴风雨中巨猫泰坦怒战海军舰队
prompts.prompt: 暴风雨之夜的海洋，闪电下的巨浪。随着一只巨大的猫科泰坦从深处升起，大海剧烈翻腾，水流慢动作般从它的皮毛上倾泻而下。低角度电影镜头，发光的眼睛穿透雨水和迷雾。海军战舰包围着它，发射导弹和大炮，爆炸照亮了云层。巨猫咆哮，冲击波在水面上荡漾。它将一艘驱逐舰拍向一旁，金属弯曲，火花四溅。它背部的皮毛开始发出电光般的蓝光，能量从尾部脉动至头部。特写镜头，明亮的蓝光在它口中积蓄。暴风雨陷入寂静。突然，一道集中的蓝色能量束向前爆发，横扫舰队。船只在火球中爆发，海水蒸发，蒸汽升腾。广角航拍镜头，毁灭的蓝光在黑暗的波浪上闪耀。超写实，体积雾，电影级布光，IMAX规模，戏剧性的管弦乐氛围，4K细节。
prompts.prompt_zh: 暴风雨之夜的海洋，闪电下的巨浪。随着一只巨大的猫科泰坦从深处升起，大海剧烈翻腾，水流慢动作般从它的皮毛上倾泻而下。低角度电影镜头，发光的眼睛穿透雨水和迷雾。海军战舰包围着它，发射导弹和大炮，爆炸照亮了云层。巨猫咆哮，冲击波在水面上荡漾。它将一艘驱逐舰拍向一旁，金属弯曲，火花四溅。它背部的皮毛开始发出电光般的蓝光，能量从尾部脉动至头部。特写镜头，明亮的蓝光在它口中积蓄。暴风雨陷入寂静。突然，一道集中的蓝色能量束向前爆发，横扫舰队。船只在火球中爆发，海水蒸发，蒸汽升腾。广角航拍镜头，毁灭的蓝光在黑暗的波浪上闪耀。超写实，体积雾，电影级布光，IMAX规模，戏剧性的管弦乐氛围，4K细节。
prompts.prompt_en: Stormy night ocean, massive waves under lightning flashes. The sea churns violently as a colossal feline titan rises from the depths, water cascading off its fur in slow motion. Low-angle cinematic shot, glowing eyes piercing rain and fog. Navy warships surround it, firing missiles and cannons, explosions lighting the clouds. The giant cat roars, shockwaves rippling across the water. It swipes a destroyer aside, metal bending, sparks flying. Its dorsal fur begins glowing electric blue, energy pulsing from tail to head. Close-up as bright blue light builds inside its mouth. The storm falls silent. Suddenly, a concentrated blue energy beam blasts forward, cutting across the fleet. Ships erupt in fireballs, steam rising as ocean water vaporizes. Wide aerial shot of destruction glowing blue across dark waves. Hyper-realistic, volumetric fog, cinematic lighting, IMAX scale, dramatic orchestral mood, 4K detail.
prompts.author: @lexx_aura

prompts.title: 暴风雨林峡谷漂流与原木洪峰的生死竞速
prompts.prompt: 连续的超广角航拍镜头始于风暴笼罩的阴暗雨林高空，掠过无尽树冠上的云影。镜头俯冲穿过参天大树之间，展现出一处狭窄的河谷峡谷，一支机动漂流队正顺流疾驰而下。在遥远的上游，由倒下的树干和巨石构成的天然水坝决堤，释放出一堵咆哮的白水墙，裹挟着旋转的原木。镜头沿着河流横向疾驰，在树梢和悬崖表面之间穿梭通过紧凑的视差通道以体现速度，随后当碎片浪潮转过弯道时，镜头迅速切入围绕刀锋般急弯的广角环绕拍摄。高潮部分，木筏在锯齿状岩石间回旋通过，而原木墙在他们身后的弯道处猛烈炸裂，最终以穿过薄雾的剧烈拉升镜头结束，此时洪水正在吞噬下方的河岸。
prompts.prompt_zh: 连续的超广角航拍镜头始于风暴笼罩的阴暗雨林高空，掠过无尽树冠上的云影。镜头俯冲穿过参天大树之间，展现出一处狭窄的河谷峡谷，一支机动漂流队正顺流疾驰而下。在遥远的上游，由倒下的树干和巨石构成的天然水坝决堤，释放出一堵咆哮的白水墙，裹挟着旋转的原木。镜头沿着河流横向疾驰，在树梢和悬崖表面之间穿梭通过紧凑的视差通道以体现速度，随后当碎片浪潮转过弯道时，镜头迅速切入围绕刀锋般急弯的广角环绕拍摄。高潮部分，木筏在锯齿状岩石间回旋通过，而原木墙在他们身后的弯道处猛烈炸裂，最终以穿过薄雾的剧烈拉升镜头结束，此时洪水正在吞噬下方的河岸。
prompts.prompt_en: Continuous ultra-wide aerial starts high above a storm-dark rainforest, skimming cloud shadows over endless canopy. The camera dives between towering trees to reveal a narrow river gorge where a motorized raft team blasts downstream. Far upstream, a natural dam of fallen trunks and boulders ruptures, unleashing a roaring wall of whitewater packed with spinning logs. Camera rockets laterally along the river, threading tight parallax passes over treetops and cliff faces for speed, then snaps into a wide orbit around a knife-edge bend as the debris wave rounds it. Climax as the raft slaloms past jagged rocks while the log wall explodes into the bend behind them, end on a violent pull-up through mist as the flood chews the shoreline below.
prompts.author: @umesh_ai

prompts.title: 暴风雪夜屋顶伫立的红衣刀锋
prompts.prompt: 一个身穿红衣的身影站在积雪的屋顶上。深红色的刀锋嗡嗡作响。三架无人机从风暴中降下。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个身穿红衣的身影站在积雪的屋顶上。深红色的刀锋嗡嗡作响。三架无人机从风暴中降下。
prompts.prompt_en: A figure in red stands on a snowy rooftop. Crimson blade humming. Three drones descend from the storm.
prompts.author: @NaoyaCreates

prompts.title: 月下竹林白衣剑客冷峻拔剑
prompts.prompt: 月光下的竹林，一位白衣剑客站在竹林深处，衣袂随风飘动。他缓缓拔剑，剑身反射月光。镜头360度环绕旋转，竹叶纷纷落下。剑客突然出剑，一道剑气划破竹林，数根竹子应声而断。长镜头一镜到底，从全景推到剑客面部特写，表情冷峻坚毅。环境音：风声、竹叶沙沙、剑鸣。
prompts.prompt_zh: 月光下的竹林，一位白衣剑客站在竹林深处，衣袂随风飘动。他缓缓拔剑，剑身反射月光。镜头360度环绕旋转，竹叶纷纷落下。剑客突然出剑，一道剑气划破竹林，数根竹子应声而断。长镜头一镜到底，从全景推到剑客面部特写，表情冷峻坚毅。环境音：风声、竹叶沙沙、剑鸣。
prompts.prompt_en: Bamboo forest under moonlight, a white-robed swordsman standing deep in the bamboo forest, clothes fluttering in the wind. He slowly draws his sword, the blade reflecting the moonlight. The camera rotates 360 degrees, bamboo leaves falling down. The swordsman suddenly strikes, a sword qi cuts through the bamboo forest, several bamboo trees break at the sound. Long shot one take to the end, pushing from panoramic view to swordsman face close-up, expression cold and determined. Ambient sound: wind sound, bamboo leaves rustling, sword ringing.
prompts.author: @channelerHua

prompts.title: 有机巨兽降临：城市毁灭瞬间
prompts.prompt:
场景：有机外星生物降临 - 市中心
快速剪辑 - 节拍同步硬切剪辑（140 BPM，15 个镜头）

氛围：发自内心的生物恐惧。巨大的、脉动的有机实体遮蔽了城市天际线。高对比度、可触知的恐惧。

镜头描述：
一个有节奏的 15 镜头序列，从广角进入过渡到微观破坏。肉质的、善于缠绕的肢体以一种发自内心的生物力量表现勒紧并压碎摩天大楼。

时间线 / 逐个镜头：
0:00–0:03 - 钩子（HOOK）
0:00–0:01 - IMAX 广角。带有波动膜的肉质黑曜石实体撕裂云层，投下巨大的阴影。
音效：深沉的有机轰鸣。

0:01–0:02 - 极特写（ECU）。沥青水坑剧烈泛起涟漪。
音效：表面张力断裂声。

0:02–0:03 - 地面视角（POV）。手持晃动。生锈的标志震动，鸽子四散飞逃。
音效：翅膀拍打声。

0:03–0:07 - 第一次冲击
0:03–0:04 - 广角。刺眼的洋红色生物脉冲从核心爆发进入城市。
音效：生物噼啪声。

0:04–0:05 - 中景。摩天大楼弯曲，粗大的、善于缠绕的肢体缠绕并挤压。
音效：混凝土研磨声。

0:05–0:06 - 慢动作。人群穿过浓密的灰色灰尘冲刺。
音效：沉闷的尖叫声。

0:06–0:07 - 动作。黄色出租车被一条游荡的、鞭状的附肢掀翻。
音效：金属粉碎声。

0:07–0:11 - 紧张感
0:07–0:08 - 仰拍。高耸的生物巨兽带着发光的静脉从黄色烟雾中浮现。
音效：潮湿的、有节奏的呼吸声。

0:08–0:09 - 特写。巨大的带吸盘肢体压入路面，使沥青起涟漪。
音效：潮湿的挤压声。

0:09–0:10 - 中景。内部胸腔涟漪在半透明皮肤后充满洋红色光辉。
音效：心跳脉冲。

0:10–0:11 - 微距。玻璃碎片反射着燃烧的有机天际线。
音效：玻璃叮当声。

0:11–0:15 - 最终规模
0:11–0:12 - 广角。巨兽升起，触手像巨大的帆一样拖曳。
音效：风啸声。

0:12–0:13 - 跟踪镜头。战斗机划过屋顶。
音效：引擎尖啸声。

0:13–0:14 - 史诗级拉镜头。摩天大楼被生物触手勒紧，溶解成灰尘。
音效：结构坍塌声。

0:14–0:15 - 航拍广角。突然定格于全城毁灭和生物发光火焰。
音效：高潮后的寂静。

技术与渲染：
- 相机：重度手持拍摄混合宏大的大规模定场镜头。
- 光线：高对比度日落；体积光洋红色生物发光。
- 镜头：IMAX 70mm，14mm-85mm 范围。
- 修饰符：35mm 胶片拍摄，照片级真实感，电影级大气照明，8k，体积渲染。

微细节与纹理：
- 带有生物发光静脉网络的波动皮肤。
- 肢体滴落粘稠的粘液；潮湿表面上的混凝土灰尘。

声音层：
0:00-0:04：深沉的有机轰鸣；风声。
0:04-0:10：挤压声，混凝土研磨声，亚音速脉冲。
0:10-0:15：结构性坠毁声；高频耳鸣声。

prompts.prompt_en:
SCENE: ORGANIC ALIEN ARRIVAL - DOWNTOWN
Quick Cuts - Beat-Sync Hard Editing (140 BPM, 15 Shots)

ATMOSPHERE: Visceral biological dread. Gargantuan, pulsating organic entities eclipse the urban skyline. High-contrast, tactile dread.

SHOT DESCRIPTION:
A rhythmic, 15-shot sequence transition from wide entry to macro-destruction. Fleshy, prehensile limbs constrict and crush skyscrapers in a visceral display of biological power.

TIMELINE / SHOT-BY-SHOT:
0:00–0:03 - HOOK
0:00–0:01 - IMAX WIDE. Fleshy obsidian entity with undulating membranes tears through clouds, casting a monumental shadow.
SFX: Deep organic thrum.

0:01–0:02 - ECU. Asphalt puddle ripples intensely.
SFX: Surface tension snap.

0:02–0:03 - GROUND POV. Handheld shake. Rusted sign vibrates as pigeons scatter.
SFX: Wing flapping.

0:03–0:07 - FIRST IMPACT
0:03–0:04 - WIDE. Blinding magenta biological pulse erupts from core into the city.
SFX: Biological crackle.

0:04–0:05 - MEDIUM. Skyscraper buckles as thick, prehensile limbs wrap around and squeeze.
SFX: Concrete grinding.

0:05–0:06 - SLOW MOTION. Crowd sprints through dense gray dust.
SFX: Muffled screams.

0:06–0:07 - ACTION. Yellow taxi flipped by a stray, whip-like appendage.
SFX: Metal crunch.

0:07–0:11 - TENSION
0:07–0:08 - LOW ANGLE. Towering bio-behemoth with glowing veins emerges from yellow smoke.
SFX: Wet, rhythmic breath.

0:08–0:09 - CLOSE UP. Massive suction-cupped limb presses into pavement, rippling asphalt.
SFX: Wet squelch.

0:09–0:10 - MEDIUM. Internal thoracic ripples charge with magenta glow behind translucent skin.
SFX: Heartbeat pulse.

0:10–0:11 - MACRO. Glass shards reflect the burning organic skyline.
SFX: Glass tinkling.

0:11–0:15 - FINAL SCALE
0:11–0:12 - WIDE. Behemoth rises, tentacles trailing like massive sails.
SFX: Wind roar.

0:12–0:13 - TRACKING. Fighter jets streak across rooftops.
SFX: Engine scream.

0:13–0:14 - EPIC PULLBACK. Skyscraper constricted by biological tentacles, dissolving into dust.
SFX: Structural collapse.

0:14–0:15 - AERIAL WIDE. Sudden freeze frame on citywide devastation and bioluminescent fires.
SFX: Silence after crescendo.

TECHNICAL & RENDER:
- Camera: Heavy handheld mixed with sweeping grand-scale establishing shots.
- Light: High-contrast sunset; volumetric magenta bioluminescence.
- Lens: IMAX 70mm, 14mm-85mm range.
- Modifiers: Shot on 35mm film, photorealistic, cinematic atmospheric lighting, 8k, volumetric rendering.

MICRO DETAILS & TEXTURES:
- Undulating skin with bioluminescent vein networks.
- Viscous slime dripping from limbs; concrete dust on wet surfaces.

SOUND LAYERS:
0:00-0:04: Deep organic thrum; wind.
0:04-0:10: Squelching, grinding concrete, subsonic pulses.
0:10-0:15: Structural crashes; high-frequency tinnitus ring.

prompts.title: 有机玻璃立方体演奏会
prompts.prompt: 一个2000年代的新金属乐队在一个位于纯白房间内的有机玻璃立方体里演奏音乐。房间周围有几台外观复杂的机器和显像管电视，当乐队演奏时从多个角度显示乐队画面。相机以极宽的视角在有机玻璃立方体内部移动，跟随并展示演奏中的乐队，引入随着音乐节奏的不规则运动和震动。乐队成员穿着带有蓝色点缀的白色服装，具有非常 Rick Owens 风格的美学。Chris Cunningham 风格的音乐视频美学。

prompts.prompt_en: A 2000-era nu-metal band plays music inside a plexiglass cube that sits in a fully white room. Around the room are several complex-looking machines and CRT tvs displaying the band in several angles as they play. The camera, in an extreme wide angle, moves around inside the plexiglass cube following and showcasing the band as they play, introducing erratic motions and vibrations in tune with the music. The band is wearing white outfits with blue accents with a very rick owens-like aesthetic. Music video aesthetic in the style of Chris Cunningham.

prompts.title: 末日废墟雄鹰极速逃生第一视角
prompts.prompt:
全程无剪辑视角，第一人杯POV，模拟一只极速逃生的成年雄鹰镜头风格。

超广角畸变镜头，画面边缘强烈拉伸，极度夸张的空间纵深感与运动视差(Motion Parallax)，电影级微距压迫感镜头以超音速级速度推进，伴随狂暴的甩摇(Whip-pans)、极限俯冲、急速滚转、翅膀扇动带来的剧烈空中颠簸与不规则震颤。

场景设定在黄昏末世，海面之上是巨大的废弃都市废墟，断裂的摩天大楼、坍塌的桥梁、锈蚀的金属钢架、破碎的玻璃幕墙、漂浮的残骸与巨浪交织。

夕阳呈血金色，低角度光线穿透厚重尘雾与浓烟，废墟在热浪与海雾中扭曲晃动，长长的阴影被无限拉长。雄鹰紧贴海面与废墟低空掠过，破碎建筑、锈蚀钢板、翻滚的巨浪、飞溅的海水在镜头前极速划过。

身后是末日灾难的追击：坠落的建筑残骸、爆炸冲击波、翻滚的火海、弥漫的浓烟与飞散的金属碎片。

巨型建筑轰然倒塌，钢筋扭曲断裂、玻璃与混凝土碎片如雨般砸落，爆炸火光冲天，火星与灰烬在空气中狂舞。镜头始终保持毫秒级极限闪避，与坠落的钢梁、爆炸冲击波、火海边缘险之又险擦身而过，气流与冲击波剧烈晃动镜头，带来极强的物理临场感。

光影为电影级质感：暖金夕阳高光、爆炸火光的强对比反射、厚重末日雾需、深邃拉长的阴影、粒子特效拉满——烟尘、灰烬、海水飞沫、金属碎屑、燃烧余烬在镜头周围疯狂旋转。

情绪基调：极致肾上腺素、生死逃亡、未日压迫感、野性求生本能。

全现场沉浸式音效：雄鹰尖锐啸叫、狂风呼味、翅膀剧烈振翅声、建筑崩塌巨响、金属撕裂声、爆炸轰鸣、海浪咆哮、冲击波撕裂空气的巨响视频在最高潮处戛然而止：雄鹰全速穿越火海与浓烟，在末日废墟的夹缝中极限逃生。

画质：8K电影质感，超写实渲。

全现场沉浸式音效：雄鹰尖锐啸叫、狂风呼味、翅膀剧烈振翅声、建筑崩塌巨响、金属撕裂声、爆炸轰鸣、海浪咆哮、冲击波撕裂空气的巨响视频在最高潮处戛然而止：雄鹰全速穿越火海与浓烟，在末日废墟的夹缝中极限逃生。

画质：8K电影质感，超写实渲。
prompts.prompt_en: Unbroken single-take perspective, first-person POV, simulating the camera style of an adult eagle escaping at top speed. Ultra-wide angle distortion lens, edges of the frame strongly stretched, extremely exaggerated spatial depth and motion parallax, cinematic macro pressure lens advancing at supersonic speed, accompanied by violent whip-pans, extreme dives, rapid rolls, severe air turbulence and irregular shaking caused by wing flapping. Scene set in a twilight apocalypse, above the sea surface lies a massive abandoned urban ruin, severed skyscrapers, collapsed bridges, rusted metal frames, shattered glass curtain walls, floating debris interwoven with giant waves. The setting sun is blood-gold, low-angle light penetrating thick dust and smoke, ruins twisting and swaying in the heat haze and sea mist, long shadows infinitely elongated. The eagle skims low over the sea surface and ruins, shattered buildings, rusted steel plates, rolling giant waves, and splashing seawater speeding past the lens. Behind is the pursuit of the doomsday disaster: falling building debris, explosion shockwaves, rolling seas of fire, pervading thick smoke, and flying metal fragments. Gigantic buildings collapse with a roar, steel bars twisting and snapping, glass and concrete fragments raining down, explosion flames shooting into the sky, sparks and ashes dancing wildly in the air. The lens maintains millisecond-level extreme evasion, narrowly brushing past falling steel beams, explosion shockwaves, and the edge of the sea of fire, airflow and shockwaves violently shaking the lens, creating a powerful physical sense of presence. Lighting is of cinematic quality: warm golden sunset highlights, high-contrast reflections from explosion firelight, heavy apocalyptic fog, deep elongated shadows, particle effects maxed out—smoke, dust, ashes, sea spray, metal scraps, and burning embers swirling crazily around the lens. Emotional tone: extreme adrenaline, life-and-death escape, apocalyptic oppression, wild survival instinct. Full on-site immersive sound effects visualized: eagle's sharp screech, howling wind, violent wing flapping, loud crashes of collapsing buildings, metal tearing, explosion roars, waves roaring, shockwaves tearing the air, video stops abruptly at the climax: the eagle flies through the sea of fire and smoke at full speed, escaping narrowly through the cracks of the apocalyptic ruins. Image quality: 8K cinematic texture, hyper-realistic rendering.
prompts.author: @liyue_ai

prompts.title: 末日红龙降临与蓝胖猫的逆天对决
prompts.prompt:
第1段提示词

好莱坞特效大片风格，写实CG渲染，HDR高动态色彩。0-3秒：大远景航拍，黄昏时分的
代都市天际线，夕阳被一片不自然的暗红色云层吞没，乌云翻滚中隐约传来低沉的咆哮声，地面上的行人纷纷驻
足抬头望天，镜头缓推向云层中心一个不断扩大的火红裂缝；4-8秒：云层炸裂，一头体型遮天蔽日的西方巨龙
云而出——暗红色鳞甲覆盖全身如熔岩铠甲，双翼展开横跨数个街区投下巨大阴影，四只利爪拖着灼热的气流，金
色竖瞳俯视大地，巨龙张开巨口喷出一道炽烈的火柱扫向城市，高楼玻璃幕墙在热浪中龟裂碎飞，镜头从地面仰
拍巨龙掠过头顶的震撼压迫感；9-12秒：火焰肆虐的街道尽头，一扇粉红色的光门凭空出现在马路中央，光门表
面泛着科技感的涟漪波纹，一个圆滚滚蓝色身体白色肚皮的矮小机器猫从光门中迈步走出——大圆眼睛、红圆鼻头
、脖颈金色铃铛闪光、没有耳朵的圆脑袋，身体虽然矮小圆胖却气场沉稳，镜头从脚部缓推至全身，粉红色光门
在身后缓缓关闭消失；13-15秒：低角度仰拍大特写，蓝胖猫抬头望向天空中盘旋的巨龙，火光映照在他蓝色的
脸上，大圆眼睛中倒映出巨龙喷火的画面，他面色从容，圆球状白色短手伸进肚皮上的半圆形口袋掏索，金色铃
铛发出清脆一响，巨龙仿佛感应到挑战者俯冲而下直扑过来。音效为末日感的低频轰鸣、巨龙破空咆哮、火焰灼
烧音、铃铛清脆声与好莱坞管弦乐紧张前奏。
禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印

第2段提示词

将@视频1延长15秒。好莱坞特效大片风格，写实CG渲染。0-3秒：接上段巨龙俯冲画面，
蓝胖猫从口袋中掏出一把手持能量炮套在圆球短手上，侧身对准俯冲而来的巨龙，能量炮蓄力发出蓝白色光芒，
一发耀眼的蓝色能量球轰出，与巨龙喷射的火柱正面对撞——蓝白能量与暗红火焰在空中炸开形成巨大的球形冲击
波，气浪掀飞两侧的汽车和路牌碎片，镜头侧面跟拍冲击波扩散；4-8秒：巨龙穿过冲击波烟尘毫发无伤继续俯
，利爪抓向蓝胖猫，千钧一发之际蓝胖猫头顶的双叶片微型旋翼高速旋转启动，圆胖身体敏捷升空闪避，巨龙利
爪砸碎地面留下巨大裂坑，蓝胖猫升至半空与巨龙同一高度对峙，镜头环绕两者形成体型悬殊的对比构图——巨龙
庞大如山，蓝胖猫渺小如球，但双方气势旗鼓相当；9-12秒：空中追逐战，巨龙扇动双翼追击，连续喷射三道火
柱，蓝胖猫灵活穿梭在摩天楼之间躲避，从口袋中掏出一面圆形银色镜面盾牌，将第三道火柱完美反弹回去击中
巨龙面部，巨龙怒吼甩头，鳞甲上的火焰反弹痕迹冒着蓝色电弧，镜头在蓝胖猫与巨龙之间快速正反打切换；13-
15秒：巨龙暴怒，全身暗红鳞甲裂开露出岩浆般的橙红光纹，体型再膨胀一圈，双翼猛扇制造飓风级气流，蓝胖
猫被强风吹得旋翼不稳被卷入气流中翻滚，撞穿一栋大楼的玻璃幕墙消失在烟尘中，巨龙仰天咆哮宣示霸权，声
波震碎周围建筑残余的玻璃。音效为能量炮充能释放声、火焰与能量碰撞的轰鸣、旋翼高速旋转嗡鸣、建筑碎裂
声、巨龙咆哮震颤低频共振。
禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印

prompts.prompt_en:
Hollywood blockbuster special effects style, realistic CG rendering, HDR high dynamic color. 0-3 seconds: Extreme long range aerial shot, modern city skyline at twilight, the setting sun is swallowed by an unnatural dark red cloud layer, a low roar is faintly heard amidst the rolling dark clouds, pedestrians on the ground stop one after another to look up at the sky, the camera slowly pushes towards a constantly expanding fiery red fissure in the center of the clouds; 4-8 seconds: The clouds explode, a Western giant dragon with a body that covers the sky and the sun bursts out of the clouds—dark red scales cover its whole body like lava armor, its twin wings spread across several blocks casting a huge shadow, four sharp claws drag scorching airflow, golden vertical pupils look down on the earth, the giant dragon opens its huge mouth and spews a fierce pillar of fire sweeping towards the city, high-rise glass curtain walls crack and shatter in the heat wave, the camera looks up from the ground to capture the shocking oppressive feeling of the giant dragon passing overhead; 9-12 seconds: At the end of the street where flames are raging, a pink light door appears out of thin air in the middle of the road, the surface of the light door ripples with a sense of technology, a short and round machine cat with a blue body and white belly steps out of the light door—large round eyes, red round nose, golden bell on the neck flashing, round head without ears, although the body is short, round and fat, the aura is calm, the camera slowly pushes from the feet to the whole body, the pink light door slowly closes and disappears behind; 13-15 seconds: Low angle extreme close-up looking up, the blue fat cat looks up at the giant dragon circling in the sky, firelight reflects on his blue face, the image of the giant dragon breathing fire is reflected in his large round eyes, his expression is calm, the round white short hand reaches into the semicircular pocket on the belly to fumble, the golden bell makes a crisp sound, the giant dragon seems to sense the challenger and dives straight down. Sound effects are apocalyptic low-frequency rumbling, giant dragon roaring through the sky, burning fire sounds, crisp bell sounds, and a tense Hollywood orchestral prelude. Prohibited: Any text, subtitles, LOGO or watermarks.

Extend @video1 by 15 seconds. Hollywood blockbuster special effects style, realistic CG rendering. 0-3 seconds: Continuing from the previous segment where the giant dragon dives, the blue fat cat takes out a handheld energy cannon from his pocket and puts it on his round short hand, turns sideways to aim at the diving giant dragon, the energy cannon charges and emits blue-white light, a dazzling blue energy ball is fired, colliding head-on with the fire pillar sprayed by the giant dragon—blue-white energy and dark red flames explode in the air forming a huge spherical shockwave, the air wave flips cars and road sign fragments on both sides, the camera follows the shockwave spreading from the side; 4-8 seconds: The giant dragon passes through the shockwave smoke unscathed and continues to dive, sharp claws grab towards the blue fat cat, at the critical moment, the dual-blade micro rotor on top of the blue fat cat's head starts rotating at high speed, the round fat body agilely ascends to dodge, the giant dragon's sharp claws smash the ground leaving a huge cracked pit, the blue fat cat rises to mid-air to confront the giant dragon at the same height, the camera orbits around the two forming a composition with contrasting body sizes—the giant dragon is as huge as a mountain, the blue fat cat is as small as a ball, but the momentum of both sides is evenly matched; 9-12 seconds: Aerial chase battle, the giant dragon flaps its wings to chase, continuously spraying three pillars of fire, the blue fat cat flexibly shuttles between skyscrapers to dodge, takes out a round silver mirror shield from his pocket, perfectly reflects the third pillar of fire back to hit the giant dragon's face, the giant dragon roars and shakes its head, the flame reflection marks on the scales emit blue electric arcs, the camera quickly switches between the blue fat cat and the giant dragon; 13-15 seconds: The giant dragon is furious, the dark red scales all over its body crack open to reveal magma-like orange-red glowing patterns, its body expands another circle, its wings flap fiercely creating hurricane-level airflow, the blue fat cat's rotor is destabilized by the strong wind and is swept into the airflow tumbling, crashes through the glass curtain wall of a building and disappears into the smoke and dust, the giant dragon roars at the sky to declare dominance, sound waves shatter the remaining glass of surrounding buildings. Sound effects are energy cannon charging and releasing sounds, roaring of fire and energy collision, high-speed rotor buzzing, building shattering sounds, giant dragon roaring shaking low-frequency resonance. Prohibited: Any text, subtitles, LOGO or watermarks.
prompts.author: @songguoxiansen

prompts.title: 机械骨骼血肉重生的赛博演变
prompts.prompt: 生成类似赛博朋克机械体，形象为女性，只有机械骨骼和线路，然后从胸部开始，生成皮肤，组织，逐步到手臂，腹部，大腿，小腿，头部，生出毛发，穿上衣服，全程都要聚焦在形体变化中。背景音乐为赛博朋克风，没有对话。
prompts.prompt_zh: 生成类似赛博朋克机械体，形象为女性，只有机械骨骼和线路，然后从胸部开始，生成皮肤，组织，逐步到手臂，腹部，大腿，小腿，头部，生出毛发，穿上衣服，全程都要聚焦在形体变化中。背景音乐为赛博朋克风，没有对话。
prompts.prompt_en: Generate a cyberpunk-like mechanical body, the image is female, with only mechanical bones and circuits, then starting from the chest, generate skin, tissue, gradually to the arms, abdomen, thighs, calves, head, grow hair, put on clothes, focus on the form change throughout the process. Background music is cyberpunk style, no dialogue.
prompts.author: @binghe

prompts.title: 机甲霸主觉醒的视觉盛宴
prompts.prompt: 一、混沌初开，钢铁潜涌画面从绝对纯黑开始，无任何光源。随着低沉的工业金属音效与机械齿轮咬合的颤响传来，画面中心开始浮现极淡的橙红色能量粒子流，如熔炉岩浆般缓慢汇聚，形成一道若有若无的竖形热能光带。光带边缘伴随扭曲的钢铁碎片飞溅特效，粒子密度逐渐提升，齿轮纹路在黑暗中隐约浮现，营造出钢铁巨兽破壳而出的压迫感。二、变形破局，字意初现能量粒子流突然加速，从竖形光带中爆发出一道贯穿画面的炽白金属光束，如重型机甲展开变形序列，瞬间撕裂黑暗。白光所过之处，霸字左侧偏旁革以机械装甲折叠展开的方式快速成型，每一笔画均如同装甲钢板逐节咬合锁紧，笔画边缘带有锋利的金属锯齿光效与电弧闪烁，墨色由深黑渐变为炽烈的橙金色，笔画内部流动着细碎的金属熔融反光粒子，整体呈现出机甲举臂破空的动态张力。三、钢甲凝形，字体渐成霸字成型后，画面右侧爆发出第二道更具冲击力的钛白光柱，从画面底部向上延伸，如重型机甲脚踏大地拔地而起。王字的竖笔以机甲擎天的姿态骤然成型，笔锋刚直如钢梁，末端带有熔融金属飞溅与蓝色电弧特效。王字的三横以机械臂展开的方式从竖笔中依次锁定成型，笔画边缘伴随橙白色的能量冲击波涟漪，整体呈现出钢甲凝形、力压山河的视觉效果。霸与王两字的笔画在黑暗中相互呼应，如两台巨型机甲对峙，形成强烈的视觉张力平衡。四、甲字加冕，甲字登场霸王二字稳定后，画面正上方骤降一道紫蓝色高压电磁光束，甲字以从天而降的装甲头盔扣合方式成型，竖笔如脊柱主梁轰然落定，田字框如装甲胸板依次展开锁紧，每一笔画锁合时伴随短暂的高压电弧爆鸣与钢铁碰撞音效。甲字成型瞬间，三字连体触发全画面震动特效，仿佛巨型机甲完成最终变形，地动山摇。五、锋芒毕露，特效叠加霸王甲三字完全成型后，字体表面开始浮现流动的橙金与钛白双色辉光，辉光从笔画中心向边缘扩散，形成机甲能量核心过载的动态效果。画面中开始飘落细碎的钢铁碎屑与蓝色电弧粒子，粒子在字体周围高速旋转、碰撞，产生短暂的装甲爆破特效，字体边缘的金属锯齿光效逐渐强化，整体亮度提升，字体表面隐现重型机甲标志性的科幻纹路，营造出霸王降世、无可匹敌的视觉冲击力。六、定格终局，余威震天所有动态特效逐渐收敛，霸王甲三字的辉光稳定为柔和的橙金色金属光泽，粒子流停止流动，钢铁碎屑缓缓飘落至画面底部消失。最终定格为纯黑背景下，霸王甲三字以发光金属铸刻字体呈现，霸字笔锋威猛如装甲战士，王字横笔沉稳如王座基台，甲字顶划凌厉如头盔冠翼。字体下方偏左位置浮现出红色竖排小字机甲霸王甲传说，字体边缘带有细微的蓝色科幻能量光晕，整体呈现出钢铁霸主、余威长存的终局效果

prompts.prompt_en:
I. Chaos dawns, steel surges. The picture starts from absolute pure black, with no light source. As low-pitched industrial metal sound effects and the trembling sound of mechanical gears meshing come, extremely faint orange-red energy particle flows begin to emerge in the center of the picture, converging slowly like furnace magma, forming a barely visible vertical thermal light band. The edge of the light band is accompanied by splashing special effects of twisted steel fragments. The particle density gradually increases, and gear patterns faintly emerge in the darkness, creating a sense of oppression of a steel behemoth breaking out of its shell.

II. Transformation breaks through, characters emerge. The energy particle flow suddenly accelerates, and a blazing white metal beam bursts out from the vertical light band, penetrating the picture, like a heavy mecha unfolding a transformation sequence, instantly tearing apart the darkness. Where the white light passes, the left radical "Ge" of the character "Ba" forms rapidly in the manner of mechanical armor folding and unfolding. Every stroke locks together section by section like armored steel plates. The edges of the strokes have sharp metal sawtooth light effects and flickering arcs. The ink color changes from deep black to blazing orange-gold. The inside of the strokes flows with fine molten metal reflection particles, presenting the dynamic tension of a mecha raising its arm to break through the sky.

III. Steel armor solidifies, characters take shape. After the character "Ba" is formed, a second titanium-white light pillar with more impact explodes from the right side of the picture, extending upward from the bottom, like a heavy mecha stepping on the earth and rising from the ground. The vertical stroke of the character "Wang" takes shape instantly in the posture of a mecha holding up the sky; the stroke tip is as straight as a steel beam, with splashing molten metal and blue arc effects at the end. The three horizontal strokes of "Wang" lock into shape sequentially from the vertical stroke in the manner of mechanical arms unfolding. The stroke edges are accompanied by orange-white energy shockwave ripples, presenting a visual effect of steel armor condensing and suppressing mountains and rivers. The strokes of "Ba" and "Wang" echo each other in the darkness, like two giant mechas confronting each other, forming a strong visual tension balance.

IV. "Jia" character crowned, "Jia" character enters. After the characters "Ba" and "Wang" stabilize, a purple-blue high-voltage electromagnetic beam suddenly descends from directly above the picture. The character "Jia" forms in the manner of an armored helmet descending and fastening from the sky. The vertical stroke slams into place like a spine main beam, and the "Tian" character frame unfolds and locks sequentially like an armored chest plate. Each stroke locking is accompanied by brief high-voltage arc explosions and steel collision sound effects. The moment the "Jia" character forms, the three connected characters trigger a full-screen shaking effect, as if a giant mecha has completed its final transformation, shaking the earth and mountains.

V. Sharpness revealed, special effects overlaid. After the three characters "Ba Wang Jia" are fully formed, flowing orange-gold and titanium-white dual-color glows begin to emerge on the font surface, diffusing from the center of the strokes to the edges, creating a dynamic effect of mecha energy core overload. Fine steel debris and blue arc particles begin to fall in the picture, rotating and colliding at high speed around the characters, producing brief armor explosion effects. The metal sawtooth light effects on the character edges gradually strengthen, the overall brightness increases, and heavy mecha's iconic sci-fi patterns faintly appear on the font surface, creating the visual impact of an overlord descending and being invincible.

VI. Freeze frame finale, lingering awe. All dynamic effects gradually converge. The glow of the three characters "Ba Wang Jia" stabilizes into a soft orange-gold metallic luster. The particle flow stops, and steel debris slowly falls to the bottom of the picture and disappears. The final freeze frame is presented against a pure black background, with the three characters "Ba Wang Jia" appearing as luminous metal cast fonts. The stroke of "Ba" is fierce like an armored warrior, the horizontal strokes of "Wang" are steady like a throne base, and the top stroke of "Jia" is sharp like a helmet crest. Red vertical small characters "Mecha Overlord Armor Legend" appear at the lower left of the font, with subtle blue sci-fi energy halos on the edges, presenting a finale effect of a steel overlord whose lingering power remains.
prompts.author: @john87445528

prompts.title: 极具动感的病毒式嘻哈舞蹈电影感视频
prompts.prompt: 基于参考图1视觉效果的极具动感的电影感舞蹈视频。病毒式传播的TikTok潮流风格。高能量、完美无瑕的现代嘻哈编舞，包含快速、犀利的动态动作。配合快节奏拍子的快速、有韵律的镜头剪辑。无缝融合展示完整舞蹈动作的全景定场镜头与动态B-roll素材：执行复杂舞步的时尚运动鞋的极度特写，强烈面部表情的微距镜头，以及犀利的动作隔离手部特写。强调动感和重力的极低角度跟踪镜头。重低音段落时的动态运镜摇摄和轻微的震动镜头效果。电影级工作室布光，快速动作上的运动模糊，超精细细节，照片级真实感，社交媒体热门趋势。
prompts.prompt_zh: 基于参考图1视觉效果的极具动感的电影感舞蹈视频。病毒式传播的TikTok潮流风格。高能量、完美无瑕的现代嘻哈编舞，包含快速、犀利的动态动作。配合快节奏拍子的快速、有韵律的镜头剪辑。无缝融合展示完整舞蹈动作的全景定场镜头与动态B-roll素材：执行复杂舞步的时尚运动鞋的极度特写，强烈面部表情的微距镜头，以及犀利的动作隔离手部特写。强调动感和重力的极低角度跟踪镜头。重低音段落时的动态运镜摇摄和轻微的震动镜头效果。电影级工作室布光，快速动作上的运动模糊，超精细细节，照片级真实感，社交媒体热门趋势。
prompts.prompt_en: Highly dynamic cinematic dance video based on @ image1 visual. Viral TikTok trend style. High-energy, flawless modern hip-hop choreography with fast, sharp kinetic movements. Rapid, rhythmic camera cuts matching a fast beat. Seamlessly blending wide establishing shots of the full dance routine with dynamic B-rolls: extreme close-ups of stylish sneakers performing complex footwork, macro shots of intense facial expressions, and sharp hand isolations. Extreme low-angle tracking shots to emphasize motion and gravity. Dynamic camera panning and slight shaky-cam effects on heavy drops. Cinematic studio lighting, motion blur on fast actions, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, trending on social media.
prompts.author: @michaelheina

prompts.title: 极地冰层下的未知巨物觉醒
prompts.prompt: 南极科考站的一名无线电操作员收到了一段传输信号，这让她猛地扯下了耳机。她冲向窗户。在一英里外的冰架上，某种巨大的物体正从下方向上顶起，将表面崩裂成一个完美的圆形。随着冰架开始崩解，地平线发生了倾斜。视觉特效：冰层裂缝径向模拟，地下压力置换，暴风雪粒子系统，站内红色应急灯频闪。美学风格：乳白天空白和深海站红，约翰·卡朋特式的孤立色调，渺小的人类巨大的威胁，冰层像盖子一样从下方被掀起，冰冷的光线，更冰冷的恐惧。
prompts.prompt_zh: 南极科考站的一名无线电操作员收到了一段传输信号，这让她猛地扯下了耳机。她冲向窗户。在一英里外的冰架上，某种巨大的物体正从下方向上顶起，将表面崩裂成一个完美的圆形。随着冰架开始崩解，地平线发生了倾斜。视觉特效：冰层裂缝径向模拟，地下压力置换，暴风雪粒子系统，站内红色应急灯频闪。美学风格：乳白天空白和深海站红，约翰·卡朋特式的孤立色调，渺小的人类巨大的威胁，冰层像盖子一样从下方被掀起，冰冷的光线，更冰冷的恐惧。
prompts.prompt_en: A radio operator in an Antarctic station picks up a transmission that makes her tear off her headphones. She runs to the window. On the ice shelf a mile out, something enormous is pushing up from below, cracking the surface in a perfect circle. The horizon tilts as the shelf begins to calve. VFX: ice fracture radial simulation, subsurface pressure displacement, blizzard particle system, emergency red light strobing inside the station. Aesthetic: Whiteout white and deep station red, John Carpenter isolation palette, small human enormous threat, the ice as a lid being lifted from underneath, cold light, colder dread.
prompts.author: @AllaAisling

prompts.title: 极致光影下的法式香奈儿绝美佳人
prompts.prompt:
人物面部参考@【@图1】
女主是带有亚洲风格的日系美人（脸部甜美典雅。身穿极简剪裁纯黑裙。大红唇。皮肤白皙。轻熟女。）
(0-3秒）：镜头从人物半垂眼的特写切入，眼神缓慢抬起，直视镜头，形成极具故事感的特写绝杀。女生半垂着眼，身体微微向前倾斜，眼神朦胧妩媚向镜头、指向观众，眼神抬起看向镜头。 (3-7秒)：她微微歪头，发丝轻扫脸颊，慢眨眼，嘴角半笑不笑，随后侧脸先以眼神锁定镜头，再缓缓转向正面，电影感拉满。眼神魅惑。
(7-10秒）：她极轻地轻咬下唇，克制又性感，镜头定格在她的面部特写，氛围感达到顶点。动作自然流畅，五官精致，光影高级，画面唯美。（专业细节：景别：面部特写加中景来回切换，聚焦眼部与唇部微表情。运镜：稳定跟拍，轻微推拉，突出人物情绪流动。角度：45°侧拍转正面，利用光影勾勒面部轮廓。清晰度：8K，超写实，电影级质感。风格：冷调柔光，克制性感，高级氛围感。)
10-12秒:带有法国口音讲“Chanel”（一定要有广告感）

prompts.prompt_en:
Character Face Reference @ 【@Image 1】
The female lead is a Japanese beauty with an Asian style (sweet and elegant face. Wearing a minimalist cut pure black dress. Big red lips. Fair skin. Young mature woman.)
(0-3 seconds): The camera cuts in from a close-up of the character with half-lowered eyes, the gaze slowly lifts, looking directly at the camera, forming a story-filled close-up killer shot. The girl has half-lowered eyes, body leans slightly forward, eyes hazy and charming towards the camera, pointing at the audience, gaze lifts to look at the camera.
(3-7 seconds): She tilts her head slightly, hair strands gently sweep across the cheek, slow blink, corners of the mouth half-smiling, then the side face locks the camera with eyes first, then slowly turns to the front, cinematic feel maxed out. Eyes are seductive.
(7-10 seconds): She bites her lower lip extremely lightly, restrained yet sexy, the camera freezes on her facial close-up, atmosphere reaches the peak. Movements are natural and smooth, facial features are exquisite, lighting is high-end, the picture is aesthetic. (Professional details: Shot type: Face close-up and medium shot switching back and forth, focusing on micro-expressions of eyes and lips. Camera movement: Stable follow shot, slight push and pull, highlighting character emotion flow. Angle: 45° side shot turning to front, using light and shadow to outline facial contours. Clarity: 8K, hyper-realistic, cinematic texture. Style: Cool tone soft light, restrained sexiness, high-end atmosphere.)

prompts.title: 极致广角下的山海滑板疾驰
prompts.prompt:
第三人称滑板后仰视，超广角强透视，镜头随公路左弯同步缓慢倾斜，机身微晃模拟跟滑体感，低速入弯→快速提速。

【@图1】重心左倾压弯，上衣下摆、头发被风向后猛飘；公路高亮白 / 黄标线初现拖影，路边极绿草木、艳红花朵呈横向动态模糊；远处海面波光随弯道折射反光，高速快门定格车轮初现残影，边缘轻微虚化，保留路面与花草高饱和纯色对比，胶片颗粒初显。

镜头随连续 S 型弯道剧烈左右倾斜，紧贴主体极速俯冲，超广角透视拉满，镜头小幅上下颠簸强化真实滑行感。

全程跟锁【@图1】主体，【@图1】左右连续重心切换、身体大幅摇晃下坡，衣物与头发完全被疾风扯成流线型；车轮高速旋转拉出长残影，路面标线化作密集速度线，路边花草树木压缩成彩色模糊色带；

海面强光反光随速度扭曲弥散，全局强动态模糊 + 边缘虚化，高噪点胶片质感拉满，暗部晕染层次突出，纯色高对比（绿山 / 红花 / 亮标线 / 蓝海）极致冲击。随公路出弯镜头缓慢回正，视角微抬，跟拍速度略缓但仍保持高速轨迹感，结束剧烈倾斜。

【@图1】身体回正、姿态稳住，衣物头发仍保持飘动余势；车轮残影、速度线逐渐淡化但保留动态余韵，路面标线恢复清晰但边缘仍留虚边；花草模糊色带收敛，海面波光恢复柔和反光，动态模糊减弱、保留高速摄影质感，以【@图1】俯冲背影 + 山海高饱和风景收尾，层次与氛围感拉满。
