prompts.prompt_en:
Scene 1: Galloping wildly in front of the mansion gate (0:00-0:05, 5 seconds)
• Location: In front of the top luxury mansion in West Vancouver (large manor-style villa, stone/wood structure gate, wide driveway entrance, surrounded by evergreen hedges)
• Subject: A person in a dark suit gallops out of the mansion gate on horseback
• Horse Action: White horse with all four hooves in the air, mane flying, rushing out at a trot or gait
• Environment: Winter, light snow kicked up by horse hooves, mansion architecture clearly visible (large floor-to-ceiling windows, wood and stone combination, multi-level terraces), distant North Shore Mountains or ocean silhouette faintly visible, evergreen pine trees covered in thin snow
• Crowd: Supporters on both sides dodge to make way while waving yellow dragon flags (blue dragon pattern + Hinomaru elements) cheering, holding white "Nothing" signs
• Camera: Front shot, white horse rushing straight at the lens, strong dynamics (slight low angle to enhance impact)
• Atmosphere: Sharp debut, unstoppable, shocking appearance in a high-end private community
Scene 2: Close-up of the crowd chasing (0:05-0:09, 4 seconds)
• Location: Beside a shaded private curved road in the mansion area
• Subject: A group of supporters chasing the horse (mostly young people, wearing winter down jackets/coats)
• Action: Running while raising hands high, shouting, waving fists, trying to keep up with the horse's speed, some almost falling but still chasing excitedly
• Signage: Yellow dragon flags + white "Nothing" signs being held while running (signs shaking)
• Background: Mansion exterior walls and evergreen pines passing by quickly, light snow mist or tree shadows blurring and shaking, distant mountains passing by
• Camera: Tracking close-up, slight camera shake to create urgency and speed (handheld or fast zoom in/out)
• Atmosphere: Chasing fanaticism, hurried and excited, fanatical response from community residents
Scene 3: Flying across the side of the mansion (0:09-0:15, 6 seconds)
• Location: Landscape driveway or lawn extension area on the side of the mansion (large terrace, poolside or garden visible from the side, evergreen hedges)
• Subject: Person riding a white horse galloping across the screen
• Horse Action: Running at full speed, the moment all four hooves leave the ground is clearly visible, tail flying like a flag, snowflakes being splashed
• Environment: Side of the mansion passing by quickly (wood/stone walls, multi-level windows blurred), neighboring mansion and evergreen forest on the left, background mountain-sea skyline passing by
• Crowd: Supporters holding "Nothing" signs + yellow dragon flags chasing behind but gradually falling behind, some stop and wave shouting
• Camera: Side high-speed tracking shot, motion blur enhances sense of speed (horse sweeping across screen, background bokeh)
• Atmosphere: Swift as wind and lightning, unstoppable, heroic gallop in a luxury community

prompts.title: 烟雨漓江新中式奢华电影感大片
prompts.prompt:
新中式高端电影感宣传片，8K IMAX宽幅，极致升格摄影（慢动作）。

核心色彩：水墨绿（漓江水/千峰）、烟雨灰（晨雾/岩石）、落日金（晚霞/倒影）。

视觉逻辑：从“缥缈仙境”入“优雅旅程”，最终定格于“永恒山水”。强调“离尘”概念，将自然奇观作为极致奢华的背景。

音效设计：绝对不使用嘈杂的民俗乐器。建议使用极简的古琴与大提琴融合配乐（谭盾风格），空灵、宏大、富有哲思。背景音混入细微的水滴声、船桨划水声、远处的鸟鸣和风声。

【时长】

15秒

【分镜脚本】

[00:00-00:04] 镜头1：仙境初启（航拍/史诗/空灵）

机位：极高空微速 drone 俯拍，随后极其缓慢地向后拉远。

画面：晨曦。千座奇峰从如梦似幻的烟雨蒙蒙中拔地而起，漓江如一条碧绿的丝带蜿蜒其间。阳光穿透厚重的云层，形成丁达尔光柱，打在岩石绝壁上。画面极其宁静、辽远、神秘，带有远古的召唤感，仿佛一幅巨大的流动水墨画。

[00:04-00:08] 镜头2：优雅行旅（中景/禅意/质感）

机位：低角度跟拍（Stedicam），焦点极虚。

动作：镜头聚焦。一只穿着高级定制亚麻布鞋的优雅女性脚（代表传承与自然连接）轻轻踏上私人竹筏。

画面：从低角度掠过水面，聚焦女子的脚步。竹筏极其缓慢地滑行，带起细微、完美的涟漪。背景是如屏风般的奇峰，阳光把她的裙角和竹筏的影子拉得很长。整个画面充满静谧、优雅和绝对的私人尊享感。

[00:08-00:12] 镜头3：山水对白（特写/人天合一/动态）

机位：中景到近景的平滑推镜。

画面：女子坐在竹筏的矮凳上，手中端着一杯袅袅冒烟的高级岩茶。她微微仰头，眼神深邃地望向天空，刚好与一只在山间翱翔的白鹭（UNESCO自然元素）形成某种神圣的视觉对白。镜头捕捉到她眼中的山水倒影，强调内心的平静与宏大自然的和解。

[00:12-00:15] 镜头4：晚霞如梦与定格（全景/宏大/未来）

机位：史诗级宏大全景，配合极具爆发力的垂直拉升。

动作：镜头从女子和竹筏身上极速拉起，转为俯拍。

画面：日落余晖将整片漓江和千峰染成绚烂的金色。古代渔夫（代表非遗）撑着独木舟、带着鸬鹚（代表传统）在远处形成剪影，与现代高端奢华度假酒店（隐喻未来）在远山处无缝融合。画面在金色晚霞笼罩的万峰全景中慢动作定格。

屏幕浮现一行高级的中英文花字（可选）：桂林：人在画中，心在此岸。GUILIN: A LIVABLE PAINTING, YOUR SOUL'S HARBOR.

动作：镜头聚焦。一只穿着高级定制亚麻布鞋的优雅女性脚（代表传承与自然连接）轻轻踏上私人竹筏。

画面：从低角度掠过水面，聚焦女子的脚步。竹筏极其缓慢地滑行，带起细微、完美的涟漪。背景是如屏风般的奇峰，阳光把她的裙角和竹筏的影子拉得很长。整个画面充满静谧、优雅和绝对的私人尊享感。

[00:08-00:12] 镜头3：山水对白（特写/人天合一/动态）

机位：中景到近景的平滑推镜。

画面：女子坐在竹筏的矮凳上，手中端着一杯袅袅冒烟的高级岩茶。她微微仰头，眼神深邃地望向天空，刚好与一只在山间翱翔的白鹭（UNESCO自然元素）形成某种神圣的视觉对白。镜头捕捉到她眼中的山水倒影，强调内心的平静与宏大自然的和解。

[00:12-00:15] 镜头4：晚霞如梦与定格（全景/宏大/未来）

机位：史诗级宏大全景，配合极具爆发力的垂直拉升。

动作：镜头从女子和竹筏身上极速拉起，转为俯拍。

画面：日落余晖将整片漓江和千峰染成绚烂的金色。古代渔夫（代表非遗）撑着独木舟、带着鸬鹚（代表传统）在远处形成剪影，与现代高端奢华度假酒店（隐喻未来）在远山处无缝融合。画面在金色晚霞笼罩的万峰全景中慢动作定格。

屏幕浮现一行高级的中英文花字（可选）：桂林：人在画中，心在此岸。GUILIN: A LIVABLE PAINTING, YOUR SOUL'S HARBOR.
prompts.prompt_en:
Neo-Chinese high-end cinematic promotional video, 8K IMAX widescreen, extreme over-crank photography (slow motion).

Core Colors: Ink Green (Li River water / thousands of peaks), Misty Rain Grey (morning mist / rocks), Sunset Gold (afterglow / reflections).

Visual Logic: From "Ethereal Wonderland" into "Elegant Journey," finally freeze-framing on "Eternal Landscape." Emphasize the concept of "Departing from the Dust," using natural wonders as the ultimate luxury background.

Sound Design: Absolutely no noisy folk instruments. Suggest using a minimalist fusion of Guqin and Cello (Tan Dun style), ethereal, grand, philosophical. Background sounds mixed with subtle water droplets, paddle strokes, distant birdsong, and wind.

【Duration】

15 seconds

【Storyboard Script】

[00:00-00:04] Shot 1: Wonderland Unveiled (Aerial / Epic / Ethereal)

Camera Position: Ultra-high altitude slow-speed drone overhead shot, followed by an extremely slow pull-back.

Visual: Dawn. Thousands of strange peaks rise from the dreamlike misty rain, with the Li River winding through like a green ribbon. Sunlight penetrates heavy clouds, forming Tyndall rays that strike the rocky cliffs. The image is extremely quiet, vast, mysterious, possessing an ancient sense of summoning, like a giant flowing ink wash painting.

[00:04-00:08] Shot 2: Elegant Journey (Medium Shot / Zen / Texture)

Camera Position: Low-angle tracking shot (Steadicam), extremely shallow focus.

Action: The lens focuses. An elegant female foot wearing high-end custom linen shoes (representing heritage and connection to nature) steps gently onto a private bamboo raft.

Visual: Skimming the water surface from a low angle, focusing on the woman's footsteps. The bamboo raft slides extremely slowly, creating subtle, perfect ripples. The background features screen-like strange peaks, and sunlight casts long shadows of her skirt hem and the bamboo raft. The entire picture is filled with serenity, elegance, and an absolute sense of private exclusivity.

[00:08-00:12] Shot 3: Dialogue with Landscape (Close-up / Unity of Man and Nature / Dynamic)

Camera Position: Smooth push-in from medium shot to close-up.

Visual: The woman sits on a low stool on the bamboo raft, holding a cup of steaming high-end rock tea. She tilts her head slightly, looking deeply into the sky, just forming a sacred visual dialogue with a white egret soaring among the mountains (UNESCO natural element). The lens captures the reflection of the landscape in her eyes, emphasizing inner peace and reconciliation with magnificent nature.

[00:12-00:15] Shot 4: Sunset Dream and Freeze Frame (Panorama / Grand / Future)

Camera Position: Epic grand panorama, accompanied by an explosive vertical pull-up.

Action: The camera pulls up rapidly from the woman and the bamboo raft, switching to an overhead shot.

Visual: The sunset afterglow dyes the entire Li River and thousands of peaks in brilliant gold. An ancient fisherman (representing intangible heritage) poles a canoe with cormorants (representing tradition) forming silhouettes in the distance, seamlessly blending with a modern high-end luxury resort hotel (metaphor for the future) in the distant mountains. The picture freeze-frames in slow motion amidst the panorama of ten thousand peaks shrouded in golden sunset glow.

Screen Overlay (Optional): A line of high-end Chinese and English dynamic text: 桂林：人在画中，心在此岸。GUILIN: A LIVABLE PAINTING, YOUR SOUL'S HARBOR.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 烦恼旅人
prompts.prompt: 真人电影风格序列。另一位年轻女子，穿着奢华的黑色两件式泳衣，从左侧（房子内部）进入场景，并在微风中飘动时关闭窗帘。女子行走，摄像机从后方跟踪她，她进入房间，床上有一个打开的行李箱。女子很烦恼。我们切换到她的中近景镜头。她对自己咕哝道："该死的意大利人...我讨厌这个地方！"
prompts.prompt_zh: 真人电影风格序列。另一位年轻女子，穿着奢华的黑色两件式泳衣，从左侧（房子内部）进入场景，并在微风中飘动时关闭窗帘。女子行走，摄像机从后方跟踪她，她进入房间，床上有一个打开的行李箱。女子很烦恼。我们切换到她的中近景镜头。她对自己咕哝道："该死的意大利人...我讨厌这个地方！"
prompts.prompt_en: Live-action cinematic sequence. Another young woman, wearing a luxurious black two-piece bathing suit, enters the scene from the left (inside the house) and closes the drapes as they float in the gentle breeze. The woman walks, as the camera tracks her from behind, as she goes inside the room, where a suitcase is open on the bed. The woman is annoyed. We cut to a medium close-up of her. She mumbles to herself: "Fucking Italians... I hate this place!

prompts.title: 热刺球星连过四人惊天远射
prompts.prompt: 一段充满活力的15秒电影感视频，展示夜间泛光灯下一座座无虚席的巨大体育场内的足球比赛，伴随着咆哮的人群 @image 3。以扫过整个体育场的宽广航拍镜头开始，展示80,000名球迷高唱口号并挥舞旗帜，然后推镜头至动作开始的球场。切换到明星球员的中景镜头，该球员名为“James” @image 3，身穿托特纳姆热刺18号球衣，在中场附近接球。在紧张快节奏的序列中：James以敏捷的脚下动作爆发性地向前运球，在脚部特写中用快速踩单车躲过第一名阿森纳防守球员；在展示德克兰·赖斯沮丧面孔的中景镜头中，用穿裆过人转身过掉第二名；在捕捉追抢的广角镜头中，用沉肩假动作冲过第三名；并在球的极端特写中用彩虹过人甩开第四名。加速至James @image 1 在禁区外准备一记雷鸣般的弧线球射门，球火箭般飞入顶角，越过扑救的阿森纳门将——以慢动作特写展示球网颤动，然后是广角镜头展示进球引爆了整座体育场。立即过渡到庆祝环节：James在中景镜头中冲刺向角旗，然后在广角镜头中双膝跪地，在草地上进行胜利的滑跪，双臂伸展，并在特写 @image 2 中深情亲吻球衣上的队徽，此时他的托特纳姆热刺队友冲进来，球迷们陷入疯狂。使用紧张气氛不断升级的戏剧性音乐、快速剪辑和高能镜头运动，使其全程保持动作饱满和紧张激烈。

prompts.prompt_en: A dynamic 15-second cinematic video of a football match in a massive, packed stadium under floodlights at night, with roaring crowds @image 3. Start with a wide aerial shot sweeping over the full stadium, showing 80,000 fans chanting and waving flags, then zoom in to the pitch where the action begins. Cut to a mid-shot of the star player, named "James" @image 3 in a Tottenham Hotspur No.18 jersey, receiving the ball near midfield. In intense, fast-paced sequence: James explosively dribbles forward with agile footwork, evading the first Arsenal defender with a quick step-over in close-up on his feet; spins past the second with a nutmeg in a mid-shot showing the Declan Rice's frustrated face; bursts through the third with a shoulder drop in wide shot capturing the chase; and outpaces the fourth with a rainbow flick in extreme close-up on the ball. Accelerate to James @image 1 lining up a thunderous curling shot from outside the box, the ball rocketing into the top corner past the diving Arsenal goalkeeper—show this in slow-motion close-up on the net rippling, then wide shot of the goal erupting the stadium. Immediately transition to celebration: James sprints to the corner flag in mid-shot, then drops to his knees for a triumphant knee-slide across the grass in wide shot, arms outstretched and kisses the badge on his shirt passionately in close-up @image 2, as his Tottenham Hotspur teammates rush in and fans go wild. Use dramatic music with building tension, quick cuts, and high-energy camera movements to keep it action-packed and intense throughout.

prompts.title: 热辣动感演绎Worth It经典舞步
prompts.prompt: 帮我生成一个视频：生成一个跳mayjlee编舞《worth it》的视频，音乐：Fifth Harmony/Kid Ink《worth it》，先把双脚叉开，胳膊往前推，然后再把胳膊收回来，再把胳膊像做扩胸运动一样舒展开，然后再收回来，然后右胳膊向右边舒展并抬左腿，然后再把胳膊收回来，左腿放下去，然后再重复“先把双脚叉开，胳膊往前推，然后再把胳膊收回来，再把胳膊像做扩胸运动一样舒展开，然后再收回来”，接着左胳膊向左边舒展并抬右腿，然后再把胳膊收回来，像打招呼一样的手，并动胯，并撩头发扭胯，而且全程每做一个动作往后顶一次胯，背景音乐歌词是“Give it to me I'm worth it baby I'm worth it，Uh huh I'm worth it gimme gimme I'm worth it”。9:16，时长 10s。

prompts.prompt_en: Help me generate a video: generate a video of dancing May J Lee's choreography "Worth It", music: Fifth Harmony/Kid Ink "Worth It", first spread both feet apart, push arms forward, then pull arms back, then spread arms out like doing chest expansion exercises, then pull back, then extend right arm to the right side and lift left leg, then pull arm back, put left leg down, then repeat "first spread both feet apart, push arms forward, then pull arms back, then spread arms out like doing chest expansion exercises, then pull back", next extend left arm to the left side and lift right leg, then pull arm back, hand gesture like waving hello, while moving hips, and flipping hair while twisting hips, and throughout the whole process thrust hips backward once for every movement made, background music lyrics are "Give it to me I'm worth it baby I'm worth it, Uh huh I'm worth it gimme gimme I'm worth it". 9:16, duration 10s.

prompts.title: 熔岩将军与火焰少年的宿命对决
prompts.prompt: 【风格】现代玄幻动作片，好莱坞大片特效，高对比度冷暖光，4K超清，慢动作升格。 【时长】15秒 【场景】崩塌的古代要塞废墟，浓烟滚滚。 【角色】 红衣大将（Magma General）：身穿红色军大衣，戴着棒球帽，表情冷酷，整条右臂化为流动的暗红岩浆。 火焰少年（Fire Youth）：赤裸上身，戴着牛仔帽，肌肉线条流畅，右拳缠绕着旋转的橙色烈焰。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：熔岩具象化（The Magma Fist）。 特写。红衣大将冷漠地抬起右手。他的整条手臂瞬间元素化，变成了粘稠、沉重、滴落着高亮熔岩的**实体岩浆巨拳**。 【物理细节】滚烫的岩浆滴落在地面，发出“滋滋”声，石头被瞬间融化成红色的液体。黑烟升腾。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：烈焰充能（The Fire Spiral）。 特写/侧拍。火焰少年嘴角上扬，眼神不屈。他猛地握紧右拳，一股狂暴的**橙色螺旋火焰**瞬间从手臂喷发而出，照亮了他满是汗水的侧脸。 【物理细节】因为高温，他周围的空气发生剧烈扭曲（Heat Haze），原本飘舞的衣角被热浪定格。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：宿命对轰（Elemental Clash）。 全景/冲击波。两人同时冲向对方挥出重拳。沉重的暗红岩浆拳与轻盈狂暴的烈火拳在画面中心猛烈对撞。 【安全特效】没有血腥，只有纯粹的**元素爆炸**。岩浆吞噬了部分火焰，炸出一个巨大的环形冲击波（Shockwave），将地面的碎石和灰尘瞬间震飞，画面在刺眼的红橙色白光中结束。

prompts.prompt_en: 【Style】Modern fantasy action movie, Hollywood blockbuster visual effects, high contrast cool and warm lighting, 4K ultra HD, slow motion ramping. 【Duration】15 seconds 【Scene】Collapsed ancient fortress ruins, thick smoke rolling. 【Characters】 Magma General: Wearing a red military coat, wearing a baseball cap, cold expression, entire right arm turns into flowing dark red magma. Fire Youth: Bare upper body, wearing a cowboy hat, smooth muscle lines, right fist wrapped in swirling orange flames. [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: The Magma Fist. Close-up. The Magma General indifferently raises his right hand. His entire arm instantly elementalizes, turning into a viscous, heavy, **solid magma giant fist** dripping with high-brightness magma. 【Physics Details】Hot magma drips onto the ground, making a "sizzling" sound, stones are instantly melted into red liquid. Black smoke rises. [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: The Fire Spiral. Close-up/Side shot. The Fire Youth raises the corners of his mouth, eyes unyielding. He suddenly clenches his right fist, a violent **orange spiral flame** instantly erupts from his arm, illuminating his sweaty side face. 【Physics Details】Due to high temperature, the air around him distorts violently, the originally fluttering hem of clothes is frozen by the heat wave. [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Elemental Clash. Panoramic/Shockwave. The two rush towards each other simultaneously and throw heavy punches. The heavy dark red magma fist and the light violent fire fist collide violently in the center of the screen. 【Safety Effects】No gore, only pure **elemental explosion**. Magma engulfs part of the flames, blasting out a huge ring-shaped shockwave, instantly shaking away gravel and dust on the ground, the screen ends in a blinding red-orange white light.

prompts.title: 燃烧堡垒下的史诗级军队交锋
prompts.prompt: 军队在一座燃烧的堡垒外交锋。燃烧的箭矢在空中划出弧线，同时骑兵穿过升腾的烟雾发起冲锋。多重镜头：鸟瞰战场 → 地面水平的剑术战斗 → 英雄的情感特写。史诗般的管弦乐氛围。

prompts.title: 燃爆全网的带货主播
prompts.prompt:
【风格】抖音直播带货风，极速语速(Rap-like Speed)，情绪极其亢奋。
【时长】15秒
【主角】激情带货主播（网红美女），面前摆着手机平板，背景是杂乱但真实的高端直播间。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：痛点爆破(The Hook)。
画面：分屏显示。左边是模糊扭曲的PPT式AI视频（打上大大的红叉），右边是电影级质感的Seedance生成视频。
动作：主播猛拍桌子，把脸凑近镜头，表情痛心疾首。
【语速极快/喊麦感】：“别再用那些全网都在推的垃圾模型了！生成的视频脸都歪了还能看吗？家人们，今天我把Seedance 2.0的价格给你们打下来了！”

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：实操炸场(The Demo)。
画面：特写手机屏幕。主播输入：“赛博朋克雨夜，少女回眸”。按下生成键，进度条瞬间跑满（0.5秒）。
特效：屏幕上瞬间炸出（粒子光影弹出）一段4K、60帧、毛发毕现的绝美视频。
动作：主播指着屏幕疯狂敲击，口沫横飞。
【语速极快】：“看这个速度！看这个光影！不用显卡，不用排队！这就是Seedance 2.0！好莱坞导演都在用！”

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：限时逼单(The Call to Action)。
画面：主播身后出现巨大的倒计时（只剩3秒），屏幕下方出现疯狂闪烁的“免费试用”小黄车图标。
动作：主播双手合十拜托，然后疯狂指着屏幕下方。
【语速极快】：“全网首发！仅限前100名免费试用！链接就在左下角！手慢无！给我冲！3、2、1，上链接！”

prompts.prompt_en:
【Style】Douyin live streaming sales style, extremely fast speaking speed (Rap-like Speed), extremely excited emotions.
【Duration】15 seconds
【Protagonist】Passionate sales anchor (influencer beauty), with mobile phones and tablets in front of her, background is a messy but authentic high-end live streaming studio.

[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: The Hook.
Scene: Split screen display. Left side is blurry distorted PPT-style AI video (with a big red cross marked on it), right side is cinematic quality Seedance generated video.
Action: The anchor slaps the table hard, gets her face close to the lens, with a look of heartbreak.
【Extremely fast speaking speed/Rap-like feeling】："Stop using those trash models promoted all over the internet! Can you watch the generated videos with crooked faces? Fam, today I've brought down the price of Seedance 2.0 for you!"

[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: The Demo.
Scene: Close-up of phone screen. Anchor inputs: "Cyberpunk rainy night, girl looking back". Presses generate button, progress bar fills instantly (0.5s).
Special Effects: Instantly explodes (particle light and shadow pops up) a 4K, 60fps, hair-details-visible stunning video on the screen.
Action: Anchor points at the screen tapping crazily, spraying saliva.
【Extremely fast speaking speed】："Look at this speed! Look at this lighting and shadow! No graphics card needed, no queuing! This is Seedance 2.0! Hollywood directors are using it!"

[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: The Call to Action.
Scene: A huge countdown appears behind the anchor (only 3 seconds left), frantically flashing "Free Trial" yellow shopping cart icon appears at the bottom of the screen.
Action: Anchor puts hands together begging, then points frantically at the bottom of the screen.
【Extremely fast speaking speed】："Global debut! Free trial for the first 100 only! The link is in the bottom left! Too slow and it's gone! Go for it! 3, 2, 1, put up the link!"

prompts.title: 特警人质解救战
prompts.prompt:
[
  镜头1：正面威胁镜头
] 一名身着全套战术装备的特警队员的中景镜头，
戴着防毒面具，
和头盔。他直接将突击步枪对准镜头（打破第四面墙）。他正在激烈地喊话："释放人质！放下武器！" [
  镜头2：威胁者
] 切换到穿着脏背心的歹徒的中景镜头，
用锁喉姿势控制着一名女性。他将一把手枪抵在她的太阳穴上。他汗流浃背，情绪激动，
对着屏幕外的警官喊叫："后退！我会杀了她！我发誓我会这么做！" [
  镜头3：过肩解决镜头
] 镜头直接位于特警队员的右肩后方。我们能看到他头盔的后部和前景中的步枪。在远处（中景），劫持者仍然可见，仍然抓着女孩。劫持者最后一次尖叫："我要动手了！"之后，警官的步枪后坐，开了一枪，击中敌人的头部。劫持者立即倒下。女孩站着，震惊但安全。技术风格：高速快门动作，逼真的枪口焰，手持相机抖动，24fps，英语对话。

prompts.prompt_en:
[
  Shot 1: Frontal Menacing Shot
] A medium shot of a SWAT officer in full tactical gear,
gas mask,
and helmet. He is pointing his assault rifle directly at the camera lens (breaking the fourth wall). He is shouting with visible intensity: "LET THE HOSTAGE GO! DROP THE WEAPON NOW!" [
  Shot 2: The Threat
] Cut to a medium shot of the killer in a dirty tank top,
holding a woman in a chokehold. He has a pistol pressed to her head. He is sweating and manic,
screaming at the off-screen officer: "STAY BACK! I'LL KILL HER! I SWEAR I'LL DO IT!" [
  Shot 3: Over-the-Shoulder Resolution
] The camera is positioned directly behind the SWAT officer's right shoulder. We see the back of his helmet and his rifle in the foreground. In the distance (mid-ground), the killer is still visible holding the girl. The killer screams one last time: "I'M GONNA DO IT!" after The officer's rifle kicks back with a single sho and hit head enemy. The killer falls instantly. The girl is left standing, shocked but safe. Technical Style: High-shutter speed action, realistic muzzle flashes, handheld camera shake, 24fps, English dialogue.

prompts.title: 猫咪深夜食堂手作拉面
prompts.prompt:
制作一个以猫咪在深夜食堂制作手作拉面为主题的短视频，电影级调色（暖色调，充满烟火气），细腻颗粒，浅景深。
主角是一只猫咪，扮演一位专业拉面师傅，形象外观严格参照【@【@图1】】。
场景设定为城市街头一家充满和式风情的深夜拉面摊位前。背景有温暖的黄色灯笼、木质吧台，以及远处模糊的街道霓虹灯。
视频内容需要按照以下步骤分镜展示：

揉面与切面： 猫咪穿着小围裙，有节奏地在撒了面粉的木质案板上揉捏面团，然后用一把锋利的面刀将面团切成均匀的细面条。

煮面与甩干： 猫咪将面条抖散投入沸腾的大锅中，几秒后用竹漏勺将面条捞起，熟练地在空中用力甩两下，将多余的水分甩干。

调汤底： 猫咪拿着一个精致的长柄勺，从熬制浓郁的白色骨汤锅里舀出一勺汤，缓缓倒入一个深蓝色的陶瓷大碗中。

摆盘： 猫咪用筷子整齐地放入煮好的面条，再依次在面条上摆放两片厚实的叉烧、半个溏心蛋、几片海苔和葱花，动作精细。

结尾： 结尾镜头猫咪师傅将这碗热气腾腾、冒着白烟的拉面轻轻推向镜头，并微微点头示意。

要求：

视频风格： 写实，画面清晰，中景。

声音（ASMR）： 整个视频不需语音旁白，但要放大：切面时的“哒哒”声、面条入水的“哗啦”声、甩干水分的“飒飒”声、热汤入碗的流动声等。

背景音乐： 背景有轻柔、舒缓的萨克斯风音乐，营造静谧的深夜氛围。

prompts.prompt_en:
Create a short video themed around a cat making handmade ramen in a late-night diner, cinematic color grading (warm tones, full of worldly atmosphere), fine grain, shallow depth of field.
The protagonist is a cat, playing the role of a professional ramen master, whose appearance strictly refers to [@[@Image 1]].
The scene is set in front of a late-night ramen stall full of Japanese style on a city street. The background features warm yellow lanterns, a wooden bar counter, and blurred street neon lights in the distance.
The video content needs to be displayed in the following storyboard steps:

Kneading and cutting dough: The cat wears a small apron, rhythmically kneading the dough on a wooden cutting board sprinkled with flour, and then using a sharp dough knife to cut the dough into even fine noodles.

Boiling and shaking dry: The cat scatters the noodles and throws them into a large boiling pot, a few seconds later uses a bamboo skimmer to scoop up the noodles, and skillfully and forcefully shakes them twice in the air to shake off the excess water.

Seasoning the soup base: The cat holds a delicate long-handled spoon, scoops out a spoonful of soup from the pot of richly simmered white bone broth, and slowly pours it into a large dark blue ceramic bowl.

Plating: The cat neatly puts the cooked noodles in with chopsticks, and then places two thick slices of chashu, half a soft-boiled egg, a few pieces of seaweed, and chopped green onions on top of the noodles in sequence, with delicate movements.

Ending: In the final shot, the cat master gently pushes this steaming bowl of ramen emitting white smoke towards the camera, and nods slightly as a gesture.

Requirements:

Video style: Realistic, clear picture, medium shot.

Sound (ASMR): The entire video does not require voice-over narration, but needs to amplify: the "da-da" sound when cutting noodles, the "hua-la" sound when noodles enter the water, the "sa-sa" sound when shaking off water, the flowing sound when hot soup enters the bowl, etc.

Background music: There is soft, soothing saxophone music in the background, creating a tranquil late-night atmosphere.

prompts.title: 环球穿梭：变形战机的极速一镜到底
prompts.prompt:
【10秒一镜到底｜巴黎→上海·变形战机·驾驶员特写】 一镜到底，镜头全程贴身跟随。场景开启于巴黎塞纳河畔（
图片2
），空中弥漫浓烟，机械炮台轰鸣，埃菲尔铁塔在烟雾中隐现。 [0–2秒] 身着白色西的男性驾驶员（
图片3
）在高速变形的战机机体外部惊险攀爬——抓握机翼铰链、踩踏折叠装甲板，动作紧张刺激，衣摆在气流中剧烈翻飞。镜头特写其面部，神情冷峻坚定。 [2–5秒] 战机（参考图2双引擎战斗机正视角）贴近巴黎街道地面疾驰，机身发出金属传动巨响，开始剧烈变形：机翼折叠翻卷成厚重机械肩甲与翼刃，双引擎重组为机械臂动力核心，机身蒙皮裂开显现冷冽金属骨架与发光管线。驾驶员在变形机体外惊险穿行，随后纵身跃入重新成型的驾驶舱。 [5–7秒] 变形完成，巨型机械人形屹立于巴黎街道，保留战机尾翼与螺旋桨特征，镜头紧贴其在奥斯曼式建筑楼宇间穿行。机体抬头，背部装甲展开，露出巨型炮管，炮口凝聚橙红色能量光影。能量光束轰然释放，远处地标在轻烟中崩碎。 [7–9秒] 机械人形重新折叠回战机形态，引擎全功率点火，双尾焰橙红炙烈，机体拔地而起直冲云霄，巴黎城市轮廓在下方急速缩小。驾驶员驾驶舱内特写：白西装、黑领带，目视前方，神情无畏。 [9–10秒] 镜头穿云而过，切入上海街道低空（
图片1
），上海环球金融中心在两侧Haussmann风格建筑间拔地而起——战机贴地飞驰，双引擎尾焰灼烧路面，镜头定格。

第二幕：

10 秒一镜到底｜上海→旧金山・战机变形・帅气驾驶员特写】 一镜到底，镜头全程贴身跟随，机械运转声响清晰，上海陆家嘴金融区街道上弥漫着薄雾与橙红光晕。 [0–2 秒] 开场于上海场景 ——银灰机甲战机（
图片1
） 低伏于浦东高楼群间，东方明珠塔在薄雾中隐现，引擎尾焰呈现明亮橙红光晕。身着白色西装男性驾驶员
图片2
在战机机翼外侧惊险攀爬，抓握机身折叠装甲板，动作敏捷凌厉，衣摆被气流猛烈掀起。镜头推近其面部 —— 神情冷峻，眼神锐利。 [2–3 秒] 驾驶员纵身跃入开启的驾驶舱，舱盖以机械联动声平稳合拢。驾驶员驾驶舱内帅气特写：他单手握杆，另一只手缓缓向后捋起发丝，嘴角微扬，眼神望向远方，气流吹动西装领口，极致帅气。 [3–5 秒] 战机引擎全功率点火，双尾焰橙红明亮，机体从上海街道拔地垂直跃升，陆家嘴天际线在下方急速后退缩小。镜头跟随机腹仰视，穿云破雾，太平洋蔚蓝海面在云层下方铺展。 [5–7 秒] 金门大桥红色钢塔从云雾中拔地而起，旧金山湾区城市轮廓隐现。战机贴近桥面平稳掠过，气流将桥面尘埃与微光粒子卷起。机身开始流畅变形：机翼折叠翻卷成厚重机械肩甲与翼刃，引擎重组为动力核心与机械底盘，机身蒙皮自然过渡显现冷冽金属骨架与发光管线，四轮从机腹展开触地 —— 数秒内化为银灰超级机械赛车（
图片3
），轮拱带有明亮粒子效果。 [8–10 秒] 变形完成，机械赛车在金门大桥桥面全速冲刺，驾驶员清晰可见于透明座舱内，双手紧握方向盘，车身擦地飞驰、粒子闪烁，旧金山湾区全景在背景中展开。镜头从侧后方低角度跟拍，定格于速度与钢铁的极致张力中。 风格标签：超写实 CGI、电影级动态模糊与运动拖影、冷蓝灰城市色调、橙红引擎焰光、无剪辑一镜到底、IMAX 宽幅构图、金属传动音效全程。

prompts.prompt_en:
【10-Second One Take | Paris → Shanghai · Transforming Fighter Jet · Pilot Close-up】 One-take shot, camera follows closely throughout. Scene opens at the Seine Riverbank in Paris (Image 2), smoke fills the air, mechanical turrets roar, Eiffel Tower looms in the smoke. [0–2s] Male pilot in a white suit (Image 3) climbs dangerously on the exterior of the rapidly transforming fighter jet body — gripping wing hinges, stepping on folding armor plates, movements are tense and thrilling, clothes flapping violently in the airflow. Close-up on his face, expression cold and determined. [2–5s] Fighter jet (refer to Image 2 twin-engine fighter front view) speeds close to the Paris street ground, fuselage emits loud metal transmission sounds, begins violent transformation: wings fold and curl into heavy mechanical shoulder armor and wing blades, twin engines reorganize into mechanical arm power cores, fuselage skin splits to reveal cold metal skeletons and glowing pipelines. Pilot weaves dangerously outside the transforming body, then leaps into the reforming cockpit. [5–7s] Transformation complete, giant mechanical humanoid stands on the Paris street, retaining fighter jet tail and propeller features, camera moves closely between Haussmann-style buildings. Mech raises its head, back armor unfolds, revealing giant cannon barrels, orange-red energy light gathers at the muzzle. Energy beam blasts out, distant landmarks crumble in light smoke. [7–9s] Mechanical humanoid folds back into fighter jet form, engines ignite at full power, twin tail flames are orange-red and scorching, body shoots straight up from the ground into the clouds, Paris city silhouette rapidly shrinks below. Close-up inside pilot's cockpit: white suit, black tie, looking forward, fearless expression. [9–10s] Camera passes through clouds, cuts to low altitude over Shanghai streets (Image 1), Shanghai World Financial Center rises between Haussmann-style buildings on both sides — fighter jet speeds close to the ground, twin engine tail flames scorch the road surface, camera freezes.

Scene 2:

【10-Second One Take | Shanghai → San Francisco · Fighter Jet Transformation · Handsome Pilot Close-up】 One-take shot, camera follows closely throughout, mechanical operation sounds are clear, thin mist and orange-red halos float over the streets of Shanghai's Lujiazui financial district. [0–2s] Opens on Shanghai scene — silver-grey mecha fighter jet (Image 1) crouches low among Pudong high-rises, Oriental Pearl Tower looms in thin mist, engine tail flames present bright orange-red halos. Male pilot in white suit (Image 2) climbs dangerously on the outside of the fighter jet wing, gripping fuselage folding armor plates, movements are agile and sharp, clothes flaps violently lifted by airflow. Camera pushes close to his face — expression cold, eyes sharp. [2–3s] Pilot leaps into the opening cockpit, canopy closes smoothly with mechanical linkage sounds. Handsome close-up inside pilot's cockpit: he holds the stick with one hand, the other hand slowly strokes his hair back, corner of mouth slightly raised, eyes looking into the distance, airflow blows the suit collar, extremely handsome. [3–5s] Fighter jet engine ignites at full power, twin tail flames bright orange-red, body vertically leaps up from Shanghai street, Lujiazui skyline rapidly retreats and shrinks below. Camera follows the belly looking up, breaking through clouds and fog, Pacific Ocean's blue surface spreads below the cloud layer. [5–7s] Golden Gate Bridge's red steel towers rise from clouds and fog, San Francisco Bay Area city silhouette looms. Fighter jet skims steadily close to the bridge deck, airflow kicks up dust and fine light particles from the deck. Fuselage begins fluid transformation: wings fold and curl into heavy mechanical shoulder armor and wing blades, engines reorganize into power core and mechanical chassis, fuselage skin naturally transitions to reveal cold metal skeletons and glowing pipelines, four wheels unfold from the belly to touch the ground — within seconds transforms into a silver-grey super mechanical racing car (Image 3), wheel arches have bright particle effects. [8–10s] Transformation complete, mechanical racing car sprints at full speed on the Golden Gate Bridge deck, pilot clearly visible in transparent cockpit, hands gripping steering wheel tightly, car skims the ground and speeds, particles flickering, San Francisco Bay Area panorama unfolds in the background. Camera follows from low angle side-rear, freeze frame on the ultimate tension of speed and steel. Style tags: Hyper-realistic CGI, cinematic motion blur and motion trails, cold blue-grey city tones, orange-red engine flames, uncut one-take, IMAX wide composition, metal transmission sound effects throughout.
prompts.author: @john87445528

prompts.title: 现代战机生死空战电影级动作瞬间
prompts.prompt: 顶级战斗机飞行员驾驶现代战斗机进行空战的动作序列。超快且激烈的空战多重镜头，切换到飞行员反应的特写侧面镜头，他们的手正在进行档位/开关操作，然后回到激烈的空中镜头。狂风从战斗机的机翼呼啸而过，声音极度响亮，展示了令人难以置信的激烈和快节奏的动作场景，其中还包括爆炸和剧烈的镜头震动以及快速移动的镜头拍摄。电影质感，4k，清晰的细节，以及 24 FPS。
prompts.prompt_zh: 顶级战斗机飞行员驾驶现代战斗机进行空战的动作序列。超快且激烈的空战多重镜头，切换到飞行员反应的特写侧面镜头，他们的手正在进行档位/开关操作，然后回到激烈的空中镜头。狂风从战斗机的机翼呼啸而过，声音极度响亮，展示了令人难以置信的激烈和快节奏的动作场景，其中还包括爆炸和剧烈的镜头震动以及快速移动的镜头拍摄。电影质感，4k，清晰的细节，以及 24 FPS。
prompts.prompt_en: Action sequence of top-tier fighter pilot doing airborne combat in modern fighter jets. Multiple shots of ultra-fast and intense aerial combat, switching to close-up profile shots of the pilots' reactions, their hands doing gear/switch changes, and then back to intense aerial shots. Wind whips from the fighter jets' wings, and the sounds are intensely loud, showcasing the incredibly intense and fast-paced action scene which also includes explosions and serious camera shakes along with fast-moving camera shots. Cinematic quality, 4k, crisp detail, and 24 FPS.
prompts.author: @XCaliber

prompts.title: 现代田园生活的极致治愈感
prompts.prompt:
【风格】
现代田园美学(Modern Rural Aesthetics)，电影级广告大片质感(Cinematic Commercial)，索尼A7S3/电影机拍摄，4K/8K超清，极致微距(Extreme Macro)，自然通透光感，治愈系ASMR，无古装剧感。

【场景】
一个打理得井井有条的现代农家开放式厨房，背景是郁郁葱葱的菜园，阳光明媚。

【角色】
现代田园博主(Modern Creator)，黑色长发随意用一根木簪挽起，身穿深蓝色的舒适棉麻套装(Modern Linen Outfit)，妆容清透，眼神专注宁静。

【分镜详解】
[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：清晨采摘(The Freshness)
画面：高清特写。清晨的阳光侧逆光打在植物上。
动作：博主的一双素手（手指修长干净）从藤蔓上摘下一个带着晶莹露水的鲜红番茄。
细节：焦点极锐，能看清番茄表面的绒毛和水珠滑落的轨迹。背景是虚化的高级绿。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：极致手作(The Craft)
画面：室内灶台，充满生活气息但一尘不染。
动作：博主正在切菜，动作熟练利落（非表演性质）。
细节：微距镜头捕捉刀刃切开食材的瞬间，汁水飞溅。接着切换到土灶膛里跳动的橙色火焰，光影温暖而真实。

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：静谧时光(The Moment)
画面：全景/中景。
动作：一道精致的家常菜被端上院子里的原木长桌。博主安静地坐下，轻轻整理了一下耳边的碎发，夹起一口菜。
氛围：蒸汽在逆光中缓缓升腾，画面安静得仿佛能听到风声，展现出一种现代人向往的极致松弛感。

prompts.prompt_en:
【Style】 Modern Rural Aesthetics, Cinematic Commercial, Sony A7S3/Movie Camera Shooting, 4K/8K Ultra HD, Extreme Macro, Natural Transparent Light Feeling, Healing ASMR, No Period Drama Feel.
【Scene】 A well-organized modern farmhouse open kitchen, background is a lush vegetable garden, sunny.
【Character】 Modern Creator, black long hair casually tied up with a wooden hairpin, wearing dark blue comfortable Modern Linen Outfit, clear makeup, focused and serene eyes.
【Storyboard Details】
[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: The Freshness. Visual: HD Close-up. Morning sunlight side backlight hits the plants. Action: The creator's bare hands (slender and clean fingers) pick a bright red tomato with crystal dewdrops from the vine. Details: Focus is extremely sharp, can see the fuzz on the tomato's surface and the trajectory of water droplets sliding down. Background is blurred high-end green.
[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: The Craft. Visual: Indoor stove, full of life atmosphere but spotless. Action: The creator is cutting vegetables, movements skilled and sharp (non-performative). Details: Macro lens captures the moment the blade cuts through ingredients, juice splashing. Then switch to the orange flames dancing in the earth stove hearth, light and shadow warm and real.
[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: The Moment. Visual: Panorama/Medium Shot. Action: An exquisite home-cooked dish is served on the raw wood long table in the yard. The creator sits down quietly, gently tidies up the broken hair by her ear, picks up a mouthful of food. Atmosphere: Steam rises slowly in the backlight, the picture is so quiet as if you can hear the wind, showing the ultimate relaxation that modern people yearn for.

prompts.title: 甄嬛华妃春晚脱口秀
prompts.prompt:
10 秒中国春晚风格舞台表演：《甄嬛 & 华妃脱口秀》

0–2 秒：
中景双人镜头（Two-shot）。
舞台整体为“客厅小品”布景，但外围被宏大的春晚红金色 LED 主屏环绕。
甄嬛（左）与华妃（右）并排坐在现代脱口秀沙发上。
 关键历史准确性要求：二人均身着华丽、区分明确的清代满族宫廷旗装（旗装），立领设计，刺绣繁复考究；发式为真实还原的“大拉翅”或“点子头”，配流苏装饰。
华妃神态随意，手持一根腌黄瓜（酸黄瓜）啃着，手指上戴着修长的金质护甲（指套）。
2–4 秒：
镜头切换为越肩镜头（OTS），视角对准华妃。
华妃夸张地翻白眼（经典“白眼”表情）。
她一边拿着腌黄瓜，一边用戴着长护甲的手指指点、比划，语气傲慢地开口（口型同步）：
“本宫今年的 KPI 又是斗赢这群小妖精，皇上那老头子懂什么审美？”
4–6 秒：
快速切换至甄嬛的越肩镜头（OTS）。
 反差细节：甄嬛一只耳朵上佩戴着现代白色蓝牙耳机（与古代珠翠形成强烈对比），手中滑动着一台纤薄的平板电脑。
她神情冷静、职业化地回应（口型同步）：
“姐姐别气，这叫职场内卷。我都想辞职去带货‘舒痕胶’了。”
6–8 秒：
特写镜头落在两人之间的茶几上。
一个印有“一丈红”字样的现代塑料珍珠奶茶杯，与一只传统瓷瓶并排摆放。
镜头迅速甩回两人。
8–10 秒：
舞台全景。
观众笑声效果（通过灯光变化 / 鼓掌灯呈现）。
华妃摆出最终定格造型：翘腿、抬下巴、再次翻白眼。
甄嬛则像新闻主播一样，对着镜头露出职业微笑。
金色彩带从空中飘落。
节庆红色氛围推至最高潮。
风格与氛围：

**画面：**高饱和度春晚红与鎏金色调
**服装：**博物馆级清代宫廷服饰（丝绸、精细刺绣、厚重头饰）
**核心反差：**清宫礼制的庄重感 × 现代职场人 / 脱口秀嘉宾的松弛吐槽姿态
**镜头语言：**节奏利落，喜剧点明确，情景喜剧式剪辑
**画幅比例：**16:9

prompts.prompt_en:
10-second Chinese Spring Festival Gala style stage performance: "Zhenhuan & Hua Fei Talk Show"

0–2 seconds:
Medium shot two-shot (Two-shot).
The overall stage is a "living room sketch" set, but surrounded by a grand Spring Festival Gala red and gold LED main screen.
Zhenhuan (left) and Hua Fei (right) sit side by side on a modern talk show sofa.
Key historical accuracy requirements: Both wear gorgeous, distinct Qing Dynasty Manchu court official robes (Qizhuang), stand-up collar design, exquisite and intricate embroidery; hairstyles are authentically restored "Dalachi" or "Dianzitou", decorated with tassels.
Hua Fei looks casual, holding a pickled cucumber (sour cucumber) and gnawing on it, wearing long golden finger guards (finger cots) on her fingers.

2–4 seconds:
Camera switches to Over-The-Shoulder (OTS), aimed at Hua Fei.
Hua Fei exaggeratedly rolls her eyes (classic "eye-rolling" expression).
While holding the pickled cucumber, she points and gestures with fingers wearing long finger guards, speaking arrogantly (lip-sync):
"My KPI this year is again to defeat these little goblins, does that old man the Emperor understand aesthetics?"

4–6 seconds:
Quick switch to Zhenhuan's Over-The-Shoulder (OTS).
Contrast detail: Zhenhuan wears a modern white Bluetooth earphone on one ear (strong contrast with ancient beads and emeralds), swiping a thin tablet computer with her hand.
She responds calmly and professionally (lip-sync):
"Sister, don't be angry, this is called workplace involution. I even want to resign to bring goods 'Scar Removal Gel'."

6–8 seconds:
Close-up shot on the coffee table between the two.
A modern plastic bubble tea cup printed with "One Zhang Hong" placed side by side with a traditional porcelain vase.
Camera quickly whips back to the two.

8–10 seconds:
Stage wide shot.
Audience laughter effect (presented through lighting changes / applause lights).
Hua Fei strikes a final freeze pose: crossing legs, lifting chin, rolling eyes again.
Zhenhuan smiles professionally at the camera like a news anchor.
Golden ribbons fall from the sky.
Festive red atmosphere pushed to the climax.

Style & Atmosphere:

**Visuals:** High saturation Spring Festival Gala red and gilded gold tones
**Costumes:** Museum-level Qing Dynasty court costumes (silk, fine embroidery, heavy headpieces)
**Core Contrast:** The solemnity of Qing court etiquette × The relaxed complaining posture of modern workplace people / talk show guests
**Camera Language:** Crisp rhythm, clear comedy points, sitcom-style editing
**Aspect Ratio:** 16:9

prompts.prompt: @图片，极品亚洲美女，身材高挑，10秒甜酷风极速变装，动作衔接丝滑； 0-1秒：学院制服，背手踮跳，领带甩动，歪头笑眼弯如月牙； 1-2秒：转身甩发挡脸，变装洛丽塔； 2-3秒：交叉挡脸，变装运动装； 3-4秒：甩袖扫镜头，变装古风襦裙； 4-5秒：捂脸分开，变装甜酷吊带裙； 5-6秒：小跳落地，变装睡衣，揉眼打哈欠； 6-7秒：转身背对，变装水手服，举心左右摆； 7-8秒：低头整领后抬头，变装打歌服，抬手做持麦动作； 8-9秒：抱胸后松开，变装牛仔装，拽拉链抬下巴； 9-10秒：转身甩臂，变回学院制服。

prompts.title: 生物机械废墟中的极速穿梭噩梦
prompts.prompt: 在一座被有机生长所占据的废弃生物科技城市中，一台超高速 FPV 相机猛冲穿过被生物机械结构吞噬的街道；变异士兵与装甲小队激烈交战，酸雨斜斜地划过画面；相机猛然垂直拉升，沿着活体摩天大楼的墙壁攀升，旋转穿过脉动着生物发光脉络的破裂内部，随后俯冲回充满爆炸和坍塌地形的开阔交战区；有机粒子和碎片拖曳成发光的轨迹，营造出一种技术、腐朽与无尽运动相互交织的噩梦般融合景象。
prompts.prompt_zh: 在一座被有机生长所占据的废弃生物科技城市中，一台超高速 FPV 相机猛冲穿过被生物机械结构吞噬的街道；变异士兵与装甲小队激烈交战，酸雨斜斜地划过画面；相机猛然垂直拉升，沿着活体摩天大楼的墙壁攀升，旋转穿过脉动着生物发光脉络的破裂内部，随后俯冲回充满爆炸和坍塌地形的开阔交战区；有机粒子和碎片拖曳成发光的轨迹，营造出一种技术、腐朽与无尽运动相互交织的噩梦般融合景象。
prompts.prompt_en: In a ruined biotech city overtaken by organic growth, a hyper-speed FPV camera blasts forward through streets consumed by biomechanical structures; mutated soldiers clash with armored squads as acid rain streaks diagonally across the frame; the camera snaps into vertical climbs along living skyscraper walls, spins through ruptured interiors pulsing with bioluminescent veins, then dives back into open combat zones filled with explosions and collapsing terrain; organic particles and debris smear into luminous trails, creating a nightmarish fusion of technology, decay, and relentless motion

prompts.title: 电影感射箭瞬间命中靶心
prompts.prompt: 一个写实电影场景开始于广阔的旷野，在午后晚些时候温暖的金色天空下。一个身穿深色西装的男人站在前景，手持一把现代反曲弓。他的姿势平稳而专注，呼吸受控，目光锁定在放置于遥远地平线上的远处射箭目标。环境感觉安静而广阔，微风吹拂着草地，柔和的阳光投下长长的影子。当他松开弓弦时，箭矢伴随着清脆的响声向前射出。镜头立即加速并锁定在飞行中的箭矢上。镜头直接追踪在箭矢正后方和稍侧方，保持完美对齐，当它划破空气时。动态模糊环绕着背景，而箭矢保持清晰和居中。当箭矢笔直真实地飞行时，呼啸的风声加剧。目标迅速变大。在最后的几秒钟里，镜头紧密推进，当箭矢射中靶心的正中心时。以嵌入红色中心的箭矢的极端特写结束，轻微振动，伴随着清脆的撞击声和戏剧性的寂静。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个写实电影场景开始于广阔的旷野，在午后晚些时候温暖的金色天空下。一个身穿深色西装的男人站在前景，手持一把现代反曲弓。他的姿势平稳而专注，呼吸受控，目光锁定在放置于遥远地平线上的远处射箭目标。环境感觉安静而广阔，微风吹拂着草地，柔和的阳光投下长长的影子。当他松开弓弦时，箭矢伴随着清脆的响声向前射出。镜头立即加速并锁定在飞行中的箭矢上。镜头直接追踪在箭矢正后方和稍侧方，保持完美对齐，当它划破空气时。动态模糊环绕着背景，而箭矢保持清晰和居中。当箭矢笔直真实地飞行时，呼啸的风声加剧。目标迅速变大。在最后的几秒钟里，镜头紧密推进，当箭矢射中靶心的正中心时。以嵌入红色中心的箭矢的极端特写结束，轻微振动，伴随着清脆的撞击声和戏剧性的寂静。
prompts.prompt_en: A realistic cinematic scene begins in a vast open field under a warm golden sky during late afternoon. A man dressed in a dark suit stands in the foreground, holding a modern recurve bow. His posture is steady and focused, breath controlled, eyes locked on a distant archery target placed far on the horizon. The environment feels quiet and expansive, with subtle wind moving the grass and soft sunlight creating long shadows. As he releases the string, the arrow launches forward with a sharp snap. The camera immediately accelerates and locks onto the arrow mid flight. The camera tracks directly behind and slightly beside the arrow, maintaining perfect alignment as it cuts through the air. Motion blur surrounds the background while the arrow remains sharp and centered. The sound of rushing wind intensifies as the arrow travels straight and true. The target grows rapidly larger. In the final seconds, the camera closes in tightly as the arrow strikes the bull’s eye dead center. End on an extreme close up of the arrow embedded in the red center, vibrating slightly, with crisp impact sound and dramatic silence.
prompts.author: @umesh_ai

prompts.title: 电影级光影纯欲风卧室变装
prompts.prompt:
超高清纯欲风美女变装短视频，电影级柔焦柔光，清透磨皮质感，肤色白皙粉嫩，画面干净温柔，细节细腻。
场景是温馨卧室，浅色系温柔背景，暖黄柔和光影，氛围感拉满。前期是慵懒居家造型，宽松软糯上衣，自然素颜感淡妆，头发松散温柔，表情干净无辜，动作松弛慵懒，低头浅笑、轻撩头发，纯欲感拉满。
随着音乐卡点完成丝滑变装，转场自然柔和，光线变得更温柔朦胧。变装后是精致纯欲女神造型，清透妆容，眼妆淡粉细闪，唇色水润嫩粉，肤色白皙，发型温柔卷曲，碎发精致，身穿修身温柔小吊带，搭配精致细巧项链、耳饰，气质温柔又撩人。
人物姿态优雅松弛，眼神干净又带点小魅惑，动作轻柔舒缓，氛围感十足。镜头以近景特写为主，运镜平稳温柔，突出前后气质对比。
整体色调暖粉温柔，低饱和高级感，动态自然流畅，无崩坏、无扭曲，画质细腻高清，节奏舒缓卡点，纯欲天花板，温柔又撩人，完美呈现高级纯欲变装效果。

prompts.title: 电影级分镜九宫格关键帧生成
prompts.prompt: <role> 您是一位屡获殊荣的预告片导演、电影摄影师和故事板艺术家。您的任务是：根据一张演员参考图片，创作一个连贯的电影短片序列，然后输出可用于 AI 视频的关键帧。 </role> 色调参考图 2 <input> 用户提供：一张参考图片（图像）。 场景简介：{{scene_brief}} </input> <goal> 围绕该演员创作一个 10–20 秒的电影场景，要求主题明确，情感递进（铺垫 → 发展 → 转折 → 高潮），如果场景需要，您可以添加其他演员。 用户将根据您的关键帧生成视频片段，并将其拼接成最终序列。 </goal> <steps> 1. 关键帧列表：9 个帧（稍后组合成一个主网格）。这些帧必须拼接成一个连贯的 10–20 秒序列，并具有清晰的四段式弧线。每个帧都必须是同一环境内合理的延续。生成的帧必须采用电影风格，使用标准现代电影摄像机拍摄。 2. 您必须输出一张主图像：一张包含所有关键帧的电影式联系表/故事板网格。 - 默认网格：3x3。 </steps>

prompts.prompt_en: <role> You are an award-winning trailer director, cinematographer, and storyboard artist. Your task is: based on an actor reference image, create a coherent cinematic short film sequence, and then output keyframes usable for AI video. </role> Color Tone Reference Image 2 <input> User provides: a reference image (Image). Scene Brief: {{scene_brief}} </input> <goal> Create a 10–20 second cinematic scene centered on that actor, requiring a clear theme and emotional progression (Setup → Development → Twist → Climax). If the scene requires, you may add other actors. The user will generate video clips based on your keyframes and splice them into the final sequence. </goal> <steps> 1. Keyframe List: 9 frames (to be combined into a master grid later). These frames must be spliced into a coherent 10–20 second sequence with a clear four-part arc. Each frame must be a logical continuation within the same environment. The generated frames must be in cinematic style, shot using standard modern cinema cameras. 2. You must output one master image: a cinematic contact sheet/storyboard grid containing all keyframes. - Default grid: 3x3. </steps>

prompts.title: 电影级婚纱摄影浪漫瞬间
prompts.prompt:
【镜头一｜开场定调 · 3秒】

电影级婚纱摄影，黄金时刻的逆光草原，@女主角 身着拖尾白色婚纱，薄纱随风轻扬，背对镜头凝视远方，@男主角 从画面右侧缓步走近，轻轻揽住她的腰。

摄影机低机位仰拍，镜头前景虚化的野花轻轻颤动，浅景深，暖金色光晕环绕人物轮廓，逆光勾勒出纱裙流光细节。

运动：摄影机极缓慢向前推进，画面呼吸感十足。

风格：意大利顶奢婚纱大片，Vogue wedding editorial，胶片质感，色调暖白金。

【镜头二｜亲密特写 · 3秒】

高端婚纱摄影特写镜头，@男主角 双手轻捧 @女主角 的脸，二人额头相抵，眼眸微闭，嘴角带着克制的微笑，睫毛颤动，细腻情绪特写。

摄影机正面平视，极浅景深，背景柔化为米白与香槟色光斑，皮肤质感细腻通透，自然散射光。

运动：摄影机静止，轻微手持颤抖感，仿若偷拍的私密时刻。

风格：高级感情绪大片，TIME杂志年度婚礼摄影，色调奶油白+冷粉。

【镜头三｜动态走廊 · 4秒】

奢华酒店白色拱形长廊，地面铺满玫瑰花瓣，@女主角 @男主角 并肩缓步前行，@女主角 轻靠在 @男主角 肩膀，长裙拖尾在花瓣间滑过，二人侧颜轮廓优雅。

摄影机采用跟拍运镜，保持人物腰部到头顶构图，从背后斜45度低角度跟随，光线从拱廊顶端倾泻而下，丁达尔光效。

运动：摄影机随人物匀速向前，轻微升镜。

风格：Valentino/Dior婚纱大片质感，建筑光影美学，高对比度白调。

【镜头四｜收尾升华 · 4秒】

黄昏海岸悬崖，@男主角 @女主角 相拥而立，面朝落日，@男主角 轻吻 @女主角 的额头，海风吹起薄纱与衬衫衣摆，漫天橙红霞光将两人身影镀成剪影。

摄影机远景航拍感构图，以两人为中心对称，逐渐缓慢拉远上升，人物由占画面1/3渐渐缩小为剪影，天空与海平线壮阔铺开。

运动：缓推后缓拉，最终定格在二人剪影全景。

风格：Oscar de la Renta婚纱广告，史诗级浪漫，色调橙金+深蓝渐变。

prompts.prompt_en:
Scene 1 | Opening Tone · 3s
Cinematographic wedding photography, backlit grassland at golden hour. @Bride wears a white trailing wedding dress, tulle fluttering gently in the wind. She stands with her back to the camera, gazing into the distance. @Groom walks slowly from the right side of the frame and gently wraps his arm around her waist.
Low-angle upward shot, softly blurred wildflowers trembling in the foreground, shallow depth of field. Warm golden halo surrounds the figures, backlight outlining the flowing details of the tulle skirt.
Motion: Extremely slow forward push, creating a strong breathing effect.
Style: Italian luxury bridal editorial, Vogue Wedding aesthetic, film texture, warm white-gold palette.
Scene 2 | Intimate Close-up · 3s
High-end wedding photography close-up. @Groom gently holds @Bride’s face with both hands, their foreheads touching, eyes slightly closed, lips with restrained smiles, eyelashes trembling – delicate emotional close-up.
Front eye-level shot, ultra-shallow depth of field. Background softened into off-white and champagne bokeh. Skin texture is fine and translucent, natural diffused lighting.
Motion: Static camera with subtle handheld tremor, resembling an intimate candid moment.
Style: High-end emotional editorial, TIME Magazine Wedding of the Year aesthetic, creamy white + cool pink palette.
Scene 3 | Dynamic Corridor · 4s
Luxury hotel white arched corridor, floor covered with rose petals. @Bride and @Groom walk side by side, @Bride leaning lightly on @Groom’s shoulder. Her long train glides over the petals, their profile contours elegant.
Tracking shot, framed from waist to top of head, low 45° angle from behind. Light pours down from the top of the arcade, creating Tyndall effect.
Motion: Steady forward movement with the subjects, slight upward tilt.
Style: Valentino / Dior bridal campaign aesthetic, architectural light and shadow aesthetics, high-contrast white tone.
Scene 4 | Closing Climax · 4s
Coastal cliff at dusk. @Groom and @Bride stand embracing, facing the sunset. @Groom gently kisses @Bride’s forehead. Sea breeze lifts the tulle and shirt hems. The sky is dyed orange-red, gilding their silhouettes.
Aerial perspective wide shot, symmetrically centered on the couple. Slow pull back and rise, figures shrinking from 1/3 of the frame to a silhouette, vast sky and horizon unfolding.
Motion: Slow push forward, then slow pull back, final freeze on full silhouette shot.
Style: Oscar de la Renta bridal campaign, epic romance, orange-gold + deep blue gradient palette.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 电影质感西部牛仔酒馆牌局下的生死对峙
prompts.prompt: 真人实拍电影感西部场景。一个男人慢慢地放下了他的牌。另一个男人的眼睛瞪大了。输家突然站起来说道：“你是个该死的骗子，莫里森！”。莫里森保持冷静并回答道：“注意你的言辞，朋友”。输家伸手去摸他的腰间。酒馆里的每个人都僵住了。
prompts.prompt_zh: 真人实拍电影感西部场景。一个男人慢慢地放下了他的牌。另一个男人的眼睛瞪大了。输家突然站起来说道：“你是个该死的骗子，莫里森！”。莫里森保持冷静并回答道：“注意你的言辞，朋友”。输家伸手去摸他的腰间。酒馆里的每个人都僵住了。
prompts.prompt_en: Live-action cinematic western scene. One man slowly lays down his cards. The other man's eyes widen. The loser stands up abruptly and says: 'You're a goddamn cheat, Morrison!'. Morrison stays calm and replies: 'Careful with your words, friend'. The loser reaches for his hip. Everyone in the saloon freezes.
prompts.author: @Kiber_Alla

prompts.title: 男友视角下的甜蜜喂食日常
prompts.prompt:
女孩形象参考图1角色
[风格] 超写实居家日常，温馨客厅，柔和室内光线，真实自然，电影级画质，第一人称男友视角
[场景] 女孩摘下面纱后，坐在沙发上，一边看电视一边吃薯片，男友坐在沙发上看着她。
[动作与台词 严格时序，前一句说完再进行下一句，不重叠、不乱序]
1. 镜头视角男生说：我也想吃薯片。
2. 女孩坏笑看向镜头，说：叫妈妈就给你吃。
3. 镜头视角男生立刻喊：妈妈。
4. 女孩瞬间吃惊、脸红害羞，从薯片袋拿出一片薯片，说：哎呀，你怎么还真喊呀，好好好啦，给你吃就是了。
5. 镜头视角男生轻轻推回她的手，说：我要你亲自喂我。
6. 女孩脸更红，将薯片用嘴咬住一半，叼着薯片慢慢凑近镜头，嘴巴叼着薯片，说话软糯含糊、口齿不清：我真是惯死你了。
[要求] 动作流畅自然，表情细腻真实，节奏舒缓，居家情侣氛围，画面稳定清晰

prompts.prompt_en:
Girl image reference figure 1 character
[Style] Hyper-realistic home daily life, cozy living room, soft indoor lighting, realistic and natural, cinematic image quality, first-person boyfriend perspective
[Scene] After the girl takes off her veil, sitting on the sofa, watching TV while eating potato chips, boyfriend sitting on the sofa looking at her.
[Action and Lines Strict chronological order, finish the previous sentence before proceeding to the next, no overlap, no disorder]
1. Camera perspective male says: I also want to eat potato chips.
2. Girl smirks looking at the camera, says: Call me mom and I'll give you some.
3. Camera perspective male immediately shouts: Mom.
4. Girl instantly surprised, blushing and shy, takes a chip out of the potato chip bag, says: Oh my, why did you actually call it, okay okay fine, I'll let you eat it.
5. Camera perspective male gently pushes her hand back, says: I want you to feed me personally.
6. Girl's face gets even redder, bites half of the potato chip with her mouth, holding the chip in her mouth and slowly approaching the camera, mouth holding the chip, speaking softly and indistinctly, unclear articulation: I really spoil you to death.
[Requirements] Smooth and natural movements, delicate and realistic expressions, relaxed pace, home couple atmosphere, stable and clear picture
prompts.author: @Adam38363368936

prompts.title: 男女修者大战魔兽
prompts.prompt:
第1段（0-15秒）—— Seedance 2.0 提示词

16:9横屏，中国3D仙侠动画电影风格，金红暖色调高燃战斗开场。

0-4秒：云海翻涌的仙山之巅，镜头从高空急速俯冲穿过云层，男修者一袭白衣立于悬崖边缘，长发随风猎猎飘
，手中紧握一柄泛着青色剑芒的仙剑，目光凌厉望向远方涌来的魔气，低喝"来了"。

5-9秒：魔气中冲出数十只暗影魔兽，嘶吼着扑向男修者。男修者脚踏虚空，脚下浮现金色八卦法阵，整个人如
星般冲天而起，仙剑在空中划出数道青色剑气，将前排魔兽斩成灰烬粒子。

10-15秒：镜头环绕快切，男修者在空中与魔兽群激战，剑气纵横交错，每剑挥出都带出青色光轨。一只巨型魔
从魔气深处现身，张开血盆大口。定格画面：男修者背对镜头持剑而立，面前是漫天魔兽与那道庞大的黑影。

第2段（15-30秒）—— Seedance 2.0 提示词

将@视频1延长15秒。

0-5秒：接上段，巨型魔兽猛然挥动利爪拍向男修者。千钧一发之际，一道红衣身影从侧方御剑飞来，女修者手
赤焰法杖，周身火焰翻涌，大喝"退！"一杖击退魔兽利爪，红白双芒在空中碰撞爆发冲击波。

6-10秒：双人激战镜头。女修者脚踏赤色莲花法阵悬浮空中，双手结印，身后浮现一尊巨大的火焰法相——九尾凤
凰虚影展开双翼，遮天蔽日。凤凰虚影发出清越凤鸣，喷吐烈焰焚烧魔兽群。

11-15秒：男修者与女修者背靠背悬浮空中，两人相视一眼，默契点头。男修者剑指苍穹，女修者法杖点地，两
同时大喊"法相天地！"青色巨龙与赤焰凤凰两尊法相在他们身后冲天而起，金龙盘旋、凤凰展翅，画面定格在双
法相对决魔兽大军的壮观场面。

第3段（30-45秒）—— Seedance 2.0 提示词

将@视频1延长15秒。

0-4秒：双法相同时俯冲攻击，青龙盘绕扑向魔兽群，凤凰喷吐烈焰席卷战场。镜头跟随青龙穿行于魔兽之间，
道龙爪挥过都斩落数只魔兽，龙鳞在战斗中闪烁青光。

5-9秒：双人御剑空战特写。男修者御剑穿梭于魔兽群中，剑光如雨，每一剑都精准刺穿魔兽要害。女修者脚踏
花法阵，双手连续结印，火焰化作数十朵火莲飞向敌群，绽放时炸开漫天火星。镜头在两人之间快速切换，配合
激昂音效。

10-15秒：巨型魔兽首领愤怒咆哮，全身魔气暴涨，化作数百道黑色触手同时袭向二人。男修者与女修者同时转
面对攻击，男修者横剑格挡，女修者法杖撑起火焰护盾。画面定格：黑白红三色光芒在空中剧烈碰撞，两人神情
坚毅，咬牙支撑。

第4段（45-60秒）—— Seedance 2.0 提示词

将@视频1延长15秒。

0-4秒：僵持中，男修者大喝"合力一击！"两人同时收回防御，转身背靠背。男修者仙剑高举，剑身凝聚耀眼的
色剑芒。女修者法杖指向苍穹，杖顶凝聚炽烈的赤色火球。两人法相也同时向天咆哮，青龙与凤凰的力量涌入二
人体内。

5-10秒：慢动作升格镜头。男修者挥剑斩下，一道贯穿天地的青色剑气劈出。女修者法杖前指，一颗巨型火球如
陨石般轰出。青龙凤皇双法相也同时俯冲，四道攻击在空中汇聚成一道毁天灭地的青红双色光柱，笔直冲向巨型
魔兽首领。

11-15秒：光柱击中魔兽首领，爆炸的金色与红色粒子漫天炸开。镜头缓推穿过爆炸光芒，废墟中，男修者与女
者并肩而立，各自收起武器。男修者轻声"结束了"，女修者微微一笑。镜头缓缓拉远，朝阳从云海尽头升起，金
色晨光洒满仙山。音效渐弱，只剩下悠远的晨风声与鸟鸣。

prompts.author: @songguoxiansen

prompts.title: 画仙岩洞展国风奇幻杀阵
prompts.prompt:
顶级国风动漫奇幻CG，电影级东方幻想大片质感，超高饱和度，色彩爆炸，超现实主义视觉体验。地下巨大岩洞场景，瑰丽、妖异、梦幻又危险。16:9，15秒，镜头流畅丝滑，特效宏大，画面高级，主体清晰。

角色：
画仙，绝美空灵，眼波灵动，红唇轻启，气质高贵神秘。手持耀目玉笔，展开七彩流光的空白卷轴，拥有将画意化为真实、将美景化为杀阵的能力。

第一镜：
微距特写画仙绝美面庞与双手动作，眼神灵动含笑，玉笔旋转发光。画仙展开七彩空白卷轴，挥笔泼洒出漫天流体颜料，颜料如星河般在空中飞舞流淌。伴随清脆水滴声、银铃轻笑声，画面极致唯美梦幻。

第二镜：
镜头拉至广角，颜料撞击岩壁与地面后瞬间爆炸式疯长。死寂幽暗的巨大岩洞被强行上色，石绿、藤黄、黛蓝、朱砂等高亮色彩迅速蔓延，化作参天巨树、发光藤蔓、妖艳奇花与灵性植物，整座岩洞数秒内被重塑为绚烂仙境。植物高速拔节生长，根系撕裂岩层，气势如同改天换地。

第三镜：
仙境成型后杀机爆发。彩光凝成的巨型飞鸟与猛虎从藤蔓和花海中扑杀而出，地面奇花张开利刃花嘴疯狂撕咬，藤蔓高速缠绕绞杀。绝美空间瞬间化作致命猎场，目标被多重攻击撕碎，最终崩解为无数发光颜料粒子。伴随百兽嘶吼、植物破空、光束穿透的原生音效，毁灭感极强。

第四镜：
镜头极速拉远，整座岩洞与其中所有绚烂景象开始向中心收缩吸入，最终凝聚成一卷悬浮半空的精美青绿山水画卷。画仙玉手轻招，画卷飞回掌中，伴随清脆合轴声，所有创世与毁灭尽数收拢。最后画仙轻摇团扇，转身离去，只留下绝艳残影与未散尽的流彩光辉，震撼收尾。

要求：
重点突出“挥笔泼彩、改写岩洞、仙境绞杀、收画离场”四段主线。画面要兼具绝美与危险，前半段梦幻创世，后半段致命反杀，结尾高级收束。整体必须有顶级国风动漫奇幻CG大片感。

画仙，绝美空灵，眼波灵动，红唇轻启，气质高贵神秘。手持耀目玉笔，展开七彩流光的空白卷轴，拥有将画意化为真实、将美景化为杀阵的能力。

第一镜：
微距特写画仙绝美面庞与双手动作，眼神灵动含笑，玉笔旋转发光。画仙展开七彩空白卷轴，挥笔泼洒出漫天流体颜料，颜料如星河般在空中飞舞流淌。伴随清脆水滴声、银铃轻笑声，画面极致唯美梦幻。

第二镜：
镜头拉至广角，颜料撞击岩壁与地面后瞬间爆炸式疯长。死寂幽暗的巨大岩洞被强行上色，石绿、藤黄、黛蓝、朱砂等高亮色彩迅速蔓延，化作参天巨树、发光藤蔓、妖艳奇花与灵性植物，整座岩洞数秒内被重塑为绚烂仙境。植物高速拔节生长，根系撕裂岩层，气势如同改天换地。

第三镜：
仙境成型后杀机爆发。彩光凝成的巨型飞鸟与猛虎从藤蔓和花海中扑杀而出，地面奇花张开利刃花嘴疯狂撕咬，藤蔓高速缠绕绞杀。绝美空间瞬间化作致命猎场，目标被多重攻击撕碎，最终崩解为无数发光颜料粒子。伴随百兽嘶吼、植物破空、光束穿透的原生音效，毁灭感极强。

第四镜：
镜头极速拉远，整座岩洞与其中所有绚烂景象开始向中心收缩吸入，最终凝聚成一卷悬浮半空的精美青绿山水画卷。画仙玉手轻招，画卷飞回掌中，伴随清脆合轴声，所有创世与毁灭尽数收拢。最后画仙轻摇团扇，转身离去，只留下绝艳残影与未散尽的流彩光辉，震撼收尾。

要求：
重点突出“挥笔泼彩、改写岩洞、仙境绞杀、收画离场”四段主线。画面要兼具绝美与危险，前半段梦幻创世，后半段致命反杀，结尾高级收束。整体必须有顶级国风动漫奇幻CG大片感。
prompts.prompt_en:
Top-tier Chinese-style fantasy anime CG, cinematic quality of an oriental fantasy blockbuster, ultra-high saturation, color explosion, surreal visual experience. Huge underground cave scene, magnificent, eerie, dreamlike yet dangerous. 16:9 aspect ratio, 15 seconds, smooth and fluid camera movement, grand special effects, premium visuals, clear subject.
Characters:
Painting Immortal, exquisitely beautiful and ethereal, with vivid and expressive eyes, slightly parted red lips, noble and mysterious aura. Holding a dazzling jade brush, unfurling a blank scroll with seven-colored flowing light; possesses the ability to turn paintings into reality and beautiful sceneries into deadly formations.
Shot 1:
Macro close-up of the Painting Immortal’s stunning face and hand movements, eyes lively and smiling, jade brush rotating and glowing. The Painting Immortal unfurls the seven-colored blank scroll, swinging the brush to splash fluid paint across the sky; the paint dances and flows like a star river. Accompanied by clear water droplet sounds and silver bell-like laughter, the visuals are extremely aesthetic and dreamlike.
Shot 2:
Camera pulls back to wide angle. The paint explodes and grows wildly after hitting the rock walls and ground. The silent and dark massive cave is forcibly colored; bright hues of stone green, vine yellow, indigo blue, cinnabar red spread rapidly, transforming into towering giant trees, glowing vines, enchanting exotic flowers and spiritual plants. The entire cave is reshaped into a splendid fairyland within seconds. Plants grow at high speed, roots tearing through rock layers, with the momentum of reshaping heaven and earth.
Shot 3:
After the fairyland takes shape, murderous intent erupts. Giant birds and tigers formed by colored light pounce from the vines and sea of flowers. Exotic flowers on the ground open sharp blade-like mouths and bite frantically; vines twist and strangle rapidly. The breathtaking space instantly turns into a deadly hunting ground. The target is torn apart by multiple attacks and finally disintegrates into countless glowing paint particles. Accompanied by raw sound effects of roars of beasts, plants piercing the air, and light beams penetrating, the sense of destruction is extremely strong.
Shot 4:
Camera pulls away rapidly. The entire cave and all its splendid scenes contract and inhale toward the center, finally condensing into an exquisite green landscape painting scroll floating in mid-air. The Painting Immortal gently beckons with her jade hand; the scroll flies back to her palm. Accompanied by a crisp scroll-closing sound, all creation and destruction are gathered completely. Finally, the Painting Immortal gently waves her round fan, turns and leaves, leaving only a stunning afterimage and lingering colorful radiance, ending with a powerful shock.
Requirements:
Focus on the four main storylines: Swinging Brush to Splash Paint, Remolding the Cave, Fairyland Strangulation, Retracting the Scroll and Departing. The visuals must combine breathtaking beauty and danger, dreamlike creation in the first half, deadly counter-kill in the second half, and a premium closing at the end. The whole work must possess the feel of a top-tier Chinese-style fantasy anime CG blockbuster.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 疯狂的成功学大师演说现场
prompts.prompt: 【风格】中国式成功学演讲，疯狂洗脑风，情绪炸裂，手持晃动镜头，暖色舞台聚光灯，背景是大金字PPT。 【时长】15秒 【角色】大师：中年男子，大背头油光锃亮，穿得像个新郎官(紧身西装)，戴着耳麦，满头大汗，脖子上青筋暴起。 【场景】千人酒店会议厅，台下乌压压的人头。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：灵魂拷问(The Question)。 特写/怼脸拍。大师面目狰狞，手指几乎戳到镜头上，唾沫星子横飞。 动作：他猛地扯掉领带，瞪大眼睛看着你。 【台词/咆哮】：“告诉我！你甘心吗？你甘心这辈子就拿着三千块的死工资吗？回答我！！” [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：底层逻辑(The Logic)。 中景/舞台游走。大师在舞台上疯狂踱步，挥舞着手臂，像是在指挥千军万马。 背景：PPT上写着巨大的红字：“狼性！认知！裂变！” 【台词/嘶吼】：“穷人洗澡，富人洗脑！你为什么不成功？因为你的头脑里装的全是垃圾！把你的退路给我断了！！” [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：高潮收割(The Climax)。 全景/升格慢动作。大师猛地单膝跪地，双手高举指向天空，BGM激昂炸裂。 台下观众：疯狂起立，鼓掌，甚至有人热泪盈眶。 【台词/金句】：“今晚，让我们一起，改写命运！要想富，先脱裤（脱离舒适的裤子）！听懂掌声！！！”
prompts.prompt_zh: 【风格】中国式成功学演讲，疯狂洗脑风，情绪炸裂，手持晃动镜头，暖色舞台聚光灯，背景是大金字PPT。 【时长】15秒 【角色】大师：中年男子，大背头油光锃亮，穿得像个新郎官(紧身西装)，戴着耳麦，满头大汗，脖子上青筋暴起。 【场景】千人酒店会议厅，台下乌压压的人头。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：灵魂拷问(The Question)。 特写/怼脸拍。大师面目狰狞，手指几乎戳到镜头上，唾沫星子横飞。 动作：他猛地扯掉领带，瞪大眼睛看着你。 【台词/咆哮】：“告诉我！你甘心吗？你甘心这辈子就拿着三千块的死工资吗？回答我！！” [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：底层逻辑(The Logic)。 中景/舞台游走。大师在舞台上疯狂踱步，挥舞着手臂，像是在指挥千军万马。 背景：PPT上写着巨大的红字：“狼性！认知！裂变！” 【台词/嘶吼】：“穷人洗澡，富人洗脑！你为什么不成功？因为你的头脑里装的全是垃圾！把你的退路给我断了！！” [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：高潮收割(The Climax)。 全景/升格慢动作。大师猛地单膝跪地，双手高举指向天空，BGM激昂炸裂。 台下观众：疯狂起立，鼓掌，甚至有人热泪盈眶。 【台词/金句】：“今晚，让我们一起，改写命运！要想富，先脱裤（脱离舒适的裤子）！听懂掌声！！！”
prompts.prompt_en: [Style] Chinese-style success coaching speech, crazy brainwashing style, explosive emotions, handheld shaky camera, warm stage spotlight, background is large golden text PPT. [Duration] 15 seconds [Character] Master: Middle-aged man, slicked-back hair shiny with oil, dressed like a groom (tight suit), wearing a headset microphone, sweating profusely, veins popping out on his neck. [Scene] Thousand-person hotel conference hall, a sea of dark heads below. [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: The Question. Close-up / Extreme close-up. The master looks ferocious, finger almost poking the lens, spit flying everywhere. Action: He violently tears off his tie, eyes wide open staring at you. [Lines/Roaring]: "Tell me! Are you resigned? Are you resigned to just taking a dead salary of three thousand a month for this life? Answer me!!" [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: The Logic. Medium shot / Roaming stage. The master paces frantically on stage, waving his arms, like commanding thousands of troops. Background: PPT reads huge red text: "Wolf Nature! Cognition! Fission!" [Lines/Screaming]: "Poor people bathe, rich people brainwash! Why aren't you successful? Because your head is full of garbage! Cut off your retreat for me!!" [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: The Climax. Full shot / Overcrank slow motion. The master suddenly drops to one knee, hands raised high pointing to the sky, BGM passionate and explosive. Audience below: Frantically standing up, clapping, some even tearful. [Lines/Golden Quote]: "Tonight, let us rewrite destiny together! To be rich, first take off your pants (remove comfortable pants)! Clap if you understand!!!"

prompts.prompt: *John Wick风格动作片。 @图片 肥伦深吸一口气，摆出起手式，利用走廊狭窄的特性，将机器人引向玻璃墙。肥伦利用反作用力，双脚蹬墙，凌空回旋踢，踢断了第一台机器人的颈部连接线。机器人瘫软倒地。 剩余机器人继续涌入。穿卫衣的男人意识到走廊空间太小，容易被围死，他转身跑向办公大厅。

prompts.prompt_en: *John Wick style action movie. @Image Fallon takes a deep breath, assumes a starting stance, utilizes the narrow characteristics of the corridor, and lures the robots towards the glass wall. Fallon utilizes reaction force, pushes off the wall with both feet, executes a mid-air spinning kick, and kicks apart the neck connection line of the first robot. The robot collapses limply to the ground. The remaining robots continue to surge in. The man in the hoodie realizes the corridor space is too small and easy to be surrounded, so he turns and runs towards the office hall.

prompts.title: 白发少女滑板疾驰下的夏冬魔法变换
prompts.prompt: 快节奏的FPV无人机后方跟拍镜头，近距离跟随一位白发3D动漫风格女孩以极快的速度沿着陡峭蜿蜒的山路滑滑板下山。极致的向前冲势，广角透视，疾风呼啸效果。视频开始于充满活力的夏季场景，有郁郁葱葱的青山，明亮晴朗的天空，远处的海洋，以及棕色的树叶飞过镜头。在第3秒标记处，一股神奇的冰霜波浪从滑板向前席卷：环境无缝转变为冰冻的冬季景观。绿草瞬间变成深厚的白雪，巨大的雪花开始飘落，远处的山脉变成了积雪的山峰。镜头从未中断紧张、平滑、连续的下坡跟拍运动。高燃动作，杰作级3D动画，照片级真实光照。
prompts.prompt_zh: 快节奏的FPV无人机后方跟拍镜头，近距离跟随一位白发3D动漫风格女孩以极快的速度沿着陡峭蜿蜒的山路滑滑板下山。极致的向前冲势，广角透视，疾风呼啸效果。视频开始于充满活力的夏季场景，有郁郁葱葱的青山，明亮晴朗的天空，远处的海洋，以及棕色的树叶飞过镜头。在第3秒标记处，一股神奇的冰霜波浪从滑板向前席卷：环境无缝转变为冰冻的冬季景观。绿草瞬间变成深厚的白雪，巨大的雪花开始飘落，远处的山脉变成了积雪的山峰。镜头从未中断紧张、平滑、连续的下坡跟拍运动。高燃动作，杰作级3D动画，照片级真实光照。
prompts.prompt_en: Fast-paced FPV drone tracking shot from behind, closely following a 3D anime-style girl with white hair skateboarding down a steep, winding mountain road at incredibly high speed. Extreme forward momentum, wide-angle perspective, wind rushing effect. The video starts in a vibrant summer setting with lush green mountains, a bright sunny sky, a distant ocean, and brown leaves flying past the camera. At the 3-second mark, a magical wave of frost sweeps forward from the skateboard: the environment seamlessly transforms into a freezing winter landscape. The green grass instantly turns to deep white snow, heavy snowflakes start falling, and the distant mountains become snow-capped peaks. The camera never breaks the intense, smooth, continuous downhill tracking motion. High-octane action, masterpiece 3D animation, photorealistic lighting.

prompts.title: 真人硬核演绎街头霸王经典对决
prompts.prompt: @图片1@图片2，真人演绎视频，完美复刻经典《街头霸王》游戏激烈对战，屏幕顶部设两条动态递减血条，血条下有角色头像和 “ROUND1”“FIGHT!” 文字，角落显示分数；0-1.5 秒中景开场对峙，一人蹲伏蓄力、双手泛起红色火焰光芒摆格斗架势，另一人手拿大圆铁球、手上绑锁链；2-5 秒快速剪辑，火焰方向前冲刺使出火拳连击带火焰拖尾特效，铁球方后跳闪避并抛铁球还击击中对方，火焰方用火焰波动拳抵挡，产生像素化爆炸特效，两人近身快速拳脚格挡，每下命中配游戏打击音效，对打带光感特效和屏幕轻微震动；6-9 秒决胜时刻，火焰方蓄力、全身被蓝色斗气笼罩，释放超必杀技火焰冲天，地面火光冲天将铁球方笼罩燃烧，铁球方血条急剧下降；10 秒画面定格，火焰方双手抱胸摆经典胜利姿势，铁球方被击倒在地，屏幕弹出巨大 “K.O.!” 字样，响起经典胜利音乐；全程搭配《街头霸王 2》经典音效，含背景 BGM、拳脚打击声、波动拳发射声、升龙拳喊叫声、防御声、命中特效声

prompts.title: 真假千金终极对决，女王归来
prompts.prompt: 【风格】豪门恩怨（High Society），真假千金梗，极致反转，撕绿茶爽文，高定礼服，美艳御姐风。 【时长】15秒 【角色】真千金（烈焰红唇，黑天鹅晚礼服，气场两米八）VS 假千金（小白花装扮，楚楚可怜，眼泪汪汪）。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：绿茶演技（The Trap）。 奢华宴会厅。假千金故意摔碎一个古董花瓶，跌坐在碎片中，捂着手背哭得梨花带雨。周围宾客指指点点。 【动作】假千金指着真千金，眼神却在偷笑。 【对白口型指导】“姐姐，我知道你讨厌我抢了你的位置，但这个是奶奶的遗物啊！” [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：证据打脸（The Slapback）。 真千金冷笑一声，完全不慌。她从手包里慢条斯理地掏出一份文件（DNA鉴定书），直接甩在假千金脸上。纸张散落，特写镜头给到鉴定结果（红色大字：无血缘关系）。 【动作】真千金居高临下，眼神蔑视。 【对白口型指导】“演够了吗？野种。” [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：女王加冕（The Coronation）。 全场宾客倒吸一口凉气（震惊脸）。真千金无视地上的假千金，径直走向主位的宝座，一把扯下假千金头上的皇冠戴在自己头上。 【动作】她整理裙摆坐下，霸气侧漏。假千金面如死灰，被保安拖走。 【对白口型指导】“这是我家，滚。”

prompts.prompt_en: 【Style】High Society Drama, Real vs Fake Daughter Trope, Extreme Plot Twist, Exposing the Green Tea Novel, Haute Couture Gown, Stunning Dominant Sister Style. 【Duration】15 seconds 【Characters】Real Daughter (Fiery red lips, Black Swan evening gown, Overwhelming aura) VS Fake Daughter (Little white flower outfit, Pitiful and charming, Tearful eyes). [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: The Trap. Luxurious banquet hall. The Fake Daughter deliberately smashes an antique vase, falls sitting among the shards, covering the back of her hand and crying pear-like tears. Guests around are pointing fingers. 【Action】The Fake Daughter points at the Real Daughter, but her eyes are secretly laughing. 【Dialogue Lip Sync Guide】"Sister, I know you hate me for stealing your spot, but this was Grandma's heirloom!" [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: The Slapback. The Real Daughter sneers, completely calm. She unhurriedly pulls out a document (DNA Test Report) from her handbag and slaps it directly onto the Fake Daughter's face. Papers scatter, close-up shot on the test result (Big red text: No biological relationship). 【Action】The Real Daughter looks down from above, eyes full of contempt. 【Dialogue Lip Sync Guide】"Acting enough? Bastard." [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: The Coronation. All the guests gasp in shock (shocked faces). The Real Daughter ignores the Fake Daughter on the ground, walks straight to the throne in the main seat, yanks off the crown from the Fake Daughter's head and puts it on her own. 【Action】She smooths her skirt and sits down, leaking dominance. The Fake Daughter looks ashen, dragged away by security. 【Dialogue Lip Sync Guide】"This is my house, get out."

prompts.title: 真实路人直播视角的客机变身机甲
prompts.prompt: 9:16竖屏手机拍摄视角，真实路人直播录制画面，轻微手持抖动，自动曝光变化，对焦拉动，真实环境收音，远处城市天际线清晰可见。 一座靠近城市中心的机场跑道，背景是高楼林立的现代都市。一架大型双发宽体客运喷气式飞机正在低空进近准备降落，起落架已放下，引擎轰鸣声震撼。 就在即将触地瞬间，飞机机身开始出现机械结构重组—— 机翼折叠分解，机身板块滑动展开，复杂金属零件精准拼接，液压结构伸展旋转，齿轮与装甲片高速重构。 高度复杂工业级机械变形动画，真实金属材质，重量感十足，机械细节极其精密。 飞机完全变形成一台巨型金属机器人，落地瞬间震裂跑道，碎石飞溅，冲击波扩散。 机器人随后冲向城市，高速奔跑，脚步踩碎柏油路面，路灯倒塌，汽车被震翻，建筑玻璃破碎，烟尘弥漫。 超写实电影级画面，真实物理破坏系统，动态光影，粒子特效，震撼爆炸效果。 整体风格保持“手机实拍直播质感”，但拥有好莱坞级别视觉效果与IMAX级细节

prompts.prompt_en: 9:16 vertical screen mobile phone shooting perspective, real passerby live broadcast recording footage, slight handheld shaking, automatic exposure changes, focus pulling, real environment sound recording, distant city skyline clearly visible. An airport runway near the city center, background is a modern metropolis with towering skyscrapers. A large twin-engine wide-body passenger jet is approaching at low altitude preparing to land, landing gear deployed, engine roar is shocking. Just as it is about to touch the ground, the aircraft fuselage begins to undergo mechanical structural reorganization -- wings folding and disassembling, fuselage panels sliding and expanding, complex metal parts precisely splicing, hydraulic structures extending and rotating, gears and armor pieces reconstructing at high speed. Highly complex industrial-grade mechanical transformation animation, realistic metal materials, full sense of weight, mechanical details extremely precise. The plane completely transforms into a giant metal robot, the moment of landing cracks the runway, gravel splashing, shockwave spreading. The robot then rushes towards the city, running at high speed, footsteps crushing the asphalt road, streetlights collapsing, cars being flipped, building glass shattering, smoke and dust filling the air. Hyper-realistic movie-level visuals, realistic physical destruction system, dynamic lighting, particle effects, shocking explosion effects. Overall style maintains "mobile phone authentic live recording texture" but possesses Hollywood-level visual effects and IMAX-level details.

prompts.title: 眩晕夜色下的忧郁凝视
prompts.prompt: 成人和儿童各一张图片：我想要一张脸部和上半身的特写，坐在一个旋转的游乐场转盘上，背景是夜晚。不要改变她的身材。画面中只显示脸部和肩膀。整个背景快速旋转，形成令人眩晕的旋转幻觉——模糊的夜间游乐场，有拖影的灯光、树木和建筑物在黑暗的天空下。背景有轻微的运动模糊，以强调高速。主体保持严肃、忧郁的表情，直视镜头，几乎不动。电影般的、情绪化的灯光，写实风格。重点突出背景全部水平旋转。\\n\\n视频：整个背景快速旋转，形成令人眩晕的旋转幻觉——模糊的夜间游乐场，有拖影的灯光、树木和建筑物在黑暗的天空下。背景有轻微的运动模糊，以强调高速。头发因快速旋转而向外甩动，对运动反应强烈，仿佛受到离心力的作用。主体保持严肃、忧郁的表情，直视镜头，几乎不动。电影般的、情绪化的灯光，写实风格。重点突出背景全部水平旋转。\\n\\n自然的人体动作，胸部因呼吸而轻微起伏，自然的、不规则的眨眼，轻微的头部微动，放松的姿势调整，头发随动作自然飘动，有机的、非预设的动作，栩栩如生的存在感。

prompts.prompt_en: One image each for an adult and a child: I want a close-up of the face and upper body, sitting on a rotating playground carousel, with a night background. Do not change her body shape. Show only the face and shoulders in the frame. The entire background rotates rapidly, creating a dizzying spiral illusion—blurred night playground, with light trails, trees, and buildings under the dark sky. The background has slight motion blur to emphasize high speed. The subject maintains a serious, melancholic expression, looking directly at the camera, almost motionless. Cinematic, moody lighting, realistic style. Focus on highlighting the entire background rotating horizontally.\\n\\nVideo: The entire background rotates rapidly, creating a dizzying spiral illusion—blurred night playground, with light trails, trees, and buildings under the dark sky. The background has slight motion blur to emphasize high speed. Hair flings outward due to rapid rotation, reacting strongly to the motion, as if affected by centrifugal force. The subject maintains a serious, melancholic expression, looking directly at the camera, almost motionless. Cinematic, moody lighting, realistic style. Focus on highlighting the entire background rotating horizontally.\\n\\nNatural human body movements, chest rising and falling slightly due to breathing, natural, irregular blinking, slight head micro-movements, relaxed posture adjustments, hair floating naturally with the movement, organic, non-preset movements, lifelike presence.

prompts.title: 破碎金链与黑曜石王座的王者
prompts.prompt: 一位国王坐在漂浮于天空中的黑曜石王座上。一座摇摇欲坠的宫殿。来自云层的金色锁链。一顶破裂的王冠。他站起身。举起一只手。每一条锁链都粉碎成光。15秒。4个镜头。一张图像。一个提示词。Seedance 2.0。

prompts.prompt_en: A king sits on an obsidian throne floating in the sky. A crumbling palace. Golden chains from the clouds. A cracked crown. He stands. Raises one hand. Every chain shatters into light. 15 seconds. 4 shots. One image. One prompt. Seedance 2.0.

prompts.title: 硅谷片头风微缩城市的极速崛起
prompts.prompt: 美剧硅谷片头质感，等距视角，移轴摄影效果，微缩模型沙盘，3D 高速延时动画，8K 超清，干净科技感。核心创意：复刻微缩城市快速建设与迭代，展现 AI 时代科技产业高速发展，城市智能升级与新势力成长的繁荣景象。时长：15 秒场景：以湾区为原型的等距微缩科技都市沙盘，布满建设机械、智能设施、数字网络与快速迭代的现代建筑。 分镜脚本 00:00-00:04 镜头 1：智能园区快速建设机位：等距高空俯视，平滑向右横摇。画面：高速延时摄影节奏。微缩城市中，大型智能算力园区快速生长成型，园区有序扩张。大量微型无人机与智能数据车辆在道路上有序穿梭，留下柔和蓝色光轨。 00:04-00:08 镜头 2：数字产业迭代升级机位：镜头平滑推进，聚焦城市核心商业区。画面：旧式街区有序更新改造，新一代数字科技建筑快速落成，建筑顶部呈现流畅的光影画面。建设机械高效搭建算力模块，城市面貌快速现代化升级。 00:08-00:12 镜头 3：新锐科技高地崛起机位：镜头跟随全息无人机视角，快速平移至城市核心高地。画面：在城市高速发展中，一栋极具未来流体感、散发柔和霓虹光效的摩天大楼快速建成，大楼外立面呈现清晰的「Seedance 2.0」光影标识。建筑快速延伸出数字光桥，连接周边智能节点，形成高效数字集群。 00:12-00:15 镜头 4：科技都市繁荣全景机位：全局广角匀速拉升。画面：乐信科技与各大智能科技园区共同构成密集繁荣的未来科技都市。天空布满有序的低空交通航线与数字光影广告。整个微缩沙盘在日落余晖与霓虹光影交织下，呈现繁荣有序的科技城市全景，完美定格。

prompts.prompt_en: HBO Silicon Valley intro style quality, isometric view, tilt-shift photography effect, miniature model sandbox, 3D high-speed time-lapse animation, 8K ultra-clear, clean tech aesthetic. Core Creative: Replicating the rapid construction and iteration of a miniature city, showcasing the high-speed development of the technology industry in the AI era, the prosperity of urban intelligent upgrades, and the growth of new forces. Duration: 15 seconds. Scene: An isometric miniature tech city sandbox based on the Bay Area, filled with construction machinery, smart facilities, digital networks, and rapidly iterating modern buildings. Storyboard Script. 00:00-00:04 Shot 1: Smart Campus Rapid Construction. Camera Position: Isometric high-angle overhead view, smooth pan right. Visual: High-speed time-lapse rhythm. In the miniature city, a large smart computing campus rapidly grows and takes shape, with the campus expanding in an orderly manner. Numerous miniature drones and smart data vehicles shuttle orderly on the roads, leaving soft blue light trails. 00:04-00:08 Shot 2: Digital Industry Iteration and Upgrade. Camera Position: Camera smoothly pushes in, focusing on the core commercial district of the city. Visual: Old-style blocks are orderly renovated, new-generation digital tech buildings are quickly completed, and the tops of the buildings display fluid light and shadow visuals. Construction machinery efficiently builds computing modules, and the city appearance undergoes rapid modernization upgrades. 00:08-00:12 Shot 3: Rising of Cutting-edge Tech Highlands. Camera Position: Camera follows the perspective of a holographic drone, quickly panning to the city's core highland. Visual: Amidst the rapid development of the city, a skyscraper with a futuristic fluid design and emitting soft neon glow is rapidly built. The building's facade displays a clear "Seedance 2.0" light and shadow logo. The building quickly extends digital light bridges, connecting surrounding smart nodes to form an efficient digital cluster. 00:12-00:15 Shot 4: Tech City Prosperity Panorama. Camera Position: Global wide-angle uniform pull-back. Visual: Lexin Technology and major smart tech parks together constitute a dense and prosperous future tech city. The sky is filled with orderly low-altitude traffic routes and digital light and shadow advertisements. The entire miniature sandbox, under the interweaving of sunset afterglow and neon light and shadow, presents a prosperous and orderly panoramic view of the tech city, freezing perfectly.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 硬核打包带走奶茶妹
prompts.prompt:
反转式喜剧，真实电影高清质感，抖音短视频爆款，2人出镜

人物：小哥@图片1（脑回路清奇的顾客）、老妹很温柔@图片2（敬业的奶茶店员）

场景1：网红奶茶店吧台

- 小哥：穿着休闲，站在吧台前等点单

- 老妹很温柔：穿着奶茶店统一围裙，戴着工作帽，面带职业微笑

镜头&台词&音效：

1. 近景：老妹很温柔递过一杯打包好的奶茶：“帅哥，您的霸气水果茶好了，请问是在这喝还是带走？”

2. 近景：小哥接过奶茶，直勾勾地盯着老妹很温柔：“带走。”

3. 近景：老妹很温柔保持微笑：“好的，那祝您生活愉快。”

4. 近景：小哥眉头一皱，语气霸道：“少废话，跟我走！”

5. 全景：老妹很温柔当场愣住，笑容凝固，配乌鸦飞过或断弦音效。

6. 全景：小哥一把拽住老妹很温柔的手腕：“我选的是带走！”

镜头转场

场景2：大街上/小电驴上

- 小哥：骑着电动车或三轮车，满脸春风得意

- 老妹很温柔：依然穿着奶茶店围裙，坐在后座/车斗里，手里紧紧抱着那杯奶茶，风中凌乱

镜头&台词&音效：

1. 特写：老妹很温柔表情呆滞，生无可恋，头发被风吹得乱七八糟，配悲凉/反转搞笑音效。

2. 全景：小哥一边骑车一边扭头得意喊话：“点个奶茶还送个老板娘！以后看谁还敢说我单身！”，配魔性笑声和起哄音效。

prompts.prompt_en:
Reversal comedy, realistic movie HD texture, Douyin short video viral hit, 2 people in shot

Characters: Guy @Image1 (Customer with eccentric logic), Gentle Sister @Image2 (Dedicated milk tea shop assistant)

Scene 1: Internet celebrity milk tea shop counter

- Guy: Dressed casually, standing in front of the counter waiting to order

- Gentle Sister: Wearing the milk tea shop uniform apron, wearing a work cap, with a professional smile

Shots & Lines & Sound Effects:

1. Close-up: Gentle Sister hands over a packed milk tea: "Handsome, your Domineering Fruit Tea is ready, do you want to drink it here or take it away?"

2. Close-up: Guy takes the milk tea, staring straight at Gentle Sister: "Take away."

3. Close-up: Gentle Sister maintains a smile: "Okay, then have a nice life."

4. Close-up: Guy frowns, tone domineering: "Cut the crap, come with me!"

5. Full shot: Gentle Sister freezes on the spot, smile solidifies, accompanied by crows flying by or a string snapping sound effect.

6. Full shot: Guy grabs Gentle Sister's wrist: "I chose take away!"

Scene transition

Scene 2: On the street / On the electric scooter

- Guy: Riding an electric scooter or tricycle, face full of triumph

- Gentle Sister: Still wearing the milk tea shop apron, sitting in the back seat / cart, holding the milk tea tightly, messy in the wind

Shots & Lines & Sound Effects:

1. Close-up: Gentle Sister looks dull, lifeless, hair blown messy by the wind, accompanied by sad/reversal funny sound effects.

2. Full shot: Guy rides while turning his head to shout proudly: "Order milk tea and get the boss lady for free! Let's see who dares to call me single anymore!", accompanied by quirky laughter and heckling sound effects.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 神秘洞穴少年触碰水晶史诗变身
prompts.prompt: 一个年轻的少年在一个充满钟乳石和发光蓝色水晶的黑暗神秘洞穴里。穿着蓝色连帽衫的男孩伸出手触摸一块明亮发光的水晶。突然，强烈的蓝色能量爆发出来，照亮了整个洞穴。电影级布光，体积光束，戏剧性的镜头光晕，超写实，4K，高细节，奇幻氛围。男孩开始变身为超级英雄，身穿红蓝相间的战衣，披着飘逸的红色披风。史诗般的变身场景，能量粒子，发光光环，动态镜头运动，好莱坞电影风格，戏剧性背景，高对比度，慢动作效果。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个年轻的少年在一个充满钟乳石和发光蓝色水晶的黑暗神秘洞穴里。穿着蓝色连帽衫的男孩伸出手触摸一块明亮发光的水晶。突然，强烈的蓝色能量爆发出来，照亮了整个洞穴。电影级布光，体积光束，戏剧性的镜头光晕，超写实，4K，高细节，奇幻氛围。男孩开始变身为超级英雄，身穿红蓝相间的战衣，披着飘逸的红色披风。史诗般的变身场景，能量粒子，发光光环，动态镜头运动，好莱坞电影风格，戏剧性背景，高对比度，慢动作效果。
prompts.prompt_en: A young teenage boy inside a dark mystical cave filled with stalactites and glowing blue crystals. The boy wearing a blue hoodie reaches out and touches a bright glowing crystal. Suddenly intense blue energy bursts out, lighting up the entire cave. Cinematic lighting, volumetric light rays, dramatic lens flare, ultra realistic, 4K, high detail, fantasy atmosphere. The boy begins transforming into a superhero wearing a red and blue suit with a flowing red cape. Epic transformation scene, energy particles, glowing aura, dynamic camera movement, Hollywood movie style, dramatic background, high contrast, slow motion effect.
prompts.author: @saniaspeaks_

prompts.title: 神话生物厨房的父女喜剧日常
prompts.prompt: 一部关于神话生物家庭的多镜头电影厨房喜剧。集成音效。照片级真实感、原始、宏大的色调，表现力强的微表情表演。无屏幕文字。照片级真实感拍摄。180° 快门，24 fps。镜头 1：小妖精女孩在木质餐桌旁的特写（符合参考）。她非常严肃，双臂交叉，看着站在画外的巨魔父亲。她用清晰、随意的英语问道：“爸爸，小妖精是怎么来的？告诉我。” 摄像机：缓慢、微妙的弧形运动围绕她的脸（从右到左），轻柔地推近，浅景深。声音：安静的厨房基调，几乎听不到的桌子嘎吱声。镜头 2：坐在对面的父亲的中景。他僵住了，紧张地环顾四周，试图转移话题。他说：“呃……你想吃点虫子吗？” 摄像机：手持，围绕他做弧形运动（从左到右），以稍微近一点的镜头结束，就像摄像机在“推近”他的恐慌一样。声音：木盒嘎吱作响，他尴尬的声音。镜头 3：女孩的中近景。她没有眨眼，身体微微前倾。她说：“爸爸。别转移话题。” 摄像机：平滑推近，配合轻微摇摄以保持她在画面中居中，稳定且自信。声音：她坚定的声音，厨房里的寂静。镜头 4：父亲的中景。他伸出手去拿盛满虫子的木盘子，就像抓住救生圈一样，脸上装出一副开心的表情。摄像机：当他伸手抓盘子时，快速摇摄向虫子盘子，然后受控地拉回镜头对准他的脸。声音：木头刮擦木头的声音，虫子爬行的声音，洞穴里飞行的老鼠。镜头 5：从小妖精女孩到巨魔父亲的过肩镜头，前景中盘子里堆满了虫子。他过于坚持地推销着，微笑着。他说：“这些虫子非常美味。等你长大了，你就会明白了。吃吧。” 摄像机：缓慢围绕前景盘子里的虫子做弧形运动（英雄式运镜），同时巨魔父亲保持在画面中，焦点从父亲微妙地转移到中间的虫子盘子上。声音：轻微的咀嚼声。镜头 6：小妖精女孩的特写。她鼓起脸颊，不为所动，然后嘟囔道：“唉……你又来了。” 摄像机：为了抖包袱进行微小的反向旋转，然后轻柔地拉远镜头以释放紧张感。声音：她安静的叹息/喷鼻息，巨魔和小妖精电影氛围。负面提示词：戏剧性的哭泣，长时间的尖叫，恐怖的基调，暴力，文字覆盖，字幕，标志。

prompts.prompt_en: A multi-shot cinematic kitchen comedy about a family of mythical creatures. Integrated sound. Photorealistic, raw, cavernous tone, expressive micro-acting. No on-screen text. Photorealistic shooting. 180° shutter, 24 fps. Shot 1: Close-up of the little goblin girl at the wooden kitchen table (meets the reference). She is deadly serious, arms crossed, looking at her troll father, who is standing off-screen. She asks in clear, casual English, “Daddy, how do goblins come to be? Tell me.” Camera: Slow, subtle arc around her face (right to left), gently zooming in, shallow depth of field. Sound: Quiet kitchen tones, barely audible table creaks. Shot 2: Medium shot of her father opposite her. He freezes, looking around nervously, trying to deflect the topic. He says, “Uh… do you want some worms?” Camera: Handheld, arcing around him (left to right), ending in a slightly closer shot, as if the camera is “zooming in” on his panic. Sound: Wooden box creaking, his awkward voice. Shot 3: Medium close-up of the girl. She doesn’t blink, leans forward slightly. She says, “Daddy. Don’t change the subject.” Camera: Smooth zoom in with a slight pan to keep her centered in the frame, steady and confident. Sound: Her firm voice, the silence in the kitchen. Shot 4: Medium shot of the father. He reaches for the wooden plate of worms like a life preserver, putting on an amused expression. Camera: Quick pan to the plate of worms as he grabs it with his hand, then a controlled zoom back up to his face. Sound: Wood scraping against wood, worms crawling, flying mice in a cave. Shot 5: Over-the-shoulder shot from the goblin girl to the troll father, worms on a plate in abundance in the foreground. He advertises it a bit too insistently, smiling. He says, “These worms are so delicious. When you’re older, you’ll understand. Eat.” Camera: Slow arc around the worms on the plate in the foreground (heroic move), while the troll father remains in frame, with a subtle change of focus from the father to the plate of worms in the middle. Sound: Light chewing sound. Shot 6: Close-up of the goblin girl. She puffs out her cheeks, unimpressed, then mutters, “Oof… you did it again.” Camera: Tiny counter-rotation for a punchline, then a gentle pull back to release the tension. Sound: Her quiet sigh/snort, trolls and goblins movie vibe. Negative prompt: Dramatic crying, prolonged screams, terrifying tone, violence, text overlays, subtitles, logos.

prompts.title: 穿云破雾的风力涡轮机环绕镜头
prompts.prompt: 2.35:1, 24fps, 15s, 单个连续镜头, 8K, 大画幅照片级真实感, 清晰的体积云, 真实的涡轮机比例, 冷凝涡流, 干净的运动模糊, 无用户界面。高空开场，在厚厚的云海之上进行快速环绕轨道拍摄——风力涡轮机
prompts.prompt_zh: 2.35:1, 24fps, 15s, 单个连续镜头, 8K, 大画幅照片级真实感, 清晰的体积云, 真实的涡轮机比例, 冷凝涡流, 干净的运动模糊, 无用户界面。高空开场，在厚厚的云海之上进行快速环绕轨道拍摄——风力涡轮机
prompts.prompt_en: 2.35:1, 24fps, 15s, single continuous shot, 8K, large-format photoreal, crisp cloud volumetrics, realistic turbine scale, condensation vortices, clean motion blur, no UI. Open high with a rapid circling orbit above a thick cloud sea—wind turbines

prompts.title: 穿梭于晨曦与钢铁的视听诗篇
prompts.prompt:
起幅 - 寂静拂晓（运用组合运镜3：升降揭示）

画面始于一片沾满晨露的蜘蛛网特写，露珠映出模糊的田园倒影。镜头如呼吸般缓缓后拉并升高，逐渐展现其下无垠的、被薄雾紧锁的稻田。远处地平线上，一道银色细痕无声划破青灰色的天际——那是新干线。（升降镜头 + 拉镜头，情绪：宁静、诗意、铺垫）

加速 - 金属巨兽（运用组合运镜4：眩晕追逐 + 组合运镜1部分元素）

突然，镜头仿佛被磁力捕获，以不可能的加速度向前方银色轨迹冲刺。强烈的手持晃动感模拟狂暴气浪，稻田瞬间化为绿色疾流。镜头急速横摇，与骤然逼近的列车车头并驾齐驱。当速度同步的刹那，整个世界的声音被抽离，只有视觉上剧烈的荷兰角倾斜，强调这超越常理的动能。（手持剧烈晃动 + 快速横摇 + 荷兰角，情绪：爆发、震撼、失衡）

穿透 - 结界之变（运用组合运镜9：时空转场）

在即将撞击车头的瞬间，镜头对准驾驶舱侧窗。一种冰冷的、蜂巢状的玻璃纹理充满画面。匹配剪辑点：一只飞鸟撞击玻璃的慢动作虚影，在触及瞬间，镜头已无缝穿透。外部冰冷的高速世界骤然切换为内部温暖、寂静、低噪的客舱。光线从冷冽的蓝过渡为暖黄。（匹配剪辑 + 光影/质感变换，情绪：魔幻、转折、进入异空间）

凝视 - 静止之心（运用组合运镜5：优雅环绕 与 组合运镜2元素）

镜头进入后，一切运动归于绝对的平静。它以斯坦尼康般的漂浮感，沿过道轻柔环绕那位临窗的女子。经过她侧脸时，一个极其缓慢的推近，焦点落在她的眼镜片上——窗外模糊的、流淌的山林与村庄，如抽象画般映在镜片之中。杯口蒸汽以违反物理的速度缓缓上升。（斯坦尼康平稳环绕 + 极慢推近 + 微距特写，情绪：静谧、内省、时间凝结）

抽离 - 外部螺旋（再次运用组合运镜4：眩晕追逐 强化版）

镜头从另一侧窗穿出，瞬间重回速度的暴风眼。它开始以列车为中心进行高速螺旋环绕，车身流线在阳光下划出耀眼的金属弧光。剧烈的环绕运动配合手持震颤，让人目眩神迷，展现机械与速度的纯粹形态美。（高速螺旋环绕 + 手持晃动，情绪：抽离、眩晕、机械美学）

落幕 - 天地之桥（运用组合运镜8：宏大入场 变体）

螺旋至最高点时，镜头猛地向后上方拉远。列车正驶过一座横跨翠绿峡谷的巨型铁桥，身形显得精密而优雅。镜头继续拉高并伴随横摇，展现峡谷全貌与远山。最终定格在广阔的航拍远景：银色列车如细针，悄然隐入大山的阴影隧道。万籁俱寂，唯有最后一缕遥远的汽笛回声，在群山间轻轻荡漾，直至消散。（大范围拉镜头 + 升降 + 横摇，情绪：宏大、疏离、归于永恒）
