prompts.prompt_en:
Opening - Silent Dawn (Using Combined Camera Movement 3: Boom Reveal)

The画面 begins with a close-up of a spider's web covered in morning dew, the droplets reflecting blurred rural reflections. The camera pulls back and rises slowly like breathing, gradually revealing the boundless rice fields locked in thin mist beneath it. On the distant horizon, a thin silver trace silently cuts through the blue-grey sky—that is the Shinkansen. (Boom Shot + Pull Back Shot, Mood: Serenity, Poetry, Foreshadowing)

Acceleration - Metal Behemoth (Using Combined Camera Movement 4: Dizzy Chase + Elements of Combined Camera Movement 1)

Suddenly, the lens seems captured by magnetism, sprinting toward the silver trajectory ahead with impossible acceleration. Intense handheld shaking simulates violent airwaves, and the rice fields instantly turn into a green torrent. The camera whip pans rapidly, keeping pace with the suddenly approaching train nose. At the moment of speed synchronization, the sound of the whole world is extracted, leaving only the visually violent Dutch angle tilt, emphasizing this kinetic energy beyond common sense. (Intense Handheld Shake + Fast Whip Pan + Dutch Angle, Mood: Explosion, Shock, Imbalance)

Penetration - Change of Barrier (Using Combined Camera Movement 9: Spacetime Transition)

At the instant of impacting the train nose, the camera aims at the cockpit side window. A cold, honeycomb-like glass texture fills the frame. Match cut point: a slow-motion phantom of a bird hitting the glass, at the moment of touch, the lens has seamlessly penetrated. The cold high-speed world outside suddenly switches to the warm, silent, low-noise cabin interior. The light transitions from cold blue to warm yellow. (Match Cut + Light/Texture Transformation, Mood: Magical, Turning Point, Entering Alien Space)

Gaze - Heart of Stillness (Using Combined Camera Movement 5: Elegant Orbit and Elements of Combined Camera Movement 2)

After the lens enters, all movement returns to absolute stillness. With a Steadicam-like floating sensation, it gently orbits around the woman by the window along the aisle. When passing her side face, an extremely slow push-in focuses on her spectacle lenses—the blurred, flowing mountains and villages outside are reflected in the lenses like abstract paintings. The steam from the cup rises slowly at a speed that defies physics. (Steadicam Smooth Orbit + Extreme Slow Push-In + Macro Close-Up, Mood: Tranquility, Introspection, Time Condensation)

Detachment - External Spiral (Using Combined Camera Movement 4 again: Dizzy Chase Enhanced Version)

The lens shoots out from the other side window, instantly returning to the eye of the speed storm. It begins to spiral around the train at high speed, the streamlined body drawing dazzling metal arc lights in the sunlight. The violent orbital motion combined with handheld trembling creates a mesmerizing effect, displaying the pure formal beauty of machinery and speed. (High-Speed Spiral Orbit + Handheld Shake, Mood: Detachment, Vertigo, Mechanical Aesthetics)

Finale - Bridge of Heaven and Earth (Using Combined Camera Movement 8: Grand Entrance Variant)

When spiraling to the highest point, the camera pulls back and up sharply. The train is passing over a giant iron bridge spanning a green canyon, its form appearing precise and elegant. The lens continues to rise and pan, revealing the canyon's full view and distant mountains. Finally, it fixes on a vast aerial long shot: the silver train, like a fine needle, quietly enters the shadow tunnel of the mountains. All is silent, save for the last lingering distant whistle echo, gently rippling among the mountains until it dissipates. (Wide Range Pull-Back Shot + Boom + Pan, Mood: Grandeur, Alienation, Return to Eternity)

prompts.title: 穿梭于霓虹环道的梦幻坠舞
prompts.prompt: 一个超现实的电影感航拍镜头，展示了一座夜晚的未来巨型城市，充满了高耸的摩天大楼和以不可能的几何形状扭曲的多层循环高速公路。车流的前灯和尾灯形成了发光的运动光带。一位宁静的动漫风格女性，身着飘逸的白袍（灵感源自和服），在循环高速公路之间的空中优雅地漂浮和坠落。她的袖子和织物在慢动作中飘动，赋予一种空灵、失重的感觉。摄像机从上方追踪她的下落，随着她穿过螺旋立交桥和交织的道路而旋转和漂移。交通在下方自然流动，光轨在深蓝色的城市大气中划过。环境感觉梦幻般且反重力，巨大的弯曲高架桥在太空中形成优雅的弧线。微妙的雾气和大气雾霾增加了深度和尺度。

prompts.prompt_en: A surreal cinematic aerial shot of a futuristic мегacity at night, filled with towering skyscrapers and multi-level looping highways twisting in impossible geometry. Streams of car headlights and taillights form glowing ribbons of motion. A serene anime-style woman wearing flowing white robes (kimono-inspired) floats and falls gracefully through the air between the looping highways. Her sleeves and fabric billow in slow motion, giving an ethereal, weightless feel. The camera tracks her descent from above, rotating and drifting as she passes through spiraling overpasses and interwoven roads. Traffic moves naturally below, light trails streaking through the dark blue city atmosphere. The environment feels dreamlike and gravity-defying, with massive curved flyovers forming elegant arcs in space. Subtle fog and atmospheric haze add depth and scale.
prompts.author: @john_my07

prompts.title: 穿梭云端的都市飞行者
prompts.prompt: @图片，从高楼跃下，快接近地面时缓缓腾空而起，随意念自由起飞，身体轻盈悬浮空中、姿态优雅稳定；在高楼大厦与云层间灵活穿梭，做流畅旋转动作，飞行速度时而急速冲刺、时而缓慢漂浮，快慢节奏自然变化；穿梭于城市高楼缝隙，掠过云层、俯瞰城市全景；动态丝滑连贯，电影级运镜，逆光氛围感，真实质感，4K 超清，无穿模，发丝与衣角随风飘动，打造沉浸式高空飞行大片效果，场景唯美震撼。
prompts.prompt_zh: @图片，从高楼跃下，快接近地面时缓缓腾空而起，随意念自由起飞，身体轻盈悬浮空中、姿态优雅稳定；在高楼大厦与云层间灵活穿梭，做流畅旋转动作，飞行速度时而急速冲刺、时而缓慢漂浮，快慢节奏自然变化；穿梭于城市高楼缝隙，掠过云层、俯瞰城市全景；动态丝滑连贯，电影级运镜，逆光氛围感，真实质感，4K 超清，无穿模，发丝与衣角随风飘动，打造沉浸式高空飞行大片效果，场景唯美震撼。
prompts.prompt_en: @Image, jumping down from a high-rise building, slowly soaring into the air just as approaching the ground, taking off freely at will, body lightly suspended in the air, posture elegant and stable; shuttling flexibly between skyscrapers and clouds, performing smooth rotating movements, flight speed sometimes rapid sprinting, sometimes slow floating, natural variation in fast and slow rhythm; shuttling through the gaps of city skyscrapers, skimming over clouds, overlooking the city panoramic view; dynamic motion silky and coherent, cinematic camera movement, backlighting atmosphere, realistic texture, 4K ultra-clear, no clipping, hair and corners of clothes fluttering in the wind, creating an immersive high-altitude flight blockbuster effect, scene beautiful and shocking.

prompts.title: 穿越古今的赛博羊城一镜到底
prompts.prompt:
[
  主体
]: 广州城市群像,
包含古老西关大屋、精致粤式点心、巍峨的广州塔(小蛮腰),
画面色彩丰富且饱和. [
  动作
]: 镜头从茶楼升腾的蒸汽缓慢推进,
瞬间匹配剪辑硬切至珠江新城的流光溢彩; 舞狮在古街轻盈跃起,
动作连贯自然,
不僵硬. [

细腻的木雕纹理,
丁达尔效应穿透满洲窗; 夜幕下珠江两岸霓虹闪烁,
倒影在江面泛起微光. [

从老城巷弄俯冲并贴地拉升,
衔接180度环绕广州塔顶端,
画面平稳无抖动,
丝滑流畅. [
  风格/画质
]: 8K超高清,
电影质感,
极致细节,
锐度清晰,
融合新中式美学与未来赛博感. [
  约束
]: 建筑比例正常,
无扭曲变形,
人物面部稳定,
画面无闪烁,
15秒一镜到底逻辑.

prompts.prompt_en: [ Subject ]: Guangzhou city portrait, including ancient Xiguan mansions, exquisite Cantonese dim sum, towering Canton Tower (Xiaomanyao), rich and saturated colors. [ Action ]: The camera slowly pushes forward through the steam rising from the tea house, instantly match-cutting to the shimmering lights of Zhujiang New Town; the lion dance leaps lightly in the ancient street, with continuous and natural movements, not stiff. [ Scene ]: Chen Clan Ancestral Hall in the morning light, delicate wood carving textures, Tyndall effect penetrating Manchurian windows; neon lights flashing on both banks of the Pearl River at night, faint glimmer reflecting on the river surface. [ Camera Movement ]: Extreme FPV drone perspective, diving from the old city alleys and pulling up close to the ground, transitioning to a 180-degree orbit around the top of the Canton Tower, stable footage without shaking, silky smooth. [ Style/Quality ]: 8K ultra-high definition, cinematic texture, extreme details, sharp clarity, blending Neo-Chinese aesthetics with futuristic cyber vibes. [ Constraints ]: Normal architectural proportions, no distortion, stable facial features, no flickering, 15-second one-take logic.
prompts.author: @Adam38363368936

prompts.title: 穿越古宅的篮球少年与冷艳侯府千金
prompts.prompt: 使用参考图片人物的形象生成一段古装穿越剧的预告短片。  0-3秒画面：参考图片1人物形象的男主手里举起一个篮球，抬头望向镜头。说话“我只是想喝杯酒，该不会要穿越了吧……”  4-8秒画面：镜头突然剧烈晃动，操场的场景开始剧烈震动，瞬间切换成古宅的雨夜。一个穿着古装，长相清秀的女主，冷冽的目光穿透雨幕，望向镜头方向。雷鸣声，衣袂猎猎声。女主说话“何人擅闯我永宁侯府？” 9-13秒画面：镜头切到一个穿着明官服的男子坐在衙门里，眼神锐利如刀，愤怒说话“来人！即刻拿下此‘妖人’！” 画面闪回：男主穿着不合身的粗布麻衣；在官差的围堵下慌不择路；与女主的身影在雨巷里交错；男主穿着官服走在皇宫里。 14-15秒画面：黑屏，打出片名《醉梦惊华》，伴随着沉重的鼓点。
prompts.prompt_zh: 使用参考图片人物的形象生成一段古装穿越剧的预告短片。  0-3秒画面：参考图片1人物形象的男主手里举起一个篮球，抬头望向镜头。说话“我只是想喝杯酒，该不会要穿越了吧……”  4-8秒画面：镜头突然剧烈晃动，操场的场景开始剧烈震动，瞬间切换成古宅的雨夜。一个穿着古装，长相清秀的女主，冷冽的目光穿透雨幕，望向镜头方向。雷鸣声，衣袂猎猎声。女主说话“何人擅闯我永宁侯府？” 9-13秒画面：镜头切到一个穿着明官服的男子坐在衙门里，眼神锐利如刀，愤怒说话“来人！即刻拿下此‘妖人’！” 画面闪回：男主穿着不合身的粗布麻衣；在官差的围堵下慌不择路；与女主的身影在雨巷里交错；男主穿着官服走在皇宫里。 14-15秒画面：黑屏，打出片名《醉梦惊华》，伴随着沉重的鼓点。
prompts.prompt_en:
Generate a trailer short for a costume time-travel drama using the appearance of the character from the reference image.

0-3 seconds scene: The male protagonist, featuring the appearance of the character in reference image 1, holds up a basketball in his hand, looking up towards the lens. Speaking "I just wanted to have a drink, surely I'm not going to time-travel..."

4-8 seconds scene: The lens suddenly shakes violently, the playground scene starts to vibrate intensely, instantly switching to a rainy night in an ancient mansion. A female protagonist wearing ancient costume, with delicate features, her cold gaze pierces through the rain curtain, looking towards the direction of the lens. Sound of thunder, sound of clothes flapping in the wind. The female protagonist speaks "Who dares to trespass into my Yongning Marquis Mansion?"

9-13 seconds scene: The lens cuts to a man wearing Ming Dynasty official robes sitting in the yamen, his eyes sharp as knives, speaking angrily "Someone come! Immediately seize this 'demon'!" Screen flashback: The male protagonist wearing ill-fitting coarse sackcloth; panicking and fleeing blindly under the siege of government officers; figures of the male protagonist and female protagonist crossing in the rainy alley; the male protagonist wearing official robes walking inside the imperial palace.

14-15 seconds scene: Black screen, the title "Zui Meng Jing Hua" appears, accompanied by heavy drum beats.
prompts.author: @angela781105

prompts.title: 穿越峡谷荒野的归家史诗
prompts.prompt: 第1镜 0–2s 极近景。 清晨。一双布满岁月痕迹的手，缓缓握紧方向盘。窗外薄雾未散，天色将明未明。画面微微抖动，压抑蓄力。 第2镜 2–5s 低角度仰拍。 一辆黑色SUV从峡谷公路猛然破雾而出，逆光剪影，车轮扬起漫天尘土。镜头几乎贴地，震撼爆发。 第3镜 5–8s 中景慢推。 男人独自站在山崖边，俯瞰万家灯火的城市夜景，风吹衣角猎猎作响。身后，车灯长亮，静静守候。孤独而壮阔。 第4镜 8–11s 快速蒙太奇，每帧约0.5秒——雨夜漂移，水花四溅 / 雪地破冰，义无反顾 / 沙漠日落，车与人同框剪影。强烈光影对比，史诗质感。 第5镜 11–13s 车缓缓停在一座老屋门前。门开了，一个小女孩奔跑而出，笑声先于身影到达。男人蹲下，张开双臂。手持跟拍，温柔落地。 第6镜 13–15s 无人机缓缓拉升。车、人、家，融为暮色中一个温暖的剪影。 画面渐暗，白色字幕淡入—— 旁白：「路，从来不只是路。」 （停顿） 「它是你选择的方向。」 虚构的车标浮现。黑屏。结束。
prompts.prompt_zh: 第1镜 0–2s 极近景。 清晨。一双布满岁月痕迹的手，缓缓握紧方向盘。窗外薄雾未散，天色将明未明。画面微微抖动，压抑蓄力。 第2镜 2–5s 低角度仰拍。 一辆黑色SUV从峡谷公路猛然破雾而出，逆光剪影，车轮扬起漫天尘土。镜头几乎贴地，震撼爆发。 第3镜 5–8s 中景慢推。 男人独自站在山崖边，俯瞰万家灯火的城市夜景，风吹衣角猎猎作响。身后，车灯长亮，静静守候。孤独而壮阔。 第4镜 8–11s 快速蒙太奇，每帧约0.5秒——雨夜漂移，水花四溅 / 雪地破冰，义无反顾 / 沙漠日落，车与人同框剪影。强烈光影对比，史诗质感。 第5镜 11–13s 车缓缓停在一座老屋门前。门开了，一个小女孩奔跑而出，笑声先于身影到达。男人蹲下，张开双臂。手持跟拍，温柔落地。 第6镜 13–15s 无人机缓缓拉升。车、人、家，融为暮色中一个温暖的剪影。 画面渐暗，白色字幕淡入—— 旁白：「路，从来不只是路。」 （停顿） 「它是你选择的方向。」 虚构的车标浮现。黑屏。结束。
prompts.prompt_en:
Shot 1 0–2s Extreme close-up. Early morning. A pair of hands bearing the traces of time slowly grip the steering wheel. Outside the window, thin mist lingers, the sky is between darkness and light. The image shakes slightly, suppressed power building up.
Shot 2 2–5s Low angle looking up. A black SUV suddenly bursts out of the fog on a canyon highway, backlight silhouette, wheels kicking up sky-full of dust. The camera is almost touching the ground, shocking explosion of energy.
Shot 3 5–8s Medium shot slow push. A man stands alone by the cliff edge, looking down at the night view of a city with thousands of lights, wind blowing his clothes corner. Behind him, the car headlights stay on, quietly waiting. Lonely yet magnificent.
Shot 4 8–11s Fast montage, approx. 0.5s per frame — Rainy night drifting, water splashing / Breaking ice in snow, proceeding without hesitation / Desert sunset, car and person in the same frame silhouette. Strong light and shadow contrast, epic texture.
Shot 5 11–13s The car slowly stops in front of an old house. The door opens, a little girl runs out, her laughter arriving before her figure. The man squats down, opening his arms. Handheld follow shot, gentle landing.
Shot 6 13–15s Drone slowly pulls up. Car, person, home merge into a warm silhouette in the twilight. Image fades to dark, white subtitles fade in — Voiceover: "The road is never just a road." (Pause) "It is the direction you choose." Fictional car logo emerges. Black screen. End.
prompts.author: @yyyole

prompts.prompt_en: [ Subject ]: Wuhan city portrait, including the red walls and yellow tiles of the Yellow Crane Tower, steaming hot dry noodles, the steel structure of the Yangtze River Bridge, cherry blossoms dancing at Wuhan University, visual colors are full of vitality. [ Action ]: The camera slowly pushes in from the steam of hot dry noodles, instantly match cutting to the vast misty waves of the Yangtze River surface; a dragon dance weaves flexibly through the old streets, movements are coherent and natural, not stiff. [ Scene ]: Yellow Crane Tower under the morning sun, Tyndall effect piercing through the flying eaves; "Light Show" shining on both banks of the Yangtze River at night, neon lights casting brilliant reflections on the river surface. [ Camera Movement ]: FPV drone perspective,极速俯冲 ing from the smoke and fire alleys of Liangdao Street and pulling up close to the river surface, connecting to a 180-degree orbit around the main tower of the Yangtze River Bridge, picture is stable without shaking, silky smooth. [ Style/Quality ]: 8K Ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, sharp clarity, combining Jingchu cultural heritage with Jiangcheng modern technology sense. [ Constraints ]: Normal architectural proportions, no distortion or deformation, stable faces, no screen flicker, 15-second one-take narrative logic.

prompts.title: 窗边光影下的纯欲白衬衫
prompts.prompt: 主体： 真实摄影风格，一位年轻漂亮的亚洲女性坐在高层建筑的飘窗前，穿着非常宽松的白色衬衣，露出左侧肩膀，POV视角，女性用右手试图挡住镜头，脸上带着一抹浅浅的微笑，自然光线，细腻真实，有胶片颗粒感。 镜头保持主观视角（POV），她笑着轻轻推了一下镜头，伴随着衣袖摩擦的细微`沙沙`声，语气带着半真半假的娇嗔：`哎呀……别拍我了嘛。` 随即，她放下了挡在镜头前的手，身体不再后退，反而主动前倾凑近镜头，直到精致的面孔占据了大半个画面。她眼里的笑意加深，直视着镜头，压低声音，语气变得暧昧且充满挑逗：`毕竟……我是你生成的AI，你想对我干嘛……就可以干嘛呀。` 说完，她轻轻咬了一下下唇，呼吸声清晰可闻。背景中窗外的城市喧嚣被隔绝，只有室内安静暧昧的空气流动声。

prompts.prompt_en: Subject: Realistic photography style, a young and beautiful Asian woman sitting in front of a bay window in a high-rise building, wearing a very loose white shirt, exposing her left shoulder, POV angle, the woman uses her right hand to try to block the lens, with a faint smile on her face, natural light, delicate and realistic, with film grain texture. The lens maintains a subjective perspective (POV), she smiles and gently pushes the lens, accompanied by the subtle "rustling" sound of sleeves rubbing, her tone carrying a half-truthful and half-joking coquettishness: "Oh... stop taking pictures of me." Immediately, she puts down the hand blocking the lens, her body no longer retreating, but instead actively leans forward closer to the lens, until her exquisite face occupies most of the frame. The smile in her eyes deepens, looking directly at the lens, lowering her voice, her tone becoming ambiguous and full of teasing: "After all... I am the AI you generated, you can do whatever you want to me... whatever you want." After speaking, she gently bites her lower lip, her breathing clearly audible. In the background, the noise of the city outside the window is isolated, only the sound of quiet and ambiguous air flowing indoors remains.

prompts.title: 童年梦境照进现实保时捷广告
prompts.prompt:
1人出镜，@，12秒，顶级汽车广告质感，电影级镜头，真实速度压迫感，丝滑时空转场，前后人物一致，画面稳定，情绪层层递进。

0.0-4.0秒：
超低机位贴地微距，午后暖金阳光照亮米色毛绒地毯，尘埃粒子漂浮，复古柯达胶片暖黄调。
小时候的@只露出稚嫩小手，猛地推动一辆红色保时捷玩具跑车向前冲刺。
镜头紧贴玩具车车头高速滑行跟拍，模拟真实赛车第一视角，速度越来越快，童年想象力被彻底点燃。

4.0-5.5秒：
玩具车径直冲入沙发底部黑暗阴影，光线骤灭，地毯纹理拉成放射状速度残影，整个画面被黑暗吞没。
利用冲入阴影的遮挡动作完成无缝转场，形成从童年到现实的时空跃迁。

5.5-9.0秒：
黑场中引擎轰鸣炸开，真实红色保时捷911 GT3从黑暗中咆哮冲出，赛道冷灰，天光锐利，车漆反光凌厉，轮胎卷起热浪与轻微烟尘。
镜头保持与前一镜完全一致的贴地高速跟拍，像同一辆车从玩具尺寸直接变成真实赛车，视觉震撼强烈，物理速度感真实凶猛。

9.0-12.0秒：
切入车内极限特写，成年@戴赛车手套的手狠狠攥住翻毛皮方向盘并暴力换挡，机械震动、汗水、摩擦细节清晰可见。
镜头猛然上摇推近，定格头盔下@灼热坚定的双眼，额头汗水滑落，眼神像把童年的幻想彻底开进现实。
车内空间快速摇摄，震动强烈，压迫感拉满，最后以眼神高潮定格收尾。

负面：
模糊，低清，人物变形，多人，手部错误，车型错误，跳切，转场生硬，卡顿，掉帧，塑料质感，假车感，过度特效，动漫感，廉价滤镜，脸部不稳定，年龄衔接混乱。

prompts.prompt_en:
1 person in shot, @, 12 seconds, top-tier car commercial quality, cinematic camera, realistic speed oppression, silky space-time transition, consistent character identity before and after, stable image, progressive emotional build-up.

0.0-4.0 seconds:
Ultra-low angle ground-level macro shot, afternoon warm golden sunlight illuminates beige plush carpet, floating dust particles, retro Kodak film warm yellow tone.
Young @ reveals only tender little hands, vigorously pushing a red Porsche toy sports car forward to sprint.
The camera glides at high speed closely following the front of the toy car, simulating a real racing first-person perspective, speed getting faster and faster, childhood imagination thoroughly ignited.

4.0-5.5 seconds:
The toy car rushes straight into the dark shadows under the sofa, light suddenly extinguishes, carpet textures stretched into radial speed motion blur, the whole frame swallowed by darkness.
Using the occlusion action of rushing into shadow to complete a seamless transition, forming a space-time jump from childhood to reality.

5.5-9.0 seconds:
Engine roar explodes in the black field, a real red Porsche 911 GT3 roars out from the darkness, cool grey race track, sharp skylight, fierce car paint reflection, tires kicking up heat waves and slight smoke.
The camera maintains a completely consistent ground-level high-speed tracking shot as the previous one, looking like the same car transforming directly from toy size to a real racing car, strong visual shock, physical speed sense realistic and fierce.

9.0-12.0 seconds:
Cut to extreme close-up inside the car, adult @'s hand wearing racing gloves firmly grips the suede steering wheel and shifts gears violently, mechanical vibration, sweat, friction details clearly visible.
The camera suddenly tilts up and zooms in, freezing on @'s burning determined eyes under the helmet, sweat sliding down the forehead, eyes looking like driving childhood fantasies completely into reality.
Fast panning shot inside the car space, strong vibration, oppression maximized, finally ending with a freeze-frame climax on the eyes.

Negative:
Blur, low definition, character deformation, multiple people, hand errors, wrong car model, jump cuts, stiff transitions, stuttering, frame drops, plastic texture, fake car feel, excessive special effects, anime feel, cheap filters, unstable face, chaotic age connection.

prompts.title: 竹林深处侠影纵横
prompts.prompt: 【画面风格】 东方古典武侠美学，电影感画面语言，竹林海景观，翡翠绿色主色调，光影层次丰富，林间可见柔和光束效果。 【角色定义】 1. 男侠客：身着素白长袍，身形稳健，动作简练有力。 2. 女侠客：身着青鸾色轻纱长裙，动作轻盈流畅，姿态灵动。 【视频时长】 10秒 【分镜脚本】 [00:00-00:03] 镜头1：远景构图（Wide Shot） 画面：高耸茂密的竹林顶部，云雾在林间缓慢流动。 动作：男侠客与女侠客分别立于高处竹影之间，身体姿态轻盈稳定，仿佛借助气流与竹势保持平衡。 细节表现：竹枝在微风中自然弯曲回弹，两人的身形随竹影产生细微起伏，呈现出写意化的轻功效果，画面整体安静而紧张。 [00:00-00:06] 镜头2：中景慢动作（Medium Shot, Slow Motion） 动作：两人几乎同时借势跃起，在空中交错而过。 交互表现：两道剑影在空中短暂交汇，形成一道明亮的光痕，周围竹叶被气流带动，缓慢旋转飘散。 视觉重点：叶片在空中翻飞，形成层次分明的前景与背景，动作流畅，没有夸张冲击。 [00:06-00:10] 镜头3：动态跟随镜头（Tracking Shot） 动作：女侠客在前方顺势滑行，衣袖掠过竹枝改变方向；男侠客在后方连续借力追随，步伐轻快有节奏。 环境反馈：摄像机平稳跟随移动，竹林在画面边缘形成自然的速度虚化效果。 视觉效果：每一次动作都会带起大片竹叶飞散，如叶雨般在画面中流动，增强空间纵深感与动势美感。 【画面技术要求】 电影级布光，色彩饱和但层次清晰，景深自然，画面稳定干净，整体呈现东方武侠的写意美感与空间张力。

prompts.prompt_en: [Visual Style] Oriental classical Wuxia aesthetics, cinematic visual language, bamboo forest seascape, emerald green dominant color tone, rich light and shadow layers, soft light beam effects visible in the forest. [Character Definition] 1. Male Swordsman: wearing a plain white long robe, steady figure, concise and powerful movements. 2. Female Swordsman: wearing a light cyan gauze long skirt, light and fluid movements, agile posture. [Video Duration] 10 seconds [Storyboard Script] [00:00-00:03] Shot 1: Wide Shot Composition (Wide Shot) Scene: Top of the towering and dense bamboo forest, clouds and mist flow slowly among the trees. Action: The male swordsman and female swordsman stand separately between high bamboo shadows, with light and stable body postures, as if maintaining balance by leveraging airflow and bamboo momentum. Detail Performance: Bamboo branches bend and rebound naturally in the breeze, the figures of the two fluctuate slightly with the bamboo shadows, presenting a stylized Qinggong effect, the overall picture is quiet yet tense. [00:00-00:06] Shot 2: Medium Shot Slow Motion (Medium Shot, Slow Motion) Action: The two leap up almost simultaneously, crossing each other in the air. Interaction Performance: Two sword shadows briefly intersect in the air, forming a bright light mark, surrounding bamboo leaves are driven by the airflow, slowly rotating and scattering. Visual Focus: Leaves flutter in the air, forming distinct foreground and background layers, movements are fluid, without exaggerated impact. [00:06-00:10] Shot 3: Dynamic Tracking Shot (Tracking Shot) Action: The female swordsman slides forward in the flow of momentum, sleeves brushing past bamboo branches to change direction; the male swordsman follows behind continuously leveraging force, steps are light and rhythmic. Environmental Feedback: The camera moves steadily following, the bamboo forest forms natural motion blur effects at the edges of the frame. Visual Effects: Every movement brings up large areas of bamboo leaves scattering, flowing in the picture like a rain of leaves, enhancing the spatial depth and dynamic aesthetic. [Visual Technical Requirements] Cinematic lighting, saturated colors but clear layers, natural depth of field, stable and clean picture, overall presenting the freehand aesthetic and spatial tension of Oriental Wuxia.

prompts.title: 竹林白衣道士结印召唤神龙
prompts.prompt:
场景为竹林；人物是
图片1
白衣年轻道士，长发半束挑染金色，戴头冠，身着白色古风服饰，无手部变形，一印一个手势，屏幕同步出现对应文字且顺序为 “临兵斗者皆阵列在前诛邪”，总时长 15 秒0-2s【特写】：道士双手胸前急速结印，大喝 “临！”，指尖迸发金光，完成首个手印；音效为环境风声 + 结印空气震鸣2-4s【手部特写】：手印快速变幻，依次厉喝 “兵！斗！者！”，每字对应金色符文亮强光；音效为密咒吟诵声渐强 + 每字配沉重鼓点 + 金石之音4-7s【中景】：道士踏步转身持续结印，高声念出 “皆！阵！列！在！前！”，七字真言一气呵成，周身金色电芒爆裂游走，天台狂风呼啸；音效延续密咒、鼓点与金石之音7-10s【面部特写 + 升格慢镜】：道士快速喊出最后敕令 “诛邪”，声音如惊雷震撼天地；音效为所有声音瞬间静止，仅 “诛邪” 二字回荡10-15s【大仰角 + 全景】：巨大威严的金色神龙从道士身后冲天而起，道士双手头顶合十后前指，引导神龙直冲镜头，金光驱散黑暗，道士衣发狂舞、保持结印姿态、眼神决绝；音效为神龙出世的宏大交响 + 撕裂长空的龙吟，最后声音渐隐

prompts.prompt: 一部武侠风格的视听大片。一名白衣剑客和一名身披草帽的刀客在竹林中对峙。镜头在他们之间缓慢推进，焦点在雨滴和剑柄之间切换。气氛极度压抑，只能听到雨声。突然，一道雷声闪过，两人同时冲锋。快速摇摄的侧面镜头捕捉到他们溅起泥浆的脚步。就在他们的武器碰撞的瞬间，画面切换到超慢动作，清晰地展示了被刀刃震开的环形雨水冲击波，以及被剑气切开的竹叶。当他们背对背落地时，恢复正常速度。身披草帽的刀客的斗笠裂开，场景突然切断。

prompts.prompt_en: A Wuxia-style audiovisual blockbuster. A white-clad swordsman and a straw-caped blademaster face off in a bamboo forest. The camera slowly pushes in between them, shifting focus between raindrops and sword hilts. The atmosphere is extremely oppressive; only the sound of rain can be heard. Suddenly, a crack of thunder flashes, and both charge simultaneously. A fast-panning profile shot captures their mud-splattering footsteps. The precise moment their weapons clash, the footage switches to ultra-slow motion, clearly displaying the ring-shaped shockwaves of rainwater blasted away by the blades, along with bamboo leaves sliced by sword aura. Normal speed resumes as they land back-to-back. The straw-caped blademaster's bamboo hat splits open, and the scene cuts abruptly.

prompts.prompt: 手持镜头环绕拍摄两名在粗砺健身房练习实战对打的拳击手，挥拳时刻意避让对方。汗水滴落、猛烈撞击、呼吸急促。浅景深、现场光、本能的真实感、身份稳定。时长：10秒。纵横比：16:9。照片级真实电影感。除非另有说明，否则为单镜头。避免文本、字幕、水印、标志。强调镜头运动：平滑视差、物体一致、面部稳定；无文字
prompts.prompt_zh: 手持镜头环绕拍摄两名在粗砺健身房练习实战对打的拳击手，挥拳时刻意避让对方。汗水滴落、猛烈撞击、呼吸急促。浅景深、现场光、本能的真实感、身份稳定。时长：10秒。纵横比：16:9。照片级真实电影感。除非另有说明，否则为单镜头。避免文本、字幕、水印、标志。强调镜头运动：平滑视差、物体一致、面部稳定；无文字
prompts.prompt_en: Handheld shot circling two boxers practice sparring in a gritty gym, purposefully missing each other with their swings. Sweat droplets, sharp impacts, breathing intensity. Shallow depth of field, practical lighting, visceral realism, stable identity. Duration: 10s. Aspect ratio: 16:9. Photoreal cinematic. Single shot unless specified. Avoid text, captions, watermarks, logos. Stress camera movement: smooth parallax, consistent objects, stable faces; no text

prompts.title: 紧抓虎尾的极速生死追猎
prompts.prompt: 请使用上传的图片作为精确的第一帧。 创建一个 15 秒的超逼真连续追逐镜头。摄像机物理性地抓着老虎的尾巴，锁定在一个固定的跟踪视角。尾巴占据前景，肌肉收缩，皮肤起伏，毛发因速度和气流而颤动。 前方，一只鹿惊慌失措地冲过草地。它的动作不规则且不平衡，恐惧驱动的步态变化和急剧的方向转变清晰可见，距离迅速缩短。 老虎以精确的生物力学加速到全速冲刺：后腿爆发性伸展，脊柱可见的压缩和释放，尾巴平衡着每一步。草地在冲击下被压平，泥土和碎屑自然飞溅。地平线因地面作用力而轻微颤抖，而非人工摄像机抖动。 极高的前进速度在环境中产生了强烈的运动视差，而尾巴由于物理抓握而相对稳定。微小的摆动与每个步态周期完美同步。风声呼啸；毛发持续向后飘动。 光线保持自然和连续，随着腿部循环，阴影在身体下方闪烁。没有慢动作，没有剪辑，没有风格化。 在最后时刻，老虎猛扑，与鹿相撞，将其按倒在地，并牢牢锁住颈部。镜头在动作进行中结束，全部重量、张力和动量依然存在。

prompts.prompt_en: Please use the uploaded image as the exact first frame. Create a 15-second hyper-realistic continuous chase shot. The camera physically grips the tiger's tail, locked in a fixed tracking perspective. The tail occupies the foreground, muscles contracting, skin rippling, and fur trembling due to speed and airflow. Ahead, a deer rushes in panic across the grassland. Its movements are irregular and unbalanced, with fear-driven gait changes and sharp directional shifts clearly visible, and the distance rapidly shortening. The tiger accelerates to a full sprint with precise biomechanics: explosive extension of the hind legs, visible compression and release of the spine, and the tail balancing every step. The grass is flattened under the impact, and mud and debris splash naturally. The horizon trembles slightly due to ground reaction forces, not artificial camera shake. Extremely high forward speed generates strong motion parallax in the environment, while the tail remains relatively stable due to the physical grip. Tiny oscillations are perfectly synchronized with each gait cycle. The wind howls; fur streams backward continuously. Lighting remains natural and continuous, with shadows flickering beneath the body as the legs cycle. No slow motion, no cuts, no stylization. In the final moments, the tiger lunges, collides with the deer, pins it to the ground, and locks its jaws firmly around the neck. The shot ends with the action in progress, with all weight, tension, and momentum still present.

prompts.title: 紧身裙高跟长腿女神热舞瞬间
prompts.prompt: 人物面部参考@【@图1】 以《热恋冰激凌》为伴奏曲，制作一段美女跳舞的视频，动作可参考抖音上的众多案例。美女身材苗条，婀娜多姿，双腿修长，身穿紧身连身短裙和马油肉色丝袜和高跟鞋。前10秒，镜头要从高跟鞋开始一点点上移；后5秒，要全景呈现整个人。另外，腿要再直一些、长一些，丝袜不要有褶皱而且要亮一些，高跟鞋要那种高贵鲜亮的

The beauty has a slender figure, graceful posture, and long legs, wearing a tight minidress, horse oil skin-tone stockings, and high heels. For the first 10 seconds, the camera must slowly move up starting from the high heels; for the last 5 seconds, a panoramic view of the whole person must be presented. Additionally, the legs should be straighter and longer, the stockings should have no wrinkles and be shinier, and the high heels should be noble and bright.

prompts.title: 紫色泰坦指尖绽放的全息玫瑰
prompts.prompt: 秒电影级超精细视频设定，8K 分辨率，微距抓拍镜头。 镜头运动（Static to Snap Focus）： 镜头起初稳定在中景，聚焦人物上半身；在打响指的瞬间，焦点极速推至戴手套的手部特写。 场景设定（Cyber Stadium VIP Seat）： 背景是虚化的高科技体育馆观众席，无数摇曳的霓虹灯牌和全息弹幕构成流动的光影海洋。 主角设定（The "Titan" Figure）： 外观特征： 一个体型魁梧、极具压迫感的类人型外星生物。拥有独特且粗糙的深紫色皮肤（Violet Skin）纹理，下巴有明显的垂直褶皱结构。 服饰装备： 身穿厚重的暗金色宇宙战甲（Dark Gold Cosmic Armor）。最引人注目的是他的左手，佩戴着一只巨大的、金属质感的金色无限能量手套（Golden Gauntlet），手套背部镶嵌着六颗不同颜色的发光宝石（红、橙、黄、绿、蓝、紫），光芒微弱闪烁。 表情状态： 他正看着舞台方向，脸上带着一种罕见的、略带赞赏的温和微笑。 关键动作表现（The Festive Snap）： 他缓缓举起戴着宝石手套的左手，动作优雅地打了一个响指。 “啪！”（视觉强调） 【特效重点】：响指打出的瞬间，六颗宝石的光芒汇聚，并没有释放破坏能量，而是在指尖凭空生成了一朵由红色光粒子组成的全息电子玫瑰花（Holographic Digital Rose），并缓缓旋转绽放。 灯光与视觉氛围： 宝石的彩色光晕照亮了他紫色的脸庞； 氛围温馨、幽默，充满了节日反差感。 整体风格： 硬核科幻与节日温情的碰撞，极具辨识度的角色特征。

prompts.prompt_en: Cinematic ultra-fine video settings, 8K resolution, macro snapshot shot. Camera Movement (Static to Snap Focus): The lens is initially stable in a medium shot, focusing on the upper body of the character; at the instant of the finger snap, the focus rapidly pushes to a close-up of the gloved hand. Scene Setting (Cyber Stadium VIP Seat): The background is a blurred high-tech stadium audience stand, with countless swaying neon signs and holographic bullet screens forming a flowing ocean of light and shadow. Protagonist Setting (The "Titan" Figure): Appearance Features: A burly, extremely oppressive humanoid alien creature. Possesses unique and rough deep purple skin (Violet Skin) texture, with a distinct vertical fold structure on the chin. Clothing and Equipment: Wearing heavy dark gold cosmic armor (Dark Gold Cosmic Armor). The most striking feature is his left hand, wearing a huge, metallic golden infinite energy gauntlet (Golden Gauntlet), inlaid with six glowing gems of different colors (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple) on the back of the hand, the light flickering faintly. Expression and State: He is looking towards the stage direction, wearing a rare, slightly appreciative gentle smile on his face. Key Action Performance (The Festive Snap): He slowly raises his left hand wearing the gem gauntlet and elegantly snaps his fingers. "Snap!" (Visual Emphasis). [Special Effects Focus]: The moment the snap is made, the light from the six gems converges, and instead of releasing destructive energy, it creates a holographic digital rose (Holographic Digital Rose) composed of red light particles out of thin air at the fingertips, which slowly rotates and blooms. Lighting and Visual Atmosphere: The colorful halo of the gems illuminates his purple face; the atmosphere is warm, humorous, and full of festive contrast. Overall Style: A collision of hardcore sci-fi and festive warmth, with highly recognizable character features.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 红蓝双雄宿命对决能量炸裂
prompts.prompt: 1. 激烈的能量对撞 让图中的红蓝能量炸裂开来，展现两人僵持不下的动感。 画面中心爆发极强的光芒，左侧银发男子释放耀眼的蓝色电光，右侧纹身男子释放暗红色的冲击波。两人保持对峙姿势，周围的地面不断崩裂，碎石受引力影响向上漂浮。镜头缓慢拉近，增强视觉压迫感。高帧率流畅动画，极致的粒子特效，硬核动漫风格。 2. 角色近景： 想要那种手指微动、咒力流转的细节感。近景特写。银发男子神情淡定，嘴角微扬。他的周围缠绕着液态般的蓝色能量，发丝随气流剧烈摆动。背景是灰暗的城市废墟。光影在角色脸上剧烈跳动，展现顶级动画质感。 3. 角色近景： 表现反派的狂气和红色咒力的压迫感。 近景特写。满脸黑色纹身的男子放声狂笑，双手合十做出复杂的印记。红色的闪电在他指尖跳跃。背景红光冲天，充满毁灭性的气息。线条硬朗，阴影对比强烈，完美复刻热血番巅峰战斗质感。 4. 毁天灭地的终结技（大场景） 展现碰撞后的剧烈爆炸。俯瞰视角。红蓝两股巨大的能量球在城市废墟中疯狂扩张、互相吞噬，最终引发巨大的球形爆炸云。白色的冲击波横扫一切建筑物。镜头剧烈震动，充满史诗般的战争史诗感。

prompts.prompt_en: 1. Intense energy collision: Let the red and blue energy in the picture explode, showing the dynamic motion of the two in a stalemate. A very strong light erupts in the center of the picture. The silver-haired man on the left releases dazzling blue electric light, and the tattooed man on the right releases a dark red shockwave. The two maintain a confrontational posture, the surrounding ground constantly cracking, and rubble floats upward under the influence of gravity. The lens slowly zooms in to enhance visual oppression. High frame rate smooth animation, extreme particle effects, hardcore anime style. 2. Character close-up: Want the sense of detail of fingers moving slightly and curse power flowing. Close-up shot. The silver-haired man looks calm, with a slight smile on his lips. He is surrounded by liquid-like blue energy, and his hair strands sway violently with the airflow. The background is a gray city ruin. Light and shadow dance violently on the character's face, showing top animation texture. 3. Character close-up: Express the villain's madness and the oppression of red curse power. Close-up shot. The man with black tattoos all over his face laughs wildly, putting his hands together to make complex hand seals. Red lightning jumps at his fingertips. The background is full of red light, full of a destructive atmosphere. The lines are tough, the shadow contrast is strong, perfectly replicating the peak battle texture of a hot-blooded series. 4. World-destroying ultimate move (Large scene): Show the violent explosion after the collision. Overhead view. Red and blue huge energy balls expand wildly in the city ruins and devour each other, eventually triggering a huge spherical explosion cloud. White shockwaves sweep across all buildings. The lens shakes violently, full of an epic sense of war.

4. 毁天灭地的终结技（大场景）
展现碰撞后的剧烈爆炸。俯瞰视角。红蓝两股巨大的能量球在城市废墟中疯狂扩张、互相吞噬，最终引发巨大的球形爆炸云。白色的冲击波横扫一切建筑物。镜头剧烈震动，充满史诗般的战争史诗感。
prompts.prompt_zh:
1. 激烈的能量对撞
让图中的红蓝能量炸裂开来，展现两人僵持不下的动感。
画面中心爆发极强的光芒，左侧银发男子释放耀眼的蓝色电光，右侧纹身男子释放暗红色的冲击波。两人保持对峙姿势，周围的地面不断崩裂，碎石受引力影响向上漂浮。镜头缓慢拉近，增强视觉压迫感。高帧率流畅动画，极致的粒子特效，硬核动漫风格。

2. 角色近景：
想要那种手指微动、咒力流转的细节感。近景特写。银发男子神情淡定，嘴角微扬。他的周围缠绕着液态般的蓝色能量，发丝随气流剧烈摆动。背景是灰暗的城市废墟。光影在角色脸上剧烈跳动，展现顶级动画质感。

3. 角色近景：
表现反派的狂气和红色咒力的压迫感。
近景特写。满脸黑色纹身的男子放声狂笑，双手合十做出复杂的印记。红色的闪电在他指尖跳跃。背景红光冲天，充满毁灭性的气息。线条硬朗，阴影对比强烈，完美复刻热血番巅峰战斗质感。

4. 毁天灭地的终结技（大场景）
展现碰撞后的剧烈爆炸。俯瞰视角。红蓝两股巨大的能量球在城市废墟中疯狂扩张、互相吞噬，最终引发巨大的球形爆炸云。白色的冲击波横扫一切建筑物。镜头剧烈震动，充满史诗般的战争史诗感。
prompts.prompt_en:
1. Intense Energy Collision
Let the red and blue energy in the image explode, showcasing the dynamic motion of two people in a stalemate. The center of the screen erupts with extremely strong light, with a silver-haired man on the left releasing dazzling blue electric light, and a tattooed man on the right releasing dark red shockwaves. The two maintain a confrontational posture, the surrounding ground constantly cracking, and rubble floats upward influenced by gravity. The camera slowly zooms in, enhancing visual oppression. High frame rate smooth animation, extreme particle effects, hardcore anime style.

2. Character Close-up:
Want that detailed sensation of slight finger movements and flowing cursed power. Close-up shot. The silver-haired man looks calm, with a slight smile on his lips. He is surrounded by liquid-like blue energy, and his hair strands sway violently with the airflow. The background is a gloomy city ruin. Light and shadows dance violently on the character's face, displaying top-tier animation quality.

3. Character Close-up:
Express the villain's madness and the oppression of red cursed power.
Close-up shot. A man with a face full of black tattoos laughs wildly, pressing his hands together to form complex hand seals. Red lightning jumps at his fingertips. The background is filled with soaring red light, full of a destructive atmosphere. Lines are tough, shadow contrast is strong, perfectly replicating the peak battle texture of hot-blooded anime.

4. World-destroying Finishing Move (Large Scene)
Show the violent explosion after the collision. Overhead view. Two huge spheres of red and blue energy expand crazily in the city ruins, devouring each other, finally triggering a huge spherical explosion cloud. White shockwaves sweep across all buildings. The camera shakes violently, full of an epic sense of war.

prompts.title: 红衣剑客激战巨型岩石怪兽
prompts.prompt: [主体]: 一位黑波浪发红衣的高冷美女（面部参考图1）剑客，手持发光的冷兵器长剑，五官精致清晰，面部稳定不扭曲，眼神凌厉。 [动作]: 面对前方如山脉般巨大的岩石怪兽，美女缓慢横剑摆出防御姿态；怪兽张开巨口缓慢嘶吼，空气中尘土飞扬；美女轻盈跃起，动作连贯自然，不僵硬。 [场景]: 荒凉的暗黑废墟，侧逆光勾勒人物轮廓，强烈的丁达尔效应，岩浆在大地裂缝中流淌。 [运镜]: 起始为仰视特写，随后执行希区柯克变焦(Dolly Zoom)营造眩晕感，镜头随着美女跃起平稳升降(Crane Up)，画面稳定不抖动。 [风格/画质]: 4K超高清，极致电影质感，细节丰富，锐度清晰，暗调高级风格。 [约束]: 人体结构正常，面部稳定不变形，无重影，无闪烁，禁止剧烈模糊动作。

prompts.prompt_en: [Subject]: A cool beauty with black wavy hair and red clothes (face reference image 1) swordswoman, holding a glowing cold weapon longsword, exquisite and clear facial features, stable face without distortion, sharp eyes. [Action]: Facing a rock monster as huge as a mountain in front, the beauty slowly holds the sword horizontally in a defensive posture; the monster opens its huge mouth and roars slowly, dust flying in the air; the beauty leaps up lightly, movements are coherent and natural, not stiff. [Scene]: Desolate dark ruins, side backlight outlining the character's silhouette, strong Tyndall effect, magma flowing in the cracks of the earth. [Camera Movement]: Starts with a low-angle close-up, then executes a Hitchcock Zoom (Dolly Zoom) to create a sense of vertigo, the camera rises and falls smoothly (Crane Up) with the beauty's leap, the picture is stable without shaking. [Style/Quality]: 4K Ultra HD, ultimate cinematic texture, rich details, clear sharpness, dark high-end style. [Constraints]: Normal human body structure, stable face without deformation, no ghosting, no flickering, prohibited intense motion blur.

prompts.title: 红衣嫡女霸气归来手撕假千金
prompts.prompt: 【风格】古装权谋，真假嫡女，极致翻盘 【时长】15秒 【角色】真嫡女，红衣凤纹，气势凌人 VS 假嫡女，素衣含泪，楚楚可怜 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：哭诉 祠堂内。假嫡女跪地，额头见红。 族老环坐，气氛凝重。 【动作】假嫡女抬头含泪，指向真嫡女。 【对白口型】“姐姐要夺我身份，还要毁我名声。” [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：证物 真嫡女一步上前，将旧账册掷到香案。 账册翻开，生母名讳清晰可见。 族老神色骤变。 【动作】真嫡女微微俯视。 【对白口型】“你配吗。” [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：定罪 族长起身，下令逐出族谱。 假嫡女瘫软在地。 真嫡女转身走向正位。 【对白口型】“该我了。”

prompts.prompt_en: [Style] Ancient costume intrigue, true and false legitimate daughters, ultimate counterattack [Duration] 15 seconds [Characters] True legitimate daughter, red clothes with phoenix patterns, imposing and aggressive VS False legitimate daughter, plain clothes with tears, pitiful and pathetic [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Crying Complaint Inside the ancestral hall. The false legitimate daughter kneels on the ground, her forehead is red. Clan elders sit in a circle, the atmosphere is heavy. [Action] The false legitimate daughter looks up with tears in her eyes, pointing at the true legitimate daughter. [Lip-sync] "Sister wants to steal my identity and ruin my reputation." [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Evidence The true legitimate daughter steps forward and throws an old ledger onto the incense table. The ledger opens, the biological mother's name is clearly visible. The clan elders' expressions change suddenly. [Action] The true legitimate daughter looks down slightly. [Lip-sync] "Are you worthy?" [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Conviction The patriarch stands up and orders expulsion from the family genealogy. The false legitimate daughter collapses to the ground. The true legitimate daughter turns and walks towards the main seat. [Lip-sync] "It's my turn."

prompts.title: 红裙猫耳女王的扑克魔术变身
prompts.prompt:
为首帧锁定初始形象，比例 16:9，总时长 10s。画面以 Diagonal Low-angle Medium Close-up（对角线低仰角近景） 开场。

上半身侧探入画面，头部位于左侧。右手食指与中指仅夹住一张单牌侧面横跨画面中心，眼神 Stoic（坚忍冷静），面部呈现 Laser-focused（激光般专注）的 Minimalist（极简）神态。

0s - 2s (开场动能：冷静的物理操纵)： 1.6s 时手腕轻微转动，使这张孤立的牌面翻转展示出红色背面，以此动能为锚点触发镜头回正并执行平滑 Dolly Out 展示中景走廊的冷白矩阵光与高光泽地板。

2s - 4s (空间拉伸与单牌弧线轨迹)：主角双手旋转该（唯一单牌1.5）后向两侧平稳移开（Hands move apart without any throwing motion），该单张扑克牌像被磁力吸引般，以其中心点为轴心，执行平行于地面的高速水平自旋（High-speed horizontal axis-spin），并沿平肩高度执行从右向左的水平半圆弧形轨迹。严禁出现粒子喷射感，严禁牌向镜头方向（Z轴）飞行，空间中绝对禁止出现第二张牌的像素残影（Absolutely zero extra card particles）。与此同时，镜头快速拉远至全景，将视角中心完全留给这张孤立旋转的单牌轨迹。  

4s - 6s (运镜反弹与接牌蓄力)： 镜头借由单牌惯性极速推进（Dolly In），锁回主体。伸左手精准接住这张唯一的单牌并回收手关节蓄力。此时整个物理空间仍保持“单牌真空”状态。

6s - 7s (遮挡转场：从现实到舞台的临界点)： 向镜头正面展示牌面，镜头以牌面为聚焦锚点执行指数级加速冲刺，在 5.5s 时牌面完全占据画面 100% 形成物理遮挡锚点，实现空间阻断。

7s - 10s (身份变异与魅惑定格)： 牌面划开瞬间，丝滑转场至红裙猫耳形象，画面瞬切为 Ultra-wide angle 14mm 强透视构图。位于画面中心，面部表情转变为 Alluring（魅惑）与 Authoritative gaze（权威凝视），带着 Sultry smirk（性感的冷笑）和 Dominant elegance（掌控的优雅）。

主角左手五指张开呈直指镜头的贯穿式动态，手掌由于透视极其巨大，形成破屏感，身体微微后仰。此时背景已切换为深色幕布与金色雕花画框，顶部强逆光在主体猫耳及银发边缘勾勒出锐利的轮廓光边线，红裙材质在侧光下呈现深邃的明暗梯度。

多枚扑克牌作为前景失焦元素慢速旋转，产生撕裂般的空间深度。主体右手食指轻触下颌，目光锁定镜头，画面最终定格在电影级纵深感极强的华丽姿态。

prompts.prompt_en:
Lock initial image for the first frame, aspect ratio 16:9, total duration 10s. The scene opens with a Diagonal Low-angle Medium Close-up.

The upper body leans sideways into the frame, with the head positioned on the left. The index and middle fingers of the right hand grip only a single card by its side edge across the center of the frame, with a Stoic gaze, and the face presents a Laser-focused Minimalist expression.

0s - 2s (Opening Kinetic Energy: Calm Physical Manipulation): At 1.6s, the wrist rotates slightly, causing this isolated card to flip and reveal its red back. Using this kinetic energy as an anchor point, trigger the camera to realign and execute a smooth Dolly Out to reveal a medium shot of the corridor featuring cold white matrix lights and a high-gloss floor.

2s - 4s (Space Stretching and Single Card Arc Trajectory): The protagonist rotates the (single unique card 1.5) with both hands and then smoothly moves them apart to the sides (Hands move apart without any throwing motion). This single playing card, as if magnetically attracted, performs a high-speed horizontal axis-spin parallel to the ground using its center point as the axis, and executes a horizontal semi-circular trajectory from right to left at shoulder height. Strictly forbid particle jet effects, strictly forbid the card flying towards the lens (Z-axis), and absolutely zero extra card particles are allowed in the space. Meanwhile, the camera quickly zooms out to a panoramic view, leaving the center of view entirely for the trajectory of this isolated spinning single card.

4s - 6s (Camera Rebound and Card Catch Charge): The camera uses the single card's inertia to quickly push forward (Dolly In), locking back onto the subject. The left hand extends to precisely catch this unique single card and retracts the arm joints to charge up. At this time, the entire physical space remains in a "single card vacuum" state.

6s - 7s (Occlusion Transition: The Critical Point from Reality to Stage): The card face is presented frontally to the lens. The camera executes an exponentially accelerating sprint with the card face as the focus anchor. At 5.5s, the card face completely occupies 100% of the frame forming a physical occlusion anchor point, achieving spatial interruption.

7s - 10s (Identity Mutation and Alluring Freeze): The moment the card face cuts across, a silky transition occurs to a red dress cat-eared figure. The scene instantly cuts to an Ultra-wide angle 14mm strong perspective composition. Located in the center of the frame, the facial expression shifts to Alluring and Authoritative gaze, with a Sultry smirk and Dominant elegance.

The protagonist's left hand spreads five fingers wide in a penetrating dynamic pointing straight at the lens. The palm appears extremely huge due to perspective, creating a screen-breaking sensation, while the body leans slightly back. At this time, the background has switched to a dark curtain and a golden carved picture frame. Strong top backlighting outlines sharp rim light edges on the subject's cat ears and silver hair, and the red dress material presents a deep light-dark gradient under side lighting.

Multiple playing cards rotate slowly as out-of-focus foreground elements, creating a torn-like spatial depth. The subject's right index finger lightly touches the chin, eyes locked on the lens, and the frame finally freezes in a magnificent pose with strong cinematic depth.

prompts.title: 红鸾星动引爆宇宙桃花奇观
prompts.prompt: 东方玄幻命理奇观，顶级电影特效，宇宙级视觉奇观。 深邃靛蓝与暗紫色交织的东方星空宇宙，巨大的青铜色星盘残骸悬浮在虚空中，表面刻满暗淡的篆体星宿符文。画面中央，一颗暗红色巨大星曜开始如心跳般脉动苏醒，赤金色能量裂纹在表面蔓延扩散。 红鸾星猛然爆发出垂直贯穿虚空的赤红色光柱，冲击波以同心圆扩散，激活周围所有星盘碎片，碎片旋转拼合成巨型金色东方星盘阵法，二十八星宿逐一点亮金色光芒，光线在星宿间连成复杂几何图案。 无数条炽烈的赤红色发光丝线从红鸾星表面迸射而出，穿透旋转的星盘，缠绕住每一颗星辰，被缠绕的星辰依次染成赤红色，形成蔓延至视野尽头的红色星链。丝线内部流淌液态光能，交汇处绽放桃花形能量脉冲。 镜头极速后拉揭示宇宙全貌，所有丝线与星辰共同构成一朵横亘星空的巨大桃花形星座图案。红鸾星发出超新星级能量脉冲，整朵宇宙桃花同时绽放极致赤金色光芒，最终定格，能量光点如星尘般缓缓飘散。 镜头先缓慢推进再急速后拉至超级远景，画面丝滑流畅，4K超高清，电影质感，体积光，色彩浓烈饱满，赤红与深靛蓝冷暖对比强烈，无闪烁无重影，细节丰富，画面稳定

prompts.prompt_en: Eastern fantasy metaphysical spectacle, top-tier cinematic special effects, cosmic-level visual wonder. Deep indigo and dark purple interwoven eastern starry sky universe, huge bronze astrolabe debris suspended in the void, surface covered with faded seal script constellation runes. In the center of the screen, a huge dark red star begins to pulse and awaken like a heartbeat, crimson-gold energy cracks spreading across the surface. The Hong Luan Star suddenly erupts with a vertical red light beam piercing through the void, shockwaves diffusing in concentric circles, activating all surrounding astrolabe fragments, fragments rotating and assembling into a giant golden eastern astrolabe formation, the Twenty-Eight Mansions lighting up with golden glow one by one, light rays connecting into complex geometric patterns between constellations. Countless scorching red glowing threads shoot out from the surface of the Hong Luan Star, penetrating the rotating astrolabe, wrapping around every star, the wrapped stars being dyed red in sequence, forming a red star chain spreading to the end of the field of view. Liquid light energy flows inside the threads, peach blossom-shaped energy pulses blooming at intersections. The camera pulls back rapidly to reveal the full view of the universe, all threads and stars together forming a giant peach blossom-shaped constellation pattern spanning the starry sky. The Hong Luan Star emits a supernova-level energy pulse, the entire cosmic peach blossom simultaneously blooms with ultimate crimson-gold light, finally freezing frame, energy light spots drifting slowly like stardust. The camera slowly pushes in then rapidly pulls back to an extreme long shot, silky smooth画面, 4K ultra-high definition, cinematic texture, volumetric lighting, rich and saturated colors, strong contrast between warm crimson and cool deep indigo, no flickering no ghosting, rich details, stable image.

prompts.title: 纽约时代广场的春节自拍奇遇
prompts.prompt: 从一个女孩举起手机自拍的角度看去。她偶尔环顾四周，似乎希望在纽约找到中国新年的迹象，她一边走一边说：“我希望我有幸在时代广场看到人们庆祝中国新年。”然后女孩发现了什么并跑过去，惊呼道：“就是这个。这就是我在纽约的第一个春节。”在她身后，舞狮表演的热闹声响弥漫在空气中，营造出充满中国新年精神的喜庆、繁华氛围。

prompts.prompt_en: A girl from the angle of her holding up her phone to take a selfie. occasionally she glances around, as if hoping to find signs of the Chinese New Year in New York, she says as she walks: “I wish I’m lucky enough to see people celebrating Chinese New Year on Times Square.” Then the girl spots something and runs over, exclaiming: “This is it. This is my first Spring Festival in New York.” Behind her, the lively sounds of a lion dance performance fill the air, creating a festive, bustling atmosphere full of the spirit of Chinese New Year.

prompts.title: 绝世厨神泼油酸辣鱼
prompts.prompt:
动作主体@【@图1】身穿白色厨师装
 0-2秒(起刀宰鱼):俯身按鱼，布鞋踏稳灶台，快刀斜劈鱼头，刀刃沿脊骨一划，两爿鱼肉应声分离，鱼排被指风弹飞落盘。
2-4秒(片鱼成薄片):鱼肉平摊案上，手腕翻转，刀光如织，薄如蝉翼的鱼片连刀不断，飘落时带起微，掌风裹着调料快速翻拌，鱼片裹浆均匀，盈润光泽。
7-9 秒(炒料爆香):铁锅上火，油热时脚尖勾来酸菜坛，酸菜、泡椒被掌风扫入锅中，翻炒间酸辣气冲天，褂摆被热气掀得轻晃。

9-12秒(煮鱼勾芡):高汤入锅沸腾，抖腕撒入鱼片，掌风控温不让鱼肉散碎，勾薄芡时旋锅画弧，汤汁浓稠裏住每片鱼。

10-12秒(泼油收招):热油淋在蒜末、干辣椒上"滋啦"作响，收势时褂角垂落，酸菜黄亮、鱼片雪白，热气中飘着醇厚的酸辣香，然后镜头定格这盘沸腾的酸辣鱼上。（画面中不要出现文字信息）

prompts.prompt_en:
Action subject@【@Image 1】wearing white chef's outfit
 0-2 seconds (starting the knife to butcher fish): leaning over to press the fish, cloth shoes stepping firmly on the stove, fast knife diagonally chops the fish head, blade slides along the backbone with one stroke, two halves of fish meat separate accordingly, fish fillet is flicked flying by finger wind and lands on the plate.
2-4 seconds (slicing fish into thin slices): fish meat is spread flat on the cutting board, wrist turns over, knife light weaves like a cloth, fish slices as thin as cicada wings are continuous without breaking the knife, when floating down they bring up slight, palm wind wraps the seasonings to quickly toss and mix, fish slices are evenly coated with batter, moist and glossy luster.
7-9 seconds (stir-frying ingredients to burst fragrance): iron pot is put on fire, when oil is hot toes hook over the pickled vegetable jar, pickled vegetables and pickled peppers are swept into the pot by palm wind, during stir-frying the sour and spicy aroma rushes to the sky, hem of the gown is lifted and swayed slightly by hot steam.

9-12 seconds (boiling fish and thickening with starch): stock enters the pot and boils, shaking the wrist to sprinkle in the fish slices, palm wind controls the temperature to prevent the fish meat from breaking apart, when thickening with thin starch spinning the pot to draw an arc, thick soup wraps around every piece of fish.

10-12 seconds (pouring oil to finish the move): hot oil is poured on minced garlic and dried chili peppers making a "sizzling" sound, when finishing the pose the corners of the gown drop down, pickled vegetables are yellow and bright, fish slices are snow white, in the hot steam floats mellow sour and spicy fragrance, then the camera freezes on this plate of boiling sour and spicy fish. (No text information in the picture)

prompts.title: 绝壁古城极速飞车追逐战
prompts.prompt: 穿越悬崖城市的飞车追逐（单镜头连续拍摄）从一座雕刻在石头上的宏伟悬崖城市开始，镜头俯冲向一道沿着狭窄岩架道路疾驰的微弱光芒。锁定目标：一辆以疯狂速度紧贴墙壁飞驰的飞车。镜头弹射向前，猛地甩回，然后紧紧坠落到后推进器后方：热浪扭曲，碎石从岩架上崩裂，警示灯闪烁。一个坍塌的阳台落下大量碎片；骑手在坠落拱门下进行了一次毫厘之差的急转，然后以一条流畅的线路穿梭穿过悬挂的晾衣绳和敞开的窗户。镜头穿过同样的开口，紧紧跟随动作。最后一个弯道和突然的宁静：镜头向外爆发，展现出城市向无尽的瀑布滋养的山谷敞开，雾气变成了彩虹。

prompts.prompt_en: Speeder chase across a cliff city (single continuous shot) From a monumental cliffside city carved into stone, the camera dives toward a tiny streak of light ripping along a narrow ledge-road. Lock-on: a speeder hugging the wall at insane speed. The camera slingshots ahead, whips back, then drops tight to the rear thrusters: heat haze, grit snapping off the ledge, warning lights flashing. A collapsing balcony rains debris; the rider snaps a last-inch swerve under a falling arch, then threads through hanging laundry lines and open windows in one fluid line. The camera darts through the same openings, staying glued to the motion. One final bend and sudden calm: the camera blasts outward into a reveal of the city opening onto a boundless waterfall-fed valley, mist turning into rainbow.

prompts.title: 绝美仙女云海惊鸿舞
prompts.prompt: 【风格】东方古典仙侠美学，唯美主义，电影级质感，流体布料模拟，发光粒子特效，梦幻光影。 【时长】15秒 【主角】绝美仙女，身着多层素白霓裳羽衣，超长飘带。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：史诗感大远景（Epic Wide Shot）。 地点是云海之上的悬空仙岛古台。仙女伫立，背后是万丈霞光（丁达尔效应）。重点在于她身上无数条长长的丝绸飘带在风中极其柔顺地舞动，如水波纹般铺满画面，展现极致的布料飘逸感。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：慢动作中景（Slow-motion Medium Shot）。 仙女开始跳古典“惊鸿舞”。她腾空而起（反重力轻功感），旋转甩出宽大的水袖。镜头聚焦于丝绸袖子在空中绽放的形态，以及她优雅的肢体语言。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：特写与环境交互（Close-up & Interaction）。 镜头推进至面部特写。她轻启朱唇开始吟唱（自然的歌唱口型）。随着歌声，周围无数发光的粉色花瓣凭空浮现，围绕她形成一个绚烂的粒子风暴漩涡，她的眼神充满神性光辉。

prompts.prompt_en: 【Style】Oriental classical Xianxia aesthetics, Aestheticism, Cinematic texture, Fluid cloth simulation, Glowing particle effects, Dreamy lighting. 【Duration】15s 【Protagonist】Exquisitely beautiful fairy, wearing multi-layered plain white neon feather clothes, ultra-long ribbons. [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Epic Wide Shot. The location is an suspended ancient platform on a fairy island above the sea of clouds. The fairy stands tall, behind her is a myriad of morning glow (Tyndall effect). The focus is on the countless long silk ribbons on her body dancing extremely smoothly in the wind, spreading across the screen like water ripples, showing the ultimate flowy feeling of the cloth. [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Slow-motion Medium Shot. The fairy begins to dance the classical "Jinghong Dance". She leaps into the air (anti-gravity Qinggong feeling), rotating and flinging out wide water sleeves. The camera focuses on the form of the silk sleeves blooming in the air, as well as her elegant body language. [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Close-up & Interaction. The camera zooms in to a facial close-up. She lightly opens her red lips and begins to chant (natural singing mouth shape). With the singing, countless glowing pink petals appear out of thin air around her, forming a gorgeous particle storm vortex around her, and her eyes are full of divine radiance.

3-4 seconds: Lightly lifting skirt hem, outfit change as skirt hem passes the lens, changing into cool blue-green gradient ancient skirt + jade drop earrings, cool temperament, elegant movements

6-7 seconds: Round fan lightly covering face, outfit change as fan moves away, changing into red wedding Ru skirt + tassel Buyao, bright and stunning, intense atmosphere
7-8 seconds: Raising hand to wrap hair, instant outfit change as hand drops, changing into dark dark-patterned ancient skirt + silver accessories, cool and high-end, low-saturation tone
8-9 seconds: Pibo (long silk ribbon) swinging to cover body, outfit change as Pibo falls, changing into gradient flowing light fairy dress, fairy-like and flowing, soft light and shadow, aesthetic and dreamy
9-10 seconds: Turning around and lifting skirt, changing back to plain Ru skirt, lowering eyes and nodding to finish, gentle and quiet, complete picture, stable and smooth camera movement
 
Overall Style: Douyin viral ancient style outfit change, movements synced to the beat with smooth transitions, no hard cuts, lively and elegant character, warm soft light filter, Chinese ancient aesthetics, clear image quality, maximum atmosphere, medium shot following camera movement, tight rhythm.

prompts.title: 维多利亚雪夜的硬核圣诞老人
prompts.prompt: [场景 1：电影中景，夜晚白雪覆盖的维多利亚式豪宅外。@圣诞老人，身穿油腻的红色连体工作服，戴着焊接面罩，正在用焊枪焊接一辆高科技金属红色 @雪橇。炽热的橙色火花飞溅在雪地上。电影般的灯光，4K，超现实。 场景 2：一位迷人的金发女子（@金发女孩）身穿仿皮草大衣进入画面。她伸出手，轻抚圣诞老人的肩膀。特写她的脸，她带着傲慢的表情说：“嘿，圣诞老人！我需要一百万美元。给我！”（她的声音使用 @speech1）。背景是鹅毛大雪。 场景 3：@圣诞老人 的特写。他掀起焊接面罩，脸上沾满了烟灰。他慢慢地转向那个女人，眼睛眯了起来。他深沉地说道：“还没到圣诞节呢。”（他的声音使用 @speech2）。他发出一声沉重而疲惫的叹息，表情变得极度悲伤，问道：“你什么时候才能改变？” 场景 4：从圣诞老人宽阔的肩膀后面拍摄的过肩镜头（OTS），看向那个女人。她依然靠近，脸颊上泛起一丝红晕。她慢慢地摇了摇头说“不”，同时保持着俏皮狡黠的笑容。柔和的散景雪花在他们之间飞舞。高情感对比，戏剧性的阴影。]
prompts.prompt_zh: [场景 1：电影中景，夜晚白雪覆盖的维多利亚式豪宅外。@圣诞老人，身穿油腻的红色连体工作服，戴着焊接面罩，正在用焊枪焊接一辆高科技金属红色 @雪橇。炽热的橙色火花飞溅在雪地上。电影般的灯光，4K，超现实。 场景 2：一位迷人的金发女子（@金发女孩）身穿仿皮草大衣进入画面。她伸出手，轻抚圣诞老人的肩膀。特写她的脸，她带着傲慢的表情说：“嘿，圣诞老人！我需要一百万美元。给我！”（她的声音使用 @speech1）。背景是鹅毛大雪。 场景 3：@圣诞老人 的特写。他掀起焊接面罩，脸上沾满了烟灰。他慢慢地转向那个女人，眼睛眯了起来。他深沉地说道：“还没到圣诞节呢。”（他的声音使用 @speech2）。他发出一声沉重而疲惫的叹息，表情变得极度悲伤，问道：“你什么时候才能改变？” 场景 4：从圣诞老人宽阔的肩膀后面拍摄的过肩镜头（OTS），看向那个女人。她依然靠近，脸颊上泛起一丝红晕。她慢慢地摇了摇头说“不”，同时保持着俏皮狡黠的笑容。柔和的散景雪花在他们之间飞舞。高情感对比，戏剧性的阴影。]
prompts.prompt_en: [Scene 1: Cinematic medium shot, exterior of a snow-covered Victorian mansion at night. @Santa, wearing a greasy red jumpsuit work overall, wearing a welding mask, is welding a high-tech metallic red @sleigh with a welding torch. Blazing orange sparks fly and splash onto the snow. Cinematic lighting, 4K, surreal. Scene 2: A stunning blonde woman (@BlondeGirl) wearing a faux fur coat enters the frame. She reaches out and gently strokes Santa's shoulder. Close-up of her face, she says with an arrogant expression: "Hey, Santa! I need a million dollars. Give it to me!" (Her voice uses @speech1). The background is heavy snow. Scene 3: Close-up of @Santa. He flips up the welding mask, his face covered in soot. He slowly turns to the woman, squinting his eyes. He says deeply: "It's not Christmas yet." (His voice uses @speech2). He lets out a heavy and weary sigh, his expression becoming extremely sad, and asks: "When will you ever change?" Scene 4: Over-the-shoulder shot (OTS) from behind Santa's broad shoulders, looking at the woman. She remains close, a faint flush appearing on her cheek. She slowly shakes her head saying "No" while maintaining a playful and sly smile. Soft bokeh snowflakes dance between them. High emotional contrast, dramatic shadows.]

prompts.title: 自习室里错过的浪漫爱情暗示
prompts.prompt:
电影爱情氛围，电影胶片质感的唯美自习室内。
年轻美丽的女孩羞涩的盯着帅气的男孩问：“你属什么？”
切换男孩镜头，男孩说：“什么？”
女孩重复“我问你属什么？”
切换男孩镜头，男孩说：“哦，我属狗。”切换女孩镜头，女孩害羞的说“你属于我”。
切换男孩镜头，男孩说：“啥？我说了我属狗”
女孩愤怒的说：“活该一辈子单身狗”！

prompts.title: 舞台演讲：万能充的消逝与AI时代的警醒
prompts.prompt: @图片站在舞台上、手持麦克风，台下坐满观众，舞台大屏幕展示 AI 相关PPT；主人公台词：“他曾经有一个很牛的名字叫万能充，现在他什么都充不了，不要老拿自己过去当回事，世界在变，你如果不变，也会变成这个万能充一样。曾经的万能，现在的无能，不学习，不调整，不改变，早晚都会被时代淘汰。
prompts.prompt_zh: @图片站在舞台上、手持麦克风，台下坐满观众，舞台大屏幕展示 AI 相关PPT；主人公台词：“他曾经有一个很牛的名字叫万能充，现在他什么都充不了，不要老拿自己过去当回事，世界在变，你如果不变，也会变成这个万能充一样。曾经的万能，现在的无能，不学习，不调整，不改变，早晚都会被时代淘汰。
prompts.prompt_en: @Image standing on stage, holding a microphone, full audience sitting below, large stage screen displaying AI-related PPT; Protagonist's line: "He once had a very cool name called Universal Charger, now he cannot charge anything. Do not always dwell on your past. The world is changing. If you do not change, you will become just like this Universal Charger. Formerly omnipotent, now incompetent. If you do not learn, do not adjust, do not change, sooner or later you will be eliminated by the times."

prompts.title: 莱戈拉斯与巨型半兽人的生死对决
prompts.prompt: 莱戈拉斯在战场上飞奔，一个巨型半兽人正向他冲来，其巨大的脚步震动着地面。箭矢以致命的精准度飞射，击中盔甲缝隙和暴露的血肉，而半兽人挥舞着巨大的武器，撕裂树木和石头。灰尘和碎片弥漫在空气中，速度与技巧与蛮力相撞，将这场战斗变成了敏捷与原始野蛮之间无情的冲突。

prompts.prompt_en: Legolas darts through the battlefield as a giant orc charges toward him, its massive footsteps shaking the ground. Arrows fly with deadly precision, striking armor gaps and exposed flesh while the orc swings a colossal weapon, tearing through trees and stone. Dust and splinters fill the air as speed and finesse collide with brutal strength, turning the fight into a relentless clash between agility and raw savagery.

prompts.title: 萌猫MotoGP赛道超越本田93号赛车
prompts.prompt: 我提供的图片包含我的小猫——请将其用作角色模型参考。创作一个视频，展示小猫驾驶一辆小推车在MotoGP赛道上竞速。小猫在弯道超越本田 #93 赛车（该镜头持续3秒）。切换到小猫的后方镜头，以贴地低角度拍摄，捕捉小猫向弯道内侧大幅度倾斜的动作（3秒）。然后使用超长焦镜头拍摄小猫在大型C形弯道飞驰而过的画面（3秒）。切换到广角镜头，展示小猫和本田 #93 赛车通过终点线前最后一个弯道的画面（3秒）。最后，展示小猫在冲过终点线时抬起推车前端进行翘头特技（3秒）。在整个视频中，添加真实的MotoGP风格原创英语男声解说——但仅在开场超车和最后冲线时刻包含解说。
prompts.prompt_zh: 我提供的图片包含我的小猫——请将其用作角色模型参考。创作一个视频，展示小猫驾驶一辆小推车在MotoGP赛道上竞速。小猫在弯道超越本田 #93 赛车（该镜头持续3秒）。切换到小猫的后方镜头，以贴地低角度拍摄，捕捉小猫向弯道内侧大幅度倾斜的动作（3秒）。然后使用超长焦镜头拍摄小猫在大型C形弯道飞驰而过的画面（3秒）。切换到广角镜头，展示小猫和本田 #93 赛车通过终点线前最后一个弯道的画面（3秒）。最后，展示小猫在冲过终点线时抬起推车前端进行翘头特技（3秒）。在整个视频中，添加真实的MotoGP风格原创英语男声解说——但仅在开场超车和最后冲线时刻包含解说。
prompts.prompt_en: The image I provide contains my kitten — please use it as the character model reference. Create a video where the kitten is riding a small cart and racing on a MotoGP track. The kitten overtakes the Honda #93 race bike in a corner (this sequence should last 3 seconds). Cut to a rear shot of the kitten, filmed from a ground-level low angle, capturing the kitten leaning hard into the turn (3 seconds). Then use an ultra-telephoto lens shot of the kitten speeding through a large C-shaped corner (3 seconds). Switch to a wide shot showing the kitten and the Honda #93 bike going through the final corner before the finish line (3 seconds). Finally, show the kitten lifting the front of the cart into a wheelie as it crosses the finish line (3 seconds). Throughout the video, add authentic MotoGP-style original male English commentary — but only include commentary for the opening overtake and the final finish-line moment.

prompts.title: 落日余晖下健身房的第一视角触碰
prompts.prompt: 第一视角（POV），电影感光影。一个身材曼妙的少女在瑜伽垫上做拉伸动作时被瞬间定格，身体僵硬无法动弹。镜头极近，特写第一人称的手正在揉捏她纤细的腰肢（指尖陷进软肉的细节）、轻抚她细腻的脸颊，以及紧致的大腿。高清皮肤纹理，可见细微汗珠，运动内衣质感，背景是朦胧的健身房落日余晖，写实，大师级作品。
prompts.prompt_zh: 第一视角（POV），电影感光影。一个身材曼妙的少女在瑜伽垫上做拉伸动作时被瞬间定格，身体僵硬无法动弹。镜头极近，特写第一人称的手正在揉捏她纤细的腰肢（指尖陷进软肉的细节）、轻抚她细腻的脸颊，以及紧致的大腿。高清皮肤纹理，可见细微汗珠，运动内衣质感，背景是朦胧的健身房落日余晖，写实，大师级作品。
prompts.prompt_en: First-person perspective (POV), cinematic lighting. A girl with a graceful figure is frozen in an instant while doing stretching exercises on a yoga mat, her body stiff and unable to move. The camera is extremely close, a close-up of a first-person hand kneading her slender waist (details of fingertips sinking into soft flesh), gently stroking her delicate cheek, and her firm thighs. High-definition skin texture, visible tiny beads of sweat, sports bra texture, background is a hazy gym with sunset glow, realistic, masterpiece.

prompts.title: 蒸汽朋克主厨与外星贵族的米其林盛宴
prompts.prompt: 一个蒸汽朋克机器人当上了米其林三星主厨，在未来厨房用机械臂精准翻炒宫保鸡丁，食材自动飞入锅中，顾客是外星人贵族，品尝后集体鼓掌，镜头从食材特写拉到餐厅全景，蒸汽与霓虹交织。

prompts.title: 蜘蛛侠决战孙悟空古庙之巅
prompts.prompt: 在金色夕阳下的中国古代寺庙屋顶上，蜘蛛侠与齐天大圣孙悟空之间展开的电影级史诗战斗。身穿经典红蓝战衣的蜘蛛侠利用蛛丝荡入画面，在半空中翻转并以蹲姿落地。孙悟空，这位身穿虎皮裙、头戴金箍的肌肉发达的猴战士，旋转着能够流畅伸缩的巨大如意金箍棒。激烈的近身肉搏：蜘蛛侠躲避着超高速的棍棒挥击，使用蛛丝发射器缠绕住伸长的金箍棒，被猛力向前拉扯但通过后空翻脱身。孙悟空进行远距离跳跃，翻着筋斗云，利用七十二变制造残影（短暂分身成三个分身从不同角度攻击）。蜘蛛侠通过在瓦片上敏捷的跑酷进行反击，发射蛛网困住分身，然后在挥棒中途用蛛丝网住真正的悟空的金箍棒，导致巨大的冲击波震裂屋顶瓦片，金色火花四处飞溅。戏剧性的运镜：快速推拉变焦，围绕战斗人员的动态环绕镜头，关键撞击时刻的慢动作（蛛丝与金箍棒的碰撞，拳头相撞爆发出能量），史诗般全景与坚定面部表情/咬紧牙关的极端特写之间的快速剪辑。超逼真的动态，完美的物理效果，蜘蛛侠战衣上详细的织物波纹和悟空的毛发运动，日落时戏剧性的轮廓光，飞舞的碎片和金色能量轨迹，紧张的管弦乐 + 传统中国打击乐原声氛围。16:9 电影纵横比，超细节，无文字，无水印。

prompts.prompt_en: Cinematic epic battle between Spider-Man and Sun Wukong the Monkey King on ancient Chinese temple rooftops at golden sunset.  Spider-Man in classic red-and-blue suit swings in with webs, flips mid-air and lands in a crouch. Sun Wukong, muscular monkey warrior wearing tiger-skin skirt and golden headband, twirls massive Ruyi Jingu Bang staff that extends and retracts fluidly.  Intense close-quarters fight: Spider-Man dodges super-fast staff swings, uses web-shooters to wrap around the extending pole, gets yanked forward but backflips free. Sun Wukong leaps enormous distances, somersaults cloud-style, creates afterimages with 72 transformations (brief clone split into 3 versions attacking from different angles).  Spider-Man counters with agile parkour across tiles, shoots web nets to trap clones, then webs the real Wukong's staff mid-swing causing huge shockwave that cracks roof tiles and sends golden sparks flying everywhere.  Dramatic camera: fast dolly zooms, dynamic orbiting shots around fighters, slow-motion on key impacts (web clash vs golden staff, fists meeting with energy burst), quick cuts between wide epic vista and extreme close-ups of determined faces / gritted teeth.  Hyper-realistic motion, perfect physics, detailed fabric ripple on Spider-Man's suit and fur movement on Wukong, dramatic rim lighting from sunset, flying debris and golden energy trails, intense orchestral + traditional Chinese percussion soundtrack vibe. 16:9 cinematic aspect ratio, ultra-detailed, no text, no watermark.

prompts.title: 血色苍穹下神龙降世的震撼瞬间
prompts.prompt: 参考马小玲召唤神龙的核心动作序列和情绪节奏， 【图片2】中的人物为主角，服饰参考【图片1】，逼真的 3D CG + 热血番战斗作画风格， 角色站在悬崖之巅，身后是翻涌的血红色云海，狂风撕扯着衣角， Cinematic Low Angle 仰拍，角色低头闭眼，双手合十， 周围空气开始扭曲产生热浪纹，地面碎石悬浮， 突然睁眼——瞳孔中倒映出龙形图腾，双手猛然拉开结出手印， 画面切入日漫经典的手部特写快切，每个手印伴随金色符文爆闪，同时口念：“临、兵、斗、者、皆、阵、列、在、前，诛邪（粤语）”， 速度线从四面八方汇聚，Dynamic Tracking快速环绕角色， 角色双臂向天空猛然伸出，一道金色光柱撕裂云层直冲天际， Epic Crane Up跟随光柱急速上升，云层被冲散形成巨大漩涡， 东方神龙从漩涡中心俯冲而下，张开巨口龙吟震天， 龙身缠绕着闪电和金色火焰， 最终龙与角色对视的定格画面，背景是被撕裂的红色天空。 全程浓烈色彩饱和度，大量速度线、冲击波纹、能量粒子特效， 参考经典热血动画的战斗演出风格。 音效：压迫性的低频共振、连续结印的金属碰撞音效、 光柱冲天时的爆裂音、最终龙吟配合重低音鼓点。 禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印

prompts.prompt_en: Referencing the core action sequence and emotional rhythm of Ma Xiaoling summoning the divine dragon, the character in [Image 2] acts as the protagonist, clothing references [Image 1], realistic 3D CG + hot-blooded anime battle animation style. The character stands on the peak of a cliff, behind is a churning blood-red sea of clouds, wild wind tearing at the corners of clothes. Cinematic Low Angle looking up, character lowers head and closes eyes, hands clasped together. The surrounding air begins to distort producing heat wave patterns, ground gravel floats. Suddenly opening eyes -- pupils reflecting dragon-shaped totems, hands suddenly pull apart to form hand seals. The image cuts to classic Japanese anime hand close-up fast cuts, each hand seal accompanied by golden rune explosion flashes, simultaneously chanting: "Rin, Pyo, To, Sha, Kai, Jin, Retsu, Zai, Zen, Zhu Xie (Cantonese)". Speed lines converge from all directions, Dynamic Tracking rapidly circles the character. Character's arms suddenly stretch towards the sky, a golden light pillar tears through the clouds and rushes straight into the sky. Epic Crane Up follows the light pillar rapidly rising, clouds dispersed forming a huge vortex. An Eastern divine dragon dives down from the center of the vortex, opening its huge mouth with a sky-shaking roar. The dragon body is wrapped in lightning and golden flames. Final freeze-frame of the dragon and character looking at each other, background is the torn red sky. Intense color saturation throughout, massive speed lines, shock wave patterns, energy particle special effects, referencing classic hot-blooded anime battle performance style. Sound effects: oppressive low-frequency resonance, continuous hand seal metal collision sound effects, explosive sound when the light pillar rushes to the sky, final dragon roar combined with heavy bass drum beats. Prohibited: any text, subtitles, LOGO or watermarks.

prompts.title: 街头猫咪大厨制作美味煎饼
prompts.prompt:
主角为【@图1】
场景是城市街道早晨的早饭摊，摊位参考【@图2】
镜头固定视角【@图1】小猫左手拿一个大勺右手拿着一个木质刮板将左手勺中的面糊刮下，左手将大勺放下同时右手将面糊在鏊子上，左手拿起一个鸡蛋在鏊子边缘磕一下，单手将鸡蛋打在面饼上，然后将鸡蛋壳往后面直接扔掉，右手将鸡蛋摊开。然后将木质刮板放下右手拿起小铲子将面饼刮起并对折，左手拿出一个蘸着甜面酱的刷子在面饼上刷三次酱，之后右手拿出一个脆饼掰开叠放在面饼上。之后左手拿一些海带丝右手拿一些土豆丝撒在面饼上，然后将面饼卷起，右手拿起小铲子对着煎饼卷中间切下切成两半，最后拿起一个塑料袋装起来递给镜头方向

prompts.prompt_en: The main character is [Reference Image 1]. The scene is a breakfast stall on a city street in the morning, with the stall referencing [Reference Image 2]. Fixed camera angle [Reference Image 1]. The kitten holds a large ladle in its left hand and a wooden scraper in its right hand, scraping the batter from the ladle in its left hand. The left hand puts down the large ladle while the right hand puts the batter onto the griddle. The left hand picks up an egg, cracks it against the edge of the griddle, and cracks the egg onto the pancake with one hand, then throws the eggshell directly behind. The right hand spreads the egg out. Then, putting down the wooden scraper, the right hand picks up a small spatula to scrape up the pancake and fold it in half. The left hand takes a brush dipped in sweet bean sauce and brushes the sauce on the pancake three times. Afterwards, the right hand takes a crispy flatbread, breaks it open, and stacks it on the pancake. Then, the left hand takes some shredded kelp and the right hand takes some shredded potatoes and sprinkles them onto the pancake. Then the pancake is rolled up. The right hand picks up the small spatula and cuts down the middle of the pancake roll, cutting it in half. Finally, it picks up a plastic bag, packs it, and hands it towards the camera direction.

prompts.title: 警视厅SAT废弃工厂惊险解救人质
prompts.prompt: [Shot 1: Low-Angle Tactical Advance] 昏暗的废弃工厂内部。摄像机是贴近地面的低角度。画面深处，身穿黑色装备的警视厅特殊急袭部队（SAT）的队员缓慢前进。透过面罩传来锐利的视线。无线电的沙沙声。队员（压低的声音）“扔掉武器。已经无路可逃了。” ※虽然举着枪，但没有指向摄像机。 [Shot 2: Lateral Hostage Frame] 侧面的侧面构图。嫌疑人穿着工字背心，满身是汗。用一只手臂勒住女性人质，将手枪抵在她的太阳穴上。背景是从破碎窗户射入的逆光。嫌疑人（情绪失控地）“别过来！我要开枪了！我真的会开枪的！”女性强忍泪水，呼吸急促。 [Shot 3: Extreme Close-Up – Trigger Moment] 队员手指和扳机的极度特写。透过手套传来的轻微颤抖。瞬间，环境音消失。嫌疑人（画面外）“动手！！”枪声在画面外响起。 [Shot 4: Aftermath Wide Shot] 寂静的空间。固定摄像机的广角镜头。嫌疑人倒在地板上，手枪滑落在一边。女性瘫倒在地但平安无事。SAT队员缓慢接近，确认安全。队员 “目标控制。请求急救。”
prompts.prompt_zh: [Shot 1: Low-Angle Tactical Advance] 昏暗的废弃工厂内部。摄像机是贴近地面的低角度。画面深处，身穿黑色装备的警视厅特殊急袭部队（SAT）的队员缓慢前进。透过面罩传来锐利的视线。无线电的沙沙声。队员（压低的声音）“扔掉武器。已经无路可逃了。” ※虽然举着枪，但没有指向摄像机。 [Shot 2: Lateral Hostage Frame] 侧面的侧面构图。嫌疑人穿着工字背心，满身是汗。用一只手臂勒住女性人质，将手枪抵在她的太阳穴上。背景是从破碎窗户射入的逆光。嫌疑人（情绪失控地）“别过来！我要开枪了！我真的会开枪的！”女性强忍泪水，呼吸急促。 [Shot 3: Extreme Close-Up – Trigger Moment] 队员手指和扳机的极度特写。透过手套传来的轻微颤抖。瞬间，环境音消失。嫌疑人（画面外）“动手！！”枪声在画面外响起。 [Shot 4: Aftermath Wide Shot] 寂静的空间。固定摄像机的广角镜头。嫌疑人倒在地板上，手枪滑落在一边。女性瘫倒在地但平安无事。SAT队员缓慢接近，确认安全。队员 “目标控制。请求急救。”
prompts.prompt_en: [Shot 1: Low-Angle Tactical Advance] 薄暗い廃工場内部。 カメラは床すれすれのローアングル。 画面奥から、黒い装備に身を包んだ警視庁特殊急襲部隊（SAT）の隊員がゆっくり前進してくる。 フェイスシールド越しに鋭い視線。 無線のかすれた音。 隊員（低く抑えた声） 「武器を捨てろ。もう逃げ場はない。」 ※銃は構えているが、カメラには向けない。 [Shot 2: Lateral Hostage Frame] 横からのサイド構図。 容疑者は作業用タンクトップ姿、汗まみれ。 片腕で女性を羽交い締めにし、拳銃をこめかみに押し当てている。 背景は割れた窓から差し込む逆光。 容疑者（取り乱しながら） 「近づくな！撃つぞ！本当に撃つからな！」 女性は涙をこらえ、呼吸が荒い。 [Shot 3: Extreme Close-Up – Trigger Moment] 隊員の指とトリガーの極端なクローズアップ。 手袋越しにわずかな震え。 一瞬、環境音が消える。 容疑者（画面外） 「やるぞ！！」 銃声は画面外で響く。 [Shot 4: Aftermath Wide Shot] 静まり返る空間。 固定カメラのワイドショット。 容疑者は床に倒れ、拳銃は滑って離れている。 女性はその場に崩れ落ちるが無事。 SAT隊員がゆっくり接近し、安全確認。 隊員 「確保。救急要請。」

prompts.title: 误触女友大腿引发的甜蜜危机
prompts.prompt:
【人物设定】
• 男生： 约20出头，发型清爽，穿着白色长袖衬衫、黑色长裤。性格看起来有点憨厚，眼神透着“清纯的愚蠢”。
• 女生： 约20出头，长发齐刘海，穿着日系JK制服（白色短袖衬衫、深蓝色蝴蝶结领结、深蓝色百褶裙、黑丝袜）。性格反转极大，从文静到“霸总”。
【场景设定】
• 地点： 卧室床边。
• 背景： 浅灰色褶皱窗帘，床铺整洁，光线柔和。
【脚本内容】
00:00 - 00:01
• 画面： 两人并排坐在床边。女生手里抱着一袋零食在吃。
• 文字标题（居上）： 当你小心摸到女朋友
• 人物状态： 男生眼神呆滞地盯着前方（模拟看电视），女生面无表情地咀嚼。
00:01 - 00:02
• 画面： 男生自然地伸手去女生怀里的零食袋里掏吃的。
• 字幕： 一起看电视~
• 表情： 男生很淡定，心思全在“电视”上。
00:02 - 00:04
• 画面： 男生从袋子里拿出一块零食塞进嘴里，嚼得津津有味。
• 字幕： 拿吃的
• 表情： 两人维持着平静的观影气氛。
00:04 - 00:05
• 画面： 男生再次伸手去拿，但这次没对准袋子，手直接按在了女生的腿上（大腿位置）。
• 字幕： 继续拿……
• 动作： 男生的手不仅放上去了，还稍微停顿了一下，显然还没反应过来。
00:05 - 00:06
• 画面： 画面瞬间定格感。女生停止咀嚼，缓缓转头盯着男生的手，再看向男生的脸。
• 字幕： 摸我？
• 表情变化： * 女生： 眼神从疑惑瞬间转为一种“阴谋得逞”的坏笑。
• 男生： 瞳孔地震，嘴巴微张，整个人僵住，满脸写着“我不是故意的，药丸”。
00:06 - 00:07
• 画面： 女生突然放下零食袋，一个“饿虎扑食”的姿势向男生逼近。男生惊慌失措地举起双手做防御状，身体往后仰。
• 字幕： 你先动手的哦~
• 台词（男生）： “不是这个意思，我不是……”
00:07 - 00:09
• 画面： 背景音乐变得急促/动感。女生跨坐过去（动作幅度大，带点霸道感），男生已经退无可退，缩在床角。
• 字幕： 真的不要……
• 表情： 女生笑得非常灿烂（带点调皮的压迫感），男生一脸惊恐但又透着某种无奈的顺从。
• 视觉效果： 画面最后伴随动感的卡点音乐快速剪辑，营造出一种“男生在劫难逃”的幽默氛围。

prompts.prompt_en:
[Character Design]
• Male: Early 20s, clean hairstyle, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt and black trousers. Personality looks a bit honest/silly, with eyes revealing "pure stupidity."
• Female: Early 20s, long hair with bangs, wearing a Japanese JK uniform (white short-sleeve shirt, dark blue bow tie, dark blue pleated skirt, black silk stockings). Personality has a huge reversal, from quiet to "domineering CEO."
[Scene Design]
• Location: Beside the bed in a bedroom.
• Background: Light gray pleated curtains, tidy bed, soft lighting.
[Script Content]
00:00 - 00:01
• Visual: Two people sitting side-by-side on the edge of the bed. The girl is holding a bag of snacks and eating.
• Text Title (Top): When you carefully touch your girlfriend
• Character State: The boy stares blankly ahead (simulating watching TV), the girl chews expressionlessly.
00:01 - 00:02
• Visual: The boy naturally reaches into the snack bag in the girl's arms to get food.
• Subtitle: Watching TV together~
• Expression: The boy is very calm, his mind entirely on the "TV."
00:02 - 00:04
• Visual: The boy takes a snack from the bag and puts it in his mouth, chewing with relish.
• Subtitle: Getting food
• Expression: The two maintain a calm movie-watching atmosphere.
00:04 - 00:05
• Visual: The boy reaches out again, but this time misses the bag, his hand lands directly on the girl's leg (thigh area).
• Subtitle: Continuing to reach...
• Action: The boy's hand not only lands there but pauses slightly, clearly not having reacted yet.
00:05 - 00:06
• Visual: The image freezes instantly. The girl stops chewing, slowly turns her head to stare at the boy's hand, then looks at the boy's face.
• Subtitle: Touching me?
• Expression Change: * Female: Eyes change from confusion to a "scheme succeeded" smirk instantly.
• Male: Pupils quaking, mouth slightly open, whole body stiffened, face written with "I didn't mean it, I'm doomed."
00:06 - 00:07
• Visual: The girl suddenly puts down the snack bag and lunges at the boy in a "hungry tiger pouncing on food" posture. The boy panics, raising both hands in a defensive gesture, leaning backward.
• Subtitle: You started it~
• Dialogue (Male): "That's not what I meant, I'm not..."
00:07 - 00:09
• Visual: Background music becomes urgent/dynamic. The girl straddles over (large movement, with a sense of dominance), the boy has nowhere to retreat, huddled in the corner of the bed.
• Subtitle: Really don't want...
• Expression: The girl smiles brilliantly (with a bit of playful oppression), the boy looks terrified but shows a kind of helpless submission.
• Visual Effects: The screen ends with dynamic beat-synced music and fast editing, creating a humorous atmosphere of "the boy cannot escape."
prompts.author: @liyue_ai

prompts.title: 豪车旁的尴尬职场反转
prompts.prompt:
【风格】抖音搞笑段子（Viral Sketch Comedy），竖屏（Portrait），生活化运镜，演员表情夸张，音效卡点清晰。
【时长】15秒
【角色】
老板（穿西装，夹公文包，一脸优越感）。
员工小王（穿休闲装，一脸老实憨厚）。
【道具】一辆顶级豪车（法拉利/劳斯莱斯），水桶和抹布。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：嘲讽（The Mockery）。
场景：公司楼下。小王正靠在一辆崭新的千万级豪车旁抽烟（或喝水）。
动作：老板路过，停下来拍拍小王的肩膀，一脸说教。
【对白/口型】老板：“小王啊，别光看车发呆。好好跟着我干，下辈子……你兴许能摸一下这车轱辘。”

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：第一次反转（The Shock）。
动作：小王尴尬地笑了笑，突然从兜里掏出一把车钥匙。
音效：“哔哔！”（车锁解锁声）。豪车的车灯闪烁，后备箱缓缓自动弹开。
表情：老板的下巴都要惊掉了（特写），公文包差点掉地上。老板瞬间换上一副讨好的表情，准备握手。
【对白/口型】老板（结巴）：“哎哟！王……王总？原来您是体验生活啊！”

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：第二次反转（The Punchline）。
动作：小王淡定地从后备箱里拿出了……**一个水桶和一条脏抹布**。
表情：小王一脸无奈，老板的笑容僵在脸上，瞬间石化。
【对白/口型】小王：“老板您让让，车主马上来了，我刚接的洗车单，还得赶下一场呢。”
（画面定格在老板尴尬的脸上，配上搞笑音效“Wasted”或“嘎嘎嘎”）。

prompts.prompt_en:
[Style] Viral Sketch Comedy, Portrait, Life-like camera movement, Exaggerated actor expressions, Clear sound effect beats.
[Duration] 15 seconds
[Characters]
Boss (Wearing a suit, carrying a briefcase, looking superior).
Employee Xiao Wang (Wearing casual clothes, looking honest and simple).
[Props] A top-tier luxury car (Ferrari/Rolls-Royce), A bucket and a rag.

[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: The Mockery.
Scene: Downstairs of the company. Xiao Wang is leaning against a brand new multi-million dollar luxury car smoking (or drinking water).
Action: The boss passes by, stops to pat Xiao Wang on the shoulder, looking preachy.
[Dialogue/Lip sync] Boss: "Xiao Wang, don't just stare blankly at the car. Work hard with me, maybe in the next life... you might be able to touch this wheel."

[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: The Shock.
Action: Xiao Wang smiles awkwardly, suddenly takes out a car key from his pocket.
Sound effect: "Beep!" (Car unlocking sound). The luxury car's lights flash, the trunk slowly pops open automatically.
Expression: The boss's chin drops in shock (Close-up), the briefcase almost falls to the ground. The boss instantly switches to a fawning expression, preparing to shake hands.
[Dialogue/Lip sync] Boss (Stuttering): "Oh my! Mr... Mr. Wang? So you are experiencing life!"

[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: The Punchline.
Action: Xiao Wang calmly takes out of the trunk... **a bucket and a dirty rag**.
Expression: Xiao Wang looks helpless, the boss's smile freezes on his face, instantly petrified.
[Dialogue/Lip sync] Xiao Wang: "Boss, please move aside, the owner is coming soon. I just took this car wash order, I have to rush to the next one."
(The screen freezes on the boss's embarrassed face, accompanied by the funny sound effect "Wasted" or "Gaga").

prompts.title: 豪门宴会上演女王归来
prompts.prompt: 【风格】豪门恩怨（High Society），真假千金梗，极致反转，撕绿茶爽文，高定礼服，美艳御姐风。 【时长】15秒 【角色】真千金（烈焰红唇，黑天鹅晚礼服，气场两米八）VS 假千金（小白花装扮，楚楚可怜，眼泪汪汪）。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：绿茶演技（The Trap）。 奢华宴会厅。假千金故意摔碎一个古董花瓶，跌坐在碎片中，捂着手背哭得梨花带雨。周围宾客指指点点。 【动作】假千金指着真千金，眼神却在偷笑。 【对白口型指导】“姐姐，我知道你讨厌我抢了你的位置，但这个是奶奶的遗物啊！” [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：证据打脸（The Slapback）。 真千金冷笑一声，完全不慌。她从手包里慢条斯理地掏出一份文件（DNA鉴定书），直接甩在假千金脸上。纸张散落，特写镜头给到鉴定结果（红色大字：无血缘关系）。 【动作】真千金居高临下，眼神蔑视。 【对白口型指导】“演够了吗？野种。” [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：女王加冕（The Coronation）。 全场宾客倒吸一口凉气（震惊脸）。真千金无视地上的假千金，径直走向主位的宝座，一把扯下假千金头上的皇冠戴在自己头上。 【动作】她整理裙摆坐下，霸气侧漏。假千金面如死灰，被保安拖走。 【对白口型指导】“这是我家，滚。”

prompts.prompt_en:
[Style] High Society Drama, True and False Daughter Trope, Extreme Plot Twist, Slaying the Green Tea Bitch, Haute Couture Gowns, Gorgeous Royal Sister Style.
[Duration] 15 seconds.
[Characters] True Daughter (Flaming red lips, black swan evening gown, an aura of 2.8 meters) VS False Daughter (Little white flower attire, pitiful and pathetic, teary-eyed).
[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Green Tea Acting. Luxurious banquet hall. The False Daughter deliberately smashes an antique vase, falls sitting among the shards, covering the back of her hand and crying beautifully like a pear blossom in the rain. Surrounding guests are pointing and whispering. [Action] The False Daughter points at the True Daughter, but her eyes are secretly snickering. [Lip Sync Guidance] "Sister, I know you hate me for taking your place, but this is Grandma's heirloom!"
[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Evidence Slapback (The Slapback). The True Daughter sneers, completely unfazed. She slowly takes a document (DNA Appraisal) out of her handbag and slaps it directly on the False Daughter's face. Papers scatter, close-up shot on the appraisal result (Large red text: No Blood Relationship). [Action] The True Daughter looks down from above, eyes full of disdain. [Lip Sync Guidance] "Done acting? You bastard."
[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Queen's Coronation (The Coronation). All the guests gasp in shock (shocked faces). The True Daughter ignores the False Daughter on the ground, walks straight to the throne at the head of the table, and snatches the crown off the False Daughter's head to put it on her own. [Action] She arranges her skirt and sits down, radiating dominance. The False Daughter looks deathly pale as she is dragged away by security. [Lip Sync Guidance] "This is my home, get out."

prompts.title: 豪门弃女惊天逆转收购渣男家产
prompts.prompt:
画面（0-5秒）： 奢华宴会厅中心，特写男主（豪门少爷，嚣张跋扈）正搂着女配（娇弱白莲花），不耐烦地将一张黑卡扔在地上，卡片滑到女主脚边。女主穿着看似朴素的礼服，低头看着卡，面无表情。周围是宾客嘲讽的嘴脸（快速蒙太奇剪辑）。 台词1（男主，嫌弃且高傲）： 拿着这五百万滚出沈家！像你这种身份低微的女人，根本不配站在这里碍我的眼！

画面（6-10秒）： 女主没有捡卡，而是缓缓抬起头，眼神瞬间变得凌厉深邃。她打了一个响指。宴会厅大门轰然打开，两排黑衣保镖迅速涌入，分开人群。一位西装革履的财团特助快步走到女主面前，九十度深深鞠躬，双手奉上一份文件。 台词2（财团特助，无比恭敬）： 大小姐，收购沈氏集团的合同已经准备好了，请您过目。

画面（11-15秒）： 男主和女配的表情瞬间凝固，瞳孔地震，男主惊恐地后退一步差点跌倒。女主接过文件看都没看一眼，直接甩在男主僵硬的胸口，文件散落一地。女主越过男主，走向主位，留下一个霸气侧影。 台词3（女主，冷艳且蔑视）： 沈少爷，现在破产的是你。这五百万，留着给你自己买棺材吧。

音效： 开场喧闹的宴会背景音，黑卡扔在地上的清脆声响；中段大门打开的震撼音效，整齐的脚步声；后段极具压迫感的BGM骤然响起，文件甩在身上的闷响，男主倒吸凉气的声音，女主高跟鞋离去的哒哒声。

时长： 精准15秒（身份惊天反转，极致打脸，爽点密集爆发）

prompts.prompt_en:
Scene (0-5s): In the center of a luxurious banquet hall, close-up of the Male Lead (wealthy young master, arrogant and domineering) hugging the Female Supporting Character (delicate white lotus), impatiently throwing a black card onto the ground, the card slides to the Female Lead's feet. The Female Lead is wearing a seemingly simple gown, looking down at the card with a blank expression. Surrounding them are guests with mocking faces (rapid montage editing). Line 1 (Male Lead, disgusted and arrogant): Take this five million and get the hell out of the Shen family! A lowly woman like you doesn't deserve to stand here and be an eyesore to me!

Scene (6-10s): The Female Lead does not pick up the card, but slowly raises her head, her eyes instantly becoming sharp and profound. She snaps her fingers. The banquet hall doors bang open, and two rows of black-clad bodyguards quickly pour in, separating the crowd. A financial group special assistant in a suit and tie walks quickly to the Female Lead, bows deeply at ninety degrees, and presents a document with both hands. Line 2 (Financial Group Special Assistant, incomparably respectful): Miss, the contract for the acquisition of the Shen Group has been prepared, please have a look.

Scene (11-15s): The expressions of the Male Lead and Female Supporting Character instantly freeze, pupils quaking, the Male Lead steps back in horror, almost falling. The Female Lead takes the document without even looking at it, and directly flings it against the Male Lead's stiff chest, the documents scattering all over the ground. The Female Lead walks past the Male Lead toward the main seat, leaving behind a domineering silhouette. Line 3 (Female Lead, cold and disdainful): Young Master Shen, the one going bankrupt now is you. Keep this five million to buy yourself a coffin.

Sound Effects: Noisy banquet background sound at the opening, the crisp sound of the black card being thrown on the ground; shocking sound effect of the gates opening in the middle, neat footsteps; sudden onset of highly oppressive BGM in the later segment, the dull thud of the document hitting the body, the sound of the Male Lead gasping, the clicking sound of the Female Lead's high heels walking away.

Duration: Precise 15 seconds (shocking reversal of identity, extreme face-slapping, dense explosion of satisfying moments).

prompts.title: 豪门退婚她摊牌了首富身份
prompts.prompt:
人物
• 女主（林晚）：24岁，清冷干练，看似普通，实则深藏不露，气场全开。
• 男二（赵天宇）：25岁，嚣张富二代，看不起女主，上门退婚羞辱。
• 女二（闺蜜）：助攻，负责补刀爆点。
场景
现代轻奢客厅，简单高级，不浮夸。
【0-3秒｜镜1】
• 画面：男二甩手把订婚戒指扔在桌上，居高临下。
• 台词（赵天宇，轻蔑）：
“林晚，这婚我退定了！你配不上我们赵家。”
【3-7秒｜镜2】
• 画面：女主垂眸冷笑，缓缓抬眼，眼神变冷。
• 台词（林晚，平静）：
“退婚可以。把你们家三年来，靠我项目赚的三个亿，先还回来。”
【7-10秒｜镜3】
• 画面：男二脸色骤变，震惊后退。
• 台词（赵天宇，慌）：
“你……你怎么知道？！”
【10-12秒｜镜4】
• 画面：闺蜜推门而入，扔出一份合作文件。
• 台词（闺蜜，霸气）：
“她是你们总公司，隐藏的最大投资方！”
【12-15秒｜镜5｜爆点爽镜】
• 画面：女主拿起戒指，随手丢进垃圾桶。
• 台词（林晚，冷艳收尾）：
“现在，是我，不要你。”
• 定格：女主侧颜杀。
