prompts.prompt_en:
Eastern Fantasy Wuxia Epic. Top-tier movie special effects, fast-paced editing, emphasis on the collision of power. Strong contrast in visual style: one side is a golden solidified wild dragon, the other side is a massive void palm that distorts the air with transparency.

[Scene]
Desolate ancient battlefield ruins, dust flying, rubble everywhere.

[Characters]
1. Rugged Hero (Dragon Subduing Palm): Stubble-faced, tattered clothes, knotted muscles, wild eyes, surrounded by golden steam.
2. High Monk (Merciful Palm): Wearing yellow kasaya, face compassionate but expression solemn, surrounding air presenting twisted ripples.

[Storyboard]
[00:00-00:03] Shot 1: Close Combat · Punches to the Flesh
Camera: Shaky Handheld.
Action: Fast-paced editing. The two fight at extreme speed in the ruins. The Hero punches heavily, golden energy explodes; the Monk uses softness to overcome hardness, palm wind dissolves the offense. Dust and rubble explode amidst their energy.

[00:03-00:06] Shot 2: Distance Widening · Ready to Strike
Camera: Rapid Pullback.
Action: After a violent collision, both slide back dozens of meters simultaneously, widening the distance.
Close-up fast cut: The Hero roars, channels energy with both palms, air behind him distorts due to high heat, faintly emitting dragon roars. The Monk puts palms together then slowly pushes out, expression solemn, the air in front begins to collapse and deform on a large scale.

[00:06-00:12] Shot 3: Ultimate Move Clash · Visual Spectacle
Camera: Epic Wide Shot.
Action (Simultaneous):
Hero: Suddenly pushes out with both palms, roaring: "Eighteen Dragon Subduing Palms!". Countless dazzling golden solid light-and-shadow dragons (Countless Golden Energy Dragons) roar out from his palms, converging into a golden torrent.
Monk: Pushes out a flat palm. A massive, semi-transparent, formless giant palm (Massive Formless Transparent Palm) seemingly composed of distorted air and merciful radiance appears out of thin air, pressing forward slowly but unstoppably.
VFX Collision: The golden dragon group slams heavily onto the transparent giant palm, erupting into earth-shattering energy halos, the earth cracking.

[00:12-00:14] Shot 4: Moment of Breaking Defense
Camera: Medium Shot Impact Lens.
Visual: The transparent giant palm cracks under the biting and impact of countless golden dragons, finally shattering and dissipating with a bang. The remaining golden dragon energy penetrates through, heavily bombarding the Monk.

[00:14-00:15] Shot 5: Finale Freeze Frame
Camera: Freeze Frame.
Visual: The Monk falls backward, a trace of blood spilling from the corner of his mouth, expression still merciful. The Hero stands maintaining the palm-striking posture, golden aura around him not yet dissipated, background is energy light spots drifting in the sky.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 鎏金锦鲤唐装少女的古风奇幻演唱会
prompts.prompt: @图片，身着鎏金点翠锦鲤纹样唐装，发间缀流苏步摇，眉心点朱砂花钿，笑靥如花灵气逼人；立于雕梁画栋的朱红门廊前，背景是百盏琉璃宫灯流转光华，金丝绣“春”字屏风半掩，檐角铜铃叮咚，漫天红绸如瀑垂落，光影间浮动细碎金粉。   少女随编钟清音轻启朱唇演唱，莲步轻移广袖翻飞，动作丰富：双手合十作揖、俏皮眨眼比爱心、旋身扬起满地金箔，眸中星辉流转；专业歌手水准，演唱不跑调。  歌词搭配专属特效： 1. “青龙现 白虎衔”：四象神兽虚影破云而出，龙吟虎啸间祥云裂变 2.  “八方财气聚门檐”：紫气自东南西北奔涌而来，在少女掌心凝成旋转的金色漩涡 3.  “我要福来福来”“福从星河落满怀”：银河倾泻而下化作万千福字，每个笔画闪烁珍珠光泽 4.  “莫道年少不知愁”“偏要笑看风云骤”：少女足尖轻点，地面绽开朵朵红梅，花瓣化作振翅朱雀腾空 5.  “他日登云摘星斗”“今朝且把金樽守”：九天星斗突然坠入酒樽，迸发出璀璨光柱直冲云霄。  整体采用敦煌飞天式运镜，少女旋身时发间步摇凝滞空中，慢镜头下金箔与花瓣形成螺旋星轨；最后定格画面：少女背对镜头扬起水袖，漫天星斗与金箔化作“招财进宝”四个立体篆字，余韵中铜钱形状的雪花簌簌飘落。
prompts.prompt_zh: @图片，身着鎏金点翠锦鲤纹样唐装，发间缀流苏步摇，眉心点朱砂花钿，笑靥如花灵气逼人；立于雕梁画栋的朱红门廊前，背景是百盏琉璃宫灯流转光华，金丝绣“春”字屏风半掩，檐角铜铃叮咚，漫天红绸如瀑垂落，光影间浮动细碎金粉。   少女随编钟清音轻启朱唇演唱，莲步轻移广袖翻飞，动作丰富：双手合十作揖、俏皮眨眼比爱心、旋身扬起满地金箔，眸中星辉流转；专业歌手水准，演唱不跑调。  歌词搭配专属特效： 1. “青龙现 白虎衔”：四象神兽虚影破云而出，龙吟虎啸间祥云裂变 2.  “八方财气聚门檐”：紫气自东南西北奔涌而来，在少女掌心凝成旋转的金色漩涡 3.  “我要福来福来”“福从星河落满怀”：银河倾泻而下化作万千福字，每个笔画闪烁珍珠光泽 4.  “莫道年少不知愁”“偏要笑看风云骤”：少女足尖轻点，地面绽开朵朵红梅，花瓣化作振翅朱雀腾空 5.  “他日登云摘星斗”“今朝且把金樽守”：九天星斗突然坠入酒樽，迸发出璀璨光柱直冲云霄。  整体采用敦煌飞天式运镜，少女旋身时发间步摇凝滞空中，慢镜头下金箔与花瓣形成螺旋星轨；最后定格画面：少女背对镜头扬起水袖，漫天星斗与金箔化作“招财进宝”四个立体篆字，余韵中铜钱形状的雪花簌簌飘落。
prompts.prompt_en: @Image, wearing a gilded and kingfisher-ornamented Tang suit with koi patterns, hair adorned with tassel hairpins (buyao), a cinnabar flower decoration on the forehead, smiling like a flower with an aura full of spiritual energy; standing in front of a vermilion corridor with carved beams and painted rafters, background features hundreds of glazed palace lanterns with flowing radiance, a gold-thread embroidered "Spring" character screen half-concealed, bronze bells ringing on the eaves, red silk filling the sky like a waterfall cascading down, tiny gold powder floating amidst light and shadow. The girl sings lightly opening her lips to the clear sound of chime bells, moving with lotus steps and wide sleeves fluttering, rich movements: hands clasped together in a greeting, playfully blinking and making a heart shape, spinning to kick up gold leaf covering the ground, starlight flowing in her eyes; professional singer level, singing on pitch. Lyrics matched with exclusive special effects: 1. "Green Dragon appears, White Tiger holds": Four Symbols divine beast phantoms break out of the clouds, dragon roars and tiger howls tearing the auspicious clouds apart. 2. "Wealth from eight directions gathers at the eaves": Purple energy rushes from East, South, West, and North, condensing into a rotating golden vortex in the girl's palm. 3. "I want fortune to come" "fortune falls from the galaxy into my embrace": The Milky Way pours down transforming into thousands of "Fortune" characters, every stroke shimmering with pearl luster. 4. "Don't say youth knows no sorrow" "insist on laughing at the sudden wind and clouds": The girl lightly taps her toes, red plums bloom on the ground, petals turn into winged Vermilion Birds soaring into the air. 5. "Another day climb clouds to pick stars" "today guard the golden goblet": Stars from the nine heavens suddenly fall into the wine vessel, bursting out a brilliant light pillar rushing straight to the clouds. Overall adopts Dunhuang Flying Apsaras style camera movement, the hairpin freezes in the air when the girl spins, under slow motion gold leaf and petals form a spiral star trail; final freeze-frame: girl has her back to the camera raising water sleeves, sky full of stars and gold leaf transforms into the four 3D seal characters "Ushering in Wealth and Treasure", amidst the lingering charm copper-coin-shaped snowflakes fall rustlingly.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 钢铁巨兽突袭现代都市
prompts.prompt: 一台巨大的装甲机甲在现代城市的中心出现，它雷鸣般的脚步震动了街道，并向高耸的建筑物发送冲击波。当恐惧的人群惊慌失措地奔跑，汽车四散，混乱在到处展开时，灰尘和碎片充满了空气。这台巨大的机器像一股不可阻挡的力量一样移动，粉碎其路径上的一切，创造了一个纯粹的电影级毁灭场景。超逼真的视觉效果，戏剧性的氛围，强烈的规模感，大片电影风格，史诗般的动作，4K，高细节，逼真的视觉特效，黑暗的电影基调。

prompts.prompt_en: A gigantic armored mech emerges in the middle of a modern city, its thunderous footsteps shaking the streets and sending shockwaves through towering buildings. Dust and debris fill the air as terrified crowds run in panic, cars scatter, and chaos unfolds everywhere. The colossal machine moves like an unstoppable force, crushing everything in its path, creating a scene of pure cinematic destruction. Ultra-realistic visuals, dramatic atmosphere, intense scale, blockbuster movie style, epic action, 4K, high detail, realistic VFX, dark cinematic tone.

prompts.title: 银背巨猿与人类职业球员的激烈橄榄球对决
prompts.prompt: 超写实真人体育赛事转播镜头，关于一场人类职业球员与巨型银背大猩猩之间的橄榄球比赛。人类身穿色彩鲜艳的橄榄球球衣和防滑鞋。大猩猩是自然的、巨大的且毛茸茸的。一只巨大的大猩猩正在带球奔跑，冲过试图阻截它的人类球员防线。体育场泛光灯，绿草，毛发和人类皮肤的超精细纹理。汗水，泥土，高速快门，4k。

prompts.prompt_en: Hyper-realistic live-action sports broadcast footage of a rugby match between human professional players and massive silverback gorillas. The humans are wearing colorful rugby jerseys and cleats. The gorillas are natural, large, and furry. A huge gorilla is running with the ball, charging through a defensive line of human players trying to tackle it. Stadium floodlights, green grass, hyper-detailed textures of fur and human skin. Sweat, dirt, high shutter speed, 4k.
prompts.author: @Wujek_AI

prompts.title: 镜中倒影惊现诡异延迟与独立意识
prompts.prompt: 【风格】伪纪录片（Vlog Style），超写实主义，固定机位实拍感，自然光，带有一点点悬疑惊悚色彩。 【时长】15秒 【主角（记得传参考图）】一个性感的年轻人美女，在自家卫生间洗漱台前准备洗漱睡觉。 [00:00-00:06] 镜头1：日常铺垫（Normalcy）。 场景：普通的卫生间大镜子前。 动作：主角正在对着镜子刷牙，满嘴泡沫。她一边刷牙一边对着镜子做各种搞怪的鬼脸（挤眉弄眼）。 关键细节：此时镜子里的倒影完全正常，动作同步。 [00:06-00:11] 镜头2：BUG出现（The Glitch）。 动作：主角刷完牙，低头吐掉泡沫，然后转身准备离开卫生间。 高能时刻（核心爆点）：就在主角真身已经转身离开镜子画面范围的时候，镜子里的那个“倒影”竟然**没有动**！那个“倒影”依然保持着刷牙的姿势，甚至还坏笑着冲着镜头挑了一下眉毛，停留了整整2秒钟，才突然惊慌失措地“闪屏”追上本体的动作消失。 导演备注：要做出极其真实的“网络延迟”感，倒影有独立意识的感觉。 [00:11-00:15] 镜头3：惊悚回马枪（The Punchline）。 动作：已经走到门口的主角似乎感觉到了不对劲，猛地回头看向镜子。 结果：镜子此时已经完全恢复正常，空空荡荡，只照出对面的墙壁。主角一脸茫然且后怕，对着房间里环视了一下，露出惊悚的表情。画面在主角的懵逼脸中定格（恐怖片效果）。
prompts.prompt_zh: 【风格】伪纪录片（Vlog Style），超写实主义，固定机位实拍感，自然光，带有一点点悬疑惊悚色彩。 【时长】15秒 【主角（记得传参考图）】一个性感的年轻人美女，在自家卫生间洗漱台前准备洗漱睡觉。 [00:00-00:06] 镜头1：日常铺垫（Normalcy）。 场景：普通的卫生间大镜子前。 动作：主角正在对着镜子刷牙，满嘴泡沫。她一边刷牙一边对着镜子做各种搞怪的鬼脸（挤眉弄眼）。 关键细节：此时镜子里的倒影完全正常，动作同步。 [00:06-00:11] 镜头2：BUG出现（The Glitch）。 动作：主角刷完牙，低头吐掉泡沫，然后转身准备离开卫生间。 高能时刻（核心爆点）：就在主角真身已经转身离开镜子画面范围的时候，镜子里的那个“倒影”竟然**没有动**！那个“倒影”依然保持着刷牙的姿势，甚至还坏笑着冲着镜头挑了一下眉毛，停留了整整2秒钟，才突然惊慌失措地“闪屏”追上本体的动作消失。 导演备注：要做出极其真实的“网络延迟”感，倒影有独立意识的感觉。 [00:11-00:15] 镜头3：惊悚回马枪（The Punchline）。 动作：已经走到门口的主角似乎感觉到了不对劲，猛地回头看向镜子。 结果：镜子此时已经完全恢复正常，空空荡荡，只照出对面的墙壁。主角一脸茫然且后怕，对着房间里环视了一下，露出惊悚的表情。画面在主角的懵逼脸中定格（恐怖片效果）。
prompts.prompt_en: 【Style】Vlog Style, Hyper-realism, Fixed camera realistic feel, Natural light, Hint of suspense and horror. 【Duration】15 seconds 【Protagonist (Remember to upload reference image)】A sexy young beautiful woman, preparing to wash up and sleep in front of the bathroom sink at home. [00:00-00:06] Shot 1: Normalcy. Scene: In front of a large mirror in an ordinary bathroom. Action: The protagonist is brushing her teeth facing the mirror, mouth full of foam. While brushing, she makes various funny faces at the mirror (winking and making faces). Key details: The reflection in the mirror is completely normal at this time, movements are synchronized. [00:06-00:11] Shot 2: The Glitch. Action: The protagonist finishes brushing, lowers head to spit out foam, then turns around preparing to leave the bathroom. High-energy moment (Core climax): Just when the protagonist's real body has turned and left the mirror frame range, the "reflection" in the mirror actually **did not move**! That "reflection" still maintains the brushing posture, even smirks and raises an eyebrow at the camera, staying for a full 2 seconds before suddenly "glitching" in panic to catch up with the main body's movement and disappear. Director's note: Create an extremely realistic "network lag" feel, a feeling that the reflection has independent consciousness. [00:11-00:15] Shot 3: The Punchline. Action: The protagonist, having reached the door, seems to sense something is wrong and suddenly looks back at the mirror. Result: The mirror is now completely normal, empty, reflecting only the opposite wall. The protagonist looks blank and terrified, scans the room, revealing a horrified expression. The frame freezes on the protagonist's confused face (horror movie effect).
prompts.author: @msjiaozhu

prompts.title: 镜前崩溃：绝望女子的尖叫时刻
prompts.prompt: 图像 1 中的女子走向镜子并看着她的倒影。她的姿势应参考图像 2。经过片刻的沉思后，她突然崩溃并开始尖叫。抓住镜子的动作，以及在崩溃和尖叫期间的情绪和面部表情，应完全参考视频 1。
prompts.prompt_zh: 图像 1 中的女子走向镜子并看着她的倒影。她的姿势应参考图像 2。经过片刻的沉思后，她突然崩溃并开始尖叫。抓住镜子的动作，以及在崩溃和尖叫期间的情绪和面部表情，应完全参考视频 1。
prompts.prompt_en: The woman in @ Image 1 walks up to the mirror and looks at her reflection. Her pose should reference @ Image 2. After a moment of contemplation, she suddenly breaks down and starts screaming. The action of grabbing the mirror, as well as the emotions and facial expressions during the breakdown and scream, should fully reference @Video 1.

prompts.title: 镜头流转下的西域舞娘曼妙身姿
prompts.prompt: 摄像机对着一双玉足，镜头环绕着【@图1】角色，缓慢网上拉，来到角色屁股，最后地绕道角色下巴，看不到整张脸，镜头拉远，看到整个角色上半身，角色在【@图2】场景内开始扭动婀娜多姿的身躯跳舞，西域风格舞蹈
prompts.prompt_zh: 摄像机对着一双玉足，镜头环绕着【@图1】角色，缓慢网上拉，来到角色屁股，最后地绕道角色下巴，看不到整张脸，镜头拉远，看到整个角色上半身，角色在【@图2】场景内开始扭动婀娜多姿的身躯跳舞，西域风格舞蹈

prompts.title: 镜面视角下的清冷少女时尚变装
prompts.prompt:
人物参照：
@Image1
，外貌、发型、体型与参考图完全一致，22–25岁东亚女性，长直黑发，清冷高级感五官，身材紧致匀称，全程保持角色一致性。

核心创意：镜子自拍视角——镜头就是那面镜子，整个视频以第一人称镜面视角呈现，观众感觉自己就是那面镜子在看着她。

0–3s：画面从黑场渐入，镜头模拟镜面视角，
@Image1
女孩以参考图同款姿势出现，身穿奶油白运动套装（立领拉链短夹克+紧身短裤），右手持手机对着镜头（即镜子），她微微侧头打量自己，神情冷淡慵懒，补光灯光晕在镜面上形成唯美光斑，背景是温暖的北欧风家居，壁炉火光跳动，整体氛围安静高级。

3–6s：她放下手机，双手开始慢慢拉开夹克拉链，露出内搭奶油色抹胸，动作慵懒而自然，镜头（镜面）始终正对她的全身，她转过身展示背部，回头用眼神余光瞥了一眼镜子，表情依然冷静，但嘴角有一丝若有若无的上扬，壁炉暖光从侧面打在她腰线上，轮廓感极强。

6–10s：她突然整个人状态切换——从冷淡慵懒瞬间变成活力满满，快速从画面外抓起一件薄如蝉翼的奶油色蕾丝罩衫套上，手势快速利落，然后回头直视镜头（即摄像机），眼神从冷淡变成充满自信与光芒，镜头微微推近捕捉她的眼神变化，这一刻的状态反差是全片爆点，让观众感受到强烈的情绪冲击。

10–14s：她对着镜子（镜头）做出最自然的动作——整理一下发丝、低头看一眼自己的腿、再抬头直视镜头，整个过程完全交由模型自主发挥，呈现一个真实女孩在镜子前最自我的状态，镜头缓慢拉远至全身，壁炉光晕、书架、暖灯全部虚化成唯美光斑背景，她站在画面正中，奶油白造型在暖光中发光，最后定格在她直视镜头的瞬间，嘴角微扬，眼神有故事。

画面规格：9:16竖屏，4K超清，色调奶油暖白+北欧木质棕，镜面第一视角构图，自然手持微晃增加真实感，光线以壁炉暖光+柔光补光为主，无字幕无弹幕无界面，写实电影质感，整体氛围：清冷高级少女感。

prompts.prompt_en:
Character Reference:
@Image1
, appearance, hairstyle, and body type exactly consistent with the reference image, 22-25 year old East Asian female, long straight black hair, cool and sophisticated facial features, tight and well-proportioned figure, maintain character consistency throughout.

Core Concept: Mirror selfie perspective—the lens is the mirror, the entire video is presented from a first-person mirror perspective, making the audience feel like they are the mirror watching her.

0–3s: The image fades in from black, the lens simulates a mirror perspective,
@Image1
the girl appears in the same pose as the reference image, wearing a creamy white sports set (stand-collar zippered short jacket + tight shorts), holding a mobile phone in her right hand facing the lens (i.e., the mirror), she tilts her head slightly to examine herself, expression cool and languid, fill light halos form beautiful bokeh on the mirror surface, background is a warm Nordic-style home, fireplace flames flickering, overall atmosphere quiet and sophisticated.

3–6s: She puts down the phone, both hands start to slowly unzip the jacket, revealing a cream-colored tube top underneath, movements languid and natural, the lens (mirror) remains directly facing her whole body, she turns around to show her back, glances back at the mirror with the corner of her eye, expression still calm, but with a faint smile on her lips, fireplace warm light hits her waistline from the side, creating a strong sense of contour.

6–10s: Her entire state suddenly switches—from cool and languid to instantly full of vitality, quickly grabs a sheer cream-colored lace cover-up (thin as a cicada's wing) from off-screen and puts it on, hand movements fast and sharp, then turns back to look directly at the lens (i.e., the camera), eyes changing from indifferent to full of confidence and radiance, the lens pushes in slightly to capture the change in her eyes, this moment of contrast is the climax of the film, making the audience feel a strong emotional impact.

10–14s: She performs the most natural movements in front of the mirror (lens)—arranging her hair, looking down at her legs, then looking up to stare directly at the lens, the entire process is left to the model's autonomous improvisation to present the most authentic state of a real girl in front of a mirror, the lens slowly pulls back to a full-body shot, fireplace halos, bookshelves, and warm lights all blur into a beautiful bokeh background, she stands in the center of the frame, the creamy white look glows in the warm light, finally freezing on the moment she looks directly at the lens, lips slightly raised, eyes full of stories.

Image Specifications: 9:16 vertical screen, 4K ultra-clear, color tone creamy warm white + Nordic wood brown, mirror first-person composition, natural handheld micro-shake to increase realism, lighting mainly fireplace warm light + soft fill light, no subtitles no bullet screen no interface, realistic cinematic texture, overall atmosphere: cool and sophisticated youthful vibe.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 门禁识别失败女子崩溃瞬间
prompts.prompt: 【图片 1】为门禁监控画面，保持监控摄像头广角机位不变，12秒竖屏视频。 画面中的女子【图片2】对准门禁摄像头准备人脸识别开门，面带期待微笑，等待两秒后门禁发出"嘀——"拒绝提示音，识别失败。女子表情变得困惑，调整站位重新对准摄像头，再次失败，"嘀——"又一声。女子焦急地用手拨开额前头发，踮脚凑近摄像头，第三次识别仍然失败，女子无奈后退一步，低头看手机，然后抬头对着摄像头做出崩溃的表情，单手扶额。 全程固定监控机位，不切镜头，模拟真实门禁摄像头录像质感，画面带轻微广角畸变和噪点。
prompts.prompt_zh: 【图片 1】为门禁监控画面，保持监控摄像头广角机位不变，12秒竖屏视频。 画面中的女子【图片2】对准门禁摄像头准备人脸识别开门，面带期待微笑，等待两秒后门禁发出"嘀——"拒绝提示音，识别失败。女子表情变得困惑，调整站位重新对准摄像头，再次失败，"嘀——"又一声。女子焦急地用手拨开额前头发，踮脚凑近摄像头，第三次识别仍然失败，女子无奈后退一步，低头看手机，然后抬头对着摄像头做出崩溃的表情，单手扶额。 全程固定监控机位，不切镜头，模拟真实门禁摄像头录像质感，画面带轻微广角畸变和噪点。
prompts.prompt_en: 【Image 1】 is the access control monitoring screen, maintaining the fixed wide-angle camera position of the surveillance camera, a 12-second vertical video. The woman in the screen 【Image 2】 aims at the access control camera preparing for face recognition to open the door, with an expectant smile on her face, waiting for two seconds before the access control emits a "beep—" rejection prompt sound, recognition fails. The woman's expression becomes confused, she adjusts her position to realign with the camera, fails again, "beep—" another sound. The woman anxiously uses her hand to brush away the hair on her forehead, stands on tiptoe to get closer to the camera, the third recognition still fails. The woman helplessly steps back, lowers her head to look at her phone, then raises her head to make a breakdown expression at the camera, with one hand supporting her forehead. Throughout the process, the surveillance camera position is fixed, no cuts, simulating the texture of real access control camera recording, the screen has slight wide-angle distortion and noise.
prompts.author: @msjiaozhu

prompts.title: 闪灵破门镜头实拍级还原
prompts.prompt:
基于电影《闪灵》（The Shining）经典“劈门”段落进行镜头语言级复刻，镜头角度、景别、节奏与原片保持一致，写实电影

【镜头一｜4s】
门内视角｜角落中的恐惧

参考图像：@图2 @图3

景别：中近景

机位位置：摄影机位于门内房间，靠近室内墙面

构图与方位（关键）：镜头对准蹲在房间角落的人物，人物位于画面右侧偏中位置，白色木质酒店门位于画面左侧，门板以侧面角度进入画面，并非正对镜头

画面内容：消防斧从画面左侧外部劈入，斧刃横向闯入画面左侧，木屑飞溅至画面中部

人物表演：人物缩在角落，身体紧贴墙面，视线朝向门的方向，看到斧头破门而入瞬间，表情极度恐惧，失声大哭，身体本能后缩
台词：@图2和@图3极度惊恐的说：no…please，no....no！
镜头运动：固定镜头

约束：镜头重心始终在门内人物身上

【镜头二｜3s】
门外走廊｜手持侧拍劈门

prompts.prompt_zh:
基于电影《闪灵》（The Shining）经典“劈门”段落进行镜头语言级复刻，镜头角度、景别、节奏与原片保持一致，写实电影

【镜头一｜4s】
门内视角｜角落中的恐惧

参考图像：@图2 @图3

景别：中近景

机位位置：摄影机位于门内房间，靠近室内墙面

构图与方位（关键）：镜头对准蹲在房间角落的人物，人物位于画面右侧偏中位置，白色木质酒店门位于画面左侧，门板以侧面角度进入画面，并非正对镜头

画面内容：消防斧从画面左侧外部劈入，斧刃横向闯入画面左侧，木屑飞溅至画面中部

人物表演：人物缩在角落，身体紧贴墙面，视线朝向门的方向，看到斧头破门而入瞬间，表情极度恐惧，失声大哭，身体本能后缩
台词：@图2和@图3极度惊恐的说：no…please，no....no！

约束：镜头重心始终在门内人物身上

prompts.prompt_en:
Recreate shot-by-shot the classic "axe-splitting door" scene from the film The Shining, maintaining consistency with the original in shot angle, framing, rhythm, and style. Realistic cinematic style.
Shot 1 | 4s
View from inside the room | Fear in the corner
Reference images: @Fig 2 @Fig 3
Shot size: Medium close-up
Camera position: Inside the room, close to the interior wall
Composition and direction (critical):
Camera frames the character crouching in the corner of the room.
Character is positioned slightly right of center.
White wooden hotel door is on the left side of the frame, visible in profile, not facing the camera directly.
Content:
Fire axe chops into the frame from outside the left side.
Axe blade enters horizontally from the left; wood splinters fly toward the center.
Performance:
Character huddles in the corner, back pressed against the wall, eyes fixed on the door.
At the moment the axe breaks through, expression shows extreme terror, silent crying, body recoils instinctively.
Line:
(Extremely terrified, as in @Fig 2 and @Fig 3)
no…please, no....no!
Camera movement: Static shot
Constraint:
Camera focus remains on the character inside the room at all times.
Shot 2 | 3s
Hallway outside the door | Handheld side shot of axe splitting door
Reference image: @Fig 1
Shot size: Medium shot
Camera position: In the hallway outside, to the character’s right
Angle: Side view, showing the character’s body and the fire axe
Camera movement (core): Handheld, tracking the movement of the axe head
Visual performance:
Axe naturally enters and exits the frame during swings, sometimes near the edge of the frame.
Content:
Subject repeatedly and forcefully chops the white wooden hotel door.
Door panel gradually breaks apart.
Character state:
Actions are rough, continuous, and increasingly out of control.
Shot 3 | 3s
Close-up of door crack | Maniacal face reveal
Reference image: @Fig 1
Shot size: Close-up
Camera position and angle: Camera directly facing the cracked door gap
Content:
Door is split open to form a narrow gap.
Subject’s face slowly emerges from the gap.
Performance:
Cold, maniacal smile; eyes staring directly into the camera.
Line:
(Whispered)
“Here is...”
On “Johnny”, voice rises sharply with eerie excitement.
Upon seeing this, @Fig 2 looks terrified and slaps @Fig 1’s head back out of the gap.
Global Settings
White wooden hotel door
Calm, oppressive, realistic cinematic texture
No excessive environmental stylization
Performance, composition, and rhythm strictly reference only the original The Shining
prompts.author: @rionaifantasy

prompts.title: 阳光下男孩专注组装乐高的童趣时光
prompts.prompt: 男孩子在房间里认真组装乐高积木，画面采用3D动画风格，色彩鲜艳，线条流畅，充满童趣和活力，加入延时摄影效果展示组装过程。 0-3秒：房间全景，阳光透过窗户洒在桌面上，男孩子坐在桌前专注地组装乐高积木，表情认真，镜头缓慢推近 3-6秒：延时摄影效果展示男孩子快速拼接乐高积木的动作，积木块在他手中逐渐成型，镜头切换到不同角度 6-9秒：手部特写，展示男孩子熟练地拼接乐高积木的细节，手指灵活地操作积木块，镜头跟随手部动作移动 9-12秒：延时摄影效果继续展示组装过程，积木作品逐渐变得完整，男孩子的表情从专注到满意 12-15秒：男孩子抬起头，露出满意的笑容，镜头拉远展示他已经完成的乐高作品。
prompts.prompt_zh: 男孩子在房间里认真组装乐高积木，画面采用3D动画风格，色彩鲜艳，线条流畅，充满童趣和活力，加入延时摄影效果展示组装过程。 0-3秒：房间全景，阳光透过窗户洒在桌面上，男孩子坐在桌前专注地组装乐高积木，表情认真，镜头缓慢推近 3-6秒：延时摄影效果展示男孩子快速拼接乐高积木的动作，积木块在他手中逐渐成型，镜头切换到不同角度 6-9秒：手部特写，展示男孩子熟练地拼接乐高积木的细节，手指灵活地操作积木块，镜头跟随手部动作移动 9-12秒：延时摄影效果继续展示组装过程，积木作品逐渐变得完整，男孩子的表情从专注到满意 12-15秒：男孩子抬起头，露出满意的笑容，镜头拉远展示他已经完成的乐高作品。
prompts.prompt_en: A boy is seriously assembling Lego bricks in the room, the picture adopts a 3D animation style, bright colors, smooth lines, full of childlike fun and vitality, adding a time-lapse photography effect to show the assembly process. 0-3 seconds: Room panoramic view, sunlight spills onto the tabletop through the window, the boy sits at the table concentrating on assembling Lego bricks, expression is serious, camera slowly zooms in. 3-6 seconds: Time-lapse photography effect shows the boy quickly snapping Lego bricks together, the blocks gradually take shape in his hands, camera switches to different angles. 6-9 seconds: Hand close-up, showing details of the boy skillfully assembling Lego bricks, fingers flexibly operating the blocks, camera follows hand movements. 9-12 seconds: Time-lapse photography effect continues to show the assembly process, the Lego work gradually becomes complete, the boy's expression changes from focused to satisfied. 12-15 seconds: The boy raises his head, revealing a satisfied smile, camera zooms out to show his completed Lego work.

prompts.title: 阿尼亚爆发怪力回旋踢击溃众敌
prompts.prompt: 使用 Seedance 2.0 生成一段视频，内容关于阿尼亚·福杰嘴部的极度特写，戏剧性布光，平稳的呼吸。她的嘴唇带着绝对的信念颤动，用英语说道：“Anya will defeat all the villains.”（阿尼亚将打败所有的反派）。眼睛和眉毛中微妙的微表情，下巴轻微紧张。镜头伴随急剧的甩镜头后拉，并开始 180° 旋转，展现出阿尼亚坚定的站姿，双脚稳稳地扎根于地面。在背景中，几名强壮的男人向她冲来，营造出一种迫在眉睫的威胁感。灰尘和环境颗粒动态地对他们的动作做出反应。阿尼亚猛击地面并扯出一大块地板，裂缝向四面八方蔓延。一个强烈的冲击帧强调了她意想不到的力量。她紧接着一个回旋踢：– 打击开始时慢动作，肌肉完全调动，头发和衣服随风反应。– 动作结束时突然加速。地板块被踢向那些男人。快速剪辑展示连续的撞击，身体被向后抛出并倒下，彻底被击败。尘云升起，撞击声在空间中回荡。镜头定格在前景中的阿尼亚身上，姿势自信，环境仍因攻击的力量而震动。视觉风格：2D 动画作画，超流畅的逐帧动画，强烈的物理重量感，连续的电影感运镜，无人工动态模糊。基调参考：间谍过家家。
prompts.prompt_zh: 使用 Seedance 2.0 生成一段视频，内容关于阿尼亚·福杰嘴部的极度特写，戏剧性布光，平稳的呼吸。她的嘴唇带着绝对的信念颤动，用英语说道：“Anya will defeat all the villains.”（阿尼亚将打败所有的反派）。眼睛和眉毛中微妙的微表情，下巴轻微紧张。镜头伴随急剧的甩镜头后拉，并开始 180° 旋转，展现出阿尼亚坚定的站姿，双脚稳稳地扎根于地面。在背景中，几名强壮的男人向她冲来，营造出一种迫在眉睫的威胁感。灰尘和环境颗粒动态地对他们的动作做出反应。阿尼亚猛击地面并扯出一大块地板，裂缝向四面八方蔓延。一个强烈的冲击帧强调了她意想不到的力量。她紧接着一个回旋踢：– 打击开始时慢动作，肌肉完全调动，头发和衣服随风反应。– 动作结束时突然加速。地板块被踢向那些男人。快速剪辑展示连续的撞击，身体被向后抛出并倒下，彻底被击败。尘云升起，撞击声在空间中回荡。镜头定格在前景中的阿尼亚身上，姿势自信，环境仍因攻击的力量而震动。视觉风格：2D 动画作画，超流畅的逐帧动画，强烈的物理重量感，连续的电影感运镜，无人工动态模糊。基调参考：间谍过家家。
prompts.prompt_en: Use Seedance 2.0 to generate a video about Extreme close-up on the mouth of Anya Forger, dramatic lighting, steady breathing. Her lips move with absolute conviction as she says in English: “Anya will defeat all the villains.” Subtle micro-expressions in her eyes and eyebrows, slight tension in the jaw. The camera pulls back with a sharp whip pan and begins a 180° rotation, revealing Anya in a determined stance, feet firmly planted on the ground. In the background, several strong men rush toward her, creating an imminent sense of threat. Dust and environmental particles react dynamically to their movement. Anya slams her hand into the ground and rips out a large chunk of the floor, cracks spreading outward in all directions. A strong impact frame emphasizes her unexpected strength. She immediately follows with a spinning kick: – Slow motion at the start of the strike, muscles fully engaged, hair and clothing reacting to the wind. – A sudden acceleration at the end of the motion. The chunk of floor is launched toward the men. Rapid cuts show consecutive impacts, bodies being thrown backward and collapsing, completely defeated. Dust clouds rise, impact sounds echo through the space. The camera settles on Anya in the foreground, confident posture, the environment still vibrating from the force of the attack. Visual style: 2D anime sakuga, ultra-fluid frame-by-frame animation, strong sense of physical weight, continuous cinematic camera, no artificial motion blur. Tonal reference: Spy x Family.
prompts.author: @NACHOS2D_

prompts.title: 隔着屏幕的极致暧昧与温柔挑逗
prompts.prompt:
镜头保持主观视角（POV）指尖轻轻拂过镜头边缘，带着一点微凉的触感，布料轻轻蹭过的声音细得像耳语。
她弯着眼，声音温柔地贴过来：
“又在偷偷看我啦？”

下一秒，她忽然靠近，发梢几乎要扫过镜头，暖融融的气息隔着画面都能感觉到。
她略带挑逗的尾音带着一点故意的勾人：
“看够了没有呀……
不如……
好好看看我。”

睫毛轻轻垂了垂，再抬眼时，眼底全是笑意，安静得只剩下彼此的呼吸。

prompts.prompt_en: The camera maintains a subjective perspective (POV), fingertips gently brushing the edge of the lens, carrying a slight cool touch, the sound of fabric gently brushing past is as fine as a whisper. She bends her eyes, her voice gently sticking close: "Peeking at me again?" The next second, she suddenly leans closer, hair tips almost sweeping across the lens, the warm breath can be felt even through the screen. Her slightly teasing ending tone carries a bit of deliberate seduction: "Have you seen enough... How about... take a good look at me." Eyelashes gently lower, and when she raises her eyes again, the bottom of her eyes is full of smiling intent, quiet enough to only hear each other's breathing.

prompts.title: 雨夜电话亭的孤独守望
prompts.prompt:
【电影风格】：90年代香港文艺片风格（90s Hong Kong Art Cinema），复古胶片感，高感光度噪点（High ISO Grain），暧昧的黄绿色调（Yellow-Green Tint），抽帧效果（Step-printing），忧郁氛围。

【核心台词（用于控制情绪）】：“如果记忆是一个罐头，我希望它永远不会过期。”

【视频时长】：10秒
【分镜脚本】：

[00:00-00:04] 镜头1：隔着玻璃的窥视（Through the Glass）。
画面：一个满是雨水的红色公用电话亭。
人物：一位穿着卡其色风衣的男士（或女士），手里紧握着听筒，并没有说话，只是在听。
情绪表演：通过玻璃的折射，看到他/她的眼神空洞而深情。雨水在玻璃上流淌，把他的脸扭曲得像一幅油画。
字幕/旁白感：画面仿佛凝固，只有雨声。

[00:04-00:07] 镜头2：极度特写与微表情（Extreme Close-up & Micro-expression）。
画面：聚焦于人物的嘴唇和半张脸。
动作：他/她轻轻对着话筒低语。嘴唇微微颤动，似乎想说什么又咽了回去。
光影：路边的霓虹灯光斑（Bokeh）在他的脸上流转，忽明忽暗。
台词情绪映射：表现出一种“想触碰又收回手”的极致克制和孤独。

[00:07-00:10] 镜头3：标志性的慢快门拖影（Signature Smeary Slow Motion）。
画面：人物挂断电话，转身走入雨夜的人群中。
视觉特效：使用抽帧效果（Stop-motion feel），人物的背影变得模糊且有拖影（Motion Blur），仿佛灵魂留在了原地，只有身体在走。
环境：背景是流动的城市车灯，形成拉长的光轨。

【技术参数】：模拟手持摄影（Handheld Camera），浅景深，色彩偏移，情感浓郁。

画面：一个满是雨水的红色公用电话亭。
人物：一位穿着卡其色风衣的男士（或女士），手里紧握着听筒，并没有说话，只是在听。
情绪表演：通过玻璃的折射，看到他/她的眼神空洞而深情。雨水在玻璃上流淌，把他的脸扭曲得像一幅油画。
字幕/旁白感：画面仿佛凝固，只有雨声。

[00:04-00:07] 镜头2：极度特写与微表情（Extreme Close-up & Micro-expression）。
画面：聚焦于人物的嘴唇和半张脸。
动作：他/她轻轻对着话筒低语。嘴唇微微颤动，似乎想说什么又咽了回去。
光影：路边的霓虹灯光斑（Bokeh）在他的脸上流转，忽明忽暗。
台词情绪映射：表现出一种“想触碰又收回手”的极致克制和孤独。

[00:07-00:10] 镜头3：标志性的慢快门拖影（Signature Smeary Slow Motion）。
画面：人物挂断电话，转身走入雨夜的人群中。
视觉特效：使用抽帧效果（Stop-motion feel），人物的背影变得模糊且有拖影（Motion Blur），仿佛灵魂留在了原地，只有身体在走。
环境：背景是流动的城市车灯，形成拉长的光轨。

【技术参数】：模拟手持摄影（Handheld Camera），浅景深，色彩偏移，情感浓郁。
prompts.prompt_en:
【Movie Style】: 90s Hong Kong Art Cinema, Retro film look, High ISO Grain, Yellow-Green Tint, Step-printing, Melancholic atmosphere.
【Core Lines (for emotion control)】: "If memory is a can, I hope it never expires."
【Video Duration】: 10 seconds
【Storyboard Script】:

[00:00-00:04] Shot 1: Through the Glass.
Scene: A red public phone booth full of rain.
Character: A man (or woman) wearing a khaki trench coat, holding the receiver tightly, not speaking, just listening.
Emotional Performance: Through the refraction of the glass, seeing his/her eyes hollow yet affectionate. Rainwater flows on the glass, twisting his/her face like an oil painting.
Subtitle/Voiceover Sense: The picture seems frozen, only the sound of rain.

[00:04-00:07] Shot 2: Extreme Close-up & Micro-expression.
Scene: Focusing on the character's lips and half of the face.
Action: He/She whispers softly into the microphone. Lips trembling slightly, as if wanting to say something but swallowing it back.
Light & Shadow: Roadside neon light bokeh flows on his face, flickering between bright and dark.
Line Emotion Mapping: Expressing the extreme restraint and loneliness of "wanting to touch but withdrawing the hand".

[00:07-00:10] Shot 3: Signature Smeary Slow Motion.
Scene: The character hangs up the phone, turns around and walks into the crowd in the rainy night.
Visual Effects: Using stop-motion feel, the character's back becomes blurry with motion blur, as if the soul stayed in place, only the body walking.
Environment: The background is flowing city car lights, forming elongated light trails.

【Technical Parameters】: Simulate Handheld Camera, Shallow depth of field, Color shift, Rich emotion.
prompts.author: @johnAGI168

prompts.title: 雨夜豪门虐恋燕子离去男主崩溃
prompts.prompt: 【风格】国产爆款短剧（Viral Short Drama），竖屏构图（9:16 Portrait Ratio），极致虐心（Melodramatic），雨夜街头，高对比度霓虹光影，手持摄影晃动感。 【时长】15秒 【角色】卑微男主（浑身湿透，头发凌乱，欲哭无泪）VS 决绝女主“燕子”（妆容精致，冷漠脸）。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：决绝登车（The Departure）。 暴雨夜的繁华街头。一辆黑色劳斯莱斯（或迈克尔巴赫）停在路边，后座车门打开。女主冷漠地甩开男主拉扯的手，头也不回地坐进豪车后排。男主扒着车窗哭喊，被保镖无情拉开。车门重重关上。 【男主状态】满脸泪水与雨水交织，眼神绝望。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：撕心裂肺的追逐（The Chase & The Meme Line）。 豪车起步加速驶离。男主不顾一切地在后面狂奔追赶，踉踉跄跄，鞋子都跑掉一只。镜头紧跟男主脸部特写，疯狂晃动。他一边跑一边冲着远去的车尾灯嘶吼。 【核心台词口型指导】男主崩溃大喊：“燕子！燕子！你不要走！你走了我可怎么办啊！”（表情极其痛苦扭曲）。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：绝望跪地（The Despair）。 豪车的尾灯消失在街角尽头。男主体力不支，重重地跪倒在湿漉漉的柏油马路上，对着空荡荡的街道捶胸顿足，嚎啕大哭。镜头慢慢拉高俯拍，显得他无比渺小和凄凉。雨水不断打在他身上。

prompts.prompt_en:
【Style】Viral Short Drama, 9:16 Portrait Ratio, Melodramatic, Rainy night street, High contrast neon lighting, Handheld camera shake.
【Duration】15 seconds
【Characters】Humble male lead (soaked, messy hair, wanting to cry but no tears) VS Resolute female lead "Yanzi" (exquisite makeup, indifferent face).
[00:00-00:05] Shot 1: The Departure. Busy street on a stormy night. A black Rolls-Royce (or Maybach) parked by the roadside, rear door opens. Female lead coldly shakes off the male lead's pulling hand, gets into the back seat of the luxury car without looking back. Male lead clings to the car window crying and shouting, ruthlessly pulled away by bodyguards. Car door slams shut heavily. 【Male Lead Status】Face covered in intermingled tears and rain, despair in eyes.
[00:05-00:10] Shot 2: The Chase & The Meme Line. Luxury car starts accelerating to drive away. Male lead desperately runs and chases behind, stumbling, losing one shoe. Camera follows male lead's face close-up, shaking violently. He shouts at the receding taillights while running. 【Core Dialogue Lip-sync Guide】Male lead breaks down shouting: "Yanzi! Yanzi! Don't leave! What will I do if you leave!" (Expression extremely painful and twisted).
[00:10-00:15] Shot 3: The Despair. Taillights of the luxury car disappear at the end of the street corner. Male lead collapses from exhaustion, heavily kneeling on the wet asphalt road, beating his chest and stamping his feet facing the empty street, crying loudly. Camera slowly pulls up for a high-angle shot, making him look incredibly tiny and desolate. Rain continuously beats on him.

prompts.title: 雨夜霓虹下的甜美回眸少女
prompts.prompt: 低质量智能手机视频博客素材，手持相机摇晃的主观视角。一个年轻、绝美的女孩，拥有冷白皮肤和既天真又诱惑的气质，正在雨夜的潮湿街道上走在前面，身穿一件超大号复古厚实冬季毛衣。五颜六色的霓虹灯反射在潮湿的路面上。高 ISO 噪点，动态运动模糊。她突然停下，转过头带着延迟自动对焦效果直视镜头，露出随性、甜美且略带羞涩的微笑。她松散半扎的长发因细雨而微湿。然后她走到离镜头非常近的地方，顽皮地将一缕湿发别在耳后。业余构图，镜头光晕，重度视频颗粒，贯穿整个连续镜头的原始且未经修饰的抓拍美学。

prompts.prompt_en: Low quality smartphone vlog footage， shaky handheld camera POV. A young， ultra-beautiful girl with cool white skin and an innocent yet seductive aura is walking ahead on a wet street on a rainy night， wearing an oversized vintage chunky winter sweater. Colorful neon lights reflect on the wet pavement. High ISO noise， dynamic motion blur. She suddenly stops， turns her head back to look directly at the camera with a delayed autofocus effect， giving a casual， sweet， and slightly shy smile. Her loosely semi-tied long hair is slightly wet from the drizzle. She then steps very close to the lens， playfully tucking a wet strand of hair behind her ear. Amateur framing， lens flares， heavy video grain， raw and unpolished snapshot aesthetic throughout the entire continuous shot.

prompts.title: 雨夜霓虹下的胶片回眸少女
prompts.prompt: 电影胶片质感高清摄影，手持跟拍视角。雨夜湿漉漉的街道上。 一位皮肤冷白、气质纯真又带点诱惑的绝美少女走在前方，穿着一件灰色宽松针织毛衣。 彩色霓虹灯光在湿漉漉的路面上反射，高感光度带来的细腻胶片颗粒感，动态运动模糊。 她突然停下脚步，回头直视镜头，带有延迟对焦效果，露出随性、甜美又略带羞涩的微笑，半扎起的长发被细雨微微打湿。 随后她靠近镜头，使用0.5倍慢镜头，俏皮地将一缕湿发别到耳后。 全程采用业余构图，镜头光晕，厚重的胶片颗粒感，保持原始、未经修饰的电影胶片快照美学。

prompts.title: 雨夜霓虹副驾的温柔凝视
prompts.prompt: 真人写实风格，竖屏，第一人称驾驶座视角。夜晚车内，挡风玻璃上雨滴滑落，外面霓虹灯光模糊成光晕。副驾驶座上坐着一位气质优雅的年轻亚洲女性，栗色波浪长发，穿着米色针织开衫和黑色吊带，精致的锁骨若隐若现。动作描述：她先是看着窗外出神，然后慢慢转头看向镜头，嘴角上扬带着温柔的笑意轻声说：在想什么呢，这么认真地看着我。她伸手撩了撩头发，另一只手自然地放在腿上。镜头缓缓下移，她修长的双腿交叠，脱下一只黑色细跟高跟鞋，赤脚轻轻晃动。车内氛围暧昧温馨，光影层次丰富，电影级画质。

prompts.prompt_en: Photorealistic style, vertical screen, first-person driver's seat perspective. Nighttime inside the car, raindrops sliding down the windshield, outside neon lights blurred into halos. A young Asian woman with an elegant temperament sits in the passenger seat, chestnut wavy long hair, wearing a beige knitted cardigan and a black camisole, with delicate collarbones faintly visible. Action description: She first looks out the window in a trance, then slowly turns her head to look at the camera, the corners of her mouth raised with a gentle smile as she whispers softly: What are you thinking about, looking at me so seriously. She reaches out to brush her hair, the other hand naturally placed on her leg. The camera slowly pans down, her slender legs are crossed, taking off a black stiletto high heel, barefoot gently swaying. Ambiguous and warm atmosphere inside the car, rich layers of light and shadow, cinematic quality.

prompts.title: 雨夜霸总深情虐恋大戏
prompts.prompt: 【风格】国产热门短剧风（Mini-Drama Style），极致快剪节奏，高颜值滤镜，情绪爆发，雨夜唯美虐心。 【时长】15秒 【角色】深情霸总男主（黑风衣，湿发，眼眶通红）VS 倔强破碎感女主（白裙，满脸泪痕）。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：冲突快切组合（Rapid Cuts）。 暴雨街头。女主决绝转身要走（背影）。男主冲上来一把拉住她的手腕（特写）。女主猛然回头，眼神是爱恨交织的痛苦。 【对白口型指导】女主哭喊：“放手！我们结束了！” [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：真相爆发（Intense Close-ups）。 男主死不放手，雨水在两人脸上横流。男主急切地从怀里掏出一枚戒指（或一份报告），举到她眼前，手指颤抖。 【对白口型指导】男主嘶吼：“你看清楚！我从来没有骗过你！” [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：情感决堤（Climax）。 女主看清手中之物的瞬间，瞳孔地震（极近特写），捂住嘴巴，防线崩溃。下一秒，男主猛地将她拉入怀中死死抱住，仿佛要揉进骨子里。镜头快速旋转环绕拍摄相拥的两人。 【对白口型指导】女主埋头痛哭（无声/呜咽）。

prompts.prompt_en: 【Style】Domestic popular mini-drama style (Mini-Drama Style), extreme fast-cut rhythm, high visual beauty filter, emotional explosion, aesthetic and heart-wrenching rainy night. 【Duration】15 seconds 【Character】Deeply affectionate domineering CEO male lead (black trench coat, wet hair, red eyes) VS stubborn and broken female lead (white dress, face full of tears). [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Conflict rapid cut combination (Rapid Cuts). Stormy street. Female lead resolutely turns around to leave (back view). Male lead rushes up and grabs her wrist (close-up). Female lead suddenly turns back, eyes filled with pain of love and hate intertwined. 【Lip Sync Guide】Female lead cries and shouts: "Let go! We are over!" [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Truth explosion (Intense Close-ups). Male lead refuses to let go, rain flowing across both faces. Male lead hurriedly takes out a ring (or a report) from his bosom, holds it up in front of her eyes, fingers trembling. 【Lip Sync Guide】Male lead roars: "Look clearly! I have never lied to you!" [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Emotional bursting dyke (Climax). The moment female lead sees the object in her hand, pupils quake (extreme close-up), covers her mouth, defense line collapses. Next second, male lead suddenly pulls her into his arms and holds her tight, as if wanting to rub her into his bones. Camera rapidly rotates and orbits around the embracing couple. 【Lip Sync Guide】Female lead buries head and cries (silent/whimpering).

prompts.title: 雪域极速：电影感滑雪的青春激荡
prompts.prompt: 请基于提供的参考图生成一个滑雪视频，整体风格明亮、清爽、充满运动活力，画面流畅，镜头语言偏电影感。 时间轴与镜头设计如下： \\n 0–3 秒 图片人物在雪地中微笑看向镜头。镜头轻微晃动，雪花飘落。背景风声逐渐增强，画面中出现快速掠过的风雪流动感。  \\n3–5 秒 快速切镜头到图片人物脚下的大特写，滑雪板扣紧的瞬间，雪被踩碎。同时镜头抬升，画面衔接成陡峭雪坡的俯视视角，坡度明显，速度感即将爆发。\\n 5–8 秒 图片人物从高处高速滑下。镜头一为侧前方中景跟拍，身体前倾、动作利落；镜头二切到俯视镜头，陡坡向下延伸，雪道线条飞快拉伸，速度感极强。  \\n8–11 秒 连续快速切换镜头。 低角度贴地镜头，滑雪板掠过雪面，雪粉被高速抛起； 远景展示人物在陡坡上做出漂亮转弯动作，身体与雪线形成流畅曲线。 \\n11–13 秒 镜头回到正前方跟拍，图片人物高速冲向镜头方向，滑行到近距离急转弯，雪被大幅掀起。\\n13–15 秒 大量雪粉直接溅到镜头上，画面被白色雪雾覆盖，镜头短暂失焦后定格，留下强烈动态余韵。 整体强调速度、切镜头节奏、真实运动感与青春活力，画面明亮、不沉重，突出滑雪的刺激与自由感。

prompts.prompt_en:
Please generate a skiing video based on the provided reference image. The overall style is bright, refreshing, and full of sports vitality, with smooth visuals and cinematic camera language. The timeline and shot design are as follows: 
 0-3 seconds: The character in the image smiles at the camera in the snow. The camera shakes slightly, and snowflakes fall. The background wind sound gradually increases, and a sense of fast-moving wind and snow flow appears in the frame. 
 3-5 seconds: Quickly cut to a big close-up of the character's feet, the moment the ski bindings are tightened, and the snow is crushed. At the same time, the camera rises, transitioning the frame to a top-down view of a steep snowy slope, with a clear gradient, suggesting that a sense of speed is about to explode. 
 5-8 seconds: The character in the image slides down from a high place at high speed. Shot 1 is a tracking shot from the front-side medium distance, with the body leaning forward and movements clean; Shot 2 cuts to an overhead view, the steep slope extends downwards, the lines of the snow track stretch rapidly, creating an extremely strong sense of speed. 
 8-11 seconds: Continuous rapid shot switching. Low-angle ground-level shot, skis gliding over the snow surface, snow powder being thrown up at high speed; Long shot shows the character making a beautiful turning motion on the steep slope, the body and snow lines forming smooth curves. 
 11-13 seconds: The camera returns to a front tracking shot, the character in the image rushes towards the camera at high speed, slides to a close range and makes a sharp turn, snow is lifted up significantly. 
 13-15 seconds: A large amount of snow powder splashes directly onto the lens, the frame is covered by white snow mist, the lens briefly loses focus and then freezes, leaving a strong dynamic aftertaste. The overall emphasis is on speed, cutting rhythm, realistic sense of movement, and youthful vitality; the visuals are bright and not heavy, highlighting the thrill and freedom of skiing.

prompts.title: 雪夜死斗：双剑与伞影的极致碰撞
prompts.prompt: 15秒的电影级CG短片，场景是覆雪的破败演武场，细雪纷飞。 【@图1】手持双剑，面容清冷。 【@图2】持伞，没有打开，神情阴郁。 【@图2】与【@图1】在雪中对峙，下一刹那战斗爆发。 【@图1】化为残影突刺，剑分三点寒星； 【@图2】只用伞格挡，炸开红白火星。 紧接着把伞尖像枪般刺出，暗影突刺连绵不绝，而剑影灵动，在枪影中穿梭格挡，带起道道冰晶轨迹。 【@图1】踏碎地面，挥动双剑斩出新月般的巨大十字斩剑气， 【@图2】打开伞，高速旋转以伞面迎击 最终镜头慢动作定格：旋转的伞如同利刃与剑尖悍然对撞！ 一半是暗色如潮，一半是冰霜汇聚，两股能量形成一个剧烈波动的能量球，将周围一切排开湮灭。 特写两人面孔：【@图1】眼神决绝，额前汗珠成霜；【@图2】战意沸腾，嘴角溢血。 画面在此永恒对峙。 电影级写实渲染，皮肤与布料细节，夸张的动态模糊与速度残影，粒子特效，体积光，史诗构图。

prompts.prompt_en: 15-second cinematic CG short film, the scene is a snow-covered dilapidated martial arts arena, fine snow drifting. [Image 1] holding dual swords, face is cold and indifferent. [Image 2] holding an umbrella, not opened, expression is gloomy. [Image 2] and [Image 1] confront each other in the snow, in the next instant battle erupts. [Image 1] turns into an afterimage thrust, sword separates into three cold stars; [Image 2] uses only the umbrella to block, exploding red and white sparks. Immediately thrusts the umbrella tip out like a gun, continuous shadow thrusts, while sword shadows are agile, shuttling and parrying within the gun shadows, raising trails of ice crystal trajectories. [Image 1] stomps shattering the ground, swings dual swords unleashing a crescent-like huge cross-slash sword energy, [Image 2] opens the umbrella, rotating at high speed to meet the attack with the umbrella surface. Final shot slow-motion freeze-frame: rotating umbrella like a sharp blade clashes fiercely with the sword tip! One half is darkness like a tide, one half is gathered frost, two forces form a violently fluctuating energy ball, pushing away and annihilating everything around. Close-up of both faces: [Image 1] eyes are resolute, sweat on forehead turns to frost; [Image 2] fighting spirit is boiling, blood overflows from corner of mouth. Picture freezes in this eternal confrontation. Cinematic realistic rendering, skin and fabric details, exaggerated motion blur and speed afterimages, particle effects, volumetric lighting, epic composition.
prompts.author: @liyue_ai

prompts.title: 雪山之巅霸道剑主怒吼万剑归宗
prompts.prompt:
人物设定：@男主，现代装束（黑色风衣或深色长款外套，发型自然凌乱），气质冷峻霸道，眼神如刃，全程保持角色一致性。

0–3s：极致面部特写，@男主立于雪山之巅，凛冽寒风吹动发丝与风衣衣角，左手负于身后，右手缓缓抬起指向苍天，镜头锁定他的眼睛——眼神从冷静到爆发，瞳孔中倒映着翻滚雷云，嘴型清晰怒吼「剑来！」二字，声音与画面同步震撼，体积光从云层缝隙穿透打在他脸上，轮廓感极强。

3–7s：镜头以极速无缝广角推远切换至上帝俯瞰视角，雪山之巅的@男主身影迅速缩小至画面中心一个黑点，镜头持续拉远展现宏伟现代都市全景——摩天大楼、立交桥、霓虹灯尽收眼底，整座城市在雷云笼罩下气氛压抑震撼，雷云滚滚电闪雷鸣，天空呈现冷青钢铁质感。

7–12s：万千长剑从城市各处破空飞出——穿透玻璃幕墙、刺穿柏油路面、从地铁站台腾空而起，数以万计的长剑在雷云翻滚的天空中盘旋聚集，剑身在电光中反射出冷白光芒，规模史诗震撼，镜头从俯瞰切回@男主中景，他立于风暴中心岿然不动，风衣在狂风中剧烈翻飞，眼神直视前方霸气咆哮，右手指向远处，无数长剑随他的动作呼啸而去。

12–15s：镜头缓慢推近@男主背影全景，他站在雪山之巅俯瞰万剑归位的壮观景象，体积光从乌云中爆裂倾泻，打在他的肩背上形成强烈轮廓光，他缓缓转头，侧脸在电光与体积光的交织中轮廓分明，嘴型清晰低沉吐出：「天不生仲尼，万古如长夜。」话音落下，画面定格，万剑悬停于空中纹丝不动，四周陷入死寂，唯有雪山风声与远处雷鸣余震回荡。

画面规格：8K超高清，冷青钢铁色调，电影级光影，体积光效果贯穿全程，电影胶片颗粒，硬核现代武林风，史诗级规模，写实风格。

12–15s：镜头缓慢推近@男主背影全景，他站在雪山之巅俯瞰万剑归位的壮观景象，体积光从乌云中爆裂倾泻，打在他的肩背上形成强烈轮廓光，他缓缓转头，侧脸在电光与体积光的交织中轮廓分明，嘴型清晰低沉吐出：「天不生仲尼，万古如长夜。」话音落下，画面定格，万剑悬停于空中纹丝不动，四周陷入死寂，唯有雪山风声与远处雷鸣余震回荡。

画面规格：8K超高清，冷青钢铁色调，电影级光影，体积光效果贯穿全程，电影胶片颗粒，硬核现代武林风，史诗级规模，写实风格。
prompts.prompt_en:
Character Design: @MaleLead, modern attire (black trench coat or dark long coat, naturally messy hair), cold and domineering temperament, eyes like blades, consistent character throughout.

0–3s: Extreme facial close-up, @MaleLead stands at the peak of a snow mountain, biting cold wind blowing hair and trench coat hem, left hand behind back, right hand slowly raising to point at the sky, camera locks onto his eyes—expression shifting from calm to explosive, pupils reflecting rolling thunderclouds, mouth clearly shouting "Sword Come!" two words, sound and visuals synchronized in shock, volumetric light penetrates cloud gaps hitting his face, strong contour definition.

3–7s: Camera switches at high speed and seamlessly with a wide-angle zoom-out to a God's eye view, @MaleLead's figure on the snow peak rapidly shrinks to a black dot in the center, camera continues pulling back to reveal a magnificent modern city panorama—skyscrapers, overpasses, neon lights all in view, the entire city under shrouding thunderclouds creating an oppressive and shocking atmosphere, rolling thunderclouds with lightning flashes, sky presents a cold cyan steel texture.

7–12s: Thousands of long swords fly out from all over the city—piercing glass curtain walls, stabbing through asphalt roads, soaring from subway platforms, tens of thousands of long swords circle and gather in the thundercloud-filled sky, sword bodies reflecting cold white light in the electric flashes, epic and shocking scale, camera cuts from overhead back to @MaleLead medium shot, he stands motionless in the storm center, trench coat fluttering violently in the gale, eyes staring forward with domineering roar, right hand pointing into the distance, countless long swords whistling away with his movement.

12–15s: Camera slowly zooms in on @MaleLead's back full shot, he stands on the snow peak overlooking the spectacular scene of ten thousand swords returning, volumetric light bursts and pours from dark clouds, hitting his shoulders and back forming strong rim light, he slowly turns his head, side profile distinct in the interweaving of electric light and volumetric light, mouth clearly speaking in a low deep voice: "If Heaven does not birth Zhongni, eternity is like a long night." Voice falls, screen freezes, ten thousand swords hover in mid-air motionless, surroundings fall into dead silence, only snow mountain wind and distant thunder aftershocks echo.

Visual Specs: 8K Ultra HD, cold cyan steel tone, cinematic lighting, volumetric light effects throughout, cinematic film grain, hardcore modern martial arts style, epic scale, realistic style.

prompts.title: 雪崩追逐列车的极限航拍镜头
prompts.prompt: 超广角航拍镜头从数英里高的雪峰之上开始，随即急速俯冲向一列正驶入山口的火车。一场雪崩崩塌并在火车后方倾泻而下，用一道移动的白墙填满山谷。摄像机沿着与铁轨平行的山脊线掠过，随后摆动成一个宽阔的弧线，在火车冲向隧道的同时，让火车和雪崩都保持在画面中。最后以快速爬升结束，展示雪崩正在吞噬隧道口后方的山口。
prompts.prompt_zh: 超广角航拍镜头从数英里高的雪峰之上开始，随即急速俯冲向一列正驶入山口的火车。一场雪崩崩塌并在火车后方倾泻而下，用一道移动的白墙填满山谷。摄像机沿着与铁轨平行的山脊线掠过，随后摆动成一个宽阔的弧线，在火车冲向隧道的同时，让火车和雪崩都保持在画面中。最后以快速爬升结束，展示雪崩正在吞噬隧道口后方的山口。
prompts.prompt_en: Ultra-wide aerial begins miles above snowy peaks, then plunges into a fast dive toward a train entering a mountain pass. An avalanche breaks loose and pours down behind the train, filling the valley with a moving white wall. Camera skims along the ridgeline parallel to the tracks, then swings into a wide arc that keeps both the train and avalanche visible as the train races toward a tunnel. End with a rapid climb revealing the avalanche swallowing the pass behind the tunnel mouth.
prompts.author: @umesh_ai

prompts.title: 雪废墟双雄决战争锋瞬间
prompts.prompt:
15秒的电影级CG短片，场景是覆雪的破败演武场，细雪纷飞。 
【@图1】手持双剑，面容清冷。 
【@图2】持伞，没有打开，神情阴郁。 
【@图2】与【@图1】在雪中对峙，下一刹那战斗爆发。
【@图1】化为残影突刺，剑分三点寒星；
【@图2】只用伞格挡，炸开红白火星。
紧接着把伞尖像枪般刺出，暗影突刺连绵不绝，而剑影灵动，在枪影中穿梭格挡，带起道道冰晶轨迹。
【@图1】踏碎地面，挥动双剑斩出新月般的巨大十字斩剑气，
【@图2】打开伞，高速旋转以伞面迎击 最终镜头慢动作定格：旋转的伞如同利刃与剑尖悍然对撞！
一半是暗色如潮，一半是冰霜汇聚，两股能量形成一个剧烈波动的能量球，将周围一切排开湮灭。
特写两人面孔：【@图1】眼神决绝，额前汗珠成霜；【@图2】战意沸腾，嘴角溢血。
画面在此永恒对峙。 电影级写实渲染，皮肤与布料细节，夸张的动态模糊与速度残影，粒子特效，体积光，史诗构图。

prompts.prompt_en:
A 15-second cinematic CG short film, the scene is a snow-covered ruined drill ground, with fine snow fluttering in the air. 
[@Image1] holds double swords, with a cold and aloof facial expression. 
[@Image2] holds an umbrella, which is not opened, with a gloomy expression.
[@Image2] and [@Image1] confront each other in the snow, and in the next instant, the battle erupts.
[@Image1] turns into an afterimage to thrust, the sword splitting into three cold stars;
[@Image2] uses only the umbrella to block, exploding into red and white sparks.
Immediately thrusting the umbrella tip out like a gun, with continuous shadow thrusts, while the sword shadows are agile, shuttling and blocking within the spear shadows, raising trails of ice crystal trajectories.
[@Image1] stomps and shatters the ground, swinging the double swords to unleash a huge crescent-shaped cross-slash sword energy,
[@Image2] opens the umbrella, spinning at high speed to meet the attack with the umbrella surface. Final shot in slow-motion freeze-frame: the spinning umbrella clashes fiercely with the sword tip like a sharp blade!
Half is darkness like a tide, half is gathered frost, two forces of energy form a violently fluctuating energy ball, pushing away and annihilating everything around.
Close-up of both faces: [@Image1] has resolute eyes, sweat beads on the forehead turning into frost; [@Image2] has boiling fighting spirit, blood overflowing from the corner of the mouth.
The picture freezes in eternal confrontation. Cinematic realistic rendering, skin and fabric details, exaggerated motion blur and speed afterimages, particle effects, volumetric lighting, epic composition.
prompts.author: @liyue_ai

prompts.title: 雷暴炼油厂浪人决战机械巨兽
prompts.prompt: 雷暴期间的一座密集工业炼油厂，金属栈道和管道在火海与蒸汽之上形成了迷宫。被闪烁的警示灯照亮的蒙面浪人，正面对抗着一头巨大的机械巨兽，这头巨兽拥有液压肢体，胸口燃烧着熔炉。镜头紧紧跟随浪人，他在摇晃的栈道上冲刺，建筑结构在怪物的重压下发出呻吟并发生变形。火花和蒸汽不断遮挡画面，怪物的肢体砸穿栏杆和储罐，引发爆炸，使镜头剧烈晃动偏离轴心。快速、摇晃的特写镜头捕捉到浪人从挥舞的金属臂下滑过，并利用链条和缆绳将自己弹射向上。在最后的动作中，镜头以令人眩晕的向上螺旋方式追逐着他爬上怪物的背部，然后切换到一个宽阔但仍在颤抖的镜头，此时他将剑刺入熔炉般的胸口，激起一道冲天的火柱，将他的剪影映衬在暴风雨的天空中。
prompts.prompt_zh: 雷暴期间的一座密集工业炼油厂，金属栈道和管道在火海与蒸汽之上形成了迷宫。被闪烁的警示灯照亮的蒙面浪人，正面对抗着一头巨大的机械巨兽，这头巨兽拥有液压肢体，胸口燃烧着熔炉。镜头紧紧跟随浪人，他在摇晃的栈道上冲刺，建筑结构在怪物的重压下发出呻吟并发生变形。火花和蒸汽不断遮挡画面，怪物的肢体砸穿栏杆和储罐，引发爆炸，使镜头剧烈晃动偏离轴心。快速、摇晃的特写镜头捕捉到浪人从挥舞的金属臂下滑过，并利用链条和缆绳将自己弹射向上。在最后的动作中，镜头以令人眩晕的向上螺旋方式追逐着他爬上怪物的背部，然后切换到一个宽阔但仍在颤抖的镜头，此时他将剑刺入熔炉般的胸口，激起一道冲天的火柱，将他的剪影映衬在暴风雨的天空中。
prompts.prompt_en: A dense industrial refinery during a thunderstorm, metal catwalks and pipes forming a maze above a sea of fire and steam. The masked ronin, lit by flashing warning lights, confronts a colossal mechanical beast with hydraulic limbs and a furnace burning in its chest. The camera barrels after the ronin as he sprints along swaying catwalks, the structure groaning and buckling under the monster’s weight. Sparks and steam constantly obscure the frame as the beast’s limbs smash through railings and tanks, causing explosions that hurl the camera off-axis. Quick, shaky close-ups capture the ronin sliding under swinging metal arms and using chains and cables to slingshot himself upward. In the final movement, the camera chases him in a dizzying upward spiral as he climbs the creature’s back, then cuts to a wide but still trembling shot as he plunges his sword into the furnace chest, sending a pillar of flame skyward that silhouettes his figure against the stormy sky.
prompts.author: @Dheepanratnam

prompts.title: 雷霆水龙与冷艳白发少女
prompts.prompt: 动漫风格，国风2d风格，类似玄机科技的画风白发少女，扎发，冷白皮肤，兼具冷艳系长相，画面有颗粒感。 丹凤眼，闭眼姿态，表情慵懒平静，举止端庄，极致细节，极致厚涂，琉璃质感，流线笔刷。白色披着的头发，身着藏蓝色绒翎长袍，衣服的元素带有少数民族元素，整体有柔光、质感，氛围梦幻朦胧，低饱和度，富有反差故事感。头上簪着一支蓝色翡翠或者水晶垂吊簪，既显温婉又不失贵气，契合角色气质形象。 正脸示人，轻笑一声，语气轻柔又不屑说完＂哦？要抓我？＂ 之后，缓缓抬眼，眼中闪炸开一丝微乎其微的光，瞬间镜头从她脸前拉远，身后瞬间乌云密布电闪雷鸣，一条水龙从天而降咆哮龙吟一声，极速飞至她头顶，霸气盘立上空，眼中红光乍现，震耳的嗡鸣声滚滚响起。

prompts.prompt_en: Anime style, Chinese style 2D, art style similar to Xuanji Technology, white-haired girl, tied hair, cold white skin, cold and glamorous look, grainy texture. Phoenix eyes, eyes closed pose, lazy and calm expression, dignified behavior, extreme detail, extreme impasto, glazed texture, streamline brushstrokes. White hair draped over shoulders, wearing a navy blue velvet feather robe, clothing elements with ethnic minority characteristics, overall soft light, texture, dreamy and hazy atmosphere, low saturation, rich contrast and story sense. Hair pinned with a blue jade or crystal tassel hairpin, appearing gentle yet noble, fitting the character's temperament. Front view, chuckling, soft yet disdainful tone saying "Oh? Want to catch me?", then slowly raising eyes, a trace of microscopic light exploding in the eyes, instantly pulling the camera away from her face, dark clouds and lightning behind her, a water dragon descending from the sky roaring, flying rapidly above her head, domineeringly coiling in the sky, red light flashing in its eyes, deafening humming sound rolling.

prompts.title: 雾夜古堡前的深情恋人
prompts.prompt: 镜头1 (2秒): 从情侣身后拍摄的宽阔摇臂镜头，城堡在雾蒙蒙的夜色中发光。风吹动他们的斗篷。镜头2 (2秒): 缓慢推近特写他们紧握的双手，轻微颤抖。镜头3 (2秒): 快速摇摄至城堡塔楼，阴影在灯火后移动

prompts.author: @airina_xyz

prompts.title: 雾山五行风格燃向水墨武侠激战
prompts.prompt:
镜头1：开场即激战·武器对撞 雾山五行正统国漫画风，锐利硬边水墨线条，高对比红黑色调。
开场无铺垫，两名侠客持武器正面硬撼，刀剑/长兵激烈碰撞，火花与墨色气浪同时爆发。
动作迅猛狠辣，力量感均等，势均力敌，各有千秋。 运镜：低角度高速跟拍，镜头微震，打击特写，雾山五行同款节奏运镜。 

镜头2：高速攻防·招式互换 雾山五行式极致流畅打斗，两人残影叠影，武器交错斩击、格挡、反击，招招致命。一人刚猛爆裂，一人灵动迅捷，风格完全不同却实力相当。墨气流、速度线、动态模糊拉满，打击感炸裂。 
运镜：环绕旋转运镜，快速切镜，丝滑跟焦，强光影对比。 

镜头3：武器连击·近身搏杀 双方放弃距离，贴身武器搏杀，劈、砍、刺、挑、砸连招爆发，击中瞬间爆发冲击波，地面崩裂、烟尘飞溅。两人攻防节奏完美制衡，谁也不压谁，打斗张力拉满。 
运镜：慢动作特写打击瞬间，超广角镜头，镜头震动反馈。 

镜头4：大招对轰·气场平分秋色 两人同时爆发全力，武器灌注墨色罡气/焰光，正面全力对轰，能量冲击波炸开，天地震动。画风狂放，气势史诗，双方气场完全对等，各有千秋，压迫感拉满。 
运镜：史诗级仰视全景，逆光剪影，电影级大景深构图。 

镜头5：僵持定格·势均力敌 战斗骤停，武器相抵，两人对峙而立，气息激荡，烟尘弥漫。眼神冷峻，势均力敌，胜负未分，留白感极强。 
运镜：中景慢推定格，雾山五行高级动画质感。 全局通用强化词（每段必加） 雾山五行动画级别画风，极致凌厉线条，武器激烈打斗，拳拳到肉，打击感超强，势均力敌，各有千秋，高燃打斗。

电影级专业运镜，动态特效拉满，4K超清，中式暴力美学，无文字，动画分镜。

prompts.prompt_en:
Scene 1: Opening Battle · Weapon Collision. Fog Hill of Five Elements orthodox Chinese anime style, sharp hard-edged ink lines, high contrast red and black color scheme. Opening without preamble, two swordsmen holding weapons clash head-on, swords/long weapons collide intensely, sparks and ink-colored airwaves erupt simultaneously. The movements are swift and fierce, the sense of power is equal, evenly matched, each has its own merits. Camera Movement: Low-angle high-speed tracking shot, lens slightly shaking, impact close-up, Fog Hill of Five Elements style rhythm camera movement.

Scene 2: High-speed Offense and Defense · Move Exchange. Fog Hill of Five Elements style ultimate fluent fighting, two people with afterimages and overlapping shadows, weapons staggered slashing, parrying, counterattacking, every move is fatal. One person is vigorous and explosive, one person is agile and swift, styles are completely different but strength is equal. Ink flow, speed lines, dynamic blur maxed out, impact sense explosive. Camera Movement: Surrounding rotating shot, quick cut, silky follow focus, strong light and shadow contrast.

Scene 3: Weapon Combo · Close-quarters Combat. Both sides give up distance, close-quarters weapon combat, chop, slash, stab, pick, smash combo burst, shockwave erupts at the moment of impact, ground cracks, dust splashes. Both sides' offense and defense rhythm perfectly balanced, neither suppresses the other, combat tension maxed out. Camera Movement: Slow-motion close-up of impact moment, ultra-wide angle lens, lens vibration feedback.

Scene 4: Ultimate Move Clash · Aura Equally Matched. Both sides erupt with full power simultaneously, weapons infused with ink-colored Gang Qi/flame light, head-on full power clash, energy shockwave explodes, heaven and earth shake. Painting style wild, momentum epic, both sides' aura completely equal, each has its own merits, oppression sense maxed out. Scene 5: Stalemate Freeze · Evenly Matched. Battle stops abruptly, weapons against each other, two people stand in confrontation, breath surging, dust permeating. Eyes cold and stern, evenly matched, victory undecided, strong sense of negative space. Camera Movement: Medium shot slow push freeze, Fog Hill of Five Elements high-level animation texture. prompts.title: 霓虹夜幕下的韩式嘻哈劲爆舞台
prompts.prompt: 在夜晚霓虹闪烁的都市屋顶舞台上，动画化一位 K-hip-hop 艺人，呈现一场充满活力的说唱表演。角色自信地站在画面中央，头部有节奏地摆动，手势富有表现力，与快速的韩语说唱节奏紧密同步。运用动态多角度电影摄影：首先以广角摇臂镜头展现城市天际线和飘渺的薄雾，然后切换到平滑的推轨中景镜头，捕捉说唱歌手吐出快速的歌词，口型清晰，眼神专注。接着切换到低角度侧拍，捕捉霓虹屏幕前戏剧性的剪影，衣物随风飘动。随后是围绕面部的紧凑手持特写，强调魅力、微妙的坏笑和富有攻击性的表达。在高潮说唱段落中，加入快速环绕镜头，霓虹反射在镜头上划过。包括一个快速的无人机俯拍镜头，展示说唱歌手充满力量的脚步，然后过渡到慢动作正面镜头，突出带有胸部撞击和手腕轻弹的强烈歌词重音。最后以一个英雄式中远景镜头结束，说唱歌手完成最后一句歌词，自信地向前迈步，在 K-hip-hop 舞台灯光的脉动下，坚定不移地凝视镜头。16:9 比例，宽幅电影场景，电影色彩。

prompts.prompt_en: Animate a K-hip-hop artist on a neon-lit urban rooftop stage at night, presenting a dynamic rap performance. The character stands confidently in the center of the frame, head bobbing rhythmically, with expressive hand gestures, tightly synchronized with the fast Korean rap rhythm. Use dynamic multi-angle cinematography: First, a wide-angle crane shot reveals the city skyline and ethereal mist, then switch to a smooth tracking medium shot capturing the rapper spitting fast lyrics, with clear lip-syncing and focused eyes. Next, switch to a low-angle side shot capturing a dramatic silhouette against neon screens, with clothes fluttering in the wind. Following this is a tight handheld close-up orbiting the face, emphasizing charisma, a subtle smirk, and aggressive expression. During the climax rap section, add a rapid orbit shot, with neon reflections flaring across the lens. Include a fast drone top-down shot showing the rapper's powerful footwork, then transition to a slow-motion frontal shot highlighting intense lyric accents with chest bumps and wrist flicks. Finally, end with a heroic medium-long shot as the rapper finishes the last line, stepping forward confidently, gazing steadfastly at the camera under the pulsing K-hip-hop stage lights. 16:9 aspect ratio, widescreen cinematic scene, cinematic colors.

prompts.title: 霓虹暴雨夜极速穿梭
prompts.prompt: 【电影风格】：好莱坞科幻大片（Hollywood Sci-Fi Blockbuster），赛博朋克美学（Cyberpunk Aesthetics），高对比度霓虹光影，IMAX电影质感，史诗级配乐感。 【视频时长】：10秒 【分镜脚本】： [00:00-00:04] 镜头1：极具纵深感的广角跟拍（Wide Angle Tracking Shot）。 画面：一座未来主义的超级城市（Megacity）峡谷，夜幕降临，还在下雨。 动作：一辆流线型的反重力飞行器（Anti-gravity Vehicle）以极高速度在摩天大楼之间穿梭。 环境细节（核心测试点）：数不清的巨大全息广告牌（Holographic Ads）在闪烁，霓虹灯光极其复杂地反射在湿滑的玻璃幕墙和飞行器表面。飞行器尾部拉出长长的蓝色光流轨迹（Light Trails）。 [00:04-00:07] 镜头2：紧张的驾驶舱视角或紧凑跟拍（Tight Action Shot / Cockpit View）。 动作：飞行器为了躲避障碍物，做了一个急转弯侧滑动作。 细节：镜头非常贴近飞行器，能看到机身擦过一栋大楼边缘时激起的电火花（Sparks）和水雾。雨水密集地打在镜头前，被高速气流吹散。画面充满速度带来的震动感（Camera Shake）。 [00:07-00:10] 镜头3：宏大的拉升镜头（Epic Pull-back / Crane Shot）。 动作：飞行器冲出狭窄的建筑群，飞向一片开阔的城市中心广场。 画面：视野突然开阔，展现出令人窒息的巨型城市全景。飞行器冲破了一层巨大的低空云雾，云雾因气流而翻滚涌动（Volumetric Clouds & Turbulence）。巨大的镜头光晕（Lens Flare）横跨画面。 【技术参数】：8k超高清，电影级调色（青橙色调 Teal & Orange），极高的动态范围（HDR），复杂的粒子特效渲染。

prompts.prompt_en: 【Movie Style】: Hollywood Sci-Fi Blockbuster, Cyberpunk Aesthetics, High Contrast Neon Light & Shadow, IMAX Movie Texture, Epic Score Feeling. 【Video Duration】: 10 seconds 【Storyboard Script】: [00:00-00:04] Shot 1: Wide Angle Tracking Shot with extreme depth of field. Visual: A futuristic Megacity canyon, night has fallen, it is raining. Action: A streamlined Anti-gravity Vehicle shuttles between skyscrapers at extremely high speed. Environmental Details (Core Test Point): Countless huge Holographic Ads are flickering, neon lights reflect extremely complexly on the wet glass curtain walls and the surface of the vehicle. The tail of the vehicle pulls out long blue Light Trails. [00:04-00:07] Shot 2: Tense Cockpit View or Tight Action Shot. Action: The vehicle makes a sharp turn and side-slip maneuver to avoid obstacles. Details: The camera is very close to the vehicle, able to see Sparks and water spray kicked up when the fuselage scrapes past the edge of a building. Rain hits densely in front of the lens, blown away by the high-speed airflow. The picture is full of Camera Shake caused by speed. [00:07-00:10] Shot 3: Epic Pull-back / Crane Shot. Action: The vehicle rushes out of the narrow building cluster and flies towards an open city center plaza. Visual: The field of view suddenly opens up, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the giant city. The vehicle breaks through a huge layer of low-altitude clouds and fog, the clouds and fog tumbling and surging due to airflow (Volumetric Clouds & Turbulence). A huge Lens Flare spans the picture. 【Technical Parameters】: 8k Ultra HD, Cinematic Color Grading (Teal & Orange), Extremely High Dynamic Range (HDR), Complex Particle Effects Rendering.

prompts.title: 霓虹舞台K女团舞蹈特写
prompts.prompt:
10秒K-pop女团MV卡点镜头，8个快切镜头。0-1秒：低机位仰拍，舞台地面四个女团成员以三角阵型站立，灯光随节拍闪，舞台"像能听见震动"，全员同时吸气准备；2-3秒：主唱中心位特写，嘴角呼吸与眼
  神抓镜头，轻微头发飘动，背景光从冷蓝转粉紫；4-5秒：群舞中景，动作爆发，脚步声开始进来，全员整齐划一甩发转身，动作行云流水；6-7秒：手部特写，手势带动衣料声和饰品轻响，戒指在灯光下闪烁；8-9秒：双人侧面，
  动作更复杂，脚步更密，镜头跟动作切，两人的手部配合精准卡点；10秒：排阵近景定格0.5秒，最后一声脚步/砸点收尾。全局：霓虹高饱和冷暖对比，浅景深突出动作，禁止文字logo水印。

prompts.prompt_en: 10-second K-pop girl group MV beat-sync shot, 8 fast cut shots. 0-1 second: low-angle shot looking up, four girl group members standing in a triangular formation on the stage floor, lights flashing with the beat, the stage "feels like it can hear the vibration", all members inhale simultaneously to prepare; 2-3 seconds: close-up of the main vocalist in the center position, breathing at the corner of the mouth and eyes capturing the lens, slight hair movement, background light shifting from cold blue to pink-purple; 4-5 seconds: medium shot of group dance, explosive movements, footstep sounds start to come in, all members flick hair and turn in unison, movements are fluid like flowing water; 6-7 seconds: close-up of hands, hand gestures causing the sound of fabric and soft sounds of accessories, rings sparkling under the lights; 8-9 seconds: two-person side profile, movements are more complex, footsteps are denser, camera cuts following the movements, hand coordination between the two is precisely on beat; 10 seconds: close-up freeze frame of the formation for 0.5 seconds, ending with the final sound of a footstep/impact point. Global: neon high saturation warm and cool contrast, shallow depth of field to highlight movements, no text, logos, or watermarks.

prompts.title: 霓虹雨夜中极速穿梭的未来飞车
prompts.prompt: 【Movie Style】: 好莱坞科幻大片，赛博朋克美学，高对比度霓虹光影，IMAX 电影质感，史诗级配乐感。 【Video Duration】: 10秒 【Storyboard Script】: [00:00-00:04] 镜头 1：大角度跟拍镜头，具有极深的景深。画面：未来的超级城市峡谷，夜幕降临，正在下雨。动作：一辆流线型反重力飞行器在摩天大楼之间极速穿梭。环境细节（核心测试点）：无数巨大的全息广告在闪烁，霓虹灯光在潮湿的玻璃幕墙和飞行器表面产生极其复杂的反射。飞行器尾部拖出长长的蓝色光尾。[00:04-00:07] 镜头 2：紧张的驾驶舱视角或紧凑的动作镜头。动作：飞行器急转弯并侧滑以避开障碍物。细节：镜头非常靠近飞行器，能看到机身擦过建筑边缘时激起的火花和水花。雨水密集地打在镜头前，被高速气流吹散。画面充满了因速度造成的镜头晃动。[00:07-00:10] 镜头 3：史诗级拉镜头 / 摇臂镜头。动作：飞行器冲出狭窄的建筑群，飞向开阔的市中心广场。画面：视野突然开阔，展现出这座巨型城市令人惊叹的全景。飞行器冲破巨大的低空云雾层，云雾因气流而翻滚涌动（体积云与湍流）。巨大的镜头光晕横跨画面。 【Technical Parameters】: 8k 超高清，电影级调色（青橙色调），极高动态范围 (HDR)，复杂粒子特效渲染。

prompts.prompt_en: 【Movie Style】: Hollywood Sci-Fi Blockbuster, Cyberpunk Aesthetics, High Contrast Neon Light & Shadow, IMAX Movie Texture, Epic Score Feeling. 【Video Duration】: 10 seconds 【Storyboard Script】: [00:00-00:04] Shot 1: Wide Angle Tracking Shot with extreme depth of field. Visual: A futuristic Megacity canyon, night has fallen, it is raining. Action: A streamlined Anti-gravity Vehicle shuttles between skyscrapers at extremely high speed. Environmental Details (Core Test Point): Countless huge Holographic Ads are flickering, neon lights reflect extremely complexly on the wet glass curtain walls and the surface of the vehicle. The tail of the vehicle pulls out long blue Light Trails. [00:04-00:07] Shot 2: Tense Cockpit View or Tight Action Shot. Action: The vehicle makes a sharp turn and side-slip maneuver to avoid obstacles. Details: The camera is very close to the vehicle, able to see Sparks and water spray kicked up when the fuselage scrapes past the edge of a building. Rain hits densely in front of the lens, blown away by the high-speed airflow. The picture is full of Camera Shake caused by speed. [00:07-00:10] Shot 3: Epic Pull-back / Crane Shot. Action: The vehicle rushes out of the narrow building cluster and flies towards an open city center plaza. Visual: The field of view suddenly opens up, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the giant city. The vehicle breaks through a huge layer of low-altitude clouds and fog, the clouds and fog tumbling and surging due to airflow (Volumetric Clouds & Turbulence). A huge Lens Flare spans the picture. 【Technical Parameters】: 8k Ultra HD, Cinematic Color Grading (Teal & Orange), Extremely High Dynamic Range (HDR), Complex Particle Effects Rendering.

prompts.title: 霓虹颜料飞溅的疯狂艺术创作瞬间
prompts.prompt: 特写她的双手紧握画笔，指关节发白，颜料顺着她的手腕滴落。浅景深，她身后的空白画布呈现出柔和的白色模糊。她呼出一口气。[切换] 从她身后拍摄的广角镜头，24毫米低角度。她向后挥动手臂并将颜料猛掷向画布。霓虹色彩在白色表面炸裂开来，飞溅到墙壁和地板上。投掷的力量使她向前迈了一步。[切换] 缓慢推镜头，50毫米，紧凑聚焦于画布。颜料旋转并变形为逼真的山景。随着镜头缓慢拉近，细节变得清晰。微弱的背景嗡嗡声逐渐增强。[切换] 快速向左甩镜头至油漆桶上的猫。35毫米，平视角度。猫直勾勾地盯着镜头。眨眼一次。打哈欠。[切换] 中景镜头，40毫米。她转向镜头并耸耸肩。定格画面。

prompts.prompt_en: Close-up on her hands gripping the paintbrush, knuckles white, paint dripping down her wrist. Shallow depth of field, the blank canvas a soft white blur behind her. She exhales. [cut] Wide shot from behind her, 24mm low angle. She winds back and hurls paint at the canvas. Neon colours explode across the white surface, splattering the walls and floor. The force of the throw carries her forward a step. [cut] Slow push-in, 50mm, tight on the canvas. The paint swirls and morphs into a photorealistic mountain landscape. Detail sharpens as the camera creeps closer. Faint ambient hum builds. [cut] Quick whip pan left to the cat on the paint can. 35mm, eye level. The cat stares directly into camera. Blinks once. Yawns. [cut] Medium shot, 40mm. She turns to camera and shrugs. Freeze frame.

prompts.title: 霨雨霓虹夜副驾的温柔凝视
prompts.prompt: 真人写实风格，竖屏，第一人称驾驶座视角。夜晚车内，挡风玻璃上雨滴滑落，外面霓虹灯光模糊成光晕。副驾驶座上坐着一位气质优雅的年轻亚洲女性，栗色波浪长发，穿着米色针织开衫和黑色吊带，精致的锁骨若隐若现。动作描述：她先是看着窗外出神，然后慢慢转头看向镜头，嘴角上扬带着温柔的笑意轻声说：在想什么呢，这么认真地看着我。她伸手撩了撩头发，另一只手自然地放在腿上。镜头缓缓下移，她修长的双腿交叠，脱下一只黑色细跟高跟鞋，赤脚轻轻晃动。车内氛围暧昧温馨，光影层次丰富，电影级画质。
prompts.prompt_zh: 真人写实风格，竖屏，第一人称驾驶座视角。夜晚车内，挡风玻璃上雨滴滑落，外面霓虹灯光模糊成光晕。副驾驶座上坐着一位气质优雅的年轻亚洲女性，栗色波浪长发，穿着米色针织开衫和黑色吊带，精致的锁骨若隐若现。动作描述：她先是看着窗外出神，然后慢慢转头看向镜头，嘴角上扬带着温柔的笑意轻声说：在想什么呢，这么认真地看着我。她伸手撩了撩头发，另一只手自然地放在腿上。镜头缓缓下移，她修长的双腿交叠，脱下一只黑色细跟高跟鞋，赤脚轻轻晃动。车内氛围暧昧温馨，光影层次丰富，电影级画质。
prompts.prompt_en: Realistic style, vertical screen, first-person perspective from the driver's seat. Inside the car at night, raindrops sliding down the windshield, neon lights outside blurred into halos. A young Asian woman with elegant temperament sitting in the passenger seat, chestnut wavy long hair, wearing a beige knitted cardigan and a black camisole, exquisite collarbones faintly visible. Action description: She is first looking out the window in a trance, then slowly turns her head to look at the lens, lips curled up with a gentle smile, whispering: What are you thinking about, looking at me so seriously. She reaches out to stroke her hair, the other hand naturally resting on her leg. The camera slowly pans down, her slender legs are crossed, taking off one black stiletto high heel, barefoot gently swaying. The atmosphere inside the car is ambiguous and warm, rich layers of light and shadow, cinematic image quality.

prompts.title: 霸总壁咚下的极致甜虐拉扯
prompts.prompt:
8K超高清真人实拍，超高分辨率，电影质感，强烈空间立体感，院线级光影，细腻肤质，表情丰富自然生动，情绪层次极强。
 
人物服饰
 
男主：【@图2】高级定制黑色西装，冷峻禁欲，气场压迫。
女主【@图1】：修身吊带连衣裙/精致小香风套装，长发微乱，柔弱又倔强。
 
剧情+动作+表情变化
 
霸总强势壁咚，单手撑墙，步步紧逼，下颌线紧绷，眼神从冰冷到隐忍泛红。
女主【@图1】步步后退，眼眶含泪，嘴唇轻颤，从倔强反抗到委屈泛红，鼻尖发酸。
两人鼻尖相对，呼吸交缠，拉扯感拉满。
霸总指尖轻捏女主【@图1】下巴，眼神偏执又深情，喉结滚动。
女主【@图1】睫毛颤抖，眼泪欲落不落，又疼又爱。
 
电影级运镜分镜
 
近景推镜 → 眼部特写慢镜 → 环绕运镜 → 仰拍特写 → 肩颈特写，丝滑转场。
 
狗血台词
 
霸总：你闹够没有？全世界，我只对你破例。
女主【@图1】：我不要你的破例，我要你的真心！
霸总：我的心早就给你了，你还要我怎样？
女主【@图1】：那你为什么非要用伤害来证明爱我！
霸总：因为我怕一松手，你就永远消失在我世界里。
 
大师级杰作，甜虐狗血上头，电影即视感，每一帧都是海报。，使用写实风的画面风格生成素材，使用专业权威风格的数字人形象，使用专业权威风格的音色

prompts.prompt_en:
8K ultra-high-definition live-action footage, ultra-high resolution, cinematic texture, strong spatial three-dimensionality, theatrical-level lighting and shadow, delicate skin texture, rich, natural and vivid expressions, extremely strong emotional layers.

Character Costume

Male Lead: [@Image 2] High-end custom black suit, cold and ascetic, oppressive aura.
Female Lead [@Image 1]: Slim-fit spaghetti strap dress / exquisite Chanel-style suit, slightly messy long hair, fragile yet stubborn.

Plot + Action + Expression Changes

Domineering CEO forcefully wall-slams, single hand supporting the wall, pressing forward step by step, jawline tight, eyes changing from cold to forbearing and red.
Female Lead [@Image 1] retreats step by step, tears in eyes, lips trembling slightly, changing from stubborn resistance to aggrieved redness, nose tingling.
Two people's nose tips facing each other, breaths intertwining, tension maximized.
CEO's fingertips gently pinch Female Lead's [@Image 1] chin, eyes obsessive yet affectionate, Adam's apple bobbing.
Female Lead [@Image 1] eyelashes trembling, tears hanging but not falling, painful yet loving.

Cinematic Camera Movement and Storyboard

Close-up push-in -> Eye close-up slow motion -> Orbit shot -> Low-angle close-up -> Shoulder and neck close-up, silky transition.

Melodramatic Lines

CEO: Have you made enough noise? In the whole world, I only make exceptions for you.
Female Lead [@Image 1]: I don't want your exception, I want your true heart!
CEO: My heart was given to you long ago, what more do you want from me?
Female Lead [@Image 1]: Then why must you use hurt to prove you love me!
CEO: Because I'm afraid that if I let go, you will disappear from my world forever.

Masterpiece, sweet and angsty melodrama addictive, cinematic visual sense, every frame is a poster. Generate material using realistic style, use professional authoritative style digital human image, use professional authoritative style timbre.

prompts.prompt_en:
Character face reference [Figure 1]
8K ultra-high definition real-life footage, ultra-high resolution, cinematic texture, strong spatial three-dimensional sense, theatrical-level lighting and shadow, delicate skin texture, rich natural and vivid expressions, extremely strong emotional layers.

Character clothing

Male lead: High-end custom black suit, white shirt collar slightly open, cold and ascetic, oppressive aura.
Female lead [Figure 1]: Slim spaghetti strap dress / exquisite Chanel-style suit, long hair slightly messy, fragile yet stubborn.

Plot + Action + Expression changes

CEO forcefully wall slams, single hand supporting the wall, pressing closer step by step, jawline tight, eyes going from cold to forbearing and reddening.
Female lead [Figure 1] steps back step by step, eyes full of tears, lips trembling slightly, going from stubborn resistance to aggrieved redness, nose tingling.
The two people's nose tips are touching, breaths intertwining, tension maxed out.
CEO's fingertips lightly pinch female lead's [Figure 1] chin, eyes obsessive yet affectionate, Adam's apple bobbing.
Female lead [Figure 1] eyelashes trembling, tears about to fall but not falling, pain and love intertwined.

Cinematic camera movement breakdown

Close-up push shot -> Eye close-up slow motion -> Orbit shot -> Low angle close-up -> Shoulder and neck close-up, silky transition.

Melodramatic lines

CEO: Have you made enough noise? In the whole world, I only make exceptions for you.
Female lead [Figure 1]: I don't want your exceptions, I want your true heart!
CEO: My heart was given to you long ago, what more do you want from me?
Female lead [Figure 1]: Then why do you have to use hurt to prove you love me!
CEO: Because I am afraid that if I let go, you will disappear from my world forever.

Masterpiece, sweet and cruel melodrama addictive, cinematic visual sense, every frame is a poster, use realistic style to generate material, use professional authoritative style digital human image, use professional authoritative style timbre.

prompts.title: 霸气女主退婚打脸名场面
prompts.prompt: 人物 • 女主（林晚）：24岁，清冷干练，看似普通，实则深藏不露，气场全开。 • 男二（赵天宇）：25岁，嚣张富二代，看不起女主，上门退婚羞辱。 • 女二（闺蜜）：助攻，负责补刀爆点。 场景 现代轻奢客厅，简单高级，不浮夸。 【0-3秒｜镜1】 • 画面：男二甩手把订婚戒指扔在桌上，居高临下。 • 台词（赵天宇，轻蔑）： “林晚，这婚我退定了！你配不上我们赵家。” 【3-7秒｜镜2】 • 画面：女主垂眸冷笑，缓缓抬眼，眼神变冷。 • 台词（林晚，平静）： “退婚可以。把你们家三年来，靠我项目赚的三个亿，先还回来。” 【7-10秒｜镜3】 • 画面：男二脸色骤变，震惊后退。 • 台词（赵天宇，慌）： “你……你怎么知道？！” 【10-12秒｜镜4】 • 画面：闺蜜推门而入，扔出一份合作文件。 • 台词（闺蜜，霸气）： “她是你们总公司，隐藏的最大投资方！” 【12-15秒｜镜5｜爆点爽镜】 • 画面：女主拿起戒指，随手丢进垃圾桶。 • 台词（林晚，冷艳收尾）： “现在，是我，不要你。” • 定格：女主侧颜杀。
prompts.prompt_zh: 人物 • 女主（林晚）：24岁，清冷干练，看似普通，实则深藏不露，气场全开。 • 男二（赵天宇）：25岁，嚣张富二代，看不起女主，上门退婚羞辱。 • 女二（闺蜜）：助攻，负责补刀爆点。 场景 现代轻奢客厅，简单高级，不浮夸。 【0-3秒｜镜1】 • 画面：男二甩手把订婚戒指扔在桌上，居高临下。 • 台词（赵天宇，轻蔑）： “林晚，这婚我退定了！你配不上我们赵家。” 【3-7秒｜镜2】 • 画面：女主垂眸冷笑，缓缓抬眼，眼神变冷。 • 台词（林晚，平静）： “退婚可以。把你们家三年来，靠我项目赚的三个亿，先还回来。” 【7-10秒｜镜3】 • 画面：男二脸色骤变，震惊后退。 • 台词（赵天宇，慌）： “你……你怎么知道？！” 【10-12秒｜镜4】 • 画面：闺蜜推门而入，扔出一份合作文件。 • 台词（闺蜜，霸气）： “她是你们总公司，隐藏的最大投资方！” 【12-15秒｜镜5｜爆点爽镜】 • 画面：女主拿起戒指，随手丢进垃圾桶。 • 台词（林晚，冷艳收尾）： “现在，是我，不要你。” • 定格：女主侧颜杀。
prompts.prompt_en:
Characters • Female Lead (Lin Wan): 24 years old, cool and capable, seemingly ordinary, actually deeply hidden, full of aura. • Male Second Lead (Zhao Tianyu): 25 years old, arrogant rich second generation, looks down on the female lead, comes to the door to break off the engagement and humiliate her. • Female Second Lead (Bestie): Assist, responsible for delivering the final critical blow.
Scene Modern light luxury living room, simple and high-end, not flashy.
[0-3s | Shot 1] • Visual: Male Second Lead swings his hand and throws the engagement ring on the table, condescending. • Dialogue (Zhao Tianyu, disdainful): "Lin Wan, I am determined to break off this engagement! You are not worthy of our Zhao family."
[3-7s | Shot 2] • Visual: Female Lead lowers her eyes and sneers, slowly raises her eyes, her gaze turning cold. • Dialogue (Lin Wan, calm): "Breaking off the engagement is fine. First, return the 300 million your family earned from my projects over the past three years."
[7-10s | Shot 3] • Visual: Male Second Lead's face changes suddenly, shocked and stepping back. • Dialogue (Zhao Tianyu, panicked): "You... how do you know?!"
[10-12s | Shot 4] • Visual: Bestie pushes open the door and enters, throwing out a cooperation document. • Dialogue (Bestie, domineering): "She is the largest hidden investor in your headquarters!"
[12-15s | Shot 5 | Climax Shot] • Visual: Female Lead picks up the ring and casually throws it into the trash can. • Dialogue (Lin Wan, cold and glamorous ending): "Now, it is I who doesn't want you." • Freeze Frame: Female Lead's stunning side profile.

prompts.title: 静止雕像与时光飞逝的强烈对比
prompts.prompt: 保持中心人物完全静止不动，像雕像一样冻结。仅对周围背景和人物进行动画处理，使用快节奏的移动和强烈的动态模糊，在静止主体周围营造出动态延时摄影效果。摄像机必须保持完全固定

prompts.title: 韩立王林高燃史诗对决
prompts.prompt:
中国仙侠动画电影风格，超精细3D CG渲染，15秒高燃对决镜头，金青双色调强烈对比。0-3秒：大远景，混沌虚空中两道流光从画面两侧极速对冲——左侧金光中隐约可见一名身着青灰色道袍的中年修士，面容沉静如水，手持一柄
  绿小剑，正是韩立；右侧青黑色煞气中一名白发黑袍的清瘦男子负手而立，眼眸深邃如古井，周身萦绕灭世之气，正是王林，两人遥遥对视，虚空因双方气场碰撞而龟裂，伴随低沉的雷鸣。4-8秒：韩立掐诀催动青竹蜂云剑，七十
  二柄飞剑化为漫天剑雨如金色暴风般席卷而去；王林右手一指，身后凝聚出一只遮天蔽日的青色巨手虚影，巨手迎着剑雨一掌拍下，剑气与掌力碰撞的瞬间爆发出金青双色的能量洪流，冲击波向四面扩散撕裂虚空，伴随金属碰撞
  与空间破碎声。9-12秒：定格慢放，韩立身后浮现金色万佛虚影，双目金光大盛，万剑归宗凝聚为一道百丈金色剑光直劈而下；王林双眸中闪过一抹疯狂，口中低吼"天地若不容我，我便逆了这天！"，右手高举，一颗旋转的黑色
  球在掌心凝聚，散发出扭曲空间的毁灭气息，两股终极之力正面撞击，时间仿佛静止。13-15秒：能量大爆炸，画面白光吞噬一切后缓缓消散，烟尘中两个身影背对背伫立在碎裂的虚空中，衣袍残破，各自喘息，韩立淡淡开口"阁
  的逆天之术，韩某佩服"，王林嘴角浮现一丝笑意，音效收束为虚空碎片坠落的清脆声与渐弱风声。

prompts.prompt_en: Chinese Xianxia animation movie style, ultra-fine 3D CG rendering, 15-second high-energy duel shot, strong contrast between gold and cyan tones. 0-3 seconds: Extreme long shot, in the chaotic void two stream of lights rush towards each other from both sides of the screen at extreme speed — in the left golden light, vaguely visible is a middle-aged cultivator wearing a cyan-grey Taoist robe, face calm as water, holding a small green sword, it is Han Li; in the right cyan-black evil aura, a thin white-haired man in a black robe stands with hands behind his back, eyes deep as ancient wells, surrounded by world-destroying aura, it is Wang Lin, the two look at each other from afar, the void cracks due to the collision of their auras, accompanied by low thunder. 4-8 seconds: Han Li makes hand seals to activate the Green Bamboo Bee Cloud Swords, seventy-two flying swords turn into a sky-filling sword rain sweeping away like a golden storm; Wang Lin points with his right hand, a cyan giant hand phantom covering the sky and sun condenses behind him, the giant hand slaps down facing the sword rain, at the moment sword energy and palm force collide a gold and cyan dual-colored energy torrent erupts, shockwaves spread in all directions tearing the void, accompanied by metal collision and space shattering sounds. 9-12 seconds: Freeze frame slow motion, behind Han Li a golden ten thousand Buddha phantom appears, eyes shining with golden light, ten thousand swords return to origin condensing into a hundred-zhang golden sword light striking straight down; a flash of madness appears in Wang Lin's eyes, he growls low "If heaven does not tolerate me, I will defy this heaven!", right hand raised high, a rotating black sphere condenses in the palm, emitting a world-destroying aura that distorts space, two ultimate forces collide head-on, time seems to stand still. 13-15 seconds: Huge energy explosion, after white light swallows everything on screen it slowly dissipates, in the smoke and dust two figures stand back-to-back in the shattered void, robes tattered, each panting, Han Li says faintly "I, Han, admire your heaven-defying art", a smile appears on the corner of Wang Lin's mouth, sound effects conclude with the crisp sound of void fragments falling and fading wind sounds.
prompts.author: @songguoxiansen

prompts.title: 顶级国风动漫奇幻视觉盛宴
prompts.prompt: 顶级国风动漫奇幻CG，电影级东方玄幻大片质感，超高饱和度，金墨交融，超现实主义视觉奇观，瑰丽震撼，神圣压迫感强。16:9，15秒，画面流畅丝滑，镜头高级，动作清晰，特效宏大，视觉冲击极强。  角色： 白衣清冷仙人，气质孤绝，眼神淡漠如水，手持白玉长笔，立于苍茫云海之巅的巨型白玉石台中央，仿佛执掌天道法则。  第一镜： 微距特写角色骨节分明的手腕与修长手指，白玉长笔在掌中旋转，发出清越破空鸣响。角色眼神冷漠，凌空挥毫，笔锋沙沙作响。浓黑墨迹脱笔而出，瞬间燃烧化为耀眼金芒，连续写出数十个巨大立体狂草汉字——“关注我的都发财”。每个字都笔走龙蛇，锋芒毕露，霸道狂傲。镜头慢动作突出笔锋轨迹、墨转金光、狂草成型。  第二镜： 镜头拉至全景，角色广袖轻挥，笔尖轻点虚空。所有金色狂草汉字瞬间爆亮，极速分裂复制，化作万千金字冲天升空。无数金字在天穹之间高速交错穿梭，排布严整，形成震撼字海异象。画面伴随高频金属摩擦声、神圣低吟声与强能量轰鸣，视觉爆点拉满。  第三镜： 低视角极速环绕，万千金字高速旋转，编织成覆盖天地的巨大球形天道字阵，将目标彻底笼罩。法阵缓缓自转，所有文字笔画化作无数锐利金色剑气。角色冷冷吐出一个字：“灭。”刹那间字阵爆发，万道金光贯穿天地，笔画剑气如剑雨狂绞，目标在天道法则与万剑切割中崩碎毁灭，空间震颤扭曲，巨响轰鸣。  第四镜： 仰拍大远景，金光逐渐平息，天道字阵完成绞杀后化作万丈金字洪流，从天穹倒灌回角色袖中。空中飘落残金光斑、墨滴与云雾余辉。白玉长笔化作流光消散。角色负手而立，白衣猎猎，站在白玉石台中央俯瞰云海，清冷孤绝，神性与压迫感拉满，画面震撼收尾。  要求： 整体结构清晰，起势神圣，爆发华丽，绞杀震撼，收束高贵。突出“写字成法、万字成阵、天道绞杀、金光归袖”的核心主线。画面必须有顶级国风动漫奇幻CG质感，镜头丝滑高级，特效宏大但主体清晰。
